subject: Kate Brown wants to release 1,000+ criminals
body:
All while crime runs rampant in Portland. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/e710a0583726/kate-brown-wants-to-release-1000-criminals?e=7e91be8cad)

| | Dear Friend,

By now, you may have heard about Kate Brown's _**radical proposal to release over a thousand prisoners prematurely.**_ Victims and their families deserve better than to be blindsided by their governor, and it's absolutely ridiculous that we're even having this conversation while crime has skyrocketed in Portland and across the state.

As governor, I will make sure that victims and their families are heard. We will institute a crime reduction task force to finally address the public safety crises in our communities. And we will once again stand with our brave law enforcement officers who keep us safe every single day.

If you agree with my vision for a safe and just Oregon, will you chip in $10, $25, $50, or whatever you can afford to our campaign?

---
| [Donate Today!](https://jessicagomezforgovernor.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=38928f39f4567607835360484&id=aca23fd4eb&e=7e91be8cad "Donate Today!")
---
| We know that the way to create a safer Oregon isn't by prematurely releasing over a thousand prisoners. Instead, we have to implement common sense policies that will end the violence and lawlessness in Portland and across the state.

I hope I can count on your support.

Jessica Gomez
Republican for Governor

body:

| | Hi Friends,

I am very grateful for all of your support helping me replace Nancy Mace!

The agenda for this Tuesday night's 2/8/22 volunteers meeting is as follows:

Briefing.
Calendar Scrub.
Highlight Important events especially 19 Feb.
Team actions at next weekend event and link up point to get your cap, palm cards and supporters sign-up sheets.
Set Campaign Team Training for March.

**The new Zoom link to join at 7:00 p.m. is **
[https://zoom.us/j/97756360462?pwd=Y1JIeTZmWmIrTjYyeGhNbllsQ2hmdz09](https://centurionforcongress.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=986079a9d70593df507cfab3a&id=095955ab71&e=bb02dd73bf)
Upcoming events include:

2/10 -- Walterboro GOP, 7 pm
2/17 -- Charleston St. Andrews Rotary, 12:30 pm
2/17 -- Moncks Corner VFW 10256 Town Hall, 6 pm
2/19 -- Summerville VFW 3433 Town Hall & Fundraiser, 6 pm (don't miss it!)
2/21 -- Edisto GOP, 6 pm
2/23 -- Summerville Parents Group, 7 pm
2/24 \-- Bluffton Sun City GOP, 7 pm

DAILY!! DAILY!!**

Thank you all!
Ingrid Centurion

interview below and_[** _watch the full video here_** _._](http://links.mikeforwisconsin.com/u/click?_t=958424c79255456c93ed32354ec81cfd&_m=e38d4e719cf44c418c43121c09c98d03&_e=Yj8z6_NZXnzYxR5ARFIIPIBlLbswm8WuFc7cVJWt5FjmbObt6oMvbSSkxebhn0hsFtUiq4d7TekmOR7-wVjKktd54KvnwIFBOzJzeFHvLdTNfVUnnQ4Z8Mju4rac_-mrDzQeA96eYx3NM9W0Q-Ilnyw9wbxxxol8TiJKDb3QDzssnuw7UTeFbo_7EkPHIiXOj_MCGHxUkfOydFQ4YhjkFeeDG4RyW3mEjsK8A-sCYu8EGsrsyL_b-LKIFyMExBrddDgA5COjhmmirgTWoiDApmf8mFZdYf1khk5c01ezXgnaYA5ONxAlMNcKRCssD_aOoR4pD_Xb8kl1lr-01-zleA6lMC6N1YJdiWM4bzgFUng_KqmPHtYAxnBVlWAWFYkELDm4aIKWgDctt6pSp-_maCz9GqSBaYtdKuHxj_XZej7JMT8Z9tTuGmWAAgvJzkJd) **ON COVID-19 ORIGINS** [](http://links.mikeforwisconsin.com/u/click?_t=958424c79255456c93ed32354ec81cfd&_m=e38d4e719cf44c418c43121c09c98d03&_e=Yj8z6_NZXnzYxR5ARFIIPIBlLbswm8WuFc7cVJWt5FjmbObt6oMvbSSkxebhn0hsFtUiq4d7TekmOR7-wVjKktd54KvnwIFBOzJzeFHvLdTNfVUnnQ4Z8Mju4rac_-mrDzQeA96eYx3NM9W0Q-Ilnyw9wbxxxol8TiJKDb3QDzssnuw7UTeFbo_7EkPHIiXOj_MCGHxUkfOydFQ4YhjkFau1kIiA8nrBeXxv1T3dv1lUftwGMW2u17R5zFSmK-joGYv8eBEvrAaY1EOBureBJX9qLhIKEi5TzJKD60LWxpE2zKISCQ_MrF-zbpXrwt3am_YR4UkefJqT2A5hpGhQqWN4SVZhj04HOK4pkZNSOoF6plRh-YQuxetP4cxa-LRia3ftB6Qt9cEUsZse4Ke_Ldled8WHaTg8i1yHCUZ8uIGoLhHnxEw_whSYKBjs9tc4) [**WATCH THE FULL INTERVIEW**](http://links.mikeforwisconsin.com/u/click?_t=958424c79255456c93ed32354ec81cfd&_m=e38d4e719cf44c418c43121c09c98d03&_e=Yj8z6_NZXnzYxR5ARFIIPIBlLbswm8WuFc7cVJWt5FjmbObt6oMvbSSkxebhn0hsFtUiq4d7TekmOR7-wVjKktd54KvnwIFBOzJzeFHvLdTNfVUnnQ4Z8Mju4rac_-mrDzQeA96eYx3NM9W0Q-Ilnyw9wbxxxol8TiJKDb3QDzssnuw7UTeFbo_7EkPHIiXOj_MCGHxUkfOydFQ4YhjkFfHHRDkLv6BW5yB1DR63smU1edCma0l1qMX9dxavndHOWi2xEagSUnjPeGWjn2ZnFHjrLpiMHmpp0Q9wy0rf7vRRkSrqrYK6NEwudJNfAzrRulQNzIReAb6qvBpnyHbG8Ul1uHaM1Gic2a4gwGe8ZVwimjlEkUH2ck-AD_rIB-R_9B0R8PGwtDox7JlBqcyEzz_pknUuenZwSll5Hche6nUquWONatX0SDwSL_ct2w0E) **_“Democrats have obstructed our investigation at every step along the way.”_** Recently-released documents reveal how Dr. Fauci and NIH Director Dr. Collins worked to discredit the Wuhan lab leak hypothesis in 2020, which they called a _“conspiracy.”_ Fauci knew his organization (NAIAD) was funneling money to the Wuhan Institute of Virology through the EcoHealth Alliance. A group of scientists concluded at the start of the pandemic that COVID appeared genetically modified –– but they all changed their tune 48 hours after a call with Fauci and Collins. **_“The multi-trillion dollar question is what changed in 48 hours? The genetic sequence of the virus didn't change. What did Fauci and Collins tell them?”_** **ON MILITARY PREPAREDNESS** [](http://links.mikeforwisconsin.com/u/click?_t=958424c79255456c93ed32354ec81cfd&_m=e38d4e719cf44c418c43121c09c98d03&_e=Yj8z6_NZXnzYxR5ARFIIPIBlLbswm8WuFc7cVJWt5FjmbObt6oMvbSSkxebhn0hsFtUiq4d7TekmOR7-wVjKktd54KvnwIFBOzJzeFHvLdTNfVUnnQ4Z8Mju4rac_-mrDzQeA96eYx3NM9W0Q-Ilnyw9wbxxxol8TiJKDb3QDzssnuw7UTeFbo_7EkPHIiXOj_MCGHxUkfOydFQ4YhjkFan8o90Y7YnnzWdne2V_7nJcA9otNsKqc9kcSzU8bSLXpUqV_3CQrXQHOXvU4LYcKbhy6tTWz0SVKTXxWf2fxRJcFobg6fTCHJHsoEG5n7NRMVoe8rIaM5lwQQdfEDqbPGEm1Nl_jOUTVg8hi9BF4up5szFxA9gPNDSTY4FmaI1EDDe48VZEeN6f9ncrOuTz31HCMWWLRBG2CbOh4DbkTN_CFcOrJL9a2vIDJaCgjbiH) [**WATCH THE FULL INTERVIEW**](http://links.mikeforwisconsin.com/u/click?_t=958424c79255456c93ed32354ec81cfd&_m=e38d4e719cf44c418c43121c09c98d03&_e=Yj8z6_NZXnzYxR5ARFIIPIBlLbswm8WuFc7cVJWt5FjmbObt6oMvbSSkxebhn0hsFtUiq4d7TekmOR7-wVjKktd54KvnwIFBOzJzeFHvLdTNfVUnnQ4Z8Mju4rac_-mrDzQeA96eYx3NM9W0Q-Ilnyw9wbxxxol8TiJKDb3QDzssnuw7UTeFbo_7EkPHIiXOj_MCGHxUkfOydFQ4YhjkFbIuxg0Q4QmXv70M0s7M5QhedVz7raknXwDRtiGWpBDFAPBxL2MfzU_JraWp4cH20j_46AUZfrPfh2ps5t1nFOj6Q_KTZ-l_0TUWUARaY8vWZJSgi1rVr_YO5A0RNEJli9PLFsCMu20wPXjbt053Gck4xOZ9Ps7PnnwpMWoJZsRhQA1r7MPxNgQg9D3BDhUXXR86NtL-_ClSYsg-cCoLOQCCxSTzNtMVeDjaLXq0yxVT) **_“They [Democrats] want to cut hard power while investing in multi-trillion dollar progressive projects.”_** The Biden Administration is proposing defense budget cuts while spending trillions of dollars on Green New Deal initiatives and other radical progressive projects. This irresponsible agenda hurts America and our allies while benefiting our adversaries in Beijing and Moscow. As if that wasn’t bad enough, thousands of service members are being cut from active duty because they’re unvaccinated –– and the ones who remain are being put through wokeness training while Russia and China prepare to invade Ukraine and Taiwan. **_“All of this is undermining our warfighting prowess.”_** Thank you for all the ways you’ve supported Mike and our team so far in 2022. Read the highlights from Mike’s interview below and ON COVID-19 ORIGINS “Democrats have obstructed our investigation at every step along the way.” Recently-released documents reveal how Dr. Fauci and NIH Director Dr. Collins worked to discredit the Wuhan lab leak hypothesis in 2020, which they called a “conspiracy.” Fauci knew his organization (NAIAD) was funneling money to the Wuhan Institute of Virology through the EcoHealth Alliance. **_In order for us to reclaim power from Nancy Pelosi, we HAVE to Take Back the House. We are only 6 SEATS AWAY!_**

Democrats in power this past year have been a complete and utter disaster. Inflation is crippling families. Challenges from the COVID pandemic are still unsolved, 2 years later. Our small businesses have suffered immeasurably, and there is a dire need for change.

When I ran for Congress in 2020, I faced constant attacks from Nancy Pelosi and her band of cronies... As I embark on my mission to serve YOU in Iowa’s 1st District, I am humbly asking for your support.

Iowans NEED a representative who will prioritize their needs, keep their families safe, maintain prosperity and freedom, and keep their jobs intact. I am the candidate who has and will work day and night to achieve just that.

name: Jake Duesenberg
subject: Lisa Hanson is Out of Jail
body:
| [ ](http://www.action4liberty.com/?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=lisa_hanson_is_out_of_jail&n=1)
---
## Lisa Hanson is Out of Jail!
### Tuesday, February 8th, 2022
Friend, After facing nearly a year of persecution and [months of jail time](https://www.action4liberty.com/lisa_hanson_out_of_jail_meets_granddaughter_for_first_time?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=lisa_hanson_is_out_of_jail&n=2), Interchange Bistro owner Lisa Hanson of Albert Lea has been **FREED**! Her “crime” was opening up her business and serving coffee to willing customers. Governor Walz and Keith Ellison targeted her because she is a patriot who refused to comply with their unconstitutional lockdowns and business closures. Rep Erik Mortensen confronted Governor Walz to his face on the House Floor over the jailing of Lisa Hanson. [**Watch this**](https://www.action4liberty.com/walz_lemon_bar_publicity_stunt?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=lisa_hanson_is_out_of_jail&n=3): [](https://www.action4liberty.com/walz_lemon_bar_publicity_stunt?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=lisa_hanson_is_out_of_jail&n=4) **A[recent study by John Hopkins](https://www.action4liberty.com/lisa_hanson_out_of_jail_meets_granddaughter_for_first_time?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=lisa_hanson_is_out_of_jail&n=5) showed that lockdowns were not effective. But tyrants like Tim Walz were willing to violate our civil liberties to advance their agenda.** Lisa Hanson was unable to spend time with her family during Christmas and to be there for the birth of her beautiful new granddaughter. This is **pure evil**! The Democrats expected everyone to abide by their tyrannical decrees and allow the destruction of American Freedom. Lisa Hanson stood in the way and wouldn’t allow her life to be dictated by corrupt politicians. Her spirit for liberty lives in all of us! Lisa was released early Saturday morning and spent a quiet weekend with family and friends. She plans on holding a public event soon to announce the next part of the fight against government tyranny. **Nobody should have to go through what Lisa has gone through over the past year. That's why we MUST pass the Never Again Bill!** Did you attend your precinct caucus last week and get the Never Again Resolution passed? Please let us know: | [](https://www.action4liberty.com/caucus_results?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=lisa_hanson_is_out_of_jail&n=6 "Let Us Know") [Let Us Know](https://www.action4liberty.com/caucus_results?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=lisa_hanson_is_out_of_jail&n=6)
---
If we want to change the political process, and ensure patriots like Lisa Hanson do not end up in jail again, we must hold politicians accountable.
**Jake Duesenberg**
**Action 4 Liberty**
[](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=lisa_hanson_is_out_of_jail&n=7 "Support Us") [Support Us](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=lisa_hanson_is_out_of_jail&n=7)
---
Action 4 Liberty · United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www.action4liberty.com/unsubscribe?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=lisa_hanson_is_out_of_jail&n=8).
You can also keep up with Jake Duesenberg on [Facebook](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6nyVoJL5zCIi1gu8lCoYmQrA8P7rhuOjJmdy-IRmglie&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=lisa_hanson_is_out_of_jail&n=9).
Created with [NationBuilder](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=SWqLExi-4iBlEOa5qgO58jA2d62deOsOLwOgchKDecY&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=lisa_hanson_is_out_of_jail&n=10), software for leaders.

The Democrats have their sights set on Florida.

The Biden Administration and Lockdown Democrats are throwing everything they can at us because they know I will never stop fighting for our freedom, and that scares them. With corporate media on their side, we must fight an uphill battle every day to ensure that our message gets out there because they want us locked down, mandated and afraid. subject: Just Say No To Anti-Vaxxers
body:
| |

| | | [ ](https://kathleenfortx.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=09fca73837c97c9ddd5e5e266&id=f203e31f33&e=4712f71bea)

|
## Does Ronny Jackson want everyone to catch COVID?
Friends,

I don't know if you have seen the lunacy out of Ronny Jackson's Twitter this week.

Unfortunately, I have.

I've got to stay on top of my game to do everything I can to beat him, and that means keeping up with his nonsense.

Last Friday, he said:

[](https://kathleenfortx.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=09fca73837c97c9ddd5e5e266&id=8eb2154351&e=4712f71bea)

What?

This is textbook COVID disinformation and it needs to stop.

As your Representative in Washington, I will stand up for science and vaccines instead, not half-baked theories.

I need your help though.

**[Please take a moment to chip in $5 to send some common sense to Washington.](https://kathleenfortx.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=09fca73837c97c9ddd5e5e266&id=8b2a97caf0&e=4712f71bea)**

Yours,
Kathleen Brown
Democrat
TX-13

| | |
---
**BREAKING:** The House just passed a MAJOR bill to save the U.S. Postal Service!
Democrats just scored a MAJOR win in the fight to save the USPS. We want to hear from you, but Democratic strategists have NO RECORD of where you stand!

[](https://go.dscc.org/go/6202?ask=5&t=4&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20220208-BreakingNews-USPSRR-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220208-BreakingNews-USPSRR-Pros-sl1&akid=2914%2E9716520%2EdN1n0t)
**[Let us know where you stand -- add your name to show that you OPPOSE harmful delays to mail delivery, post office closures, and more>>](https://go.dscc.org/go/6202?ask=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20220208-BreakingNews-USPSRR-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220208-BreakingNews-USPSRR-Pros-sl1&akid=2914%2E9716520%2EdN1n0t)**

| | [Add My Name](https://go.dscc.org/go/6202?ask=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20220208-BreakingNews-USPSRR-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220208-BreakingNews-USPSRR-Pros-sl1&akid=2914%2E9716520%2EdN1n0t)
---

For years, Trump-era policies have done nothing but sabotage the U.S. Postal Service and hurt millions of Americans who rely on it.

But now, Democrats just scored a MAJOR win in the fight to save the USPS. A bill just passed in the House that will stabilize USPS finances, block service cuts, assist postal workers, and more -- and now that bill is headed to the Senate.

**We need to know that Americans stand with the USPS in its most critical hour, so we've launched a petition opposing Trump's cronies' sabotage of the Postal Service.**

**But we’re falling short of our 100,000 signature goal and are still missing your response!**

Deadline | TONIGHT
---|---
Status | NOT SIGNED

**[Sign our petition to tell us you OPPOSE harmful delays to mail delivery, post office closures, and more>>](https://go.dscc.org/go/6202?ask=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20220208-BreakingNews-USPSRR-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220208-BreakingNews-USPSRR-Pros-sl1&akid=2914%2E9716520%2EdN1n0t)**

Thank you,

Team DSCC

The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate, and our work relies on grassroots supporters like you. name: =?utf-8?Q?Joe=20Kent?=
subject: The establishment is terrified of me
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Joe Kent for Congress
body:
JHB is out of control. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/joekentforcongress/the-establishment-is-terrified-of-me?e=00856e661d)
---
|
---
|
---
| | Dear Friend,

# The establishment is terrified of me and the America First movement.
That’s why they’re taking advantage of our “jungle primary” to use their unwinnable campaigns to slander me, split the vote, and re-elect the establishment, America **Last** RINO Jaime Herrera Buetler.

Heidi St. John, who promised to drop out after President Trump endorsed me, has resorted to kamikaze tactics to attack my campaign—[but her claims about me are as baseless and empty as her campaign promises.](https://joekentforcongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=520f0c556a8895811473126aa&id=df1587ea17&e=00856e661d) _I’m not mad, just disappointed. _

Two years ago, I did everything I could to get President Trump re-elected, and am proud and honored to have received his endorsement. Sham candidates willingly lying to supporters and breaking their promises is nothing shocking—we know how JHB and her cronies operate. Time and time again, _we have seen her completely fail the people of our state and our great nation._

I am a man of honor, trust, and faith, **and I will never stop fighting for Washington families and the America First agenda.**
---
| [ ](https://joekentforcongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=520f0c556a8895811473126aa&id=80e69c20b5&e=00856e661d)

|

|
## Why is the establishment scared of me?

✅ February 7th: [Joe Kent speaks the truth on opponents’ fake attacks](https://joekentforcongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=520f0c556a8895811473126aa&id=bba991a9a7&e=00856e661d)

name: Chuck Morse
subject: I lived the American Dream. Now I’m running to save it
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Chuck Morse
body:
| |

| | | Friend, This is Chuck Morse here, U.S. Senate candidate from the great state of New Hampshire.
If you’ve ever felt that the priorities of progressive, liberal Democrats in our nation’s capital have been holding the rest of us back, you’re not alone...**
****In fact, I’m running for the United States Senate this year to fix exactly that - Washington is out of control right now, attacking our very way of life with their radical spending and policies!**
I know that only strong leaders are going to stop this - but before I tell you why, let me first tell you a little bit about me... I grew up from humble beginnings. My father was disabled, a veteran who struggled with mental health challenges that made holding a job difficult. And my mother worked multiple jobs just to support us.
I did the same - I did everything from cleaning my church to working at Dairy Queen to starting my own lawn mowing business.
Eventually, I worked my way through college and was able to live the American Dream.
So the first chance I got, I worked to give back to my state and community - first volunteering on local boards, then serving on the Board of Selectmen, as Town Moderator, as a State Representative, and now as State Senate President.
In case you haven’t heard, we’ve been able to accomplish some pretty incredible things here in New Hampshire... We cut taxes, delivered the most conservative budget in New Hampshire’s history, made sure our state had the lowest poverty rate in the country, and the Granite State even ranks at the top for freedom nationwide.
It’s been one success after another - the only thing that’s been holding us back has been the far-left priorities of Washington and our federal delegation led by the likes of Maggie Hassan.
They threaten to undo all of our hard work... **If it were up to them, they would spend us into bankruptcy to finance pet-projects like the Green New Deal, strip us of our energy independence, and reshape our government with a crop of far-left activists!**
I’m not just going to do nothing while they destroy the American Dream that I lived.
That’s why I’m running for the U.S. Senate this year to stop Maggie Hassan and the D.C. Democrats this year before it’s too late. I know I can’t do it alone, so I hope to have your support along the way.

---

---

**BREAKING: Democrat Launches 1st Statewide Ad**
Fellow American - Our Democrat opponent has launched his first advertising barrage of the 2022 Senate campaign.

**His campaign has purchased $726,000 in statewide TV ads that launch today, AND he _already_ spent $135,000 on Facebook ads in the last 30 days. **

**That's a total of $861,000 in ads, and it's still 10 months before the election.**

Fellow American, this race in Georgia is going to be one of the most expensive Senate campaigns in American history, and our opponent isn't wasting any time using the $23 million he has in his campaign coffers.

Since we declared our candidacy in August, we've been sounding the alarm every chance we get that **our Democrat opponent is likely to _outraise_ us.**

**But we guarantee you this - _our opponent is never going to outwork us._**

We're going to keep this message very short: we need your help to keep pace with what our opponent is doing. **[That's why we're kindly asking you to chip in $3, $5, or even $7 today to help us fill our advertising fund.](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=38c40048386345189916c9da6ed83234&_e=HU3NKCW2Oc9FZkq6GeGY22YCTnDqY9S3AkV98Ky6SW53mjYmOLZGXqDZ8S3Pcu68UXQDhrwCyYbXo9OTa-ZVtWOALJNZNmwYq2G1fUEbUpt00RmYucrXPkoDkljaJqfa2jgiHoSQeXrxQv57G3OogDt0JXmnbSOlB-sQ_zoV-WRrJeObGq-gXMFiFPWcxEN5f-56gT-vRURTAC1d2-ho9sqSdf6bsFqGjLlktnxjchEUzFNIiy8x1ljAybP0_mjLKtkH31mKOaOxSK0cxkK_yvWJ9JUPsXN7JhTYXR7dKE1pFxYeXtE40fVVsvxVhM7WQKR4iZTlXadoFAwo-eNv5rcNPJs9f0sSZIIXZFWhWV9WZ5PK3dM_pSOdse6ma6hWFOCZGba_0q-jjpnDjfXOKMTrMMvvjuMlS7k03l3OGVGhsgF9zVGbnoMxzWoQ_cMWMc5ghdldDrut1kr9nGFH3A%3D%3D)**

We're counting on you to help fuel this campaign!

Thank you,

Herschel Walker

A total of over $861,000 in advertising - on television and online - has been reserved. | BREAKING: Democrat Launches 1st Statewide Ad Fellow American - Our Democrat opponent has launched his first advertising barrage of the 2022 Senate campaign. His campaign has purchased $726,000 in statewide TV ads that launch today, AND he already spent $135,000 on Facebook ads in the last 30 days. That's a total of $861,000 in ads, and it's still 10 months before the election. Fellow American, this race in Georgia is going to be one of the most expensive Senate campaigns in American history, and our opponent isn't wasting any time using the $23 million he has in his campaign coffers. Since we declared our candidacy in August, we've been sounding the alarm every chance we get that our Democrat opponent is likely to outraise us. But we guarantee you this - our opponent is never going to outwork us. We're going to keep this message very short: we need your help to keep pace with what our opponent is doing. We're counting on you to help fuel this campaign! Thank you, Herschel Walker P.S. body:
We need to know if you're still in support of putting America FIRST or if you have joined the Democrats and Joe Biden. | ****

_The number of Americans identifying as Republican is the lowest it has been in a decade -- (from Gallup Polling)_**

name: Josh Hawley
subject: Pelosi embraces the Free Market
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOSH HAWLEY FOR SENATE**
body:
[](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/59489934:6A-MxfELN:m:1:3103520637:AA7E1B7B576EEE4920CA340810036E25:r "Headline") Peter, In case you haven't heard, Nancy Pelosi, the champion of socialist policies, has embraced the "free market economy," but unfortunately it's not what you and I would hope for. Politicians like Nancy Pelosi have come to Washington to enrich themselves instead of serving as YOUR VOICE, and when they get caught with their hand in the cookie jar, they try to sweep it under the rug. They even try to convince Americans that more committee hearings and investigations will lead to "reforms" that will make politicians honest. Sorry, but I don't buy it, and that's why I've introduced legislation to keep Congress focused on representing the will of the people instead of lining their own pockets. The American people ought to be able to expect Congress to be focused on doing what the people want and not using inside information to line their own pockets and pad their own wallets - which is why I think it's time to ban stock trading by members of Congress. **[If you believe it's time to stop turning a blind eye to Washington insider profiteering, then join my efforts TODAY! Donate $25, $50 or $100 and help me clean up Congress.](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/59489934:6A-MxfELN:m:1:3103520637:AA7E1B7B576EEE4920CA340810036E25:r "If
you believe it’s time to stop turning a blind eye to Washington insider profiteering, then join my efforts TODAY! Donate $25, $50 or $100 and
help me clean up Congress.")** [](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/59489934:6A-MxfELN:m:1:3103520637:AA7E1B7B576EEE4920CA340810036E25:r "Headline")Now that the cat is out of the bag, Nancy Pelosi is suggesting "stiffening penalties" of $200 are the answer for failures by Congress to report their stock trading. I came to Washington to serve the Lord, the great people of Missouri, and all Americans who demand a government of the people, by the people, and for the people. **[Will you join my efforts to clean up Congress and put the needs of the people first?](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/59489934:6A-MxfELN:m:1:3103520637:AA7E1B7B576EEE4920CA340810036E25:r "Will you join my efforts to clean up Congress and put the needs
of the people first?")** Inflation rose 7% over the past year (a historic high), and politicians like Pelosi continue to line their pockets with insider information that would put the average American in the crosshairs of the Justice Department. **While many Americans can barely afford milk, gas, and heating oil, Pelosi is filling her freezer full of gourmet ice cream, and you 're supposed to just accept it.** It's wrong! You know it's wrong. I know it's wrong, but there will still be some in Washington in the go-along, get along establishment, that will fight our attempts to clean up the Swamp tooth and nail. We can't lose this battle, and that's why I need you on my team to end the corruption and finish the work Donald Trump started. **[Stand with me today and end the corruption. Join my team of freedom-loving Americans with your donation of $50, $100 or any amount you can afford, and let's show Washington that public service should still be conducted with integrity!](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/59489934:6A-MxfELN:m:1:3103520637:AA7E1B7B576EEE4920CA340810036E25:r "Stand with me today and end the corruption. Join my team of
freedom-loving Americans with your donation of $50, $100 or any amount you can afford, and let’s show Washington that public service should
still be conducted with integrity!")** For America's future, [](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/59489934:6A-MxfELN:m:1:3103520637:AA7E1B7B576EEE4920CA340810036E25:r "Josh Hawley")
Josh Hawley
U.S. Senator, Missouri | | [STAND WITH JOSH](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/59489934:6A-MxfELN:m:1:3103520637:AA7E1B7B576EEE4920CA340810036E25:r "STAND WITH JOSH")
---

They even try to convince Americans that more committee hearings and investigations will lead to "reforms" that will make politicians honest. Sorry, but I don't buy it, and that's why I've introduced legislation to keep Congress focused on representing the will of the people instead of lining their own pockets. The American people ought to be able to expect Congress to be focused on doing what the people want and not using inside information to line their own pockets and pad their own wallets - which is why I think it's time to ban stock trading by members of Congress. "If you believe it’s time to stop turning a blind eye to Washington insider profiteering, then join my efforts TODAY! Donate $25, $50 or $100 and help me clean up Congress." "Headline"Now that the cat is out of the bag, Nancy Pelosi is suggesting "stiffening penalties" of $200 are the answer for failures by Congress to report their stock trading. I came to Washington to serve the Lord, the great people of Missouri, and all Americans who demand a government of the people, by the people, and for the people. "Will you join my efforts to clean up Congress and put the needs of the people first?" Inflation rose 7% over the past year (a historic high), and politicians like Pelosi continue to line their pockets with insider information that would put the average American in the crosshairs of the Justice Department. While many Americans can barely afford milk, gas, and heating oil, Pelosi is filling her freezer full of gourmet ice cream, and you 're supposed to just accept it. It's wrong! You know it's wrong. I know it's wrong, but there will still be some in Washington in the go-along, get along establishment, that will fight our attempts to clean up the Swamp tooth and nail. We can't lose this battle, and that's why I need you on my team to end the corruption and finish the work Donald Trump started. "Stand with me today and end the corruption. Join my team of freedom-loving Americans with your donation of $50, $100 or any amount you can afford, and let’s show Washington that public service should still be conducted with integrity!" For America's future, "Josh Hawley" Josh Hawley U.S. Senator, Missouri | | "STAND WITH JOSH" | PAID FOR BY JOSH HAWLEY FOR SENATE Please take a minute to read the special message from our sponsor. Sponsorships like this one help us keep our news service free of charge. The sponsorship above reflects the opinions & representations of the advertiser, & not necessarily the opinion of USA Freedom Fighters.

name: Ed Humphreys
subject: Reminder: The latest news for you
disclaimer_text: paid for by us, but it rarely benefits us
body:
How I will fight corruption and end the leftist agenda!
| | | |
---
|
---
|
---
|
## February 7, 2022
---
| |
---
|
---
|
# How Ed Will Fight Corruption and End The Leftist Agenda
---
| [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001_wrwxBtPjn9z99kKUPdIta1MPgj9PtWHJUImtd3yVWGODt5c3DtBDiiphk1wQvI94s_1eMy9eoaWio2exmYCdNmSfP5T4wTuBL_kmIhGElqF_WyOFpeqVeFqxKfmF1iWnqsUEws9oPiwbl-id_ic0Q==&c=P_hVjsCgBwvGbkOMGNW0a7d3-RugAPo07xWAcvGgX1uPzW8U2tziFw==&ch=_jPsKwaJwzQd_iebkYIBImWwaEUxpByQkN6baEEQc9JxQOKhcnuNvA==)
---
|
## If you want something different, you have to do something different.
##

Raising your family and working hard are integral to realize the promises of this land. Sadly, there are hordes of political operatives who have craftily hijacked the system to ensure their personal political agenda is implemented while you are occupied living your best life. Now, every time you pay your taxes you are footing the bill to ruin Idaho and destroy the American Dream.
It is no londer acceptable to funner our hard-earned money into the coffers of political operatives and activists. It's time for change! We need a free exchange of ideas instead of a subsidized exchange of pre-approved ideas. Idaho needs school choice.
On day one as Governor, I will ban all state agencies from hiring lobbyists. Also, I will wield the line-item veto to cut the special interest pork out of the budget.
---
| | [Read More](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001_wrwxBtPjn9z99kKUPdIta1MPgj9PtWHJUImtd3yVWGODt5c3DtBDiiphk1wQvI9Jc5akkTQeoDSrz0oK_Rj3i3u4Tx0b2OLk7aHdOW7haqA7GejDQHUBS0G1wtqepmCflHx2dW4imIv6OtfBhWIWeruj82V39tv8PBJyABZ2vruTWrrFyufE-kfwCJvA6py2cd04sKgp-2NWX_ty16K-BveXiKevxu_zm43RPShGlo=&c=P_hVjsCgBwvGbkOMGNW0a7d3-RugAPo07xWAcvGgX1uPzW8U2tziFw==&ch=_jPsKwaJwzQd_iebkYIBImWwaEUxpByQkN6baEEQc9JxQOKhcnuNvA==)

## A Peek at the Past Week
---
| | |
---
|
### February 3 - Juliaetta, ID

NO MORE CAREER POLITICIANS!!! Idaho is done with the status-quo.
---
| | |
---
|
### February 2 - Cour d'Alene, ID

Investigate hospital executives! They fired nurses and then can't provide healthcare to our communities. It's stupid AND criminal!
---
| | |
---
|
### February 1 - Riggins, ID

We can't keep doing the same thing and expect different results! Stopped in Riggins to spread the movement. It's a small town with big love for America.

---
| |
---
|
---
| |
---
# Principles Above Politics
---
|
---
| |
We cannot solve problems with the same mentality that created them. The elitists measure success by growth. Growth in budgets, growth in the size of government. That growth is paid for by us, but it rarely benefits us.
It's time for a fresh perspective to the problems facing Idaho. I believe there are timeless principles that produce natural consequences. It's time to put principles above politics. I will have one standard to measure success; promises kept.

---
| [The Plan](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001_wrwxBtPjn9z99kKUPdIta1MPgj9PtWHJUImtd3yVWGODt5c3DtBDh28376JIJnRGyFcGhn_ij76jv0Jzcn7pdnKcNrWbiqClIBwOoW9G7m59oDppV69jLYYBvjIPEUDhL7agzIhzV183ZZzCXj_yrxtfS8HMih7&c=P_hVjsCgBwvGbkOMGNW0a7d3-RugAPo07xWAcvGgX1uPzW8U2tziFw==&ch=_jPsKwaJwzQd_iebkYIBImWwaEUxpByQkN6baEEQc9JxQOKhcnuNvA==)

clean_body: How I will fight corruption and end the leftist agenda! | | | | | | | February 7, 2022 | | | | How Ed Will Fight Corruption and End The Leftist Agenda | == | If you want something different, you have to do something different. Raising your family and working hard are integral to realize the promises of this land. Sadly, there are hordes of political operatives who have craftily hijacked the system to ensure their personal political agenda is implemented while you are occupied living your best life. Now, every time you pay your taxes you are footing the bill to ruin Idaho and destroy the American Dream. It is no londer acceptable to funner our hard-earned money into the coffers of political operatives and activists. It's time for change! We need a free exchange of ideas instead of a subsidized exchange of pre-approved ideas. Idaho needs school choice. On day one as Governor, I will ban all state agencies from hiring lobbyists. Also, I will wield the line-item veto to cut the special interest pork out of the budget. | | == | | | | | == | | | | | A Peek at the Past Week | | | | February 3 - Juliaetta, ID NO MORE CAREER POLITICIANS!!! Idaho is done with the status-quo. | | | | February 2 - Cour d'Alene, ID Investigate hospital executives! They fired nurses and then can't provide healthcare to our communities. It's stupid AND criminal! | | | | February 1 - Riggins, ID We can't keep doing the same thing and expect different results! Stopped in Riggins to spread the movement. It's a small town with big love for America. | | | | | Principles Above Politics | | | We cannot solve problems with the same mentality that created them. The elitists measure success by growth. Growth in budgets, growth in the size of government. That growth is paid for by us, but it rarely benefits us. It's time for a fresh perspective to the problems facing Idaho. I believe there are timeless principles that produce natural consequences. It's time to put principles above politics. I will have one standard to measure success; promises kept. | == | | | | | | | Upcoming Events | == | == | | | | | JOIN THE MOVEMENT If you are like me, you know something is wrong right now. Please, join this growing movement. Volunteer. Host small gatherings in your home or community and I welcome the opportunity to attend and connect with fellow Patriots. Knock doors, make phone calls, write editorials, promote the movement on social media, etc. There are many ways to get involved. If you can't volunteer, then I humbly ask for you to help us fundraise and donate. With your support we can forge a strong Idaho. | == | | == | | | | | Grassroots support from Patriots just like you is what makes this effort successful. | | == | | | | == | Ed Humphreys == P.O. Box 1667 Eagle, ID 83616 | == Stay Social! == == == | | | | | | | Humphreys for Governor | PO box 1667, Eagle, ID 83616 | | Sent by mailto:info@edforidaho.com in collaboration with |

* * *
Hi there,

I hate to be the one to tell you this, but this is bad. **Really bad. **

**I just ran the numbers and we are _extremely_ short of our 2022 Membership goal.** I saw that Brian Mast reached out to you about the deadline and you have yet to respond.

I thought I would shoot my shot and let you know that**[I have extended the deadline for you to renew your membership to February 15th. You must act fast though because this deadline is quickly approaching >>>](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zhpahat1qbnlvaeog1adpbkv1hl2veiho108164o_rp22sh2s8i66ob1c5g62ob2clh2bs)**

---

Your membership supports Conservatives in winning back the House in 2022 and FIRING NANCY PELOSI one and for all. That's why we need you to step up.

I need you to help us reach our goal. **[Will you step up and renew your membership before 11:59 PM, February 15th?](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z0fnessl3k7l9otcb2kemg9b9bbummr0qvurvcco_rp22sh2s8i66ob1c5g62ob2clh2bs "Will you step up and renew your membership before 11:59 PM, February 15th?")**

---
Thank you,

Katy (NRCC CFO)

\--------- Forwarded Message ---------
From: **SSG Brian Mast, U.S. Army (ret.)**
Subject: Did we do something wrong?
**

Patriot, it's Brian Mast.

Newt Gingrich emailed you.

Nicole Malliotakis emailed you.

Elise Stefanik emailed you.

Kevin McCarthy emailed you.

Donald Trump Jr. emailed you.

_**Now I 'm emailing you.**_

There's only a few days left in January and House Republicans need to finalize our membership lists for 2022. **Failure to renew by 11:59pm on January 31st will result in your membership being terminated permanently. **

---
| | | [RENEW NOW](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zsqpa9sco0nso8v97lim0nbptpl60ffco8hnpgbo_rp22sh2s8i66ob1c5g62ob2clh2bs "RENEW NOW")
---

So I wanted to reach out one final time before our deadline and urge you to keep your membership current for 2022.

**[Renew my membership now>>>](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zdikjmjjh1cgmb92ion1pbkagkfn035sjvhuqee0_rp22sh2s8i66ob1c5g62ob2clh2bs)**

---

**Here 's why renewing your membership for 2022 is so important:**
1. You will be providing conservative candidates across the country the resources they need to go on offense and bring the fight to Democrats.
2. You will be showing your support for our plans to hold Joe Biden and Democrats accountable for their corruption and failures.
3. You will be a critical piece of our House Republican team as we work to take back the House and fire Nancy Pelosi for good.

November's election will be the most important election of my lifetime. With America in chaos under Joe Biden's failed leadership, it's up to Republicans in Congress to put America first and fight for the solutions to the problems that affect everyday Americans like you and me.

It's simple: _We need patriots like you to step up and help us save America._ **[Your support today will ensure that we have the resources needed to wage this fight and to take back the House, so please make sure you renew your 2022 Membership NOW>>>](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z229eboa2rvoc008fb9cu1j05v9jncm27nl387mg_rp22sh2s8i66ob1c5g62ob2clh2bs)**

name: Senator John Kennedy
subject: I didn’t want to ask.

body:

You’ve already done so much.

| [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zcbnk6b6b0kj384rd6tpulqidkqhj3qn7odmt740_rp22sh2s8i66ob1c5g62ob0shh2bs)
---

Folks,

I’m a little embarrassed. You know my parents always taught me to be grateful, not ask for too much, and thank those who were nice enough to give me a gift. So, before I get to the bad news, let me just say that your strong support in January made me happier than a penguin in an ice chest.

Your donations gave me the resources to fight the Left’s agenda, and your kind words gave me the support to keep fighting. I couldn’t do it without you. That’s why I hate to have to ask for your support so soon again, right after you did everything you could to help me in January, but there’s just too much on the line not to ask.

I missed my January fundraising goals, and my Radical Left opponents noticed. They’ve not only taken notice, but they’re taking action. They’ve called in the big guns to pour sickening amounts of money into their campaigns to try and beat me in 2022 and push their Socialist Agenda. This can’t happen.

**I NEED YOUR HELP. I’M HUMBLY ASKING.**
The only way we’re going to save America, Take Back the Senate, and stop the Left’s Liberal Agenda is by standing together. We’ve got to start February off right, and I’m hoping you can help me do just that by rushing what you can below.
| | [RUSH $25](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z0j0fpqde0dafnnlrs4vau8vrvo3j46p5ftmjd6o_rp22sh2s8i66ob1c5g62ob0shh2bs)
---
| [RUSH $50](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zq142mcg907206ei58vu7q6j3a16b4qo8tdhpco0_rp22sh2s8i66ob1c5g62ob0shh2bs)
---
| [RUSH $100](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z52n2ljujt46c1vepm31d3gl16ntq7hplqle2ad0_rp22sh2s8i66ob1c5g62ob0shh2bs)
---
| [RUSH $250](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z4spucanjj3dfo4h9ra4ai04c52int755g68a4h0_rp22sh2s8i66ob1c5g62ob0shh2bs)
---
| [RUSH $500](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2ztqe8mgcm9delrg8p9hhob1aaujsupom1r579uh8_rp22sh2s8i66ob1c5g62ob0shh2bs)
---

I appreciate your understanding, and I hope you’ll help me catch up.

Thank you,

[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z35c5nseplrhjt7j7l765356i1j67hdn5n3em5mg_rp22sh2s8i66ob1c5g62ob0shh2bs)
Senator John Kennedy

name: Ron DeSantis
subject: They're messing with the wrong guy.
body:
Friend, Joe Biden’s abuse and disregard for our Constitution is only getting worse by the day. I’ve taken an oath to rele
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zkgh77q35ggvku2smh694d7i7jkdddvi3e3s5u0o_rp22sh2s8i66ob1c5g62ob1c1h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq8ddl69qbcd1jmgr32t5nmepradrmeej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hfdc3jm5jb6t5jedq3ctj5c9pb6p5le9pn1dljmpjrct776prjcc3nmqqb1dj4c1jt4s3ic9j71cj6e3ib6or7m8q6cdb76dh6fchkcoq61cj6c3gbaor0s2qj2cdl66qn49fg)
[****](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zgft6hjj54u0aabr4rdjg1qsgusojctbp3c4fsio_rp22sh2s8i66ob1c5g62ob1c1h2bs)

Friend, Joe Biden's abuse and disregard for our Constitution is only getting worse by the day.
I've taken an oath to relentlessly defend our Constitution. In the face of attacks from the corporate press and a barrage of lies and smears, I refuse to sell out Floridians to the political power grab by dishonest lockdown Democrats.
Democrats and their corporate media allies think that I'll bend the knee to their rage mobs,**but they 're messing with the wrong guy.** I know leadership requires an unwavering spirit in the face of constant pressure.
With each passing day, Joe Biden makes more decisions that chip away at our liberty. He isn't interested in data or science, **he 's interested in power and political points.** But I'm fighting back and holding him accountable.
**[HELP ME KEEP FIGHTING BACK AGAINST BIDEN'S RECKLESS POLICIES - RUSH IN $25 NOW >>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ztt3lt6judbkphvu9326v1ks2eei51ekl64dfmvg_rp22sh2s8i66ob1c5g62ob1c1h2bs "https://secure.winred.com/rondesantis/holding-the-line-rvs")**
For Joe Biden, it wasn't enough for him to rip Americans from their jobs and livelihoods. He told them it was their own fault they are unable to provide for their families. But I stood up to Joe Biden and fought for Florida's workers. Today, they are free to work without the looming threat of Joe Biden's authoritarian mandates.
I'm doing the same thing for medical professionals. Joe Biden wants to play political games, with the lives of Floridians. I'm done playing games with Joe Biden and I'm going to do everything in my power to help give our medical professionals every possible weapon in their arsenal to help their patients.
**[RUSH IN $25 TO HELP ME CONTINUE THE FIGHT](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zt3v76q0cn0ou5mho614dgvsn5qg8vmk301q08mg_rp22sh2s8i66ob1c5g62ob1c1h2bs) **
We can no longer sit on the sidelines and be silent, friend. There is too much at stake in this upcoming election.
I will never - EVER- back down when it comes to defending Floridians from the destruction of the Biden-Harris-Fauci administration. I have stood in Joe Biden's way every single time he's attempted to desecrate our Constitution, and I'm not going anywhere.
**[Can you help me continue fighting for Florida?](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zkrs395uanipiua10r8v4a7md4rpv3hrsdo8bd58_rp22sh2s8i66ob1c5g62ob1c1h2bs "https://secure.winred.com/rondesantis/holding-the-line-rvs")**
**[RUSH IN $25 NOW>>>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z3ha4ca4hfldgtpd3v3j4e19dcj10hb4ltt2r808_rp22sh2s8i66ob1c5g62ob1c1h2bs "https://secure.winred.com/rondesantis/holding-the-line-rvs")**
Sincerely,
Ron DeSantis

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zvavkouptn31s4r4obat83t6cgp6i3qnffl6cbog_rp22sh2s8i66ob1c5g62ob1c1h2bs "DONATE NOW") [DONATE NOW](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zumn7j5c4p17vthtb0ev8gg2upn6p6qm25uiakao_rp22sh2s8i66ob1c5g62ob1c1h2bs)

name: Katy (NRCC CFO)
subject: Did we do something wrong?

body:
I just ran the numbers and we are extremely short of our January Membership goal [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8446%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=uoUVhTxRSfrsFWXHuFcv7g&sysid=1)
I just ran the numbers and we are extremely short of our January Membership goal

| |
---
| | |
* * *
Hi there,

I hate to be the one to tell you this, but this is bad. **Really bad. **

**I just ran the numbers and we are _extremely_ short of our 2022 Membership goal.** I saw that Brian Mast reached out to you about the deadline and you have yet to respond.

I thought I would shoot my shot and let you know that**[I have extended the deadline for you to renew your membership to February 15th. You must act fast though because this deadline is quickly approaching >>>](https://secure.winred.com/nrcc/2022-membership-lapsed/?recurring=true&utm_campaign=20220208_PWG-AUN2.103067_katy-williams-cfo_t1141315-573&utm_medium=emailp&utm_source=PWG-AUN2.103067&utm_content=20220208_re-did-we-do-something-wrong.AU-20220209 "I have extended the
deadline for you to renew your membership till January 15th. You must act fast
though because this deadline is quickly approaching >>> ")**

---
| [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c13081%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=8C1oZo56VeAwGLX%2b5Wqyqw&sysid=1)
---
| | | [RENEW MEMBERSHIP](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c13082%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=HxzEqF6iePgtvKZ7XOMTwA&sysid=1 "RENEW NOW")
---

Your membership supports Conservatives in winning back the House in 2022 and FIRING NANCY PELOSI one and for all. That's why we need you to step up.

I need you to help us reach our goal. **[Will you step up and renew your membership before 11:59 PM, February 15th?](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c13083%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=GcGoagMeodcSe3%2bSF437ww&sysid=1 "Will you step up and renew
your membership before 11:59 PM, February 15th? ")**

---
| | | [RENEW MEMBERSHIP](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c13082%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=HxzEqF6iePgtvKZ7XOMTwA&sysid=1 "RENEW NOW")
---
Thank you,

Katy (NRCC CFO)

\--------- Forwarded Message ---------
From: **SSG Brian Mast, U.S. Army (ret.)**
Subject: Did we do something wrong?

Patriot, it’s Brian Mast.

Newt Gingrich emailed you.

Nicole Malliotakis emailed you.

Elise Stefanik emailed you.

Kevin McCarthy emailed you.

Donald Trump Jr. emailed you.

_**Now I’m emailing you.**_

There’s only a few days left in January and House Republicans need to finalize our membership lists for 2022. **Failure to renew by 11:59pm on January 31st will result in your membership being terminated permanently. **

---
| | | [RENEW NOW](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c13084%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=flv4FmzBiM4R2OHi9KxOKw&sysid=1 "RENEW NOW")
---

So I wanted to reach out one final time before our deadline and urge you to keep your membership current for 2022.

**[Renew my membership now >>>](https://secure.winred.com/nrcc/2022-membership-lapsed/?recurring=true&utm_campaign=20220208_PWG-AUN2.103067_katy-williams-cfo_t1141315-573&utm_medium=emailp&utm_source=PWG-AUN2.103067&utm_content=20220208_re-did-we-do-something-wrong.AU-20220209 "Renew my membership now
>>>")**

---
| [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c13095%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2bsygTlImrxZsacBvB8v4kQ&sysid=1)

---

**Here’s why renewing your membership for 2022 is so important:**
1. You will be providing conservative candidates across the country the resources they need to go on offense and bring the fight to Democrats.
2. You will be showing your support for our plans to hold Joe Biden and Democrats accountable for their corruption and failures.
3. You will be a critical piece of our House Republican team as we work to take back the House and fire Nancy Pelosi for good.

November’s election will be the most important election of my lifetime. With America in chaos under Joe Biden’s failed leadership, it’s up to Republicans in Congress to put America first and fight for the solutions to the problems that affect everyday Americans like you and me.

It’s simple: _We need patriots like you to step up and help us save America._ **[Your support today will ensure that we have the resources needed to wage this fight and to take back the House, so please make sure you renew your 2022 Membership NOW >>>](https://secure.winred.com/nrcc/2022-membership-lapsed/?recurring=true&utm_campaign=20220208_PWG-AUN2.103067_katy-williams-cfo_t1141315-573&utm_medium=emailp&utm_source=PWG-AUN2.103067&utm_content=20220208_re-did-we-do-something-wrong.AU-20220209 "Your support today will

Democrats and their corporate media allies think that I'll bend the knee to their rage mobs,**but they 're messing with the wrong guy.** I know leadership requires an unwavering spirit in the face of constant pressure.

For Joe Biden, it wasn't enough for him to rip Americans from their jobs and livelihoods. He told them it was their own fault they are unable to provide for their families. But I stood up to Joe Biden and fought for Florida's workers. Today, they are free to work without the looming threat of Joe Biden's authoritarian mandates.
I'm doing the same thing for medical professionals. Joe Biden wants to play political games, with the lives of Floridians. I'm done playing games with Joe Biden and I'm going to do everything in my power to help give our medical professionals every possible weapon in their arsenal to help their patients.
**[RUSH IN $25 TO HELP ME CONTINUE THE FIGHT](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zh9bdmi1i4nk5kkaumv3qbb4jo87l1ja4inhb9n0_rp22sh2s8i66ob1c5g61o34cth2bs) **
We can no longer sit on the sidelines and be silent, Friend. There is too much at stake in this upcoming election.
I will never - EVER- back down when it comes to defending Floridians from the destruction of the Biden-Harris-Fauci administration. I have stood in Joe Biden's way every single time he's attempted to desecrate our Constitution, and I'm not going anywhere.
**[Can you help me continue fighting for Florida?](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zf1tufbj4ers08djk2jg7m0s97mk161umlnth6l8_rp22sh2s8i66ob1c5g61o34cth2bs "https://secure.winred.com/rondesantis/holding-the-line-rvs")**

Ron DeSantis

[View this message in your browser](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z3v34271lvbimu0upqh3kbaqs0hrft66hcf9q3s0_rp22sh2s8i66ob1c5g69o71cph238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq2d9ieuqfbdbie4rrcdljkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbrracrncdq6ddpgcth67d3i6iqrbclmeupbcpr0s5qb1o72clr34dbje1pr4opgsv970sj46oob4pjiegonco70mhij1o5l65iecpj66ljjbcj7mpgmctj76mr3fc5lclp2bs)
Learn how to diversify your retirement portfolio in a way that could shelter it from runaway inflation & hefty tax bills.
| Joe Biden wasn't kidding when he said he wanted to raise taxes. He's trying to push through the largest set of tax increases since 1968... In other words, one of **the biggest tax hikes of your lifetime is dead ahead.** And you can't just worry about the taxes he's raising... Joe Biden is also planning changes to the estate tax and how contributions to your retirement accounts are treated. This means choices that seemed like a good idea when you started saving for your retirement could be absolutely disastrous now... So you've got to be smart about managing your money through this -- and **[to be smart, you need to take action right away](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zlqulboa933l9scov053v6neq2s39engck9hsr88_rp22sh2s8i66ob1c5g69o71cph2bs)**. Click the link below to request a FREE guide that will show you how to diversify your retirement portfolio in a way that could shelter it from runaway inflation & hefty tax bills. It's all about one of the biggest IRS "loopholes" that retirees (and soon to be retirees) overlook these days... And under Joe Biden, no one can be sure how long this loophole will stay open. That's why, [when you click this link, we'll rush this guide directly to your door ASAP](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zns8p2hoi43dbgqddvs7oshuhr1gsk811rvlofdo_rp22sh2s8i66ob1c5g69o71cph2bs) \-- we'll even cover the shipping and handling charges! **So before all of Joe Biden 's planned tax changes hit, do yourself a favor...** [**Get educated about your options, and protect as much of your money as you can.**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zonqkg36vjcm20961h31erdgsqju8b9hk1fa196g_rp22sh2s8i66ob1c5g69o71cph2bs)

(1) I’m running for governor to defeat Ron DeSantis and build a Florida for _**All**_ ...

After a poll from the Des Moines Register showed just 27% of Iowa voters want to re-elect Chuck Grassley, we set a goal to raise $120,000 before midnight tonight to help Admiral Mike Franken take the lead in the race.

clean_body: Hello, After a poll from the Des Moines Register showed just 27% of Iowa voters want to re-elect Chuck Grassley, we set a goal to raise $120,000 before midnight tonight to help Admiral Mike Franken take the lead in the race. But we’ve been refreshing and refreshing our ActBlue, and simply not enough people have donated. If we don’t turn this around quickly, we could miss our goal and lose our one and ONLY chance to defeat Chuck Grassley. Corporate PACs and dark money Super PACs are already funneling millions of dollars to attack Mike Franken. Every single dollar we raise could be the difference between winning and losing this race – and control of the Senate. Everything is on the line, and we cannot afford to fall short now. We need grassroots donors like you to give every dollar you can spare now if Admiral Mike Franken is going to defeat Chuck Grassley, turn Iowa blue, and protect our Democratic Senate majority: = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Paid for by Michael Franken for Iowa, Inc Michael Franken for Iowa, Inc PO Box 13401 Des Moines, IA 50310 United States

name: Deb McGrath
subject: re: rent prices
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DEB MCGRATH FOR CONGRESS
body:
It’s a clear solution.

| I am concerned about the rising costs of living, Peter.

Rents rose nearly 14% last year, yet the federal minimum wage remains stagnant. Families are forced to cut corners or find new places to live. Many parents in Wisconsin work two or even three jobs just to make ends meet.

**While prices surge, the minimum wage in Wisconsin is still $7.25 an hour. Some restaurant workers and other tipped employees make as little as $2.33 an hour!**

No one should have to choose between child care, rent, prescription medications, and groceries. Western Wisconsin families are hardworking and they deserve to thrive. But right now, too many of them are struggling just to get by.

When I’m in Congress, I will fight for our hardworking friends and neighbors who need a champion. But this issue is too urgent - rent is getting higher and our communities need action now.

[**Add your name and tell Congress: it’s time to raise the minimum wage to a living wage >>>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41584287/329466694/1786827067?refcode=ea.4c9d7c90-b089-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ms=ea.4c9d7c90-b089-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzk0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YzlkN2M5MC1iMDg5LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7qEPkjno12aoAK0zj61fj_Zt4FcZWbtA0HFWbafTKyA=&emci=3457064c-fd88-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=4c9d7c90-b089-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=5944225) | ****[SIGN ON](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41584295/329466705/1786827067?refcode=ea.4c9d7c90-b089-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ms=ea.4c9d7c90-b089-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzk0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YzlkN2M5MC1iMDg5LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7qEPkjno12aoAK0zj61fj_Zt4FcZWbtA0HFWbafTKyA=&emci=3457064c-fd88-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=4c9d7c90-b089-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=5944225)****

| ATLANTA, FULTON COUNTY \- "I'm proud to have President Trump's endorsement, confidence and support as I seek to represent the people of Georgia's 10th Congressional District. America First movement is alive and well! The squad better get ready!" \- Vernon Jones

About Vernon Jones
---

---
Vernon Jones is running for Georgia's 10th Congressional District. He is a former member of the GA House of Representatives (1993-2001, 2017-2021) and former Chief Executive Officer of DeKalb County, GA. A former Conservative Democrat, Jones officially switched parties after endorsing Donald J. Trump for President and delivering a keynote address at the 2020 Republican National Convention. The proud Republican is now running to defeat the radical left, as a Pro-Trump candidate who will fight for free and fair elections, and always put Georgia First and Take Georgia Back.

In his first, exclusive interview since leaving Congress and joining President Trump’s new company, Devin Nunes just shared a MAJOR update about his new project with Trump. Every Conservative needs to hear this:
_“It is going to be a company open to all Americans... It is going to be the freest platform,” Devin Nunes said. _
Devin Nunes was one of the FIRST to be shadow-banned from Twitter. President Trump was banned from Twitter, Facebook, Instagram, AND Snapchat. Now, they teamed up to make sure it doesn’t happen to YOU.
**They're taking on Big Tech by launching their official app in just a few weeks from right now.**
They promised:
\-- No woke algorithms
\-- No shadow bans
\-- No Conservative censorship

name: Trump News HQ
subject: Victor Davis Hanson on DVD
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losi
[View this message in your browser](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zi7tf3m00lvmn834nrtk16h539i6ifqp62il1vsg_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jk5p7atdge5p78d5jmeqjetjjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbr38pb16hqnddpmepq3dd9iedge4cb364qr6t33c8q3cs316pp32crnm9r32odgcv970sj2cpob4pjgsipm6pti6hj3ap5jcgrr5cb661ob4pj0s2qm6o70mkoj3d9hmlp238h1e8he4933c5gm2p35c9i6coh5u)
This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zcej9q9jkpa3a4lc1682685u56ssr5pir6ua5eg0_rp22sh2s8i66ob1c5i6aoj4cph2bs) Dear Fellow American, Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled “The Second World Wars.” Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zokqhbba4vip3vs17m9vu79rn1k3vvnnotcpn8g8_rp22sh2s8i66ob1c5i6aoj4cph2bs) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of “**The Second World Wars** ” on DVD: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zs0k8mfvuubsg50iao2f4prsdi0kgs0kakh48488_rp22sh2s8i66ob1c5i6aoj4cph2bs)** Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
---

name: Team Kathy
subject: One more BIG endorsement for Kathy!
body:
---
| | | | | | |
---
[ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ebLmBHmGhCO2JXtXuMiRUMb3TwwN2zR49T_8EFNC3Rvx9W-xmY2wj40raocXG_nzG7sPnknIPWGR1qwGU3h8cuXHJhVUGQjV2Bfb04SEvdy_kadRbaMthHYdGbCmAC-WOt_LS7QiY6r6ts-DfjdZU9Pw0RpNWMpZODRqptF-QQvV3acXbYjZwg==&c=diEUSKpc_Eq9VYeV2lWJBItmEBctl07YZKGgFNDAez7IRoUiQ2mICg==&ch=nfRSn0dxSbB12EaTS6AkD-9R0hhYv5Eo3byXJKNDWHzuXd1vMw2eAg==)
---
|
---
| |
---
| Dear Peter ,
---
| Chris Frye, Mayor of New Castle, Pennsylvania, has just endorsed Kathy Barnette for Senate!
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ebLmBHmGhCO2JXtXuMiRUMb3TwwN2zR49T_8EFNC3Rvx9W-xmY2wj40raocXG_nzG7sPnknIPWGR1qwGU3h8cuXHJhVUGQjV2Bfb04SEvdy_kadRbaMthHYdGbCmAC-WOt_LS7QiY6r6ts-DfjdZU9Pw0RpNWMpZODRqptF-QQvV3acXbYjZwg==&c=diEUSKpc_Eq9VYeV2lWJBItmEBctl07YZKGgFNDAez7IRoUiQ2mICg==&ch=nfRSn0dxSbB12EaTS6AkD-9R0hhYv5Eo3byXJKNDWHzuXd1vMw2eAg==)
---
| | | [SUPPORT KATHY BARNETTE!](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ebLmBHmGhCO2JXtXuMiRUMb3TwwN2zR49T_8EFNC3Rvx9W-xmY2wj40raocXG_nzG7sPnknIPWGR1qwGU3h8cuXHJhVUGQjV2Bfb04SEvdy_kadRbaMthHYdGbCmAC-WOt_LS7QiY6r6ts-DfjdZU9Pw0RpNWMpZODRqptF-QQvV3acXbYjZwg==&c=diEUSKpc_Eq9VYeV2lWJBItmEBctl07YZKGgFNDAez7IRoUiQ2mICg==&ch=nfRSn0dxSbB12EaTS6AkD-9R0hhYv5Eo3byXJKNDWHzuXd1vMw2eAg==)
---
| In his statement announcing his endorsement, Mayor Frye cited Kathy's extensive record of defending our Constitution and Bill of Rights as his main reason to vote for her. We're so proud to have such a distinguished public servant recognize Kathy's work!
You can read his full endorsement here:
---
| | |
---
| It's an honor to endorse Kathy Barnette for U.S. Senate. Those of you who have met her or heard her speak understand why I am endorsing her. For those who haven't, I encourage you to listen to one of her many speeches available online at her website. Rarely do you find a political figure that is down to earth, tough and knowledgeable at the same time. Kathy's ability to quickly and willingly assimilate to different groups to understand their concerns is remarkable. I endorse Kathy Barnette for the following reasons: Kathy's history of defending liberty and the US Constitution is well documented in numerous interviews on Fox and in her book "Everything to Gain and Nothing to lose, being Black and Conservative in America" Kathy has a steel spine... her birth and life have demonstrated how Kathy knows how to work for what life can offer you in America. Kathy knows if you pursue your goals and don't listen to the naysayers, you will exceed your dreams in this country. No one is a victim... Kathy is a person of faith and will stand for the truth. Kathy stood up and fought for election integrity as no other private citizen has in PA. Kathy went to court to force Pennsylvania government to follow the constitution with respect to the election rules. Kathy and her team helped insure that the voter rolls are corrected and that future elections will be safe, secure, and fair. Kathy is a friend of New Castle and Lawrence County. She's demonstrated her willingness to fight for all Pennsylvanians as a private citizen and will continue to fight for us as the US Senator representing PA. I am voting for Kathy Barnette and I ask you to do the same.
---
| | |
---
| Mayor Frye is completely correct - Kathy is second to none in her commitment to constitutional government. If we want a Senator who is going to stand up for the inalienable rights of every Pennsylvanian and American, we can't do better than Kathy Barnette!
It's time to bring real conservative representation back to Washington. Kathy stands ready with over 100 endorsements from prominent conservatives to fight for us. [Are you ready to answer the call and join the fight?](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ebLmBHmGhCO2JXtXuMiRUMb3TwwN2zR49T_8EFNC3Rvx9W-xmY2wj40raocXG_nzG7sPnknIPWGR1qwGU3h8cuXHJhVUGQjV2Bfb04SEvdy_kadRbaMthHYdGbCmAC-WOt_LS7QiY6r6ts-DfjdZU9Pw0RpNWMpZODRqptF-QQvV3acXbYjZwg==&c=diEUSKpc_Eq9VYeV2lWJBItmEBctl07YZKGgFNDAez7IRoUiQ2mICg==&ch=nfRSn0dxSbB12EaTS6AkD-9R0hhYv5Eo3byXJKNDWHzuXd1vMw2eAg==)
---
| | | [DONATE NOW!](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ebLmBHmGhCO2JXtXuMiRUMb3TwwN2zR49T_8EFNC3Rvx9W-xmY2wj40raocXG_nzG7sPnknIPWGR1qwGU3h8cuXHJhVUGQjV2Bfb04SEvdy_kadRbaMthHYdGbCmAC-WOt_LS7QiY6r6ts-DfjdZU9Pw0RpNWMpZODRqptF-QQvV3acXbYjZwg==&c=diEUSKpc_Eq9VYeV2lWJBItmEBctl07YZKGgFNDAez7IRoUiQ2mICg==&ch=nfRSn0dxSbB12EaTS6AkD-9R0hhYv5Eo3byXJKNDWHzuXd1vMw2eAg==)
---
| For Pennsylvania,
-Team Kathy

---
|
---
| | |
---

clean_body: | | | | | | | == | | | | Dear Peter , | Chris Frye, Mayor of New Castle, Pennsylvania, has just endorsed Kathy Barnette for Senate! | == | | | == | In his statement announcing his endorsement, Mayor Frye cited Kathy's extensive record of defending our Constitution and Bill of Rights as his main reason to vote for her. We're so proud to have such a distinguished public servant recognize Kathy's work! You can read his full endorsement here: | | | | It's an honor to endorse Kathy Barnette for U.S. Senate. Those of you who have met her or heard her speak understand why I am endorsing her. For those who haven't, I encourage you to listen to one of her many speeches available online at her website. Rarely do you find a political figure that is down to earth, tough and knowledgeable at the same time. Kathy's ability to quickly and willingly assimilate to different groups to understand their concerns is remarkable. I endorse Kathy Barnette for the following reasons: Kathy's history of defending liberty and the US Constitution is well documented in numerous interviews on Fox and in her book "Everything to Gain and Nothing to lose, being Black and Conservative in America" Kathy has a steel spine... her birth and life have demonstrated how Kathy knows how to work for what life can offer you in America. Kathy knows if you pursue your goals and don't listen to the naysayers, you will exceed your dreams in this country. No one is a victim... Kathy is a person of faith and will stand for the truth. Kathy stood up and fought for election integrity as no other private citizen has in PA. Kathy went to court to force Pennsylvania government to follow the constitution with respect to the election rules. Kathy and her team helped insure that the voter rolls are corrected and that future elections will be safe, secure, and fair. Kathy is a friend of New Castle and Lawrence County. She's demonstrated her willingness to fight for all Pennsylvanians as a private citizen and will continue to fight for us as the US Senator representing PA. I am voting for Kathy Barnette and I ask you to do the same. | | | | Mayor Frye is completely correct - Kathy is second to none in her commitment to constitutional government. If we want a Senator who is going to stand up for the inalienable rights of every Pennsylvanian and American, we can't do better than Kathy Barnette! It's time to bring real conservative representation back to Washington. Kathy stands ready with over 100 endorsements from prominent conservatives to fight for us. == | | | == | For Pennsylvania, -Team Kathy | | | | | Kathy Barnette for Senate | == | == == == | | | == | | | Kathy Barnette for Senate | P.O. body:
[****](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59504099:JQ8rkMEfN:m:1:3298722022:E97A9B8268E0F9AAD5429150D322B8FB:r)

Peter, Joe Biden's abuse and disregard for our Constitution is only getting worse by the day.
I've taken an oath to relentlessly defend our Constitution. In the face of attacks from the corporate press and a barrage of lies and smears, I refuse to sell out Floridians to the political power grab by dishonest lockdown Democrats.
Democrats and their corporate media allies think that I'll bend the knee to their rage mobs,**but they 're messing with the wrong guy.** I know leadership requires an unwavering spirit in the face of constant pressure.
With each passing day, Joe Biden makes more decisions that chip away at our liberty. He isn't interested in data or science, **he 's interested in power and political points.** But I'm fighting back and holding him accountable.
**[HELP ME KEEP FIGHTING BACK AGAINST BIDEN'S RECKLESS POLICIES - RUSH IN $25 NOW >>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59504099:JQ8rkMEfN:m:1:3298722022:E97A9B8268E0F9AAD5429150D322B8FB:r "https://secure.winred.com/rondesantis/holding-the-line-rvs-tst-sm?utm_source=prospecting&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=tst_sm")**
For Joe Biden, it wasn't enough for him to rip Americans from their jobs and livelihoods. He told them it was their own fault they are unable to provide for their families. But I stood up to Joe Biden and fought for Florida's workers. Today, they are free to work without the looming threat of Joe Biden's authoritarian mandates.

Team,
Dr. Shirley Weber is a lifelong academic and equal rights advocate. She served in California’s State Assembly for almost a decade before becoming California’s first Black Secretary of State last year.
She is acutely aware of the issues faced by disenfranchised communities this Black History Month – and she has a message to share: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-feb22?amount=20&refcode=email_020922_1]
“This year, Black History Month weighs heavily on my mind as we've seen the diminishing of voting rights for many Black voters across our nation. Let's make this a time for celebration and also a time of renewed effort in the push for equal rights.”
– Dr. Shirley Weber, California Secretary of State

CHIP IN TO PROTECT VOTING RIGHTS >>>

We need every single supporter to stand with DASS now and resist the far-right’s discriminatory voter suppression. We’re running out of time to stop them!! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-feb22?amount=20&refcode=email_020922_1]
