name: Fair Fight
subject: The Fight: February Edition!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fair Fight PAC, www
body:
We're here with the newest edition of the Fight, our quarterly newsletter featuring updates including our joint achievements. Our successes are your successes, and we are thrilled to kick off your new year with exciting updates, achievements, and insight into our ambitious goals for 2022.
Fair Fight |
---
****

| | Friend - We’re kicking off 2022 sharing what we collectively accomplished in the last quarter of 2021. The work has been impactful, and so are the accomplishments. Here are some of Fair Fight’s top wins from 2021 at a glance:
* Fair Fight eliminated over $212 million in medical debt for 108,000 individuals across five Southern states.
* As voters in Georgia went to the polls for the first time since SB 202 went into effect, Fair Fight worked to encourage voters, despite the onslaught of negative messaging around SB 202. Our voter education efforts culminated in [www.PeachVote.com](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41590371/329488495/-151303486?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOWYyMTlmNi1iODg5LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VXzLPRgGjJnpiFZMGHHEzpmk8swCpfPA_3TZXP1pn84=&emci=c57d8b36-6888-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&emdi=29f219f6-b889-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=1037277).
* Fair Fight invested in Georgia 2021 municipal elections that saw victories all across the state: 43 Georgia target races resulted in wins, and 12 Fair Fight-endorsed candidates won their races.
* Fair Fight also continued the fight for voters in court through its lawsuit against Texas-based right-wing organization True the Vote, Inc. for using tactics designed to intimidate Georgia voters, particularly voters of color and first-time voters.

And top wins for Fair Fight Action’s in 2021 include:
* Fair Fight Action’s Research and Policy team continued work as a national leader in understanding and outcompeting disinformation. Our team provided education, rapid response, and safety guidance on the threat of of disinformation to allies, election workers, and the media and worked with national partners to ensure anti-democratic, disinformation- fueled efforts were exposed in a responsible manner using best practices to combat propaganda without amplifying through the launch of NotAnAudit.com.
* Fair Fight Action produced and introduced[ the first state report into the Congressional Record](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41590372/329488496/1052082947?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOWYyMTlmNi1iODg5LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VXzLPRgGjJnpiFZMGHHEzpmk8swCpfPA_3TZXP1pn84=&emci=c57d8b36-6888-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&emdi=29f219f6-b889-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=1037277) in support of the John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act (JLVRAA) for Georgia, which included over 100 voter declarations: “Georgia’s Enduring Racial Discrimination in Voting and the Urgent Need to Modernize the Voting Rights Act.”
* Fair Fight Action’s Voter Protection and Organizing Teams worked cross-departmentally and with external partners to:
* Support local efforts nationwide to slow down hundreds of anti-voter bills in states such as AZ, TX, and MI;
* Mitigate the impact of SB 202 on Georgia elections and educate voters about its harmful provisions;
* Significantly advance the fight for federal voting rights legislation, including by grassroots and grasstops advocacy and by preparing comprehensive reports for inclusion in the Congressional Record arguing for bringing Georgia, Mississippi, Louisiana, and Alabama back under preclearance as established by the Voting Rights Act of 1965;
* And document the impact of voter suppression on individual voters in Georgia and across the country.

As we move forward this year, the following three pillars will guide Fair Fight’s future efforts, investments, and resources: **Building to Win in Georgia** **Strategic Investments and Activity Around the Country** **Expanding People Power in the South** And in 2022, Fair Fight Action will be focused on: **Georgia 2022 Legislative Session and Year-long Accountability** **Voter Protection in Georgia and Key States Nationwide** **National Leadership and Federal Advocacy for Voting Rights** **And Major Georgia Litigation Going to Trial in 2022** _**A MESSAGE FROM CIANTI STEWART-REID** _ _Dear Readers of The Fight,_ _In 2021, we were laser-focused on combating the assault on our democracy, an assault which not only happened on January 6, but has reverberated over again and again in statehouses restricting access to the right to vote. As election workers were under attack and election sabotage became a central strategy of the Republican party, Fair Fight and Fair Fight Action led the national fight to protect voters, election workers, and access to the ballot. Fair Fight and Fair Fight Action were essential in both mitigating the impact of voter suppression at the state level and advocating for federal legislation to protect the freedom to vote._ _The failure of the United States Senate to pass the Freedom to Vote: John R. Lewis Act in January 2022 was unacceptable. We cannot tolerate barriers to voting for voters of color, veterans, voters with disabilities, rural voters, new Americans, or young people. We cannot tolerate efforts to remove local election officials or harass them to prevent them from counting every vote. Instead, we must join together at the local, state, and federal level to protect the voice and vote of every American._ _I know that many of you have spent the last year working tirelessly to advance voting rights in our country. I share your frustration and disappointment in our elected leaders. It is the repeated blow to communities of color, young people, the disabled and many others, that our vote is not worth their effort. For that reason, I am sad. But, I am not hopeless._ _I am filled with hope and faith in you. We will do what we can and what we must to protect and advance the freedom to vote for Georgians and all eligible Americans. It will be hard. But, together, we will continue to fight for ourselves, our families, neighbors, and communities. _ _History has already made clear that in moments like this, it is up to us to carry the fight forward. We have faced and overcome staggering odds before, and we will do so again. _ _Yours in the fight,_ _Cianti Stewart-Reid _ _Executive Director _ _Fair Fight _ [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41590373/329488497/217548953?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOWYyMTlmNi1iODg5LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VXzLPRgGjJnpiFZMGHHEzpmk8swCpfPA_3TZXP1pn84=) _**WHY YOU ARE FIGHTING**_ In December 2021, we asked why YOU joined the movement to protect voting rights in America. Your responses were both inspiring and encouraging– [take a look at this thread](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41590374/329488498/1341185014?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOWYyMTlmNi1iODg5LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VXzLPRgGjJnpiFZMGHHEzpmk8swCpfPA_3TZXP1pn84=&emci=c57d8b36-6888-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&emdi=29f219f6-b889-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=1037277).[ #WithYourWork](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41590375/329488499/-554787662?src=hashtag_click&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOWYyMTlmNi1iODg5LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VXzLPRgGjJnpiFZMGHHEzpmk8swCpfPA_3TZXP1pn84=&emci=c57d8b36-6888-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&emdi=29f219f6-b889-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=1037277) _**WAYS TO FIGHT BACK**_
* Advocate: Fair Fight Action is launching Democracy Watch, a new program to ensure that all Georgia county election meetings are attended by people who support voting access and that pro-voting voices are heard at those meetings. In joining Democracy Watch, volunteers like you will attend and/or submit public comments at your local Georgia Board of Elections and other local county meetings to make sure members at those bodies that are critical to elections administration are hearing the reasons and ways they should and can be supporting their voters. This program is only based in Georgia. We are currently looking for volunteers in Chatham, Clarke, Clayton, Cobb, DeKalb, Fulton, Gwinnett, Henry, and Newton counties. Sign up [here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41590376/329488500/1075599088?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOWYyMTlmNi1iODg5LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VXzLPRgGjJnpiFZMGHHEzpmk8swCpfPA_3TZXP1pn84=&emci=c57d8b36-6888-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&emdi=29f219f6-b889-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=1037277).

_**FAIR FIGHT ACTION’S KEY UPDATES **_ _Where We Are_ On January 19, 2022, 52 U.S. Senators refused to support a rule change that would allow the Freedom to Vote: John R. Lewis Act to advance. The Senate obstructionism is a reminder that we don’t elect saviors—we elect servants. Sometimes these servants fail us, as they did today—despite the best efforts of Sens. Schumer, Warnock, Ossoff, and other Democrats who have been leading the charge on voting rights. But you can be sure of this: Fair Fight Action and our allies on the front lines of the fight to protect our freedom to vote will not waver. The failure of the United States Senate to pass the Freedom to Vote: John R. Lewis Act is unacceptable. We stand with you in our collective frustration, and our desire to do better. We cannot tolerate barriers to voting for voters of color, veterans, voters with disabilities, rural voters, new Americans, or young people. We cannot tolerate efforts to remove local election officials or harass them to prevent them from counting every vote. Instead, we must join together at the local, state, and federal level to protect the voice and vote of every American. History has already made clear that in moments like this, it is up to us to carry the fight forward. We have faced and overcome staggering odds before, and we will do so again in 2022. As Senator Warnock said, we cannot turn away. We must have the courage to fight for one another, and we will work as a community to fulfill the promise of our democracy and ensure that the voice of every American is heard. After the Senate failed voters across the country, Fair Fight Action invested in a half a million statewide TV and digital ad buy in Georgia to remind voters that we are still in this fight and will continue to fight for the freedom to vote. You can watch the ad [here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41590383/329488506/-803653937?v=0XaBoSF3UOU&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOWYyMTlmNi1iODg5LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VXzLPRgGjJnpiFZMGHHEzpmk8swCpfPA_3TZXP1pn84=&emci=c57d8b36-6888-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&emdi=29f219f6-b889-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=1037277). This includes Governor Kemp and Republicans’ prior cuts and underfunding of education, [raising awareness](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41590408/329488535/-605454982?v=306277661526354&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOWYyMTlmNi1iODg5LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VXzLPRgGjJnpiFZMGHHEzpmk8swCpfPA_3TZXP1pn84=&emci=c57d8b36-6888-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&emdi=29f219f6-b889-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=1037277) on this key issue. _Disability Council_ Our Disability Council, comprised of disability advocates and policy experts from across the country, continued to advocate for disabled voters. _Litigation _ Fair Fight Action v. Raffensperger is moving forward and our legal team is preparing for trial, tentatively scheduled for April, 2022. The [federal lawsuit](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41590410/329488537/134397866?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOWYyMTlmNi1iODg5LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VXzLPRgGjJnpiFZMGHHEzpmk8swCpfPA_3TZXP1pn84=&emci=c57d8b36-6888-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&emdi=29f219f6-b889-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=1037277) against Georgia’s Secretary of State and State Election Board alleges unconstitutional voter suppression. In the course of the trial, the State of Georgia will have to defend its suppressive voting practices while Fair Fight Action will seek remedies to put a permanent end to those practices. Fair Fight Action’s case will be the first major federal voting rights case brought under the Voting Rights Act of 1965 to go to trial after the recent Supreme Court ruling [Brnovich v. DNC](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41590411/329488538/-1648283096?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOWYyMTlmNi1iODg5LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VXzLPRgGjJnpiFZMGHHEzpmk8swCpfPA_3TZXP1pn84=&emci=c57d8b36-6888-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&emdi=29f219f6-b889-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=1037277). _**FAIR FIGHT’S KEY UPDATES**_ _One-Year Anniversary of Historic Victories in Georgia’s U.S. Senate Runoff Election_ Over a year ago, on January 5, 2021, Georgia voters from every corner of the state came together in record numbers to form a winning multi-racial, multi-generational coalition that catapulted voting rights champions Jon Ossoff and Reverend Raphael Warnock to the U.S. Senate. Black, brown and young progressive voters demonstrated their political power and refused to let the obstacles posed by voter suppression stand in their way. Now, Fair Fight is doubling down on our winning playbook to make further advances for the people of Georgia. This includes fighting for affordable and accessible health care, Medicaid expansion, Covid-19 recovery, fully funded public education, and a justice system that works for all. Underlying all of these efforts is our core mission of protecting our freedom to vote. As anti-voter Republican lawmakers continue to undermine our democracy, we will not stop working to ensure every eligible voter is able cast their ballot and have that ballot counted—and we will win again in 2022. _Electoral Victories_ In 2021, Fair Fight invested in Georgia municipal elections and saw victories all across the state. 43 Georgia target races resulted in wins, and 12 Fair Fight -endorsed candidates won their races. Turnout increased in many areas compared to previous municipal elections, and we flipped city council seats all over Georgia, from suburban Atlanta down to small-town South Georgia. Many of our candidates won with 50-52% of the vote, indicating that our efforts to support their campaigns were critical to ensuring their victories. These victories are in part the byproduct of sustained investments in districts identified by Fair Fight as top targets for our long-term electoral efforts. _Relieved $212 million in Medical Debt_ As we approached the 2021 holiday season, [Fair Fight made a $1.4 million donation](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41590412/329488539/-1449845911?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOWYyMTlmNi1iODg5LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VXzLPRgGjJnpiFZMGHHEzpmk8swCpfPA_3TZXP1pn84=&emci=c57d8b36-6888-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&emdi=29f219f6-b889-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=1037277) to eliminate over $212 million in medical debt for 108,000 individuals across five Southern states—Georgia, Louisiana, Mississippi, Alabama, and Arizona— delivering much-needed relief to 68,000 individuals in Georgia alone. This effort underscored the need for full Medicaid expansion in the 12 states that have refused to do so—including Georgia, Mississippi, and Alabama—leaving their constituents vulnerable to worse healthcare outcomes as well as higher medical debt. Individuals without insurance—including the almost 500,000 Georgians—are about twice as likely to face medical debt challenges, in addition to expensive and exhausting barriers to getting basic, needed health care. _**THE LANDSCAPE IN 2022**_ _Suppressive Bills in Georgia & in State Legislatures Across the Country_ In December 2021, reporting from [the New York Times outlined](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41590413/329488540/369022450?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOWYyMTlmNi1iODg5LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VXzLPRgGjJnpiFZMGHHEzpmk8swCpfPA_3TZXP1pn84=&emci=c57d8b36-6888-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&emdi=29f219f6-b889-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=1037277) potential upcoming efforts by Republicans at the state-level to push new anti-voter legislation in state legislative sessions across the country beginning in 2022. “In over 20 states, more than 245 [restrictive] bills put forward this year could be carried into 2022.” As a result of the Big Lie surrounding the 2020 presidential election, the GOP launched a massive anti-voter crusade across the country earlier this year and “have enacted wide-ranging cutbacks to voting access” while using “aggressive gerrymandering to lock in the party’s statehouse power for the next decade.” [Read more](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41590414/329488541/-907505857?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOWYyMTlmNi1iODg5LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VXzLPRgGjJnpiFZMGHHEzpmk8swCpfPA_3TZXP1pn84=&emci=c57d8b36-6888-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&emdi=29f219f6-b889-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=1037277) about the Republican-led effort to push anti-voter legislation 2022 legislative sessions. Fair Fight Action is working with in-state allies, labor unions, and national advocates to mitigate the impact of anti-voter legislative proposals by stopping, slowing down, and making legislation less harmful to voters and democracy whenever possible. We are working with our state and national partners to identify needs and plan for both traditional and expanded voter protection programs around the country. Here are some highlights of what Fair Fight Action is currently monitoring in the states:
* In Georgia, legislation has been introduced that would completely ban drop boxes, allow for the release of ballot images to the public without a court order, and impose unnecessary, burdensome administrative processes on election officials which would further expose them to threats, harassments, and burgeoning conspiracy theories.
* In Florida, the Senate introduced legislation to create an Office of Election Crimes and Security, which would create a new law enforcement branch to monitor elections, increase the Governor’s authority to investigate violations of election law, and increase criminal penalties.
* In New Hampshire, legislation has been introduced that would allow individual voters to act as vigilantes of election administration by suing for the removal of election officials, facilitate poll watcher intimidation of voters, and limit same day registration.

As we move forward this year, we are forever grateful for your continued partnership. Let’s stay focused, determined, humble, and hopeful. clean_body: We're here with the newest edition of the Fight, our quarterly newsletter featuring updates including our joint achievements. Our successes are your successes, and we are thrilled to kick off your new year with exciting updates, achievements, and insight into our ambitious goals for 2022. Fair Fight | ** | | Friend - We’re kicking off 2022 sharing what we collectively accomplished in the last quarter of 2021. The work has been impactful, and so are the accomplishments. Here are some of Fair Fight’s top wins from 2021 at a glance: Fair Fight eliminated over $212 million in medical debt for 108,000 individuals across five Southern states. As voters in Georgia went to the polls for the first time since SB 202 went into effect, Fair Fight worked to encourage voters, despite the onslaught of negative messaging around SB 202. Our voter education efforts culminated in . Fair Fight invested in Georgia 2021 municipal elections that saw victories all across the state: 43 Georgia target races resulted in wins, and 12 Fair Fight-endorsed candidates won their races. Fair Fight also continued the fight for voters in court through its lawsuit against Texas-based right-wing organization True the Vote, Inc. for using tactics designed to intimidate Georgia voters, particularly voters of color and first-time voters. And top wins for Fair Fight Action’s in 2021 include: Fair Fight Action’s Research and Policy team continued work as a national leader in understanding and outcompeting disinformation. Our team provided education, rapid response, and safety guidance on the threat of of disinformation to allies, election workers, and the media and worked with national partners to ensure anti-democratic, disinformation- fueled efforts were exposed in a responsible manner using best practices to combat propaganda without amplifying through the launch of NotAnAudit.com. Fair Fight Action produced and introduced in support of the John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act (JLVRAA) for Georgia, which included over 100 voter declarations: “Georgia’s Enduring Racial Discrimination in Voting and the Urgent Need to Modernize the Voting Rights Act.” Fair Fight Action’s Voter Protection and Organizing Teams worked cross-departmentally and with external partners to: Support local efforts nationwide to slow down hundreds of anti-voter bills in states such as AZ, TX, and MI; Mitigate the impact of SB 202 on Georgia elections and educate voters about its harmful provisions; Significantly advance the fight for federal voting rights legislation, including by grassroots and grasstops advocacy and by preparing comprehensive reports for inclusion in the Congressional Record arguing for bringing Georgia, Mississippi, Louisiana, and Alabama back under preclearance as established by the Voting Rights Act of 1965; And document the impact of voter suppression on individual voters in Georgia and across the country. As we move forward this year, the following three pillars will guide Fair Fight’s future efforts, investments, and resources: Building to Win in Georgia Strategic Investments and Activity Around the Country Expanding People Power in the South And in 2022, Fair Fight Action will be focused on: Georgia 2022 Legislative Session and Year-long Accountability Voter Protection in Georgia and Key States Nationwide National Leadership and Federal Advocacy for Voting Rights And Major Georgia Litigation Going to Trial in 2022 A MESSAGE FROM CIANTI STEWART-REID Dear Readers of The Fight, In 2021, we were laser-focused on combating the assault on our democracy, an assault which not only happened on January 6, but has reverberated over again and again in statehouses restricting access to the right to vote. As election workers were under attack and election sabotage became a central strategy of the Republican party, Fair Fight and Fair Fight Action led the national fight to protect voters, election workers, and access to the ballot. Fair Fight and Fair Fight Action were essential in both mitigating the impact of voter suppression at the state level and advocating for federal legislation to protect the freedom to vote. The failure of the United States Senate to pass the Freedom to Vote: John R. Lewis Act in January 2022 was unacceptable. We cannot tolerate barriers to voting for voters of color, veterans, voters with disabilities, rural voters, new Americans, or young people. We cannot tolerate efforts to remove local election officials or harass them to prevent them from counting every vote. Instead, we must join together at the local, state, and federal level to protect the voice and vote of every American. I know that many of you have spent the last year working tirelessly to advance voting rights in our country. I share your frustration and disappointment in our elected leaders. It is the repeated blow to communities of color, young people, the disabled and many others, that our vote is not worth their effort. For that reason, I am sad. But, I am not hopeless. I am filled with hope and faith in you. We will do what we can and what we must to protect and advance the freedom to vote for Georgians and all eligible Americans. It will be hard. But, together, we will continue to fight for ourselves, our families, neighbors, and communities. History has already made clear that in moments like this, it is up to us to carry the fight forward. We have faced and overcome staggering odds before, and we will do so again. Yours in the fight, Cianti Stewart-Reid Executive Director Fair Fight = WHY YOU ARE FIGHTING In December 2021, we asked why YOU joined the movement to protect voting rights in America. Your responses were both inspiring and encouraging– WAYS TO FIGHT BACK Advocate: Fair Fight Action is launching Democracy Watch, a new program to ensure that all Georgia county election meetings are attended by people who support voting access and that pro-voting voices are heard at those meetings. In joining Democracy Watch, volunteers like you will attend and/or submit public comments at your local Georgia Board of Elections and other local county meetings to make sure members at those bodies that are critical to elections administration are hearing the reasons and ways they should and can be supporting their voters. This program is only based in Georgia. We are currently looking for volunteers in Chatham, Clarke, Clayton, Cobb, DeKalb, Fulton, Gwinnett, Henry, and Newton counties. Sign up . Volunteer: Sign up to ensure you get emails about volunteer opportunities. Donate: You can contribute to fighting voter suppression =. Engage: Follow us on: , , and . The best way to stay engaged is to be on the lookout on our social media for calls to action in real time! Share Fair Fight’s content with your networks to promote good information and encourage others to join our fight. FAIR FIGHT ACTION’S KEY UPDATES Where We Are On January 19, 2022, 52 U.S. Senators refused to support a rule change that would allow the Freedom to Vote: John R. Lewis Act to advance. The Senate obstructionism is a reminder that we don’t elect saviors—we elect servants. Sometimes these servants fail us, as they did today—despite the best efforts of Sens. Schumer, Warnock, Ossoff, and other Democrats who have been leading the charge on voting rights. But you can be sure of this: Fair Fight Action and our allies on the front lines of the fight to protect our freedom to vote will not waver. The failure of the United States Senate to pass the Freedom to Vote: John R. Lewis Act is unacceptable. We stand with you in our collective frustration, and our desire to do better. We cannot tolerate barriers to voting for voters of color, veterans, voters with disabilities, rural voters, new Americans, or young people. We cannot tolerate efforts to remove local election officials or harass them to prevent them from counting every vote. Instead, we must join together at the local, state, and federal level to protect the voice and vote of every American. History has already made clear that in moments like this, it is up to us to carry the fight forward. We have faced and overcome staggering odds before, and we will do so again in 2022. As Senator Warnock said, we cannot turn away. We must have the courage to fight for one another, and we will work as a community to fulfill the promise of our democracy and ensure that the voice of every American is heard. After the Senate failed voters across the country, Fair Fight Action invested in a half a million statewide TV and digital ad buy in Georgia to remind voters that we are still in this fight and will continue to fight for the freedom to vote. You can watch the ad . Fair Fight Action’s Civics for the Culture Civics For The Culture is BACK! Olympian Allyson Felix joins Fair Fight Action’s Chelsey Hall to break down how redistricting works and how gerrymandering strips away power from our communities. Legislative Session On December 14, 2021, Fair Fight Action led over 20 GA-based voting rights advocates to speak out against one of the most dangerous bans on drop boxes our nation has ever seen. This effort by Georgia Republicans, even before the official start of the 2022 legislative session, represents their latest attack on Georgia democracy. Georgia's progressive and voting rights ecosystem is strong and ready to fight back against these anti-voter efforts. Read our joint letter, . Fair Fight Action is currently supporting Gwinnett County residents and legislators fighting back against Georgia Republicans’ attempt to force a racial gerrymander of Board of Education districts to consolidate power. While this fight is ongoing, Fair Fight Action to engage our Gwinnett County volunteers and supporters with ways to take action. Education has become a key battleground in the 2022 legislative session, and Fair Fight Action is working in coalition with advocates, students, and experts to classroom censorship and efforts by Republican legislators to slash public education funding. This includes Governor Kemp and Republicans’ prior cuts and underfunding of education, on this key issue. Disability Council Our Disability Council, comprised of disability advocates and policy experts from across the country, continued to advocate for disabled voters. Lower-income communities and disabled Georgians were hit hard by the pandemic-induced recession. Still, Brian Kemp refuses to expand Medicaid—which would help save lives. Fair Fight Action also pushed for to be added to Georgia’s special legislative session agenda. Litigation Fair Fight Action v. Raffensperger is moving forward and our legal team is preparing for trial, tentatively scheduled for April, 2022. The against Georgia’s Secretary of State and State Election Board alleges unconstitutional voter suppression. In the course of the trial, the State of Georgia will have to defend its suppressive voting practices while Fair Fight Action will seek remedies to put a permanent end to those practices. Fair Fight Action’s case will be the first major federal voting rights case brought under the Voting Rights Act of 1965 to go to trial after the recent Supreme Court ruling . FAIR FIGHT’S KEY UPDATES One-Year Anniversary of Historic Victories in Georgia’s U.S. Senate Runoff Election Over a year ago, on January 5, 2021, Georgia voters from every corner of the state came together in record numbers to form a winning multi-racial, multi-generational coalition that catapulted voting rights champions Jon Ossoff and Reverend Raphael Warnock to the U.S. Senate. Black, brown and young progressive voters demonstrated their political power and refused to let the obstacles posed by voter suppression stand in their way. Now, Fair Fight is doubling down on our winning playbook to make further advances for the people of Georgia. This includes fighting for affordable and accessible health care, Medicaid expansion, Covid-19 recovery, fully funded public education, and a justice system that works for all. Underlying all of these efforts is our core mission of protecting our freedom to vote. As anti-voter Republican lawmakers continue to undermine our democracy, we will not stop working to ensure every eligible voter is able cast their ballot and have that ballot counted—and we will win again in 2022. Electoral Victories In 2021, Fair Fight invested in Georgia municipal elections and saw victories all across the state. 43 Georgia target races resulted in wins, and 12 Fair Fight -endorsed candidates won their races. Turnout increased in many areas compared to previous municipal elections, and we flipped city council seats all over Georgia, from suburban Atlanta down to small-town South Georgia. Many of our candidates won with 50-52% of the vote, indicating that our efforts to support their campaigns were critical to ensuring their victories. These victories are in part the byproduct of sustained investments in districts identified by Fair Fight as top targets for our long-term electoral efforts. Relieved $212 million in Medical Debt As we approached the 2021 holiday season, to eliminate over $212 million in medical debt for 108,000 individuals across five Southern states—Georgia, Louisiana, Mississippi, Alabama, and Arizona— delivering much-needed relief to 68,000 individuals in Georgia alone. This effort underscored the need for full Medicaid expansion in the 12 states that have refused to do so—including Georgia, Mississippi, and Alabama—leaving their constituents vulnerable to worse healthcare outcomes as well as higher medical debt. Individuals without insurance—including the almost 500,000 Georgians—are about twice as likely to face medical debt challenges, in addition to expensive and exhausting barriers to getting basic, needed health care. THE LANDSCAPE IN 2022 Suppressive Bills in Georgia & in State Legislatures Across the Country In December 2021, reporting from potential upcoming efforts by Republicans at the state-level to push new anti-voter legislation in state legislative sessions across the country beginning in 2022. “In over 20 states, more than 245 [restrictive] bills put forward this year could be carried into 2022.” As a result of the Big Lie surrounding the 2020 presidential election, the GOP launched a massive anti-voter crusade across the country earlier this year and “have enacted wide-ranging cutbacks to voting access” while using “aggressive gerrymandering to lock in the party’s statehouse power for the next decade.” about the Republican-led effort to push anti-voter legislation 2022 legislative sessions. Fair Fight Action is working with in-state allies, labor unions, and national advocates to mitigate the impact of anti-voter legislative proposals by stopping, slowing down, and making legislation less harmful to voters and democracy whenever possible. We are working with our state and national partners to identify needs and plan for both traditional and expanded voter protection programs around the country. Here are some highlights of what Fair Fight Action is currently monitoring in the states: In Georgia, legislation has been introduced that would completely ban drop boxes, allow for the release of ballot images to the public without a court order, and impose unnecessary, burdensome administrative processes on election officials which would further expose them to threats, harassments, and burgeoning conspiracy theories. In Florida, the Senate introduced legislation to create an Office of Election Crimes and Security, which would create a new law enforcement branch to monitor elections, increase the Governor’s authority to investigate violations of election law, and increase criminal penalties. * In New Hampshire, legislation has been introduced that would allow individual voters to act as vigilantes of election administration by suing for the removal of election officials, facilitate poll watcher intimidation of voters, and limit same day registration. As we move forward this year, we are forever grateful for your continued partnership. Let’s stay focused, determined, humble, and hopeful. We could not be prouder to be in this movement with you in 2022! name: Personal note from Val Demings
subject: morning reflections
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Val Demings for U
body:
Back when I was growing up in Jacksonville
| | |
---
I have 15 minutes of free time this morning, friend. It may not sound like much – but I've been working long hours in Congress to pass President Biden's agenda, and a gap in my schedule like this is rare.
So, as I'm sitting with my husband, Jerry, and drinking my coffee, I'm reflecting on this historic campaign – and I've decided I need to tell you a little bit more about my decision to run for U.S. Senate.
Back when I was growing up in Jacksonville, I went to segregated schools, washed dishes and worked at McDonald's. But my mom saw something special in me. She'd tell me I was _destined_ for something bigger.
So, when I thought about 2022 and what our country needed to build back better after a disastrous presidency, I thought about her everlasting words to me: "Never tire, Val." I thought about the hardworking families like mine who deserve a leader who understands their lives, their struggles and their dreams. I thought about our country's need to expand our Democratic Senate majority to protect our democracy. And, in the background of all of this, I heard my mother's voice in my head telling me I could win.
So, I decided to run. And now, I'm 2 points away from Marco Rubio in a race that can decide Senate control, and the stakes are higher than ever: We have a 50-50 split in the Senate. If we lose just one seat, Mitch McConnell regains Senate control – and three Democratic seats are already rated toss-ups.

It's critical that we win in Florida – and this race is tight right now, friend. I'm proud that our movement has an average donation of just $28.45, but building a people-powered movement means it's going to take all hands on deck to compete against the GOP's millions in dark money already pouring into Florida.
My 15 minutes are almost up, and I have to run to my next call: I hate to ask this, but if you believe in this campaign and want to help me defend our Democratic Senate majority, will you donate $5 today? Here's the best link to contribute: **[https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/vd_senate-fr-email](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41590822/329490848/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2384-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYTgzOTZhNi1iOTg5LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xC6C_JOUKW-iteHm0NLBF03Tngx9ihrnfQCfhFAcpwc=)**
All the best,

Val Demings
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41590823/329490849/1804727444?refcode=jtk2384-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYTgzOTZhNi1iOTg5LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xC6C_JOUKW-iteHm0NLBF03Tngx9ihrnfQCfhFAcpwc=) **Val Demings here:** I can’t thank you enough for fighting alongside me to flip Florida blue. Florida will determine whether Democrats keep our Senate majority – that’s why Republicans are pouring millions of dollars into this race to crush our movement _and_ keep Florida red _permanently_. Our grassroots campaign is off to a great start, but in a race as close as this one, I need your help to surge ahead and defend the Senate. I’m relying on grassroots supporters like you, donating to emails like this, to help me defeat Marco Rubio and stop Mitch McConnell from flipping the Senate. Will you donate today to help me flip Florida blue? **[Click here to donate now.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41590824/329490850/1804727444?refcode=jtk2384-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYTgzOTZhNi1iOTg5LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xC6C_JOUKW-iteHm0NLBF03Tngx9ihrnfQCfhFAcpwc=)** If you’d like to purchase merchandise to show your support for this campaign, **[please click here to visit my campaign store.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41590825/329490851/-460395862?refcode=jtk2384-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYTgzOTZhNi1iOTg5LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xC6C_JOUKW-iteHm0NLBF03Tngx9ihrnfQCfhFAcpwc=&emci=4f88a47f-6b88-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&emdi=fa8396a6-b989-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=20244100)** Thank you for your continued support. clean_body: Back when I was growing up in Jacksonville | | | I have 15 minutes of free time this morning, friend. It may not sound like much – but I've been working long hours in Congress to pass President Biden's agenda, and a gap in my schedule like this is rare. So, as I'm sitting with my husband, Jerry, and drinking my coffee, I'm reflecting on this historic campaign – and I've decided I need to tell you a little bit more about my decision to run for U.S. Senate. Back when I was growing up in Jacksonville, I went to segregated schools, washed dishes and worked at McDonald's. But my mom saw something special in me. She'd tell me I was destined for something bigger. So, when I thought about 2022 and what our country needed to build back better after a disastrous presidency, I thought about her everlasting words to me: "Never tire, Val." I thought about the hardworking families like mine who deserve a leader who understands their lives, their struggles and their dreams. I thought about our country's need to expand our Democratic Senate majority to protect our democracy. And, in the background of all of this, I heard my mother's voice in my head telling me I could win. So, I decided to run. And now, I'm 2 points away from Marco Rubio in a race that can decide Senate control, and the stakes are higher than ever: We have a 50-50 split in the Senate. If we lose just one seat, Mitch McConnell regains Senate control – and three Democratic seats are already rated toss-ups. It's critical that we win in Florida – and this race is tight right now, friend. I'm proud that our movement has an average donation of just $28.45, but building a people-powered movement means it's going to take all hands on deck to compete against the GOP's millions in dark money already pouring into Florida. My 15 minutes are almost up, and I have to run to my next call: I hate to ask this, but if you believe in this campaign and want to help me defend our Democratic Senate majority, will you donate $5 today? Here's the best link to contribute: = All the best, Val Demings | | = Val Demings here: I can’t thank you enough for fighting alongside me to flip Florida blue. Florida will determine whether Democrats keep our Senate majority – that’s why Republicans are pouring millions of dollars into this race to crush our movement and keep Florida red permanently. Our grassroots campaign is off to a great start, but in a race as close as this one, I need your help to surge ahead and defend the Senate. I’m relying on grassroots supporters like you, donating to emails like this, to help me defeat Marco Rubio and stop Mitch McConnell from flipping the Senate. Will you donate today to help me flip Florida blue? = If you’d like to purchase merchandise to show your support for this campaign, Thank you for your continued support. Together we’re going to protect voting rights, expand access to affordable health care and fully recover from this pandemic. = If you’re reading from your phone, to automatically sign up for my SMS team. name: Donna Imam
subject: The perfect answer.
body:
I ask this question to everyone I meet, and one day I got the perfect answer. Here’s what it was. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41594055/329499444/-573335974?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NjQ2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OWIxMTQyNS1iZDg5LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wJE2gj4dc9zhtMVHLTM8nicbO9yO_JMlLQsT-BeH9tQ=)
Dear Friend, Prior to running for office for the very first time, I spent 6 months researching my district. I met with hundreds of people from everyday walks of life, asked questions, and just listened. One of my favorite questions to ask was, “What is the most important thing in your life?” The answers were always, my family or my children. One day, when I asked this question again, I got the perfect answer which was simply, “life!”

**Life _is_ the most important thing. Without good health we can’t truly embrace life.** Good health means we can get up in the morning and make lunch for our kids or spend quality time with them. It means we can be there for our family and be able to show our love for them. To be in good health we need to be able to see the doctor when we get sick, but health insurance deductibles in the thousands of dollars are keeping millions of Texans from doing so, that’s unacceptable. **[Lowering the cost of healthcare and prescription drugs and ensuring everyone is covered will be my focus in Congress. Friend, can you make a $5 donation today to help us win this race, so we can make healthcare coverage centric to our national conversation?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41594056/329499446/-780221392?amount=10&refcode=pl_20220209_01&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NjQ2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OWIxMTQyNS1iZDg5LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wJE2gj4dc9zhtMVHLTM8nicbO9yO_JMlLQsT-BeH9tQ=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your payment will go through immediately._ | [$10 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41594057/329499447/-780221392?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=pl_20220209_01&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NjQ2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OWIxMTQyNS1iZDg5LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wJE2gj4dc9zhtMVHLTM8nicbO9yO_JMlLQsT-BeH9tQ=) | [$20 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41594058/329499448/-780221392?express_lane=true&amount=20&refcode=pl_20220209_01&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NjQ2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OWIxMTQyNS1iZDg5LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wJE2gj4dc9zhtMVHLTM8nicbO9yO_JMlLQsT-BeH9tQ=)

clean_body: I ask this question to everyone I meet, and one day I got the perfect answer. Here’s what it was. | = Dear Friend, Prior to running for office for the very first time, I spent 6 months researching my district. I met with hundreds of people from everyday walks of life, asked questions, and just listened. One of my favorite questions to ask was, “What is the most important thing in your life?” The answers were always, my family or my children. One day, when I asked this question again, I got the perfect answer which was simply, “life!” Life is the most important thing. Without good health we can’t truly embrace life. Good health means we can get up in the morning and make lunch for our kids or spend quality time with them. It means we can be there for our family and be able to show our love for them. To be in good health we need to be able to see the doctor when we get sick, but health insurance deductibles in the thousands of dollars are keeping millions of Texans from doing so, that’s unacceptable. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your payment will go through immediately. | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = = According to numerous studies by both liberal and conservative think tanks, we’re overpaying on healthcare by $2 trillion/year while leaving tens of millions without coverage. clean_body: And the GOP is responsible = Peter, Recently, there have been rumors flying around about Florida seniors whose party registration was changed without their knowledge or consent. And, with the help of one of Florida’s seniors, they found one of the workers responsible. And guess what — her ID badge went straight to the Republican Party of Florida website. Surprise, surprise. = ** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately. | = | = | = ---|---|--- = | = | = Of course, Governor DeSantis was quick to capitalize on this situation, claiming that his ridiculous Election Crimes Office would investigate. name: Rev. Warnock
subject: Worried we could fall behind
body:
Derek,
I have an urgent update and I wanted you to hear it from me directly.
GOP super PACs have MASSIVELY outspent us on the airwaves with attack ad campaigns – and now, polling shows me neck and neck with Donald Trump's handpicked candidate.

Experts at POLITICO say defending our razor-thin Democratic majority in the Senate hinges on keeping Georgia blue . That's why the GOP is zeroing in on me as their TOP target for defeat – and why Trump's allies are flooding MILLIONS into my opponent's campaign to defeat me and flip Georgia red.

Republicans know they could retake Senate control if they win this race – so they're doing whatever it takes to make it happen. I'm fighting for our progressive priorities in the Senate, but if we don't have the resources we need to fight back against this surge in GOP spending, I'm worried we could fall behind and put our Senate majority at risk.

That's why we set a goal to raise $25,000 by midnight tonight, but with time running out, we're on track to fall short. There’s no way we win this race without your support – so please, Derek, I'm personally asking:

Will you split a donation of $25 or more between my campaign and CommonGood now – as much as you can spare before midnight tonight – to help fight back against GOP attacks, defend this critical seat and keep the Senate blue? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_rw?refcode=20220209_CGVA_Warnock]

Thank you, Derek. Your support is more important than ever.

– Rev. Raphael Warnock

body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41596349/329509216/368400405?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjAzMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OTZiODNjMC1jMTg5LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ChmKofFWC2KnHKmiNHKQ6pUx0Yqr2219aQgtg6Adjwc=&emci=aac74f47-f788-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=696b83c0-c189-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=14943357) Peter, Education is experiencing a crisis right now. In districts throughout Missouri, and throughout our country, public schools are the subject of attacks from Republican politicians at a scale never seen before. Even before the pandemic, Missouri’s schools were appallingly underfunded; and our kids and their teachers have been paying the price. Making the situation much worse, schools are now saddled with ridiculous legal fees as they defend against politically motivated and frivolous lawsuits about mask mandates launched by Missouri Attorney General Eric Schmitt. These partisan attacks on education, not just in Missouri but across the country, are truly reprehensible. And the politicians coordinating these attacks have a simple agenda: _**undermine public education and prop up private schools with taxpayer money.**_ It’s what their donors have always wanted. **Now more than ever, it is plain how politicians, elected officials at every level of government, and policymakers make an extraordinary impact—both positive and, far too often, negative—on our children’s education, and ultimately their future.** _Visiting with educators at the Parkway School District's Food Pantry in December 2021._ I believe that the key to the American Dream is quality public education—and I will never stop fighting for this, and against bad faith attacks on our teachers and students. **The stakes are the highest they can be: the very future of our children.** I hope you will have my back as we stand tall together for our kids and their educators. In Solidarity, _**P.S.** This campaign is not bankrolled by billionaires or special interest groups with their own agendas. We are entirely grassroots funded, and we need your support to win. name: Geoff Diehl
subject: Unmasking our kids is the right decision for our state and it’s long overdue.
body:
Read more of what Geoff Diehl has to say about today's announcement.
| | | |
---
| STATEMENT OF GEOFF DIEHL REGARDING ENDING THE STATEWIDE SCHOOL MASK MANDATE

"At long last, Massachusetts has joined the ranks of many other states and acknowledged that there is no need to continue masking kids in school. I've been saying this for a long time, and I know so many parents who have been with me on this for a long time. I would prefer that the mandate end immediately, but at least there is now light at the end of the tunnel. Unmasking our kids is the right decision for our state and it's long overdue. I hope communities across Massachusetts will reach the same decision and lift any remaining local mandates.
"Today's announcement represents an enormous victory for parents and for everyone else who had the courage to speak up against these mandates. I've met so many parents across our state who have fought hard against masking policies. Many of these parents aren't political, but they had the guts to take a stand for their kids and to speak out at school board meetings for what is right. I applaud all of these parents for their courage and for their hard work.
"Today, we won. But, we need to keep our guard up and make sure there is not a return to masking policies again in the fall. A recent study by Johns Hopkins has shown nonpharmaceutical interventions do not provide significant protection from the pandemic. What's more, I am deeply concerned about the effects masking had on students' health, emotional well-being, and educational progress. I do not want to see our state ever return to a point where we mask our kids again."
\- Geoff Diehl, Republican Candidate for Governor

clean_body: Will you help me with this surprise? = = My sister Lisa is turning 60 tomorrow , and I wanted to reach out to you today to help me make this birthday special for her. The short of it is this: = Lisa has spent a career serving her community. She’s made a huge impact on the people of Delaware, not just by making sure our government is doing the right thing, but by leading on some of the most pressing issues of our time. She’s been a vocal advocate for voting rights, speaking out for those who do not have a voice in our political systems. She has worked across the aisle to pass crucial legislation like the bipartisan infrastructure law, and she has always put the needs of the people of Delaware first. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | **= | | = | = | | = | = | | = Let’s do this, Marla Blunt-Carter Congresswoman Lisa Blunt Rochester is a Democrat representing the First State, Delaware. She served as the National Co-Chair of the Biden-Harris campaign and Co-Chair of the DCCC ‘Red to Blue’ program. Lisa is running for reelection to continue fighting for our health care, leading the charge toward environmental justice, and advocating for working families like hers. = Paid for by Lisa Blunt Rochester for Congress Lisa Blunt Rochester for Congress PO BOX 9767 Wilmington, DE 19810 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please. **

name: Gibbons for Ohio
subject: Our Team Is Growing!
body:
Check out our weekly newsletter
---
| | | | | | [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001NHILziWmxcP5GXaHDcTnFF6u4g3JYuwpYtRHFJq3S5kZqltq9YoMbtKagkb0a7mLeJ8xeaUzsOWamx71lnVMKWocO2JGn3UTmTAVGvRTaqhAatR0zspiS0-IJ9H12O6K_4Aka5e-ItL1kBLiog3Gr0zbW7YZSc0CDlN32Yt_o5yKm94msyvtzw==&c=5RN5E4Yg3aj-MLLJYiVWlMCnc2ovXyNhWYwfwMEEfECPC-hGJb1LpQ==&ch=xe_QcuQzJs80e7n9I1XnV6etSKuRGfthllc7Znqprk92d_QvdsB_EA==)
---
| Friends,
We are down to the final months of our primary campaign and have many exciting updates to share. Even with the [recent polls](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001NHILziWmxcP5GXaHDcTnFF6u4g3JYuwpYtRHFJq3S5kZqltq9YoMbp9b2DOGQ6W3YRuwrwdkRPYR5QyDHRileD3JOYyXYfr2d53lEks6H95zE83v1W6cnzQA4ad6EUkMopA-cXunyCpOJT9WsxOCWOMJXg6Nl52oAtogg96FV2d7Q1cMHwkXEIZxaAA7ze6mF1t5jlx4Gsw=&c=5RN5E4Yg3aj-MLLJYiVWlMCnc2ovXyNhWYwfwMEEfECPC-hGJb1LpQ==&ch=xe_QcuQzJs80e7n9I1XnV6etSKuRGfthllc7Znqprk92d_QvdsB_EA==) showing Team Gibbons in the lead, we are working harder than ever to reach more voters and encourage a record turnout in this year's primary.
Even with the big snowstorm, my team and I have been all over the state this past week to talk with voters in all corners of Ohio. Over the weekend, I visited Mahoning, Trumbull and Columbiana Counties where I spoke at several different meet & greet events.
Just yesterday, I went to Clinton County and tomorrow I have a big day in Knox County. The momentum is high and is only growing with the [big news](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001NHILziWmxcP5GXaHDcTnFF6u4g3JYuwpYtRHFJq3S5kZqltq9YoMbo9qsZGVLK5Ou_giqbERsaDQEER8FHEa9GMlD0KX8xP4_BbE5M37qsaW2rDyCKTrPYjxIKq9AUHxKdmSlI1rU1ODsx5N0n29sFII5LATTwWkf6E2EsCVio1ChUjkGSMMnLQTsFNOqDL6pHozs-RncD9-_pWZrZImcuCt3hks3OvK6k5fmYb0kns=&c=5RN5E4Yg3aj-MLLJYiVWlMCnc2ovXyNhWYwfwMEEfECPC-hGJb1LpQ==&ch=xe_QcuQzJs80e7n9I1XnV6etSKuRGfthllc7Znqprk92d_QvdsB_EA==) that Trump's former campaign managers are now part of my team!

| Bill Stepien, who served as former President [Donald Trump](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001dvhezADLWADQ69KxvrA6MXppX41IPWKV5CBowyzKIXzQzQxCbxHZsZDRI3i3FqXUgwy63sv7dGq5ydER5YDd_doLEh9-sDHT7p3Q-EE0iluwABnUXRz9Otwirb7atV3rPNFrBLkFdd_BU1u-kaoSWewBvUCrAtvxhGng1ZxQ_dVxR_abZVtN4VIj0BhNIZSF&c=IgGRJsZ9dV-70Gmav8lEikbfrkzHsrSMosaxgnOZfBZxweLK7cIWHQ==&ch=fKCFtfnvNJvGFRzWKSyQACdHcpEMxR3LXPSboowP464mUHLHmAJQhA==)'s campaign manager during the summer and autumn of 2020, is jumping into [Ohio](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001dvhezADLWADQ69KxvrA6MXppX41IPWKV5CBowyzKIXzQzQxCbxHZsZDRI3i3FqXUW9U1RJZ31RgD7TO8QJajoM2LGRWrI09HioKFu4E-32ljfTYxt8SpHSIV5rcPBqR4M35VPZyszoUuU34uQCSxBEMA93qahF4HrQklSsMvKjmcdwXg8sREzW_ozoX7_blEArUFQBTU8JA=&c=IgGRJsZ9dV-70Gmav8lEikbfrkzHsrSMosaxgnOZfBZxweLK7cIWHQ==&ch=fKCFtfnvNJvGFRzWKSyQACdHcpEMxR3LXPSboowP464mUHLHmAJQhA==)'s crowded and contentious [Republican Senate ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001dvhezADLWADQ69KxvrA6MXppX41IPWKV5CBowyzKIXzQzQxCbxHZsZDRI3i3FqXUrK3fwJtbhK-b7ZpJWvmK8TC01hYLW6pCmOCnxi2VXJPI75FW_fek1RMU5Uf5_1_cFlko3e8-rTGlQ1ReyMhIW8WkWHGjYzsib80rbI0d1aa1oG0OwWr77M-KX920tJAalhD2U_CA59E=&c=IgGRJsZ9dV-70Gmav8lEikbfrkzHsrSMosaxgnOZfBZxweLK7cIWHQ==&ch=fKCFtfnvNJvGFRzWKSyQACdHcpEMxR3LXPSboowP464mUHLHmAJQhA==)primary in the race to succeed retiring GOP Sen. Rob Portman. Fox News learned on Monday that Stepien is joining Mike Gibbons' Senate campaign as a senior adviser.

|
---
|
---
| Former Trump campaign chief [Bill Stepien](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001NHILziWmxcP5GXaHDcTnFF6u4g3JYuwpYtRHFJq3S5kZqltq9YoMbo9qsZGVLK5OOBBvRzuzS2JTQm6EoupTd3uuTLOvrOjdMq5OdwE_3b-mlI7VjvI08jtRH9qrlF0Q7iJWolHU5wUUifb5RBeHYxXZR15HZgOzYmnjJGGAq10=&c=5RN5E4Yg3aj-MLLJYiVWlMCnc2ovXyNhWYwfwMEEfECPC-hGJb1LpQ==&ch=xe_QcuQzJs80e7n9I1XnV6etSKuRGfthllc7Znqprk92d_QvdsB_EA==) is set to join Ohio Republican [Mike Gibbons](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001NHILziWmxcP5GXaHDcTnFF6u4g3JYuwpYtRHFJq3S5kZqltq9YoMbo9qsZGVLK5ODYM-oM_67E84DhrwoyIHTjYC2NmirKD2OKusa_BrPu5sNs4ro00OSHEtiTfoh884mX26AsG9LJ67P1jcQLAUdMefQLZ-ZV6qzpxwEQvA87Q=&c=5RN5E4Yg3aj-MLLJYiVWlMCnc2ovXyNhWYwfwMEEfECPC-hGJb1LpQ==&ch=xe_QcuQzJs80e7n9I1XnV6etSKuRGfthllc7Znqprk92d_QvdsB_EA==)'s Senate campaign, getting involved in one of the most contentious GOP Senate primaries in the country.
---
| | |
---
| In other news, I'm honored to have received the endorsement from two great Ohio leaders, former Ohio Republican Party Treasurer and radio personality Tracey Winbush as well as state Senator Sandra O'Brien. Thank you for your support!
---
|
---
|
---
| | |
---
| We are finishing up our 88-county tour and I plan to continue traveling the state to hear directly from voters after we hit our goal. Your input is invaluable to my campaign and will help me to serve our state better once in Washington.
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001NHILziWmxcP5GXaHDcTnFF6u4g3JYuwpYtRHFJq3S5kZqltq9YoMbmxJ8soPvbQla39Ss9igmsEu5emK6EZ0cI0VVzqcIafTae1JglnPZ9pSRuYrX8Eg2priaA92JlIwbOvdHSJ-kk1JwLPGBBWcE_dyjMTWS3FR&c=5RN5E4Yg3aj-MLLJYiVWlMCnc2ovXyNhWYwfwMEEfECPC-hGJb1LpQ==&ch=xe_QcuQzJs80e7n9I1XnV6etSKuRGfthllc7Znqprk92d_QvdsB_EA==)
---
| When I'm in the Senate, I will remember the important conversations I had with Ohioans on this bus tour and will make sure to apply your input each and every day. I will stand up for what is right and won't become part of the swamp.
We have less than three months left and I plan to use all of that time meeting with the people I plan to represent. So, please connect with my team and come to a meet & greet event so I can hear from you too.
Contact us at info@gibbonsforohio.com with any questions of if you would like to volunteer!

Sincerely,

Mike Gibbons Candidate for U.S. Senate

name: Derek Marshall
subject: ANNOUNCING: Endorsement
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Derek Marshall for Congress
body:
Peter,
I have exciting news to share with you! **Last week, the organization Ground Game LA endorsed our campaign in a strong show of solidarity.** I was one of the first members of Ground Game LA when it got off the ground a few years ago, and since then it’s evolved into one of the most influential groups in the LA metro area.
**Ground Game LA has already helped flip a congressional district from red to blue in 2018 with Katie Hill’s race.** They’ve also done incredible work around housing justice, an issue close to my heart. I’m so proud to have the endorsement of such an important organization.
**[Endorsements like these are major for our campaign, but nothing matters as much as the personal endorsement of grassroots donors like you. Will you join Ground Game LA and invest in my campaign today with a donation?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41599079/329522677/-431919476?refcode=2-9&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZjFlMTViOC1jOTg5LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5gQXHD8BhKSRgXGm3PtLy-MfMrR1b_oHEtj5GLmTVE4=)**

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41599082/329522678/-431919476?refcode=2-9&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZjFlMTViOC1jOTg5LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5gQXHD8BhKSRgXGm3PtLy-MfMrR1b_oHEtj5GLmTVE4=)

**Here’s what Ground Game LA had to say about their endorsement: **

_“Ground Game LA is proud to endorse one of its earliest members, Derek Marshall, in California's 23rd Congressional District.[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41599085/329522681/338508834?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZjFlMTViOC1jOTg5LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5gQXHD8BhKSRgXGm3PtLy-MfMrR1b_oHEtj5GLmTVE4=&emci=3f94c81b-3e89-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=6f1e15b8-c989-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=21617867)Derek Marshall is a community organizer that's ready to show that there's a progressive movement happening in the high desert and Inland Empire.”_
**These days, more and more organizations are joining our movement for bold, progressive change.** Ground Game LA knows better than anyone the importance of organizing our communities for social AND political change. And when it comes to California’s 23rd district, thousands upon thousands of people work down the hill in LA, so organizations like Ground Game LA understand how badly our communities here need this change.
**I’m so excited to see what our movement will do as we continue to strategize, organize, and mobilize for a better future.[Will you join our endorsers and support my campaign? Every single dollar counts, and we’re going to need major resources to take on my entrenched Republican opponent and win this race. Can I count on you to chip in today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41599088/329522687/-431919476?refcode=2-9&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZjFlMTViOC1jOTg5LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5gQXHD8BhKSRgXGm3PtLy-MfMrR1b_oHEtj5GLmTVE4=)**

**[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41599091/329522696/-431919476?refcode=2-9&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZjFlMTViOC1jOTg5LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5gQXHD8BhKSRgXGm3PtLy-MfMrR1b_oHEtj5GLmTVE4=)**

name: Never Again PAC
subject: Some people just don't seem to get it
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY NEVER AGAIN PAC
body:
Here's a little crash course on sedition. Because some members of the Treason Caucus just don't seem to get it. The act of seditious conspiracy is defined by the federal code as two or more people conspiring to overthrow or destroy by force the United States government. [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/41599213/329522956/-2023352048?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzkwMTkwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjZjMWUxNWI4LWM5ODktZWMxMS1hNTA3LTI4MTg3OGI4M2Q4YSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=fuV4v8jwZk-mm1FzGIC1ybNyKfxSv2o2JJu3EfQY7FM=&emci=13dfd444-fc88-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=6c1e15b8-c989-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=16335001) Here's a little crash course on sedition, team.

**Because some members of the Treason Caucus just don't seem to get it.**

The act of seditious conspiracy is defined by the federal code as two or more people conspiring to overthrow or destroy by force the United States government.

Leaders of the Oath Keepers, a made-up militia of sad little men in tactical costumes stormed the halls of the Capitol on January 6. Now they're facing charges of seditious conspiracy (and they're pleading not guilty). Let's review some of the actions these "brave defenders"took:
* Organized and extensively planned a violent attack to overthrow the results of a free and fair election. A "bloody war" and "revolution" was mentioned in their extensive messages planning January 6.
* Purchased tens of thousands of dollars in weapons and donned full combat and tactical gear to attend the advertised "peaceful" protest.
* Tried to push their way through a line of Capitol police officers in a coordinated effort to breach the Senate chamber and terrorize our elected officials into overturning the election results.

These aren't the actions of men who were “bravely defending our democracy." These are the crimes of a seditious militant terrorist group who tried to destroy the government of the United States. We know it, the Justice Department knows it, and it's high time the Oath Keepers recognized that they are nothing but traitors.

**[Unfortunately, members of the Treason Caucus are still defending these seditionists. If they won't condemn these criminals, it's time for them to go. Will you chip in now to help us defeat them in November?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/41599215/329522958/-730306332?refcode=em22_220209_OK1R_fnd_gq_nopn___NAPAC_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220209_OK1R_fnd_gq_nopn___NAPAC_ettx&utm_medium=email&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzkwMTkwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjZjMWUxNWI4LWM5ODktZWMxMS1hNTA3LTI4MTg3OGI4M2Q4YSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=fuV4v8jwZk-mm1FzGIC1ybNyKfxSv2o2JJu3EfQY7FM=)**

**We're excited for justice to be served and for these men to answer for their treason.**

Of the more than 700 people charged with crimes related to the insurrection, so far, the charge of seditious conspiracy is the most serious. But as the Justice Department is focusing on the treasonous Oath Keepers, we need to focus on defeating the Treason Caucus to prevent another insurrection.

**[Will you chip in just $5 or whatever your budget will allow to help us defeat the Treason Caucus this November?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/41599217/329522960/-730306332?refcode=em22_220209_OK1R_fnd_gq_nopn___NAPAC_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220209_OK1R_fnd_gq_nopn___NAPAC_ettx&utm_medium=email&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzkwMTkwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjZjMWUxNWI4LWM5ODktZWMxMS1hNTA3LTI4MTg3OGI4M2Q4YSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=fuV4v8jwZk-mm1FzGIC1ybNyKfxSv2o2JJu3EfQY7FM=)**

Thank you,

Team Never Again
Marjorie Taylor Greene, Paul Gosar, Lauren Boebert, Madison Cawthorn, Louie Gohmert, Mo Brooks, Andy Biggs. Those are just a few of the Republicans in Congress that Never Again PAC is working to defend our democracy from. The act of seditious conspiracy is defined by the federal code as two or more people conspiring to overthrow or destroy by force the United States government. Leaders of the Oath Keepers, a made-up militia of sad little men in tactical costumes stormed the halls of the Capitol on January 6. Now they're facing charges of seditious conspiracy (and they're pleading not guilty). Let's review some of the actions these "brave defenders"took: Organized and extensively planned a violent attack to overthrow the results of a free and fair election. A "bloody war" and "revolution" was mentioned in their extensive messages planning January 6. Purchased tens of thousands of dollars in weapons and donned full combat and tactical gear to attend the advertised "peaceful" protest. Tried to push their way through a line of Capitol police officers in a coordinated effort to breach the Senate chamber and terrorize our elected officials into overturning the election results. These aren't the actions of men who were “bravely defending our democracy." These are the crimes of a seditious militant terrorist group who tried to destroy the government of the United States. We know it, the Justice Department knows it, and it's high time the Oath Keepers recognized that they are nothing but traitors. = We're excited for justice to be served and for these men to answer for their treason. Of the more than 700 people charged with crimes related to the insurrection, so far, the charge of seditious conspiracy is the most serious. But as the Justice Department is focusing on the treasonous Oath Keepers, we need to focus on defeating the Treason Caucus to prevent another insurrection. =** Thank you, Team Never Again Marjorie Taylor Greene, Paul Gosar, Lauren Boebert, Madison Cawthorn, Louie Gohmert, Mo Brooks, Andy Biggs. Those are just a few of the Republicans in Congress that Never Again PAC is working to defend our democracy from. Team, Last week, I was so proud to go to Santa Fe and hand in the more than 2,000 petition signatures that this team and I collected over the course of January in order to get our campaign on the primary ballot in June. **Today, I’m thrilled to let you know that we just heard back from the New Mexico Secretary of State, and it was confirmed that we collected enough nomination signatures to move forward!** This is a major accomplishment for our campaign, and I can’t thank my staff, volunteers, and supporters like you enough. Now that we’ve officially filed our campaign for Congress in NM-02 and met the signature threshold, we’ve got to keep spreading the word and building support for our movement all across the district. [**Day by day, we’re building a really special movement of people who are ready for positive change and representation in Congress. clean_body: | = Team, Last week, I was so proud to go to Santa Fe and hand in the more than 2,000 petition signatures that this team and I collected over the course of January in order to get our campaign on the primary ballot in June. Today, I’m thrilled to let you know that we just heard back from the New Mexico Secretary of State, and it was confirmed that we collected enough nomination signatures to move forward! This is a major accomplishment for our campaign, and I can’t thank my staff, volunteers, and supporters like you enough. Now that we’ve officially filed our campaign for Congress in NM-02 and met the signature threshold, we’ve got to keep spreading the word and building support for our movement all across the district. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thanks again for making this possible. Si se puede! Gabe | Gabe Vasquez is a first-generation American and former City Councilor running for Congress to challenge Yvette Herrell and fight for New Mexico’s 2nd Congressional District. He's building a people-powered movement to flip this critical House seat from red to blue and take his experience in office, passion for the environment, immigrant and civil rights, and economic justice to Congress for the people of New Mexico. | = | PAID FOR BY GABE VASQUEZ FOR CONGRESS Gabe Vasquez for Congress Drawer L Mesilla, NM 88046 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

name: Michael, NRCC Communications Director
subject: RE: Please don’t let your membership expire!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Dan Crenshaw asked me to reach out to you personally to extend an exclusive membership deadline till February 15th for you.
& nbsp; &nb; sp;
Not interested? [Unsubscribe Here](https://trk.cp20.com/form?3gm8p--fgxr-4qqlpo0&sl=2d&t=5&ac=gh7s)

| | Want to FIRE Pelosi? **Text FIRE to 21818** to help House Republicans take back the House for the American People.
---
| | | Hello Patriot,

I am reaching out with an URGENT NOTICE. **You failed to renew your 2022 Membership and it has LAPSED. **
---
| | | [RENEW NOW](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3gm8p-1xcht-4qqlpo4/ "Generic Button")
---
Dan Crenshaw was upset to not see your name on our 2022 Membership list. He asked me to reach out to you personally to **extend an exclusive membership deadline till 11:59 PM TONIGHT for you. **

**[Will you answer Dan Crenshaw's plea and renew your 2022 Membership?](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3gm8p-1xchu-4qqlpo5/ "Will you answer Dan Crenshaw's plea and renew your 2022 Membership? ")**

As Crenshaw said, renewing your membership is one of the most important things you can do to help House Republicans win back the Majority in 2022.

I don't know about you, but I am fed up with Speaker Pelosi and her Radical Left Minions. They are destroying this country with their COVID Mandates, free speech bans, and open borders. We must hold Pelosi accountable and get her FIRED in 2022.

**[We can't do it without you though. That's why I NEED you to renew your 2022 Membership before the extended February 7th, 11:59 PM deadline.](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3gm8p-1xchv-4qqlpo6/ "We can't do it without you though. That's why I NEED you to renew your 2022 Membership before the extended February 7th, 11:59 PM deadline. ")**

You are _crucial_ in this fight.

Don't let Dan Crenshaw or the rest of the House Republicans down.

---
| | | [RENEW NOW](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3gm8p-1xchw-4qqlpo7/ "Generic Button")
---

Thank you,

Michael
NCCC Communications Director

\--------- Forwarded Message ---------
From: Dan Crenshaw
Subject: Please don’t let your membership expire!

It’s Dan Crenshaw. I’m reaching out to let you know that your current 2022 Membership status is listed as _EXPIRED_.

---
| | | [RENEW NOW](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3gm8p-1xchx-4qqlpo8/ "Generic Button")
---

Let me tell you why renewing your 2022 Membership is so important:
1.Beating Nancy Pelosi’s House Democrats is going to be impossible without YOU on our side.
2. This is the most important election of our lifetimes – it will truly decide whether or not America chooses the failed socialism of the Left or the freedom and prosperity of conservatism.
3\. Your 2022 Membership is _essential_ to showing Pelosi that our grassroots donors are more powerful than her evil dark money cronies.

---
| [](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3gm8p-1xchy-4qqlpo9/)
---

Because we have yet to hear from you, your membership lapsed. **But I have good news: we have extended our deadline until midnight on February 7th.**

---
| | | [RENEW NOW](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3gm8p-1xchz-4qqlpo0/ "Generic Button")
---

I can only extend this offer to you for a limited time – but it’s critical you renew your 2022 Membership before the deadline. If we fail to make our mark, the Liberal Media, pollsters, and pundits will say it’s indicative of the electoral outcome and everything will snowball.

**[Please, I’m humbly asking: renew today>>>](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3gm8p-1xci0-4qqlpo7/ "Please, %%=v\(@sFirstName\)=%%. I’m humbly asking: renew today >>>")**

Sincerely,

Dan Crenshaw

---
| | | [RENEW NOW](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3gm8p-1xci1-4qqlpo8/ "Generic Button")
---
| |
* * *

[](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3gm8p-1xci2-4qqlpo9/ "Red Wave Image Link")

Pelosi’s raising MILLIONS and spending MILLIONS MORE attacking freedom-loving patriots across the nation. We need each and every patriot who sees this to join the fight. If we fall even a dollar short, we will lose the House to Pelosi FOREVER.

**[Can we count on you to step up?](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3gm8p-1xci3-4qqlpo0/ "Can we count on you to step up?")**
---
| | | [DONATE](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3gm8p-1xci4-4qqlpo1/ "Donate Button in Footer")
---

Thank you for your continued support and thank you for being a dedicated member of our team.

---
| [](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3gm8p-1xci5-4qqlpo2/)
---
| Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. [NRCC.org](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3gm8p-1xci6-4qqlpo3/)
---
