subject: Can our Senate majority count on you?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by SMP, www
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41599438/329523446/715298156?refcode=smp-em-header&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODY3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MDFlMTViOC1jOTg5LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Vg5kdzM3gVQsgh7MRdawbaNSYwYXMHk7eUk-htFZppc=)
Friends — There are so many ways you can be a meaningful part of this team. From donating to signing petitions in support of critically important legislation in Congress, every bit helps. But there’s also something else you can do. We need to show Republicans that we have a strong team, and one of the best ways we can do that is by getting as many people as possible to personally support our Senate majority. So today, we’re reaching out to see if we can get 5,000 people to sign on and publicly say they support Senate Democrats and our extremely important majority. **It’s going to take a BIG team to defend our majority this year and we’d be honored to have your support ahead of the election. Which is why we have to humbly ask:** [_**Will you add your name to say you personally support Senate Democrats? It’s so important for our team to know that we can count on you to fight by our side as we work to keep Senate Democrats in the majority in 2022.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41599439/329523447/-694127752?refcode=AU_SMP_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20220209_AM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODY3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MDFlMTViOC1jOTg5LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Vg5kdzM3gVQsgh7MRdawbaNSYwYXMHk7eUk-htFZppc=&emci=22ad1170-c889-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=701e15b8-c989-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=16186895) | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41599440/329523448/-694127752?refcode=AU_SMP_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20220209_AM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODY3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MDFlMTViOC1jOTg5LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Vg5kdzM3gVQsgh7MRdawbaNSYwYXMHk7eUk-htFZppc=&emci=22ad1170-c889-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=701e15b8-c989-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=16186895)

name: Abby Finkenauer
subject: my dad's sweatshirt
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abby for Iowa
body:
(Photo attached)
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41600019/329526170/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk651-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOGZlYmI2Ni1jYTg5LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lVBeJ5tAArib3x087oNsjp67GPC5HqUwwnItcOWIB3I=)
Peter – you might be wondering why I’m dropping into your inbox with a photo of me holding an old sweatshirt peppered with burn holes. Well, that sweatshirt has a lot to do with why I'm running for Iowa's Senate seat to defeat Chuck Grassley, so I hope you’ll allow me a moment to explain.
You see, my parents couldn’t give me a trust fund or debt-free college experience, but they gave me something worth a heck of a lot more: They taught me about seeing work to be done and doing it. About treating people with respect. And to never think you’re better than anyone else, no matter what you do or where you go.
I come from a working class family, and working class families are who I’ve been fighting for my whole career in public service – because far too often, it’s the big guys with the fat wallets that get what they want from our government, when it should be the other way around.
When I was elected to Congress, I took this sweatshirt that my dad wore while welding as a union pipefitter with me on my very first day, to remind myself every day why I was there and who I was fighting for.
**I’m in this fight for working families like the one I come from – because Sen. Grassley has stopped showing up for us and representing our interests. **
[**If you believe Iowans need a stronger voice – if you’re with me to flip Iowa blue and protect our Democratic Senate majority – then I’m asking you to pitch in a grassroots contribution. Please give whatever you can before midnight tonight to fuel our fight for working families, defeat Sen. Grassley and win in Iowa.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41600021/329526172/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk651-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOGZlYmI2Ni1jYTg5LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lVBeJ5tAArib3x087oNsjp67GPC5HqUwwnItcOWIB3I=)
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [DONATE $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41600023/329526174/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&express_lane=true&refcode=jtk651-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOGZlYmI2Ni1jYTg5LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lVBeJ5tAArib3x087oNsjp67GPC5HqUwwnItcOWIB3I=)

clean_body: (Photo attached) | | | = Peter – you might be wondering why I’m dropping into your inbox with a photo of me holding an old sweatshirt peppered with burn holes. Well, that sweatshirt has a lot to do with why I'm running for Iowa's Senate seat to defeat Chuck Grassley, so I hope you’ll allow me a moment to explain. You see, my parents couldn’t give me a trust fund or debt-free college experience, but they gave me something worth a heck of a lot more: They taught me about seeing work to be done and doing it. About treating people with respect. And to never think you’re better than anyone else, no matter what you do or where you go. I come from a working class family, and working class families are who I’ve been fighting for my whole career in public service – because far too often, it’s the big guys with the fat wallets that get what they want from our government, when it should be the other way around. When I was elected to Congress, I took this sweatshirt that my dad wore while welding as a union pipefitter with me on my very first day, to remind myself every day why I was there and who I was fighting for. I’m in this fight for working families like the one I come from – because Sen. Grassley has stopped showing up for us and representing our interests. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = I'm so grateful for your support. Abby | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. | | Paid for by Abby for Iowa Abby for Iowa PO Box 1843 Cedar Rapids, IA 52406 United States

**"Dr Bob has walked the walk, and his career demonstrates his longtime commitment not to politics, but to people.** "I’m on the edge of never voting in this country again because politicians have by and large decided to focus their campaigns and their time in office on winning the political game, not on working together to solve the very real and present problems of our time. "Dr. Bob has taken the time to listen, and seems to be authentic in his intention to represent all the people in this district and to work toward collaborative problem solving instead of seeing further division between Americans. "In the end, I will vote for the people who demonstrate themselves to truly be devoted to solutions, collective interests and win-win-win outcomes in a highly interconnected world. If I don’t see that in a candidate, I won’t even vote. name: Michael, NRCC Communications Director
subject: RE: Please don't let your membership expire!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
| |
---
| | | Hello Patriot,

I am reaching out with an URGENT NOTICE. **You failed to renew your 2022 Membership and it has LAPSED. **
---
| | | [RENEW NOW](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59501459:J1d0YMENY:m:1:3299561967:2DA3BBB1191DD67507878369AA5E422C:r "Generic Button")
---
Dan Crenshaw was upset to not see your name on our 2022 Membership list. He asked me to reach out to you personally to **extend an exclusive membership deadline till 11:59 PM TONIGHT for you. **

**[Will you answer Dan Crenshaw's plea and renew your 2022 Membership?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59501459:J1d0YMENY:m:1:3299561967:2DA3BBB1191DD67507878369AA5E422C:r "Will you answer
Dan Crenshaw's plea and renew your 2022 Membership? ")**

As Crenshaw said, renewing your membership is one of the most important things you can do to help House Republicans win back the Majority in 2022.

I don't know about you, but I am fed up with Speaker Pelosi and her Radical Left Minions. They are destroying this country with their COVID Mandates, free speech bans, and open borders. We must hold Pelosi accountable and get her FIRED in 2022.

**[We can't do it without you though. That's why I NEED you to renew your 2022 Membership before the extended February 9th, 11:59 PM deadline.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59501459:J1d0YMENY:m:1:3299561967:2DA3BBB1191DD67507878369AA5E422C:r "We can't do it without you though. That's why I NEED you to renew your 2022 Membership before
the extended February 7th, 11:59 PM deadline. ")**

You are _crucial_ in this fight.

Don't let Dan Crenshaw or the rest of the House Republicans down.

---
| | | [RENEW NOW](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59501459:J1d0YMENY:m:1:3299561967:2DA3BBB1191DD67507878369AA5E422C:r "Generic Button")
---

Thank you,

Michael
NCCC Communications Director

\--------- Forwarded Message ---------
From: Dan Crenshaw
Subject: Please don't let your membership expire!

It's Dan Crenshaw. I'm reaching out to let you know that your current 2022 Membership status is listed as _EXPIRED_.

---
| | | [RENEW NOW](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59501459:J1d0YMENY:m:1:3299561967:2DA3BBB1191DD67507878369AA5E422C:r "Generic
Button")
---

Let me tell you why renewing your 2022 Membership is so important:
1.Beating Nancy Pelosi's House Democrats is going to be impossible without YOU on our side.
2. This is the most important election of our lifetimes - it will truly decide whether or not America chooses the failed socialism of the Left or the freedom and prosperity of conservatism.
3\. Your 2022 Membership is _essential_ to showing Pelosi that our grassroots donors are more powerful than her evil dark money cronies.

---
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59501459:J1d0YMENY:m:1:3299561967:2DA3BBB1191DD67507878369AA5E422C:r)
---

Because we have yet to hear from you, your membership lapsed. **But I have good news: we have extended our deadline until midnight on February 9th.**

---
| | | [RENEW NOW](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59501459:J1d0YMENY:m:1:3299561967:2DA3BBB1191DD67507878369AA5E422C:r "Generic
Button")
---

I can only extend this offer to you for a limited time - but it's critical you renew your 2022 Membership before the deadline. If we fail to make our mark, the Liberal Media, pollsters, and pundits will say it's indicative of the electoral outcome and everything will snowball.

**[Please, I'm humbly asking: renew today >>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59501459:J1d0YMENY:m:1:3299561967:2DA3BBB1191DD67507878369AA5E422C:r "Please,
Patriot. I’m humbly asking: renew today >>>")**

Sincerely,

Dan Crenshaw

---
| | | [RENEW NOW](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59501459:J1d0YMENY:m:1:3299561967:2DA3BBB1191DD67507878369AA5E422C:r "Generic Button")
---
| |
* * *

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59501460:J1d0YMENY:m:1:3299561967:2DA3BBB1191DD67507878369AA5E422C:r "Red Wave Image
Link")

Pelosi's raising MILLIONS and spending MILLIONS MORE attacking freedom-loving patriots across the nation. We need each and every patriot who sees this to join the fight. If we fall even a dollar short, we will lose the House to Pelosi FOREVER.

**[Can we count on you to step up?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59501460:J1d0YMENY:m:1:3299561967:2DA3BBB1191DD67507878369AA5E422C:r "Can we count on
you to step up?")**
---
| | | [DONATE](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59501460:J1d0YMENY:m:1:3299561967:2DA3BBB1191DD67507878369AA5E422C:r "Donate Button in Footer")

Thank you for your continued support and thank you for being a dedicated member of our team.

Peter, President Biden has accomplished so much in his first year in office. He vaccinated Americans against COVID-19, enacted the Child Tax Credit, and signed a historic infrastructure bill.
**After Trump's damaging presidency, President Biden is getting America back on track.** The problem is Republicans are attacking him, spreading lies about his character, and doing everything they can to halt his progress.

name: Kara, NinaTurner.com
subject: Hi there, I'm Kara
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nina Turner for Us
body:
I wanted to reach out directly to introduce myself, and to tell you a little bit about why I’m on Team Turner.
#

Hi there, I'm Kara — Nina Turner's campaign manager. I wanted to reach out directly to introduce myself, and to tell you a little bit about why I’m on Team Turner. Thank you for taking the time to read on.
I’ve always believed the best way to tell what somebody is _going to do_ , is to take a look at what they’ve _already done_. And when you take a look at Nina’s record, it’s plain to see that she’s been fighting for US for more than 20 years.
From standing up for voting rights and access to reproductive health care as an Ohio State Senator, to serving as National Co-Chair of Senator Bernie Sanders’ 2020 presidential campaign, Nina has _always_ been about doing the most for those who have the least.
**The crises we’re facing right now require bold leaders who will stand up and fight for the most vulnerable among us. That’s what Nina’s been doing her entire life, and I know it’s what she’ll do in Congress.**
But we need your help to get her there. Because the truth is that there are a LOT of powerful people and special interests who are going to spend obscene amounts of money to try to stop us.
As you know, this campaign is funded by lots and lots of people making small donations. But that means the only way we’re going to be able to match up with the dark money flooding into this race is with your support, so I have to ask:
**[Can you please make a contribution — of $27 or whatever you can afford right now — to our 100% people-powered campaign? There is only one way we are going to win this race, and that is together.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41600949/329531062/1088907945?refcode2=92fa966c-cf89-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&refcode=em220207-1-t1-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MmZhOTY2Yy1jZjg5LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PLBY6XcFg40ZmBJvrefGvVdpukuqjaOdu4SGFF6noXg=)**
**[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41600950/329531063/1088907945?refcode2=92fa966c-cf89-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&refcode=em220207-1-t1-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MmZhOTY2Yy1jZjg5LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PLBY6XcFg40ZmBJvrefGvVdpukuqjaOdu4SGFF6noXg=)**
Thank you for everything. Our campaign has gotten off to an incredible start, and it’s thanks to supporters like you getting involved.
Now let's go win this thing!
Kara Turrentine
Campaign Manager

* * *
Paid for by Nina Turner for Us
---
Nina Turner for Us
PO Box 91956
Cleveland, OH 44101
United States This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but if you need to, [click here](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/414b3465-cf89-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a/92fa966c-cf89-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MmZhOTY2Yy1jZjg5LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PLBY6XcFg40ZmBJvrefGvVdpukuqjaOdu4SGFF6noXg=&id=113311558) to unsubscribe.

**BREAKING: Democrat Launches 1st Statewide Ad**
Peter - Our Democrat opponent has launched his first advertising barrage of the 2022 Senate campaign.

**His campaign has purchased $726,000 in statewide TV ads that launched yesterday, AND he _already_ spent $135,000 on Facebook ads in the last 30 days. **

**That's a total of $861,000 in ads, and it's still 10 months before the election.**

Peter, this race in Georgia is going to be one of the most expensive Senate campaigns in American history, and our opponent isn't wasting any time using the $23 million he has in his campaign coffers.

Since we declared our candidacy in August, we've been sounding the alarm every chance we get that **our Democrat opponent is likely to _outraise_ us.**

**But we guarantee you this - _our opponent is never going to outwork us._**

Peter,

I'm forwarding you an article from a local news outlet which did a brief writeup after I officially filed to run for election in Oregon's 4th Congressional District.

Please take a moment to glance over it if interested!

"_Republican Alek Skarlatos is running again for Oregon’s 4th Congressional District, following long-term Representative Peter DeFazio’s plans to retire.

DeFazio has served as House Representative since 1986. His decision to step down has fired up interest from a number of declared and potential candidates.

Skarlatos sees Democrats vulnerable on a number of fronts, from inflation and the Ukraine crisis under President Biden’s watch, to management of the state’s timber and coastal industries.

“This is a Democrat-leaning district, I’m not going to win by simply appealing to Republicans,” he said. “Moderates and unaffiliated voters, they want the same common sense things I think that most Americans want: lower taxes, less regulation, less inflation, managing our forests properly, and getting back to having living wage jobs in the 4th Congressional district.”

Skarlatos also opposes vaccine mandates, at least from the federal government. He says that more needs to be done about homelessness, managing forests to be more resilient to wildfires, and taking care of senior citizens.

At this point, Skarlatos is the sole Republican running for the district. The former National Guardsman challenged DeFazio in 2020, and lost by a margin of just over 5 percentage points. He’d also outraised the Springfield Democrat by roughly half a million dollars, in a contest that garnered national attention and demonstrated the stakes Republicans and Democrats saw in its outcome."_

This article orginally ran in KLCC on February 2nd

name: American Defense News
subject: For a limited time
body:
The events of the last year have no precedent in our nation’s history. They’ve shaken me, and I’m sure they’ve affected
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zr0ap5d2mohjvdrtc5sgugf3gj8jgvrgcl8pngio_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkgqracjkmoq37c9l6cqj7djl6eqjetjjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbor1dtiedjb2c9ic9i3ed5jcmrr4dr56cqj9pj6mqrr1p76mdpj5dr4mqom9cj76v970sj46oob4pjiegonco70mhij1o5l65iecpj66ljjbcj7maomcs9imdj3fc5lclp238h1e8he4933c5gm2oj4sdj6coh5u)
This sponsored message from American Defense News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z37cm153939pvdrvnj4155ke00dhva501uk4g230_rp22sh2s8i66ob1c5h69or6cph2bs) Dear Fellow American, The events of the last year have no precedent in our nation’s history. They’ve shaken me, and I’m sure they’ve affected you as well. Throughout it all, you may have noticed a recurring theme from the progressives in the media, Big Tech, and politics. They insist that the government designed by our Founding Fathers, as expressed in the Constitution, is **flawed** and **outdated** —not adequate for the challenges of our time. How should defenders of the Constitution, like you and me, respond to such charges? Well, a few early champions of the Constitution—Alexander Hamilton, John Jay, and James Madison—have given you the guide: _The Federalist Papers_. Written between October 1787 and August 1788 under the pen name Publius, _The Federalist Papers_ were originally published as newspaper editorials intended to explain the merits of the Constitution. Thomas Jefferson described _The Federalist Papers_ as “the best commentary on the principles of government which ever was written.” That means that defenders of the Constitution have no better help in understanding the principles of liberty underlying our Constitution than the words of the Founders themselves. **So, I’d like to send you our entire 10-lesson course, “ _The Federalist Papers_ ,”on DVD today with a donation of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.** _**“The Federalist Papers”**_ course comes in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or a small group. You might also find it useful for a homeschool curriculum or personal study. It’s taught by Hillsdale’s knowledgeable faculty and will deepen your understanding of this incredibly relevant document even more. The DVD can also make an excellent gift for a friend or family member unfamiliar with our nation’s founding principles of liberty. [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2ztddf3ofh0r67gbnn4u14tmft8673l0neani52io_rp22sh2s8i66ob1c5h69or6cph2bs) Supplies are limited, though, so get this special edition of **_“The Federalist Papers”_** on DVD today. Given that more than 200,000 people have taken this course already, you can bet the DVD box set won’t last long. Click here to learn more about this DVD and order your copy of _**“The Federalist Papers”**_ today: [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-federalist-papers**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zhk4mlgplnru2quaa9ujjhuqs9ofeit0q70i15rg_rp22sh2s8i66ob1c5h69or6cph2bs) Warm regards, Bill Gray Class of 2001 Associate Vice President of National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College
---

625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zc174k18oo2sfsn3sko8e3lu3kc06qfgegrpvbu8_rp22sh2s8i66ob1c5h69or6cph238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

| Peter,
The Democrats have their sights set on Florida. The Biden Administration and Lockdown Democrats are throwing everything they can at us because they know I will never stop fighting for our freedom, and that scares them. With corporate media on their side, we must fight an uphill battle every day to ensure that our message gets out there because they want us locked down, mandated and afraid. I promise that Florida will never be like the radical blue states as long as I am governor - but our fight is just beginning. Fellow Conservative,

Democrats just went public with their online fundraising data for the second half of 2021, and the numbers we're seeing across the board are astonishing.

**Democrats are proving once again, as they did in 2020, that they're going to give us Republicans a run for our money - quite literally - in this year's midterm elections.**

If you've been following our Senate race in Georgia, then you already know polling shows our race is a dead heat. You may also know our Democrat opponent, Senator Raphael Warnock, is the #1 fundraiser in the entire country. But what we're now learning is that he raised over $11 million from an astounding 410,276 donors ONLINE in the last six months.

**Fellow Conservative, that's a lot of money from a lot of donors.** In fact, he's building a massive online network of Democrat donors on the scale of a presidential campaign - not a normal Senate campaign.

That's why we're reaching out to you today with a simple request: **[will you join our grassroots army of conservative PATRIOTS who will propel us to victory in Georgia and flip the Senate in favor of Republicans?](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=05e38d01aa984299b851d5499b9bc270&_e=XFHTGIn1h5Aa28p39J-F0IjlWvuF52puhGk4-GU5a5ppmS0PM1qtin3oVRTxJTrc6FX2ukkQd1Yuph55b0eBp2rqKO_HBnheTkRuFzne3y3aJFDOAT4HLnaa18nCaVDhmFZnCLL6He1sVXyq9E7JJrcphb1U9Y1t7YMpN2pPWZnaj47OBy6wwwfzUqmgRMYABon_PoO0RHOZdYHuIoXCOzHQ06_L-iORrJOpUkQVTkgf3AF13dmY7nRmFhpoyxBJwm4USKs_93YIy7mNF8WvfeAQfoWE0nbHd6gaeup6hsRovMezdkHNsO5lg34N_H0vp66YQu6i_7K6-CSETGrAyOEQGpvz6IgF0X_8vsC7S1Rmig7JdEZKQEIbUqFcJCGzTpNRYGcd20ypW-wj4yl8GEOBYSKtGYCX4lpTq8Jfvbw_G59aZJIjmvvzCQkbGymG0DOPhSvw_-v3cJAfHV4o5h9Lfg_a9t0OEUZ_jcUlrh4%3D)**

**This month, we're setting a goal of recruiting 10,000 new donors so we can begin closing the financial lead that our opponent holds over our campaign at the moment.**

**[Can we count on you to make a gift of $3.50 or more today and add your name to our list of donors?](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=05e38d01aa984299b851d5499b9bc270&_e=XFHTGIn1h5Aa28p39J-F0IjlWvuF52puhGk4-GU5a5ppmS0PM1qtin3oVRTxJTrc6FX2ukkQd1Yuph55b0eBp2rqKO_HBnheTkRuFzne3y3aJFDOAT4HLnaa18nCaVDhmFZnCLL6He1sVXyq9E7JJrcphb1U9Y1t7YMpN2pPWZnaj47OBy6wwwfzUqmgRMYABon_PoO0RHOZdYHuIoXCOzHQ06_L-iORrJOpUkQVTkgf3AF13dmY7nRmFhpoyxBJa3PUrKVtJX4f1-pcV6mUjSQj_kV-OLMByin_L8dakPnYzZnsXUaZyC2abh1fkN-148iHrlosDKclZnQ9-iVwXlmzYzCjsIVoGCI7ovWwPGSdF6fBfPBmuLg6XyGfYo4wLq3ClwkYPdp6p2e27jpP0F4fkoeYYMsHZDNNKfl5Z8ANxqe-_5_KTCKeskeF6e3sVje74iKess3-kAxdaedElb8r3kIpAr2LTsbWcd_eenc%3D)**

[** ADD YOUR NAME TO OUR LIST OF SUPPORTERS **](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=05e38d01aa984299b851d5499b9bc270&_e=XFHTGIn1h5Aa28p39J-F0IjlWvuF52puhGk4-GU5a5ppmS0PM1qtin3oVRTxJTrc6FX2ukkQd1Yuph55b0eBp2rqKO_HBnheTkRuFzne3y3aJFDOAT4HLnaa18nCaVDhmFZnCLL6He1sVXyq9E7JJrcphb1U9Y1t7YMpN2pPWZnaj47OBy6wwwfzUqmgRMYABon_PoO0RHOZdYHuIoXCOzHQ06_L-iORrJOpUkQVTkgf3AF13dmY7nRmFhpoyxBJ-vwBSFowS5h7Nf5lv4uKX982stfLUgcttqlkdxv_0wD3vQCCsSHh8Ma0I9Wxb0ZlGausdZxDoRZAn8L8Ei_EZUKph6jF2APnjCMWbpPKsvblKw0m6mr5pl667ZfLI1I5vvAs8jfBXudBIQckq_FQr-rE3mlDEvEbSoqmdR02klTervE3_TPpSwAHg4GEAj6ZJpbajU__aN9ydplq41mwjXRH8UvtMrhhoXJJQCVVDwg%3D)
**THERE IS NO SUGARCOATING THE FACTS. Our opponent is raising A LOT OF MONEY.**

Before we ever thought about entering the race, Senator Warnock was raising millions of dollars from hundreds of thousands of Democrat donors around the country. Now that we're all in, we must do everything we can - **each and every day** - to build a donor base of PATRIOTS that rivals his list of blue state supporters.

The Senate race in Georgia will most likely be the most expensive race in the country this year, so we can't do this without you on board.

Team Herschel is made stronger from folks just like you. We hope you will join our team today.

Thanks for your consideration,

Herschel Walker
Republican Candidate for Senate

clean_body: The Senate race in Georgia will most likely be the most expensive race in the country this year, so we can’t do this without you on board. The Senate race in Georgia will most likely be the most expensive race in the country this year, so we can't do this without you on board. | Fellow Conservative, Democrats just went public with their online fundraising data for the second half of 2021, and the numbers we're seeing across the board are astonishing. Democrats are proving once again, as they did in 2020, that they're going to give us Republicans a run for our money - quite literally - in this year's midterm elections. If you've been following our Senate race in Georgia, then you already know polling shows our race is a dead heat. You may also know our Democrat opponent, Senator Raphael Warnock, is the #1 fundraiser in the entire country. But what we're now learning is that he raised over $11 million from an astounding 410,276 donors ONLINE in the last six months. Fellow Conservative, that's a lot of money from a lot of donors. In fact, he's building a massive online network of Democrat donors on the scale of a presidential campaign - not a normal Senate campaign. That's why we're reaching out to you today with a simple request: This month, we're setting a goal of recruiting 10,000 new donors so we can begin closing the financial lead that our opponent holds over our campaign at the moment. THERE IS NO SUGARCOATING THE FACTS. Our opponent is raising A LOT OF MONEY. Before we ever thought about entering the race, Senator Warnock was raising millions of dollars from hundreds of thousands of Democrat donors around the country. Now that we're all in, we must do everything we can - each and every day - to build a donor base of PATRIOTS that rivals his list of blue state supporters. The Senate race in Georgia will most likely be the most expensive race in the country this year, so we can't do this without you on board. Team Herschel is made stronger from folks just like you. We hope you will join our team today. Thanks for your consideration, Herschel Walker Republican Candidate for Senate P.S. We're really looking forward to adding 10,000 new donors to our list of supporters this month. We NEED YOU, Fellow Conservative! | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but ._

name: Ron DeSantis
subject: They're messing with the wrong guy
body:
[****](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59503982:6QG52MEND:m:1:3253819041:DF6E010A06E22E42CB1FC1979CDD1B35:r)

Peter, Joe Biden's abuse and disregard for our Constitution is only getting worse by the day.
I've taken an oath to relentlessly defend our Constitution. In the face of attacks from the corporate press and a barrage of lies and smears, I refuse to sell out Floridians to the political power grab by dishonest lockdown Democrats.
Democrats and their corporate media allies think that I'll bend the knee to their rage mobs,**but they 're messing with the wrong guy.** I know leadership requires an unwavering spirit in the face of constant pressure.
With each passing day, Joe Biden makes more decisions that chip away at our liberty. He isn't interested in data or science, **he 's interested in power and political points.** But I'm fighting back and holding him accountable.
**[HELP ME KEEP FIGHTING BACK AGAINST BIDEN'S RECKLESS POLICIES - RUSH IN $25 NOW >>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59503982:6QG52MEND:m:1:3253819041:DF6E010A06E22E42CB1FC1979CDD1B35:r "https://secure.winred.com/rondesantis/holding-the-line-rvs-tst-sm?utm_source=prospecting&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=tst_sm")**
For Joe Biden, it wasn't enough for him to rip Americans from their jobs and livelihoods. He told them it was their own fault they are unable to provide for their families. But I stood up to Joe Biden and fought for Florida's workers. Today, they are free to work without the looming threat of Joe Biden's authoritarian mandates.
I'm doing the same thing for medical professionals. Joe Biden wants to play political games, with the lives of Floridians. I'm done playing games with Joe Biden and I'm going to do everything in my power to help give our medical professionals every possible weapon in their arsenal to help their patients.
**[RUSH IN $25 TO HELP ME CONTINUE THE FIGHT](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59503982:6QG52MEND:m:1:3253819041:DF6E010A06E22E42CB1FC1979CDD1B35:r) **
We can no longer sit on the sidelines and be silent, Peter. There is too much at stake in this upcoming election.
I will never - EVER- back down when it comes to defending Floridians from the destruction of the Biden-Harris-Fauci administration. I have stood in Joe Biden's way every single time he's attempted to desecrate our Constitution, and I'm not going anywhere.
**[Can you help me continue fighting for Florida?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59503982:6QG52MEND:m:1:3253819041:DF6E010A06E22E42CB1FC1979CDD1B35:r "https://secure.winred.com/rondesantis/holding-the-line-rvs-tst-sm?utm_source=prospecting&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=tst_sm")**
**[RUSH IN $25 NOW>>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59503982:6QG52MEND:m:1:3253819041:DF6E010A06E22E42CB1FC1979CDD1B35:r "https://secure.winred.com/rondesantis/holding-the-line-rvs-tst-sm?utm_source=prospecting&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=tst_sm")**
Sincerely,
Ron DeSantis

name: Patrick Clark, Keystone Progress
subject: Wanted: Fake electors
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Keystone Progress Education Fund, www
body:
Dear Friend,

With Rudy Giuliani at the helm, 84 Americans faked being electors in the electoral college to try to overthrow the last presidential election. Almost a quarter of them are from PA.

Giuliani submitted a signed list of names to the National Archives of so-called “alternate electors” who claimed Trump won the 2020 election. The Justice Department is investigating these false electors and the Jan. 6th Committee subpoenaed more than a dozen people around this issue.

We’ve got quite the roster of prominent subverters-of-democracy here in the Keystone State.

The list even includes current officeholders: an at-large member of the Allegheny County Council and member of the county board of elections, Sam DeMarco III, and Josephine Ferro, the Monroe County register of wills. It also includes gubernatorial candidates like former U.S. Representative and mayor of Hazelton, Lou Barletta, and GOP strategist Charlie Gerow.

It has district attorney candidate Tom Carroll, who was an assistant district attorney before he shamefully harassed a Black colleague by placing a stuffed monkey on her desk. Many were slated to sign but didn’t, including former Rep. Thomas Marino, who has worked to protect pharmaceutical companies from repercussions of the opioid crisis.

Please help us rise up to protect our democracy. THE TIME IS NOW. We are mobilizing, but we need your donations TODAY to help us get there.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/keystone-progress-now?refcode=020922 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/keystone-progress-now?refcode=020922]

Every dollar helps us protect voters in our state.

In solidarity,

Pat Clark
Keystone Progress

https://www.facebook.com/KPEdFund/ [https://www.facebook.com/KPEdFund/]

Paid for by Keystone Progress Education Fund, www.kpef.info. Not affiliated with any candidate or candidate's committees.

Keystone Progress
354 S Atlantic Ave
Pittsburgh, PA 15224

###
Fellow American,

Secure Democratic elections are the backbone of this country!

_**I’m afraid our democracy is under attack.**_ Democrats want to take away voter I.D. requirements for our elections, and they are canceling anyone who stands in their way. In this country, we need government I.D. to:
****Drive a car ✅**** ****Buy alcohol ✅**** ****Apply for food stamps ✅**** ****Get on an airplane ✅**** ****Adopt a pet ✅**** ****To Vote in the United States 🚫**** Not only do Democrats think requiring I.D. is voter suppression, they are calling these laws RACIST! Over 70 percent of Americans agree- [**WE NEED VOTER I.D. REQUIREMENTS! **

**If you are sick of this divisiveness by the Democrats who are trying HARD to undermine our elections, then use your voice NOW. **](http://email.senatepatriot.com/c/11zpmf4z7H7rWY0PjN4eUCSO)

Jim Inhofe

Hello,
Fundraising is the worst part of running for elected office. But if we’re going to go up against Chuck Grassley and Mitch McConnell’s Super PACs and actually win, I need grassroots donors like you in this fight with me.
There are just 11 hours until the first deadline of the month and our campaign to defeat Chuck Grassley and turn Iowa blue. **But with time running out, my team just let me know that we’re still short of our $120,000 goal and what we need to win and protect our Democratic Senate majority.**
I’m emailing to personally ask: [**Can I count on you to give $5 or more right now – whatever you can afford before our deadline at midnight tonight – to help me defeat Chuck Grassley and protect our Senate majority?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41603750/329543769/-42398318?refcode=em20220209mid-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3N2IwZGY3YS1kYTg5LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YYUrkTxo5lbvucj89z5MGHm4eWE2XsQ9AVDew_rqlbA=)
**The stakes could not be higher. Our campaign in Iowa will likely determine who controls the Senate for the next two years.** That means combatting the assault on democracy and voting rights, addressing the climate crisis, reining in Wall Street, and taking on Big Pharma... it’s all on the line.
The only way we’ll win, though, is if we hit every fundraising goal. **I’m not taking Corporate PAC money, so I’m counting on grassroots donors like you giving now.**
[**Please, will you make a donation to my campaign now – before our deadline at midnight tonight – to help me defeat Chuck Grassley, turn Iowa blue, and protect our Senate majority?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41603763/329543808/-42398318?refcode=em20220209mid-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3N2IwZGY3YS1kYTg5LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YYUrkTxo5lbvucj89z5MGHm4eWE2XsQ9AVDew_rqlbA=)

Fellow Conservative, we warned you that ignoring us would have consequences.

Joe Biden just sent **$15 MILLION** to help Democrats win back the House and Senate majorities in this year’s elections. Democrat officials say _**“he’s all in on the midterms.”**_

You have long been one of our top supporters who powered Republicans to victory, but you let your membership status lapse!

Together we can win the 2022 midterms and send a Conservative Red Wave to Washington. Losing your support this year would be a death sentence.

This is a battle for the future of our country – _Corruption versus Constitution, Socialism versus Opportunity, Tyranny versus Freedom._
---

name: Joe Cunningham
subject: Why I’m running…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Joe Cunningham for South Carolina
body:
| My earliest political memories come from watching my dad, a judge, on the campaign trail when I was a kid.

I’ll admit, sometimes he had to bribe me (with a DQ Blizzard!) to go campaigning with him, but I got to see firsthand what kind of leader he was for our community. No matter who he met, and what challenges they faced, my father treated everyone with respect and dignity. **_He is the kind of leader I strive to be every day._**

**In my campaign for governor, I am committed to supporting and uplifting South Carolinians from all 46 counties across our state.**

**_[We can get this done, but it’s going to take all hands on deck from here until November. We’ve fallen behind our goal this week. subject: Friend, will you take action with me to protect voting rights?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CONOR LAMB FOR SENATE Conor Lamb for Senate
body:
|

Friend,

This is incredibly important, so I'm going to keep this quick. Just a few weeks ago, the Senate again allowed the antiquated 60-vote procedure known as the filibuster to block voting rights legislation.

**Republicans are abusing the filibuster to block voting rights and endanger our democracy.** Again and again, we have seen the GOP use the filibuster to block health care reform, child care expansions, union protections, necessary climate legislation, and more. **The American people deserve better.**

**[Friend, please take action and join me in calling on the Senate to pass voting rights reform and protect our sacred right to vote. body:
I'm John James, and I’m running for Congress here in Michigan’s new 10th Congressional District, and I need you as my Co-Pil
[View this message in your browser](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zhl2gpj4p03b9vp5v7o396copj7k7sd6mcja3h98_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jksrr0s3iekr79c9l6eon9d1hmej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hf5cpj6gq6cobnmqpmcptkear73cr465pb8s3gc1ir1phgeqqrct36cpoj8c5lc1jt4s3ic9j71cj6e3ib6or7m8q6cdb2mdj3fcljcoq61cj6c3gbaor0s2qj2cdl66qn48d245p25oh4cdgm2ob6cph6co324no)
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zl5m87vvom773icf3r6t5urb7njmit9p20gl747g_rp22sh2s8i66ob1c5j6coj6c1h2bs) | |
---
Co-Pilot,

**I'm John James, and I’m running for Congress here in Michigan’s new 10th Congressional District, and I need you as my Co-Pilot. **

I’ve pledged to fight for you and put the ideals of family, faith, service, and the American Dream above all else.

**[Co-Pilot, will you take my Co-Pilot Pact and have my back throughout this fight? >>](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zdve0a75eo36vtul97i6cg9hk9qpsd3gdkf4mqgo_rp22sh2s8i66ob1c5j6coj6c1h2bs)**
**2022 Co-Pilot Pact**
**_I pledge to stand by John James in the fight ahead and defend the ideals of faith, family, service, and the American Dream!_**

**_Let’s Fly!_**
**_Signed,[Co-Pilot](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zbdismv4nm7lpbatmrvlrluu3qs5kp00af23iso0_rp22sh2s8i66ob1c5j6coj6c1h2bs)_**
[**PLEDGE YOUR SUPPORT NOW**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zdnmm55tcjkchnk08c3k4arbju5ushopkefpgbk8_rp22sh2s8i66ob1c5j6coj6c1h2bs)
Co-Pilot, I swore an oath to support and defend the Constitution, and now we’re facing one of its greatest threats in our lifetime.
**Faith. Family. Service. The American Dream.**
These core tenets have always guided the American way of life, **and each one of them is at risk with our current leadership in government:**
❌ The DOJ weaponized against concerned parents for opposing critical race theory.
❌ Washington serving their own interests while abandoning our servicemen and women.
❌ Inflation and out-of-control spending are making the American Dream just that, a distant dream.
It's time to take back our country. To take back our dignity. To restore America to its greatness—[**Take the Co-Pilot Pact now if you’re ready to do that >>**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zij7c8hfm0d92jipjqke0hcjoej30fhejb232g1g_rp22sh2s8i66ob1c5j6coj6c1h2bs)

Thank you,
John James
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z5h5jcgcrd0skl7eb6d1vf90s253kt5blc125kmo_rp22sh2s8i66ob1c5j6coj6c1h2bs)
[**PLEDGE YOUR SUPPORT NOW**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zb1ggctf4594m7rf85vrskmbq2hln2g4dkck9i3g_rp22sh2s8i66ob1c5j6coj6c1h2bs)
_Get to know John:_
-At age 17, he became determined to serve his country
-He graduated from West Point, then served as a pilot in Operation Iraqi Freedom, leading two Apache platoons
-After 8 years of service, he returned home to Michigan to work in the family business
-He runs a family business, James Group International, an automotive supply chain and logistics company.
-Now, John lives with his wife Elizabeth and their three young sons in Michigan

_Let’s fly together – get involved._
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zq18o1jfliuu4mgoqfou4dbe5bi2f87ct7112da0_rp22sh2s8i66ob1c5j6coj6c1h2bs)
---

name: Dick Durbin
subject: Kwame Raoul, Susana Mendoza & Mike Frerichs
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
body:
We cannot afford to lose Democratic allies like Attorney General Kwame Raoul, Comptroller Susana Mendoza, and Treasurer Mike Frerichs.
#
Peter,
What have Attorney General Kwame Raoul, Comptroller Susana Mendoza, and Treasurer Mike Frerichs done for you and our state?
The answer is simple: They have worked tirelessly to ensure Illinois has stayed afloat during these unprecedented times the last two years.
They are also up for re-election this year and under attack by Republican candidates who want to dismantle the progress we have made.
**[We cannot afford to lose Democratic allies like Attorney General Kwame Raoul, Comptroller Susana Mendoza, and Treasurer Mike Frerichs. Will you make a split contribution of $5 or anything you can afford to their campaigns today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41604581/329547394/-1595461273?refcode=dd_em_220209_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMDkyODJjZS1kYjg5LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ULznme9820adt4O2d2TXjHZJCYi0XQynNbixG79erWA=)**
Attorney General Kwame Raoul has defended our state from Republican attacks on access to affordable health care and voting rights.
Comptroller Susana Mendoza has strengthened Illinois’ finances so we can pay for essential services Illinoisans need.
And Treasurer Mike Frerichs’ “Money Match” program has put money back into Illinoisans’ pockets by working to notify qualifying Illinois taxpayers of their unclaimed funds.
These are the types of elected officials Illinois deserves and needs to keep in office.
**[Will you join me and split a contribution of $5 to reelect these three crucial Illinois officials?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41604582/329547395/-1595461273?refcode=dd_em_220209_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMDkyODJjZS1kYjg5LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ULznme9820adt4O2d2TXjHZJCYi0XQynNbixG79erWA=)**
My best,
Dick Durbin

****[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41604583/329547396/-1595461273?refcode=dd_em_220209_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMDkyODJjZS1kYjg5LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ULznme9820adt4O2d2TXjHZJCYi0XQynNbixG79erWA=)****

name: Herschel Walker
subject: 10 months before Election Day
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
A total of over $861,000 in advertising – on television and online – has been reserved. A total of over $861,000 in advertising - on television and online - has been reserved. |
---
**BREAKING: Democrat Launches 1st Statewide Ad**
Fellow American - Our Democrat opponent has launched his first advertising barrage of the 2022 Senate campaign.

**His campaign has purchased $726,000 in statewide TV ads that launched yesterday, AND he _already_ spent $135,000 on Facebook ads in the last 30 days. **

**That's a total of $861,000 in ads, and it's still 10 months before the election.**

Fellow American, this race in Georgia is going to be one of the most expensive Senate campaigns in American history, and our opponent isn't wasting any time using the $23 million he has in his campaign coffers.

Since we declared our candidacy in August, we've been sounding the alarm every chance we get that **our Democrat opponent is likely to _outraise_ us.**

**But we guarantee you this - _our opponent is never going to outwork us._**

We're going to keep this message very short: we need your help to keep pace with what our opponent is doing. **[That's why we're kindly asking you to chip in $3, $5, or even $7 today to help us fill our advertising fund.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=1334375e6d504e74ac69806831010ea4&_e=dvdcjYKwn9miYLWdvZDW9FLWO5FAbwJch9JlYtHImd_KOQwGBuUbiaR0hLaJJ1MYFJ6TSjeW22LEej8gLDj_oQPM5VpDWb7Ks-EDag_wOHWHRzx5euBfsaxmkNGS1xUKRf61tFrzRnc146R5JxjHQakRqmPIswJA-cSvyzJuQMqzh7Cg7fbJqswJy7S8zq7ijjO-uiMYTO0K4GwUltTggwpvrIYWDkLJrNGsyDiFEwigsf0_Qf5SLO67yh3lE_5GbdJ2jHV0-TdHYMRYVA1NsiD5eBNCoU9JTSc01NhWnzIy-wRG4YPfT_OXMLxZJRG4vB_LyEKBUjaC_XPZJu829hdlkJt8xqMcXCiNWX1wE9ACxdUjMQzxJhZTuisHts132OQhck-OjLGShdNLwO1LcFThS0aIClHLpKR5dGF5o9NfkY0e--VX4RPVDMn3MBRhyfeUiHHB8I0JJiSAmsIrXg%3D%3D)**

We're counting on you to help fuel this campaign!

Thank you,

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=1334375e6d504e74ac69806831010ea4&_e=dvdcjYKwn9miYLWdvZDW9FLWO5FAbwJch9JlYtHImd_KOQwGBuUbiaR0hLaJJ1MYFJ6TSjeW22LEej8gLDj_oQPM5VpDWb7Ks-EDag_wOHWHRzx5euBfsaxmkNGS1xUKRf61tFrzRnc146R5JxjHQakRqmPIswJA-cSvyzJuQMqzh7Cg7fbJqswJy7S8zq7ijjO-uiMYTO0K4GwUltTggwpvrIYWDkLJrNGsyDiFEwigsf0_Qf5SLO67yh3lE_5GrB8PeYDThPK7kXygFr_L_WT1BWRVnwH97B2ewP4Y4ClXm968TUJfGeQksFlshlWsBD39Mn5BobLIXr0Z26P0mQvGQcXZKL7xZ8pb8m6fRQmZ1KhIedfeGs-kbVzmYHWcxwhyGlJT0JBEn1Pp9rq8xS6vnVPhZV4JqvPqmR_szT5iQiJZuJOArOPvbIapgA0J8PNZ8yYCLcl9_l3L1MXxzw%3D%3D)
Herschel Walker

A total of over $861,000 in advertising - on television and online - has been reserved. | BREAKING: Democrat Launches 1st Statewide Ad Fellow American - Our Democrat opponent has launched his first advertising barrage of the 2022 Senate campaign. His campaign has purchased $726,000 in statewide TV ads that launched yesterday, AND he already spent $135,000 on Facebook ads in the last 30 days. That's a total of $861,000 in ads, and it's still 10 months before the election. Fellow American, this race in Georgia is going to be one of the most expensive Senate campaigns in American history, and our opponent isn't wasting any time using the $23 million he has in his campaign coffers. Since we declared our candidacy in August, we've been sounding the alarm every chance we get that our Democrat opponent is likely to outraise us. But we guarantee you this - our opponent is never going to outwork us. We're going to keep this message very short: we need your help to keep pace with what our opponent is doing. We're counting on you to help fuel this campaign! Thank you, Herschel Walker P.S. Spending $861,000 on TV and digital ads over 250 days before the election is proof that our Democrat opponent is very concerned about his re-election chances. | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. name: Jameson Ellis
subject: Let's meet up tomorrow night, Peter...
body:
| | | | |
---
| | Hey Peter,

Tomorrow night at 7pm, we will be having a meet & greet at Splendora Cafe and pick up your Jameson Ellis For Congress yard signs, have some great food, & get to know more about our fight to fire Dan Crenshaw!

Here are the details:

When
Thursday, February 10th, 7:00pm - 8:30pm

Where
Splendora Cafe
23085 Speed St.
Splendora, TX 77357

We are also looking at some meet & greets in The Woodlands, as well. If you'd like to help host a meet & greet, please let me know!

Early voting is right around the corner... Valentines Day, February 14th.

Primary day is March 1, 2022.

If you're on Facebook, tap below to let us know you're coming tomorrow night, and don't forget to bring family and friends!

If you're not on Facebook, totally okay... we'll hopefully see you tomorrow!

name: Team Ortega
subject: All Hands On Deck - Campaign Meeting!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ortega For Congress
body:
Join Mike & the team Sunday, Feb. 13th at 12PM PT! | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41605145/329549798/-1122995658?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220110affhousing_TO_full_SLB_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU2NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOTAzNjdlNS1kZTg5LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ESlgTg8Ztbl5zPkKR1yFAT9fCyfo0zHo8DdDsLZ0fBc=)
---
Friends,

A huge thank you to you for staying up to date with our campaign. Some good news: we're on track to get on the ballot for this election! Our AMAZING team hit the ground running and got the signatures we needed! Now that we're FOUR months out from the primary election, we have to hit the pavement and grind this win out, Ortega-style. We'll be discussing the path to victory and how we're going to beat the corporate-captured incumbent here in CA-46 (we also have some HUGE news to share!) [Join us for our HUGE campaign-wide meeting this Sunday, Feb. 13th at 12PM PT!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41605146/329549799/-589050658?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU2NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOTAzNjdlNS1kZTg5LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ESlgTg8Ztbl5zPkKR1yFAT9fCyfo0zHo8DdDsLZ0fBc=&emci=b81a0e1d-db89-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=d90367e5-de89-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=12523946)

This Sunday, February 13th at 12PM PT we're going to have a virtual meeting to share our updates and plans. We absolutely cannot do this without you - so if you can give about a 30-40 minutes of your time before kicking back and watching the Super Bowl or heading to work - it would mean the world to us here at Ortega For Congress. [Sign up here and get the link for the event!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41605147/329549800/-589050658?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU2NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOTAzNjdlNS1kZTg5LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ESlgTg8Ztbl5zPkKR1yFAT9fCyfo0zHo8DdDsLZ0fBc=&emci=b81a0e1d-db89-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=d90367e5-de89-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=12523946)
We hope to see you soon!

In Solidarity/En Solidaridad,

Alex Coronado
Campaign Manager

clean_body: Join Mike & the team Sunday, Feb. 13th at 12PM PT! | = Friends, A huge thank you to you for staying up to date with our campaign. Some good news: we're on track to get on the ballot for this election! Our AMAZING team hit the ground running and got the signatures we needed! Now that we're FOUR months out from the primary election, we have to hit the pavement and grind this win out, Ortega-style. We'll be discussing the path to victory and how we're going to beat the corporate-captured incumbent here in CA-46 (we also have some HUGE news to share!) This Sunday, February 13th at 12PM PT we're going to have a virtual meeting to share our updates and plans. We absolutely cannot do this without you - so if you can give about a 30-40 minutes of your time before kicking back and watching the Super Bowl or heading to work - it would mean the world to us here at Ortega For Congress. We hope to see you soon! In Solidarity/En Solidaridad, Alex Coronado Campaign Manager | Our campaign is fueled by everyday people like you chipping in whatever they can. Friend, Days ago, the **Republican National Committee (RNC) officially called the violent January 6 insurrection at the U.S. Capitol “legitimate political discourse,” and voted to censure two of their own representatives for courageously supporting the Jan. 6 investigation.** Republicans are literally defending a violent mob attacking police officers, breaking and entering the Capitol, and threatening lawmakers’ lives — as well as Trump’s “Stop the Steal” rally and efforts to overturn the results of a free and fair election — as “legitimate political discourse.” That is utterly bonkers. With our fragile democracy on the line, Fitzpatrick and his fellow Republicans have once again chosen party over country. Not only are they justifying what was essentially an attempted coup on our democratic government, but they are punishing the two members of their party who had the spines to speak out against it. The GOP are becoming more extreme by the day. _This is exactly why we need to replace Fitzpatrick at the ballot box and give PA-01 a leader in Washington who is unafraid to put the people first._ **[Fundraising has slowed since February started, and Fitzpatrick has $1.5 million in the bank. **THE LATEST CAMPAIGN NEWS** **Cranley for Ohio officially filed to run** After submitting the maximum number of allowed signatures (3,000 to be exact), John Cranley and Teresa Fedor are officially filed to run for the governorship! We couldn’t be more excited about this, team. With this filing, Ohio’s comeback story is now _just around the corner,_ and we look forward to building more momentum in the coming months. **Cranley-Fedor Social Justice Tour** Starting Monday in Toledo, John and Teresa kicked off a month-long social and criminal justice town hall-style tour that will take them all across Ohio. A core pillar of the Cranley-Fedor ticket is criminal justice reform, and this conversation will only help move the ball forward. Joining them on stage to help dive into this topic are a survivor of human trafficking and an exoneree from the Ohio Innocence Project, which John co-founded prior to taking office in an effort to combat wrongful imprisonment. If you’d like to be part of the conversation, too, [**click here to RSVP for an event!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41587079/329476984/-128263447?refcode=ea.2b3b0894-b589-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ms=ea.2b3b0894-b589-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYjNiMDg5NC1iNTg5LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9i8kB3RtZJil9CcJpqfwEF8KCy8XtWFiKix6ZW0xF1Q=&emci=8677b22d-2289-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=2b3b0894-b589-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=22604289) **Upcoming Cranley-Whaley debate** In October, John called on Nan Whaley to agree to a series of gubernatorial primary debates. After months of stonewalling, she’s finally agreed to debate. John firmly believes that voters ought to have the opportunity to meet their candidates before they head to the polls, so this development in the race is particularly exciting. With John’s vision for Ohio being second to none, we’re more than ready to let voters hear directly from the candidates in an open forum. Keep an eye out for the details of the debate in the coming weeks.
* * *

body:
Democrat politicians are mask-less while kids are...

| | | | | |
---
| | Dear Friend,
I'm sure by now you have seen this photo of Stacey Abrams MASK-LESS in a classroom surrounded by children who are forced to wear masks in school.

[ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001x-wb7jmQcst37JXhRFBadUZusFFZEj86uycEzCJ88TjxqS3VLn658n2iZkjYTIaCSOm6DHCfSiMirPcUavlZWaiCg3j96YLZKVMmJtQcfphQzHqSEr-_54gTp435YH4kCFFodFJg_gcAL6eMrvVyhUJHEVK8JIf2NyYj8JmVX7SbNuCWVW_E7Kf0YbYsFQZc&c=F855CdpHPs8i9qNby_DagzCeLrDueG--SNyT_AP10-QGfwPnytGcXA==&ch=wXsAQBvH55quLIWN4_4UcpA2rM_LXBr0u5cJ43mA64YTeCs_rOmoHA==)

Democrat politicians are mask-less while all the children around them suffer. This is child abuse.
The radical left continues to put themselves ahead of our children. It's unacceptable.
Send me to Congress and I will fight to DEFUND any school that forces our children to wear masks. Parents, NOT politicians should decide whether their child wears a mask.
[Donate $25 or more to help me WIN in 2022, and STOP the masking of children in our schools.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001x-wb7jmQcst37JXhRFBadUZusFFZEj86uycEzCJ88TjxqS3VLn658n2iZkjYTIaCSOm6DHCfSiMirPcUavlZWaiCg3j96YLZKVMmJtQcfphQzHqSEr-_54gTp435YH4kCFFodFJg_gcAL6eMrvVyhUJHEVK8JIf2NyYj8JmVX7SbNuCWVW_E7Kf0YbYsFQZc&c=F855CdpHPs8i9qNby_DagzCeLrDueG--SNyT_AP10-QGfwPnytGcXA==&ch=wXsAQBvH55quLIWN4_4UcpA2rM_LXBr0u5cJ43mA64YTeCs_rOmoHA==)

If Nancy Pelosi and left win in 2022, the mandates will never stop!
[STAND with me TODAY and let's FIRE Pelosi and take our freedom back!](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001x-wb7jmQcst37JXhRFBadUZusFFZEj86uycEzCJ88TjxqS3VLn658n2iZkjYTIaCSOm6DHCfSiMirPcUavlZWaiCg3j96YLZKVMmJtQcfphQzHqSEr-_54gTp435YH4kCFFodFJg_gcAL6eMrvVyhUJHEVK8JIf2NyYj8JmVX7SbNuCWVW_E7Kf0YbYsFQZc&c=F855CdpHPs8i9qNby_DagzCeLrDueG--SNyT_AP10-QGfwPnytGcXA==&ch=wXsAQBvH55quLIWN4_4UcpA2rM_LXBr0u5cJ43mA64YTeCs_rOmoHA==)

Jake Evans America First Candidate for CD-6

body:
I’m glad to have you by my side.

| Authorized by Republican Headquarters Peter, As one of the **TOP REPUBLICANS** in Englewood, FL, I’m _**proud**_ to have you by my side. clean_body: I’m glad to have you by my side. | Authorized by Republican Headquarters Peter, As one of the TOP REPUBLICANS in Englewood, FL, I’m proud to have you by my side. Now, I’m URGING you to accept my offer and join my exclusive Chairman’s Club. I’m opening the Chairman’s Club to new members in 2022, and it’s so very important to me for you to be on the official supporters list. So if you have been thinking of joining, now is the time. | Official Chairman’s Club Invitation EMAIL: SUPPORTER ID: #05966106 DEADLINE: 11:59 PM TONIGHT SUGGESTED GIFT: $10 or more | | | | | | I’m looking forward to seeing you on the list, Peter. Michael Whatley Chairman, North Carolina Republican Party

body:
A group of Democratic gatekeepers just launched a brand-new super PAC for one of Malcolm’s opponents
#

Friend,
We apologize in advance for being so direct, but this request is that urgent.

From: Bob Healey [](http://links.donatetohealey.com/u/click?_t=b85a497f2e8f41748b694630e904c604&_m=683ec5f915d04846b50e544433b03b69&_e=6DqYNYEHoUiytuI9Z607-EFk9rK67Vi7zdqJqOZQ9yuqjrp6LDk8w81H4xqXXNwHFptcV66iGJtKSuhzAy3_Gdz9Ias6YSc9nN7AwfD2ZMd-iQaClfeHbidwbScJlT2BWlE_NrQSs2-n6JTo2LHtoOfxXgoKnNIq3IzrSLCdHhzCBVjijhy7x5jhDseN0ayvluzBg2f9q5d1XlcaLepyJlYr4zxZFZzTZhLMKS-T9L7djQuzRLXbCZeubb7FP_ULDYyF0qTtmsbtWLLQP-ODt_ngk0nrxAT1jhRcGHMFXawYLqjjvDdnmbHcfPXQBgsa0XzeFqZBViZsT9ABNcZpTaaPZ-8MVEZdhacnIxqDNTdBELCLiHTyPZvxRU2TFRdR3cGGepDHqGr6NxPPs6y-zmEGGsvZBGKBc8OaFmwBJhHEKbys43WQzXGoFPWPjiNx) Friend, Governor Phil Murphy just announced that he will not be removing his restrictive school mask mandate until the middle of March. **I have one question for Governor Murphy: why not NOW?**
_Waiting an extra month on this is just absurd. Fellow Conservative,

Imagine the progressive Democrats’ worst nightmare:

A Republican woman with staunch conservative credentials, who proved that you can have a family and a successful career, an American patriot that dismantles the Left’s narrative that the GOP is for men and misogynists – I’m hoping that you’ll help me become the woman that takes back the House for Republicans in 2022.

**[My name is April Becker: I am a lawyer, mother, wife, unapologetic conservative, and currently, the Democrats’ worst nightmare.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=b7eddbc600174d12a537c2662dd9b98c&_e=zddyp_yQeO9tcrodf-z254leYzRZ0RDpj7wu9p0EY8HD2Br9OQsIQgi72_3o3-8Fbe0bQG6ay8OGl79BU8Kpfbz_LUv1oeCDqkakQXWhu4EsdzbyhEnN2YSt5tiXfsIgCGm6Zx0Qx0EtUXeQ-Z7A4il_t95aLJtGrOYAXhnjD6d6YAeUTgru5wTAsWmnioWmPiYvJbcWlYm7bl7MXyiH5STIHGPsOQtAkWCPiSYA1iFhVRxrORyxJzdtLuoYjkeARugz1y77_4r9d55C4UsSJJT4uf44JD3Z6VkHDFHRWtp6RXd1DOVHXzKibcbywlt8vIYAtfKXV2aXL2s2gI1heeIQdYovxhoyoLR555gfN0N0AetV2oYuRkrs0ANVoDaZMNpyofXMh80LsJRqLpgkv9cUjTHe3ArH0qLlujlKmsjM5thISTi8GuI0Pq_9XkPEs96M-9ZSVfUz5nsvso0bUA%3D%3D)**

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=b7eddbc600174d12a537c2662dd9b98c&_e=zddyp_yQeO9tcrodf-z254leYzRZ0RDpj7wu9p0EY8HD2Br9OQsIQgi72_3o3-8Fbe0bQG6ay8OGl79BU8Kpfbz_LUv1oeCDqkakQXWhu4EsdzbyhEnN2YSt5tiXfsIgCGm6Zx0Qx0EtUXeQ-Z7A4il_t95aLJtGrOYAXhnjD6d6YAeUTgru5wTAsWmnioWmPiYvJbcWlYm7bl7MXyiH5STIHGPsOQtAkWCPiSYA1iFhVRxrORyxJzdtLuoYjkeAAayhsnHHsawLutD-B1e5xg1sVzsY38qESZceufF9nc6BQbOdlXeg7o_MUtFRb34subNNDTdv7OqkWTOtLXSOg6f7YZX08wtepHqjOjwk7cOGIlefXKSZcv-CWw9BK6_vif-6sHc1qqu0aCSvrBs8K8D9Zcfb3o1UqDM9SORJ5BF7LIMu4LFuNBvqh1OZvDtOctKx4FSXE48AQ-2QBZYwrg%3D%3D)
[**SUPPORT APRIL TODAY -> **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=b7eddbc600174d12a537c2662dd9b98c&_e=zddyp_yQeO9tcrodf-z254leYzRZ0RDpj7wu9p0EY8HD2Br9OQsIQgi72_3o3-8Fbe0bQG6ay8OGl79BU8Kpfbz_LUv1oeCDqkakQXWhu4EsdzbyhEnN2YSt5tiXfsIgCGm6Zx0Qx0EtUXeQ-Z7A4il_t95aLJtGrOYAXhnjD6d6YAeUTgru5wTAsWmnioWmPiYvJbcWlYm7bl7MXyiH5STIHGPsOQtAkWCPiSYA1iFhVRxrORyxJzdtLuoYjkeAXLZ8L_qvrbgK2GXHGZM9ZT0gY6WDRBvcqHO0SWo8n4GJYYzX_rh1cqqHCfRAREZK4WMFa7ffAd7RNnt9Ekf6PoNw25dDx8Y1dmksWoRhRw6YthIIgIjm8_aMHy2HoF6Mm8UesGwaJNCWxYmmJhydKqUY-SST0slQfyQD0QrWR6gZOgMrPAhol3LcfptjLr7veRXZ-nBe5UAgfMZkcUumVA%3D%3D)
I am running for Congress in one of the National Republican Congressional Committee’s target districts, Nevada-03, where I am taking on a little-known Democrat with no accomplishments to speak of -- other than voting with Pelosi 99% of the time. Honestly, this could be the sleeper race that finally forces Nancy Pelosi to put her Washington D.C. penthouse on the market, having lost the House majority for the last time in her career.

**[Fellow Conservative, I am under no illusions that you’re going to back my campaign the first time you hear from me, so I’m willing to work for your support. Today I’d like to explain to you why I’m emailing and why my campaign for Congress is worth investing in.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=b7eddbc600174d12a537c2662dd9b98c&_e=zddyp_yQeO9tcrodf-z254leYzRZ0RDpj7wu9p0EY8HD2Br9OQsIQgi72_3o3-8Fbe0bQG6ay8OGl79BU8Kpfbz_LUv1oeCDqkakQXWhu4EsdzbyhEnN2YSt5tiXfsIgCGm6Zx0Qx0EtUXeQ-Z7A4il_t95aLJtGrOYAXhnjD6d6YAeUTgru5wTAsWmnioWmPiYvJbcWlYm7bl7MXyiH5STIHGPsOQtAkWCPiSYA1iFhVRxrORyxJzdtLuoYjkeA7siiW27D-RJv31n2vbAQopWa2v6-Cye43Rn6xsa7h_7zLUsb-Up9E6cwzaJp5rMSCvVXVebl__rSIgIgNcQQjcJS7PZOCr5uUjvR9nPG9Yy0mLf9QcpnGmDAWaoq-tQ1X5AH0_LF3d_6pidGv0CtjGm0tFZyQn_vdM3TvYRj6mgqMQquseG_dUVqNewGvhtfS7a6ZiGuUmoBpUbo0f89xg%3D%3D)**

With three children, I worked to pay my own way through college, and then law school.**When I wasn’t packing lunches and sitting in school pick-up lines, I was a practicing attorney, building a business, fighting for the underdog, and taking on tough cases.** I am proud to be a working mom. Now I want to take that same drive and attitude to Congress.

I’m the type of person who outworks everyone in the room and exceeds expectations. My plan is to take down one of Pelosi’s most trusted partners before she even knows she’s in trouble. My hope is that by the time she finds out, I’ll have such a groundswell of grassroots support that it will simply be too late.

**[Fellow Conservative, I have taken on tougher battles than this in the courtroom and that’s how I know I am going to need every grassroots conservative across the nation with me to flip this critical House seat.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=b7eddbc600174d12a537c2662dd9b98c&_e=zddyp_yQeO9tcrodf-z254leYzRZ0RDpj7wu9p0EY8HD2Br9OQsIQgi72_3o3-8Fbe0bQG6ay8OGl79BU8Kpfbz_LUv1oeCDqkakQXWhu4EsdzbyhEnN2YSt5tiXfsIgCGm6Zx0Qx0EtUXeQ-Z7A4il_t95aLJtGrOYAXhnjD6d6YAeUTgru5wTAsWmnioWmPiYvJbcWlYm7bl7MXyiH5STIHGPsOQtAkWCPiSYA1iFhVRxrORyxJzdtLuoYjkeApkLIHrR9q6jjEPtZV2wwjkZo62Boqyz-P4sZqOan_0ZJ0cUXv9l246EnBEeb8jdObNQUMQZGQ-vyxaEcj5rGGkyOx9it-31ytYFId_FMFon__vtQ8n18UgNdcvWgYfG4C2AiQ-E5iYdGJIOksClHkx5O9wnxnsHr9biEFMiSv0bQ122yhbBpz-QSM4rlLuxhNweyJ23DgUy717xK5TWHHg%3D%3D)**

**[I know you don’t know me but take a moment to look up my district. Do some research, and if you’re inclined afterward, please consider a donation of $10 to help me flip this seat RED.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=b7eddbc600174d12a537c2662dd9b98c&_e=zddyp_yQeO9tcrodf-z254leYzRZ0RDpj7wu9p0EY8HD2Br9OQsIQgi72_3o3-8Fbe0bQG6ay8OGl79BU8Kpfbz_LUv1oeCDqkakQXWhu4EsdzbyhEnN2YSt5tiXfsIgCGm6Zx0Qx0EtUXeQ-Z7A4il_t95aLJtGrOYAXhnjD6d6YAeUTgru5wTAsWmnioWmPiYvJbcWlYm7bl7MXyiH5STIHGPsOQtAkWCPiSYA1iFhVRxrORyxJzdtLuoYjkeA3aKNJl0p6tC7TNRimjXM69P1uxgY_1QdmrOv678-6lvTsMZU-v7KzOOwf7nuFIdMdduOZ_bdB0FaH-5kEeEL2PSP-E7JId3GIkEIyKVmmSAOmUdb90KFBnTeeJ4JwFTQMUHj6Iy4VPzLrHO8V3I2cATZZZrQgiUNnKJkTMCIlFepSEHfkNHa08gdVDiE9fciK8qtn3vlQAfHQVQtV2mtkA%3D%3D)**

Last election, we saw more women elected to Congress than we ever have before -- and 31 of them were Conservative Republicans! We are the antithesis of what progressive Democrats want women to be, and we hold the power to take back the House in the Midterm Election.

Thank you,
[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=b7eddbc600174d12a537c2662dd9b98c&_e=zddyp_yQeO9tcrodf-z254leYzRZ0RDpj7wu9p0EY8HD2Br9OQsIQgi72_3o3-8Fbe0bQG6ay8OGl79BU8Kpfbz_LUv1oeCDqkakQXWhu4EsdzbyhEnN2YSt5tiXfsIgCGm6Zx0Qx0EtUXeQ-Z7A4il_t95aLJtGrOYAXhnjD6d6YAeUTgru5wTAsWmnioWmPiYvJbcWlYm7bl7MXyiH5STIHGPsOQtAkWCPiSYA1iFhVRxrORyxJzdtLuoYjkeAWA93WaEr2ByBcUH49jniPn8wLT3VZYSUL85gsprC-HpOHFOw4WLFMIa6thD7TWuch8ICzB_3990WlEhAH7Vlh7_M8Qw7vl_RghPJk8IT5Ln_5IOuzkchUeNNJgRgwfaXOSKYr_tVla0NTlethAo08E8dEjVfwA-mI5cUKEyH5dzTQKyVlseqckPMZpC4KSdDTEPe1967_c8b3wnI88gIRg%3D%3D)

subject: RE: Did we do something wrong?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
I just ran the numbers and we are extremely short of our January Membership goal
& nbsp; &nb; sp;
Not interested? [Unsubscribe Here](https://trk.cp20.com/form?3go6b--fgxr-4qqlpo6&sl=2d&t=5&ac=gh7s)

| | Want to FIRE Pelosi? **Text FIRE to 21818** to help House Republicans take back the House for the American People.
---
| | |
* * *
Hi there,

I hate to be the one to tell you this, but this is bad. **Really bad. **

**I just ran the numbers and we are _extremely_ short of our 2022 Membership goal.** I saw that Brian Mast reached out to you about the deadline and you have yet to respond.

I thought I would shoot my shot and let you know that**[I have extended the deadline for you to renew your membership to February 15th. You must act fast though because this deadline is quickly approaching >>>](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3go6b-1xe50-4qqlpo3/ "I have extended the deadline for you to renew your membership till January 15th. You must act fast though because this deadline is quickly approaching >>> ")**

---
| [](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3go6b-1xe51-4qqlpo4/)
---
| | | [RENEW MEMBERSHIP](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3go6b-1xe52-4qqlpo5/ "RENEW NOW")
---

Your membership supports Conservatives in winning back the House in 2022 and FIRING NANCY PELOSI one and for all. That's why we need you to step up.

I need you to help us reach our goal. **[Will you step up and renew your membership before 11:59 PM, February 15th?](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3go6b-1xe53-4qqlpo6/ "Will you step up and renew your membership before 11:59 PM, February 15th? ")**

---
| | | [RENEW MEMBERSHIP](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3go6b-1xe54-4qqlpo7/ "RENEW NOW")
---
Thank you,

Katy (NRCC CFO)

\--------- Forwarded Message ---------
From: **SSG Brian Mast, U.S. Army (ret.)**
Subject: Did we do something wrong?

Patriot, it’s Brian Mast.

Newt Gingrich emailed you.

Nicole Malliotakis emailed you.

Elise Stefanik emailed you.

Kevin McCarthy emailed you.

Donald Trump Jr. emailed you.

_**Now I’m emailing you.**_

There’s only a few days left in January and House Republicans need to finalize our membership lists for 2022. **Failure to renew by 11:59pm on January 31st will result in your membership being terminated permanently. **

---
| | | [RENEW NOW](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3go6b-1xe55-4qqlpo8/ "RENEW NOW")
---

So I wanted to reach out one final time before our deadline and urge you to keep your membership current for 2022.

**[Renew my membership now>>>](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3go6b-1xe56-4qqlpo9/ "Renew my membership now >>>")**

---
| [](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3go6b-1xe57-4qqlpo0/)
---
| | | [RENEW NOW](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3go6b-1xe58-4qqlpo1/ "RENEW NOW")
---

**Here’s why renewing your membership for 2022 is so important:**
1. You will be providing conservative candidates across the country the resources they need to go on offense and bring the fight to Democrats.
2. You will be showing your support for our plans to hold Joe Biden and Democrats accountable for their corruption and failures.
3. You will be a critical piece of our House Republican team as we work to take back the House and fire Nancy Pelosi for good.

November’s election will be the most important election of my lifetime. With America in chaos under Joe Biden’s failed leadership, it’s up to Republicans in Congress to put America first and fight for the solutions to the problems that affect everyday Americans like you and me.

It’s simple: _We need patriots like you to step up and help us save America._ **[Your support today will ensure that we have the resources needed to wage this fight and to take back the House, so please make sure you renew your 2022 Membership NOW>>>](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3go6b-1xe59-4qqlpo2/ "Your support today will ensure that we have the resources needed to wage this fight and to take back the House, so please make sure you renew your 2022 Membership NOW >>>")**

---
| | | [RENEW NOW](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3go6b-1xe5a-4qqlpo2/ "RENEW NOW")
---
| | | | [](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3go6b-1xe5b-4qqlpo3/)
---

Brian Mast is a U.S. Army Veteran. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the U.S. Department of Defense or the Department of the Army.
---
| | | Thank you in advance and God bless,
---
| | | [](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3go6b-1xe5c-4qqlpo4/)
---
SSG Brian Mast, U.S. Army (ret.)
---

| |
* * *

[](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3go6b-1xe5d-4qqlpo5/ "Red Wave Image Link")

Pelosi’s raising MILLIONS and spending MILLIONS MORE attacking freedom-loving patriots across the nation. We need each and every patriot who sees this to join the fight. If we fall even a dollar short, we will lose the House to Pelosi FOREVER.

**[Can we count on you to step up?](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3go6b-1xe5e-4qqlpo6/ "Can we count on you to step up?")**
---
| | | [DONATE](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3go6b-1xe5f-4qqlpo7/ "Donate Button in Footer")
---

Thank you for your continued support and thank you for being a dedicated member of our team.

[Follow Us Here.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001h1mzx_Yw5plICo2tSbWJZDCX44j7OQaYyHI5HC3NSXN7QV3DjERfQnrHdklqQ27f5neS6Kgn54fCnAa_nEUyn4nPTchr-WafIDg-0Bu7JWg14E8rjzX5Y5a01pcYJrlbZdLugrujgToNYfy84s2P-4RR0zdXKI8p-zq1wu8wro0=&c=79fHv0mgixvk8SiwzY1Uc1Da1VSNyZQJ0CtFxWfw0_pRHwyexxVMKA==&ch=NxHsexjESTFmVYWOgPXF4PZ0LMcwDMwWpOqLTqzirA2qDEni3mqK5w==)

| |
---
| A PERSONAL WORD ON THE CHINESE VIRUS
---
| | |
---|---
|
This email is not about my campaign and isn't about fundraising, it's about making sure that you and your family are protected so please read on.

Recently, several people I know have caught the Chinese virus. A few have died and some have been in the hospital for extended periods of time. I want to make sure you and your family have everything available to combat this virus if you or someone you love gets it.

Two weeks ago, I learned about a group of medical doctors in a clinic in Florida that do prescriptions specifically for the treatment of Covid. If you catch Covid early, proper treatment is very important. They will give you a preventative prescription so you have medication on hand should you become ill with it. I cannot stress enough how important prevention is in the fight against the virus.

The preventative medications they prescribe are Ivermectin, ZPAC, and hydroxychloroquine. These medications have been lab and time tested for decades and are the very same medications President Trump, Joe Rogan, and countless others took to beat this illness. Many doctors will not prescribe these tested and award-winning medications because of, in my opinion, the lies coming from Big Pharma, the US Government, the media, and of course Dr. Fauci.

So, here is what I did after learning about this clinic in the free state of Florida.

I made a telemedicine appointment, met with the doctor online, paid the costs, and they sent my prescriptions to my home. Easy.

Here are the details. The cost of the appointment was $110. The cost of the prescription medication was $155. The Doctor sent the prescriptions to a pharmacy in Florida and the pharmacy called me for payment. Once I paid the cost (the $155), they shipped the medications to me.

I care about each and every one of you and I wanted to share this with all of you. Please be prepared. The information about this clinic came from an interview I saw of a nurse--Erin is her name--who works there. During the beginning of the pandemic, she was a traveling nurse and went to New York City to help out. What she discovered was unreal. She ended up going undercover with a hidden video camera. She did an expose about it and also wrote a book.

Here are the links for the clinic and Nurse Erin.

Clinic: [www.americasclinic.com](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001h1mzx_Yw5plICo2tSbWJZDCX44j7OQaYyHI5HC3NSXN7QV3DjERfQjeGyu0eq5c4chTPko6koywcDAzYsyYbCXMOg1_66sQrX2wdPF4POpzWXSgGK01jGPDURJ99bbOgW94EMey3Rj9FzjX_XlpF9g==&c=79fHv0mgixvk8SiwzY1Uc1Da1VSNyZQJ0CtFxWfw0_pRHwyexxVMKA==&ch=NxHsexjESTFmVYWOgPXF4PZ0LMcwDMwWpOqLTqzirA2qDEni3mqK5w==)

Nurse Erin: [www.nurseerin.org](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001h1mzx_Yw5plICo2tSbWJZDCX44j7OQaYyHI5HC3NSXN7QV3DjERfQjeGyu0eq5c4rSXRkWXDd9z245JcIXIGlNl4oroqWpPQyocwRcvfUSu1UZ1qqIMmTkEi_w9hw9AvtxySRGZa07kGOJaWXoHnNw==&c=79fHv0mgixvk8SiwzY1Uc1Da1VSNyZQJ0CtFxWfw0_pRHwyexxVMKA==&ch=NxHsexjESTFmVYWOgPXF4PZ0LMcwDMwWpOqLTqzirA2qDEni3mqK5w==)

Stay in the fight. Let's all STAND UP FOR AMERICA.

May God Bless you all,

Loren
