The Candidate for We the People. | | | == | | | | Upcoming Events We're coming to Goldendale, WA in Klickitat County on February 26, 2022, to Stand Up for America and we want to see you there! == | | | | | Listen to Loren on the Issues Streaming live every Tuesday evening at 7:00 PM PST on Facebook and Youtube (and soon we'll be streaming on other platforms as well). Join over 84,000 followers on Facebook to stay up to date on campaign activity and Loren's thoughts on statewide and national issues. == | | | | A PERSONAL WORD ON THE CHINESE VIRUS | | | ---|--- | This email is not about my campaign and isn't about fundraising, it's about making sure that you and your family are protected so please read on. Recently, several people I know have caught the Chinese virus. A few have died and some have been in the hospital for extended periods of time. I want to make sure you and your family have everything available to combat this virus if you or someone you love gets it. Two weeks ago, I learned about a group of medical doctors in a clinic in Florida that do prescriptions specifically for the treatment of Covid. If you catch Covid early, proper treatment is very important. They will give you a preventative prescription so you have medication on hand should you become ill with it. I cannot stress enough how important prevention is in the fight against the virus. The preventative medications they prescribe are Ivermectin, ZPAC, and hydroxychloroquine. These medications have been lab and time tested for decades and are the very same medications President Trump, Joe Rogan, and countless others took to beat this illness. Many doctors will not prescribe these tested and award-winning medications because of, in my opinion, the lies coming from Big Pharma, the US Government, the media, and of course Dr. Fauci. So, here is what I did after learning about this clinic in the free state of Florida. I made a telemedicine appointment, met with the doctor online, paid the costs, and they sent my prescriptions to my home. Easy. Here are the details. The cost of the appointment was $110. The cost of the prescription medication was $155. The Doctor sent the prescriptions to a pharmacy in Florida and the pharmacy called me for payment. Once I paid the cost (the $155), they shipped the medications to me. I care about each and every one of you and I wanted to share this with all of you. Please be prepared. The information about this clinic came from an interview I saw of a nurse--Erin is her name--who works there. During the beginning of the pandemic, she was a traveling nurse and went to New York City to help out. What she discovered was unreal. She ended up going undercover with a hidden video camera. She did an expose about it and also wrote a book. Here are the links for the clinic and Nurse Erin. Clinic: == Nurse Erin: == Stay in the fight. Let's all STAND UP FOR AMERICA. May God Bless you all, Loren | | | | PAID FOR BY CULP FOR CONGRESS | | Culp for Congress | PO Box 726, Moses Lake, WA 98837 | | Sent by mailto:info@culpforcongress.com powered by

We deserve a system that prioritizes accountability and chooses to protect those who fight for what is right, not a police officer who murdered a child. [**I am demanding change at the Federal level, and I am ready to be the voice fighting for that change in Congress, but I need your help to get there. As much as Laquan was a victim of police brutality, he was also a victim of gun violence. His life was ended the same way too many lives end in Chicago—with bullets. I was the Executive Director of the largest gun violence prevention organization in Illinois. This is a cause I’ve dedicated my life to. name: Abby Finkenauer
subject: 200 people, 5 churches, a bar, a post office and a school
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abby for Iowa Abby for Iowa
body:
| | |
---
It's funny to think about how different my life was when this photo was taken – and how much is still the same as we build up this campaign to defeat Sen. Chuck Grassley (R-IA). Back then, all I knew was my small town of Sherrill in rural Iowa – around 200 people, five churches, a bar, a post office and a school.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41606201/329557128/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk647-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZDc5NWM4ZC1lMzg5LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SA6kXL63T7iV9iNFq0amgDCPdICTiofK5m1s8slYk7U=)
I was raised in a working class family – my dad was a union pipe-fitter welder and my mom worked in the public school system. My parents couldn't give me a trust fund or debt-free college, but what they taught me was so much more valuable: **how to treat people with respect; to never think you’re better than anyone else; and that when there is work to be done or a problem to solve, you say “yes.”**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41606202/329557130/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk647-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZDc5NWM4ZC1lMzg5LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SA6kXL63T7iV9iNFq0amgDCPdICTiofK5m1s8slYk7U=)
**That's why, when my community needed a fighter in the Iowa State House, I stepped up and won my first election at only 25.** I served for four years in the State House, and I fought hard to deliver for my constituents – one night, I kept the House in session until midnight to demand equal pay for women.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41606204/329557131/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk647-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZDc5NWM4ZC1lMzg5LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SA6kXL63T7iV9iNFq0amgDCPdICTiofK5m1s8slYk7U=)
I was proud to serve in the State House, but the work didn't stop there for me. **That's why I decided to run for Congress and became the youngest woman to flip a House seat from red to blue.** Then, after just two weeks in Congress and during a government shutdown, I became the youngest woman to pass a bill through the House of Representatives with my legislation to create more opportunities for rural America.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41606205/329557132/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk647-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZDc5NWM4ZC1lMzg5LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SA6kXL63T7iV9iNFq0amgDCPdICTiofK5m1s8slYk7U=)
**My story is about service, community and understanding the value of hard work.** That's why I'm running to defeat Sen. Chuck Grassley (R-IA) – to give working families a real fighter in the Senate. Right now, he's facing RECORD-LOW approval with Iowa voters, so we've got the best chance in decades to flip this seat blue and expand Democrats' Senate majority. **[But we simply cannot win without major grassroots support, so will you rush a donation of $5 or more now to seize this momentum, defeat Sen. Grassley and expand our Senate majority?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41606206/329557134/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk647-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZDc5NWM4ZC1lMzg5LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SA6kXL63T7iV9iNFq0amgDCPdICTiofK5m1s8slYk7U=)**
I know that defeating Sen. Grassley won't be a walk in the park. **But I've had plenty of people tell me that I was too young or that I lacked the experience to take on a challenge – and we've proved them wrong time and time again.**
We _can_ win this race – I feel it in my bones. **But the GOP is sitting on a war chest of more than $32 MILLION to defeat challengers like me and take back the Senate.** I can only compete with those types of resources with you on my side.
**[So if you're with me to defeat Sen. Grassley, protect our Senate majority and fight for working families, then please donate $5, or whatever you can spare, before midnight tonight. This is a grassroots campaign, so I'm really counting on your donation tonight.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41606207/329557135/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk647-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZDc5NWM4ZC1lMzg5LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SA6kXL63T7iV9iNFq0amgDCPdICTiofK5m1s8slYk7U=)**
| | [CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41606208/329557136/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk647-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZDc5NWM4ZC1lMzg5LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SA6kXL63T7iV9iNFq0amgDCPdICTiofK5m1s8slYk7U=)

Thank you,

Abby

body:
---
| | | | | | [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001AmVEsw8it2drvwra84tpDVCzWH9rZqG6L4j6E3KOwjt_0gQty_7Cey-U3sVRmL9GrzEJtldmWn5aQIBVG_mhZh9kE9vSKMvpXjuDjHLl7VgbDUqwB9qIPjOLmIdDMNTF9VGzykYksk4G1axrPPuDsyERRlVyPzwxv9KqmIhvHKvewSzJMbeuVg==&c=9YA9cX-Jo8SW48qSFoRUQ0WarzcG0QzpOMG86iLIRTOLvHwMLvdACA==&ch=STusFkjcFtoT8ebAOAhppkSkzxYwDa8zP3SRO3JQ1qVaKiy_0OkR8A==)

| Peter,

The hypocrisy of Stacey Abrams knows no bounds.
Did you see this picture?
---
|
---
| Yep! Your eyes aren't playing tricks. The same left-wing radical that wants our kids to be masked in school can't be bothered to wear a mask herself.
Can you imagine what kind of socialist edicts she would issue as Governor...and completely ignore herself? We can and that's why we are busy putting together a game plan to Stop Stacey this November.
We know that running for Governor...again...is part of her grand plan for a total takeover of America. And we have every intention on doing whatever it takes to derail her efforts before it's too late.
[In our last e-mail, we encouraged all freedom loving patriots - who want to Stop Stacey - to dig deep and chip in $50, $100, or even $500. Sadly, the response was pretty bad.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001AmVEsw8it2drvwra84tpDVCzWH9rZqG6L4j6E3KOwjt_0gQty_7Cey-U3sVRmL9GrzEJtldmWn5aQIBVG_mhZh9kE9vSKMvpXjuDjHLl7VgbDUqwB9qIPjOLmIdDMNTF9VGzykYksk4G1axrPPuDsyERRlVyPzwxv9KqmIhvHKvewSzJMbeuVg==&c=9YA9cX-Jo8SW48qSFoRUQ0WarzcG0QzpOMG86iLIRTOLvHwMLvdACA==&ch=STusFkjcFtoT8ebAOAhppkSkzxYwDa8zP3SRO3JQ1qVaKiy_0OkR8A==)
If we can't reach our $25,000 goal by the end of the month, I'm afraid we will be limited in what we can do going forward. While we are proud to boast a grassroots army of more than 10,000 folks, we need matching resources to take on Stacey and her Soros funded dark money network.
[So if you didn't get a chance to chip in, we hope you will. And after you make that secure contribution, urge your friends and neighbors to join the fight.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001AmVEsw8it2drvwra84tpDVCzWH9rZqG6L4j6E3KOwjt_0gQty_7Cey-U3sVRmL9GrzEJtldmWn5aQIBVG_mhZh9kE9vSKMvpXjuDjHLl7VgbDUqwB9qIPjOLmIdDMNTF9VGzykYksk4G1axrPPuDsyERRlVyPzwxv9KqmIhvHKvewSzJMbeuVg==&c=9YA9cX-Jo8SW48qSFoRUQ0WarzcG0QzpOMG86iLIRTOLvHwMLvdACA==&ch=STusFkjcFtoT8ebAOAhppkSkzxYwDa8zP3SRO3JQ1qVaKiy_0OkR8A==)
I have the utmost confidence that together...we can Stop Stacey and Save America!
Sincerely,
Jeremy Brand Stop Stacey, Inc.

As an immigration and human rights attorney who was born and raised in Laredo, I’ve seen firsthand that the laws of this country weren’t written for everyone. I’ve also seen that our current concerns have yet to be addressed by our current representative, Henry Cuellar. When we called for a clearer pathway to citizenship for immigrants, **Cuellar voted in favor of funding for Donald Trump’s border wall.** When we called for our reproductive rights to be protected from anti-choice politicians, **Cuellar aligned himself with the GOP to block abortion rights.** And when we called for reform to make health care more accessible and affordable, **Cuellar supported a Republican plan that would allow insurance companies to sell higher-priced plans to people who need extra care.** Now more than ever, we need a representative who will fight for all Americans — not just a select, wealthy few. That’s why once I’m elected to Congress, I will fight nonstop to create a fair pathway to citizenship, protect reproductive freedom, and ensure that health care is treated as a human right, not a privilege. But Henry Cuellar has _a lot_ of wealthy corporate donors behind him who are funneling millions of dollars to help him get re-elected. So I’m relying 100% on grassroots donors to be able to compete with Henry Cuellar’s war chest. [_**So please, Peter, can I count on your support today to help me win? Early voting starts in just 5 days, so if we can raise $15,000 by Feb. 14th we can double down our efforts to take on Henry Cuellar in the primary.**_](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zAq9BM_Xlfm-G9JMYK5BQCTWoNARFNmykRPwQgo4EHTOCLxV4yCQkZZdvZZfGXlxoUSBp0jqToeQ2_FWeQvZKqqvsjCgu6Q8K_viYcp52u6gL63rZpwQsloSB6WEaNo9VD6QKCHoPqO-KHfMjlwGo_LP2k7QbdS-G5VukT9kQPvHMLyko1i813tIcZZI_fkouMSAmlt4LvJ2FzoJjtehTgjqgcabm-VW0CryO_9ugUX-s-kYdwh6O9QmSLb5r4otDKbXOjiY0kG2_6jXqZm3GpZVni6oCjxszRZ-8BmhoiGkHvEA9uDQ1DR4OwPTOtlykH0CZqN30Yfao1SotNG0Z5Kp1YBUMGlAfPpKcggkqpzzaE3tOR5nHHr3o0f60yyfI/3jf/gHIrxXzuSJ-hNl0lJuglZw/h3/aJhieSne_s_uW-dF37KDbfu0luD6EjnycFyoKKT7VVs) [Contribute now »](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zAq9BM_Xlfm-G9JMYK5BQCTWoNARFNmykRPwQgo4EHTOCLxV4yCQkZZdvZZfGXlxqcS0YGePaGRxFzTZbFB3GcJsGhsxmnycyYqo24eJu3RSWpa5OzXqr2bFunzRD9z-SiqKj8B780nFyRfbacF1Oisk28HwKGv0zJ03bee8VeHslGjwuv6FyZgRRzIHLD_saHjEn7cgi1z1Kghzv0qUq83fnAiIMJjgSHQBpOrlYJIJpgZJgJCGlZ0ryB3WJdvg1cQ3NIpY6MnEfzZkQCYTXjnedsC92mbfUTaifeQ7EQJlGkXl8x-sQ4RIXhTI5Za8mr7LxEcbhGeqnGV5FW7A3A2CmDhT_rcnBeMlak7kk_adqAlxYj6QfszVGZgZisfBE/3jf/gHIrxXzuSJ-hNl0lJuglZw/h4/dvpGTYVzDqhDHFWRcGWhAvliYoxaajeYf6vihhEfkfE) Your support means the world to me. clean_body: Your support is so critical: | | | Peter, our campaign has come a long way from where we started, but we can’t take the foot off the pedal just yet. With early voting starting in just 5 days, I’m emailing you personally to ask for you to support my campaign during these final days before the primary. Please take a moment to read this entire email. As an immigration and human rights attorney who was born and raised in Laredo, I’ve seen firsthand that the laws of this country weren’t written for everyone. I’ve also seen that our current concerns have yet to be addressed by our current representative, Henry Cuellar. When we called for a clearer pathway to citizenship for immigrants, Cuellar voted in favor of funding for Donald Trump’s border wall. When we called for our reproductive rights to be protected from anti-choice politicians, Cuellar aligned himself with the GOP to block abortion rights. And when we called for reform to make health care more accessible and affordable, Cuellar supported a Republican plan that would allow insurance companies to sell higher-priced plans to people who need extra care. Now more than ever, we need a representative who will fight for all Americans — not just a select, wealthy few. That’s why once I’m elected to Congress, I will fight nonstop to create a fair pathway to citizenship, protect reproductive freedom, and ensure that health care is treated as a human right, not a privilege. But Henry Cuellar has a lot of wealthy corporate donors behind him who are funneling millions of dollars to help him get re-elected. So I’m relying 100% on grassroots donors to be able to compete with Henry Cuellar’s war chest. Your support means the world to me. Gracias, Jessica Cisneros | To give by check: PO Box 660 Laredo, TX 78042

I’m _**appalled**_ to watch Joe Biden and his Democrat administration _bow down_ to Communist China and turn a blind eye to the slaughter happening behind the scene of the Beijing Olympics.
But while our own President ignores the biggest global threat in modern history, _**Col. clean_body: When I was Secretary of State, I saw the danger Communist China poses to the world firsthand. Peter, When I was Secretary of State, I saw the danger Communist China poses to the world firsthand. The Chinese Communist Party is the single biggest threat to America, and while Democrats turn a blind eye, American corporate dollars are funding genocide, forced labor, and political imprisonment. I’m appalled to watch Joe Biden and his Democrat administration bow down to Communist China and turn a blind eye to the slaughter happening behind the scene of the Beijing Olympics. But while our own President ignores the biggest global threat in modern history, Col. Mike Waltz is SPEAKING OUT and STANDING UP to Communist China. Mike Waltz is the first and only Green Beret in Congress, and he’s using the same fighting spirit he brought to the battlefield of Afghanistan to show Americans the truth about the disgusting Uyghur genocide in China. But even in our own country, the Chinese Communist Party is trying to silence him. Mike’s ad PULLING BACK THE CURTAIN on the Chinese “Genocide Olympics” wasn’t even allowed to air on the mainstream media channels. I refuse to sit by idly while American dollars fund mass slaughter, so I’m calling on the most dependable patriots I know to help me support Mike and STAND UP to communist China once and for all. Thank you, Mike Pompeo Paid for by Michael Waltz for Congress Michael Waltz is a member of the Army National Guard. body:
Good afternoon Peter,
I wanted to reach out again about our 2022 Priorities Survey – we want to hear from you about what issues impact you and your community the most.
We’re getting closer to Election Day and your response will help us craft our messaging!
Can you take just a minute to answer a few questions about what matters most to you in 2022? [https://secure.ngpvan.com/ZaTBgtAvFUiG4kBDZdDRXg2]
Begin our survey ➔ [https://secure.ngpvan.com/ZaTBgtAvFUiG4kBDZdDRXg2]Thank you for your help!
Nick Savas
Campaign Manager | Wade Herring for Congress

Date: Jan. 30, 2022 5:45pm
Subject: Peter, will you take our 2022 Priorities Survey?
Friend - This is the year that the First District chooses better representation and sends Wade to Washington.
For too long, Georgia’s leaders have put their partisan & political goals over the needs of the people and families who live here. Now, Election Day is around the corner, and we want to make sure your voice is heard!
So we’re asking you to share your thoughts in our Official 2022 Priorities Survey! Can you take just a minute to answer a few questions? [https://secure.ngpvan.com/ZaTBgtAvFUiG4kBDZdDRXg2]
Begin our survey ➔ [https://secure.ngpvan.com/ZaTBgtAvFUiG4kBDZdDRXg2]We want to build this campaign with input from supporters like you! We want to know what issues impact you and your community the most. We are eager to learn what you think is missing from the conversation here in Georgia.
Your response will help us determine priorities heading into the rest of the year and let us know how future Congressman Wade Herring can best serve you.
Take our Official 2022 Priorities Survey today! [https://secure.ngpvan.com/ZaTBgtAvFUiG4kBDZdDRXg2]
We look forward to reviewing your responses!
Talk soon,
Wade Herring HQ

For too long, Georgia’s leaders have put their partisan & political goals over the needs of the people and families who live here. Now, Election Day is around the corner, and we want to make sure your voice is heard! So we’re asking you to share your thoughts in our Official 2022 Priorities Survey! Can you take just a minute to answer a few questions? [] Begin our survey ➔ [ want to build this campaign with input from supporters like you! We want to know what issues impact you and your community the most. We are eager to learn what you think is missing from the conversation here in Georgia. Your response will help us determine priorities heading into the rest of the year and let us know how future Congressman Wade Herring can best serve you. Take our Official 2022 Priorities Survey today! [] We look forward to reviewing your responses! Talk soon, Wade Herring HQ [] [] [] www.WadeHerringForCongress.com [] | Info@WadeHerringForCongress.com Emails are an important way for us to keep in touch with our supporters but if you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: . Paid for by Wade Herring for Congress Wade Herring for Congress PO Box 9145 Savannah, GA 31412 United States DONATE []

Look, there’s a reason you don’t see many foster kids elected to Congress.
The foster care system and poverty go hand in hand. My adoptive parents didn’t have wealthy friends who could connect me to the best schools, internships, and jobs.
So when I entered this race, I knew I wouldn't have the advantages that other elected leaders tend to have.
I knew I wouldn’t have access to wealthy, well-connected donors who fund the politicians in Washington.
I knew that the odds would still be stacked against me in this race. But thanks to grassroots supporters like you, this campaign has continued to defy the odds.
[**Together, we’ll win this seat. If everyone reading this email chipped in right now, I’ll hit my $2,349 goal in no time, and I’ll be one step closer to being the leader PA-18 deserves. body:
| | | **BREAKING via _NY Times_ : "G.O.P. Declares Jan. 6 Attack 'Legitimate Political Discourse'"**

_We can’t let Republicans get away with defending the attack on our nation’s Capitol!_
**[Add your name now to CONDEMN Republicans for sucking up to Trump instead of defending our democracy:](https://go.dscc.org/go/6155?ask=5&t=4&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20220209-NewsUpdate-RNCCensure-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220209-NewsUpdate-RNCCensure-Pros-sl1&akid=2922%2E9716520%2EdLZ5nM) **
| | [Add My Name](https://go.dscc.org/go/6155?ask=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20220209-NewsUpdate-RNCCensure-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220209-NewsUpdate-RNCCensure-Pros-sl1&akid=2922%2E9716520%2EdLZ5nM)
---

Look, this is serious.

The deadly January 6th insurrection was the most significant attack on our Capitol in _centuries_ , **and now Republicans are trying to change the narrative by calling it "legitimate political discourse."**

Let’s be clear: January 6th was a violent insurrection and a serious threat to our democracy. **There is nothing "legitimate" about attacking our Capitol to overturn an election.**

Enough is enough -- we have to hold the GOP accountable, which is why **we set a goal of gathering 100,000 signatures by MIDNIGHT to call out Republicans’ shameful actions.******[**Please, add your name now to condemn Republicans for sucking up to Trump instead of defending our democracy >>**](https://go.dscc.org/go/6155?ask=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20220209-NewsUpdate-RNCCensure-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220209-NewsUpdate-RNCCensure-Pros-sl1&akid=2922%2E9716520%2EdLZ5nM)

Thank you,

Team DSCC

clean_body: | | | | We need secure borders. | Peter Willis, For months I have been on the front lines documenting Joe Biden’s “Ghost Flights” that have been flying in from our southern border and landing in airports across Pennsylvania. I have obtained video of these flights, called out the Biden Administration and even called for Gov. Wolf and AG Shapiro to step up and intervene. But these radical Leftists have continued to ignore the concerns of the Commonwealth. Since Joe Biden took office, over 2 MILLION illegal immigrants have been apprehended at the border. IT’S TIME TO SECURE OUR BORDERS When I was Mayor of Hazleton, I passed the first local ordinance in the country standing up against illegal immigration. As a Congressman, I was one of the few elected officials, Democrat or Republican, actually interested in passing concrete reforms to protect our citizens. And as your next Governor, if Joe Biden thinks I’m going to just sit back and allow him to secretly send illegal aliens into Pennsylvania in the middle of the night, then he’s in for a rude surprise because I won’t let it happen on my watch! Thank you, Lou Barletta Republican Candidate Governor of Pennsylvania | | | | If you prefer to contribute by check, please mail a check to “Lou Barletta for Governor” and mail to: Lou Barletta for Governor PO Box 128 Hazleton, PA 18201 =

Being born and raised in Pennsylvania, there’s a pride I take in being a lifelong resident and profound dedication I have to our commonwealth. Even during some of our most challenging times, I didn’t abandon ship. I fought tirelessly to save main street businessesー _**always knowing Pennsylvania's best days were ahead.**_ If you weren’t here for Pennsylvania at its worst, you don’t deserve it at its best.**** That’s why you should live in Pennsylvania before running in Pennsylvania. It's common sense... We need to ensure that these parachute politicians don't come in and take these seats **_because we cannot trust them to fight for us when the cards are down._ ** Friend, you can trust me to fight for you and PA because I did it when we had everything to lose, and I’ll do it againー[**now I’m trusting you to fight for me by investing anything you can into our campaign >>**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=2863e012a52d40b78e9e436836d3b480&_e=BVPldRgIN5YSVP5B7Bh-6ft2Qfat_Tnw6FkqCqo9g2LsU29OP-PhDH_DqPv2O1tHXC6RQ1_qup5In2GlUz8xlbDjWv_Kp1jbVFD30GiHr261p-LQVtxXaCpER8YOg30aHtX0-gHVLbfkgkN2wR3JUBkYfJL1NEd-ZVG7PDxylXXoDT5sXTa-d6VLuM_cRdGwTZU_HSYWLOtzIPRljpfEKzIJPjw7KZAwZQukoUtn1lJQeGVDowOw9IoeoL3zdrP2i_Zpvlg7tP8L6ybjQ5rmWro2d63Atn4dQl0hdCIKcmUY1aN8bCvKuMqkDALADNj2wpUs91a9kE-noRsHFP517Mh5T550mSG2VF1B8Pf0yM-byKwIdZnhm8haVvAe2aX32vIYXuU6Qq6OL9KyIfcmm3vn5E-guGJJuiHlpFRfW2KfGE77hPsSwMHujfVIv5cd7vn72ZQApAoARCQhS677ztZKDIbMX62Aj3dSMWQkXU0SzbrxCcUDvCJzY5piuF36) Thank you, Jeff Bartos [**INVEST IN THE FIGHT TODAY**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=2863e012a52d40b78e9e436836d3b480&_e=BVPldRgIN5YSVP5B7Bh-6ft2Qfat_Tnw6FkqCqo9g2LsU29OP-PhDH_DqPv2O1tHXC6RQ1_qup5In2GlUz8xlbDjWv_Kp1jbVFD30GiHr261p-LQVtxXaCpER8YOg30aHtX0-gHVLbfkgkN2wR3JUBkYfJL1NEd-ZVG7PDxylXXoDT5sXTa-d6VLuM_cRdGwTZU_HSYWLOtzIPRljpfEKzIJPjw7KZAwZQukoUtn1lJQeGVDowOw9IoeoL3zdrP2i_Zpvlg7tP8L6ybjQ5rmWro2d63Atn4dQl0hdCIKcmVLQGuqmHKVS27CLNkFnfc6usZ195sl83MGtzVgd-oZUffSxOzLV_o23gHCdfmRVnLlJxujf3fgUMfyQj9-xCVvsUwHVNkPViLPBaMDxlT4l_-tLQB47R5wJ5o4qZb-A92cnWWj9ewqFqpDJcpXNdKcQ8lvz1yI66Cwhx7xEuGeN2EeIusB0fwC6hXG8oc42Dj8WyYCF1rS3W_n_z2fgfu5) |

name: David Chipman, Giffords.org
subject: A background check is easy, not inconvenient
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
For twenty-five years, I served at the Bureau of Alcohol, Tobacco, Firearms and Explosives -- arresting and bringing people into court who I know would have killed someone with a gun later that night if they had the opportunity.
#

Friends,
All across America, there is partisan division on just about every topic.
But on one issue—background checks for gun purchases—an overwhelming majority of Democrats, Independents, and Republicans agree: no one should be able to buy a gun without first passing a background check.
For twenty-five years, I served as a special agent with the Bureau of Alcohol, Tobacco, Firearms and Explosives—arresting and taking to court people who I know would have killed someone with a gun later that night if they had the opportunity.
I am a gun owner. I hold a concealed carry permit. A lot of people own guns in this country for a variety of reasons.
But with that ownership comes responsibility.
If people are going to carry a gun outside their home, it should require training. If people want to buy or sell a gun, **perhaps they should take a few minutes to fill out a form and pass a background check.**
Most Americans are with us on this, but I can tell you as a former law enforcement officer, the gun lobby fights these commonsense reforms with outrageous sums of money and corrupting political influence.
That is why it is so important we continue to make our voices heard. So I am asking you to keep up the drumbeat of support for this lifesaving legislation:
[**Can you please sign Giffords’ petition calling on Congress to pass universal background checks for gun purchases? This one commonsense solution would save thousands of lives every year. It’s long past time we get it done.**](https://go.giffords.org/signup/giffords_ubc_petition?source=em220209-1-subs&t=1&akid=1542%2E3935704%2EqzDdxK)
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://go.giffords.org/signup/giffords_ubc_petition?source=em220209-1-subs&t=2&akid=1542%2E3935704%2EqzDdxK)**
In 2020, more than 45,000 people died from gun violence in the United States. And if the gun lobby gets their way on this issue, that number is sure to increase. I don’t know about you, but I think it’s time that politicians and powerful Washington lobbyists start putting the safety of our communities ahead of the profits of gun manufacturers.
Thanks for making your voice heard,
David Chipman
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://go.giffords.org/signup/giffords_ubc_petition?source=em220209-1-subs&t=3&akid=1542%2E3935704%2EqzDdxK)**

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=1542%2E3935704%2EqzDdxK) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

| | Team, We’ve had an exciting February so far on the campaign trail – and with the Massachusetts caucuses already underway, I know the race is only going to continue ramping up. Things are moving quickly over here, so I wanted to take a moment to personally share some of the latest campaign news: Last weekend, I joined Keller at Large to discuss my vision for Massachusetts — one where we deliver bold, transformational change for working families and communities. And I’m ready to get to work. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41607924/329565417/-508042667?refcode=em_20220209_f_s_update&ms=em_20220209_f_s_update&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NzBiMDA0Zi1lYzg5LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xnlhZkMp9dUXwZsh2POHFYpuSvyPC1hDrPz0kxx_w9Y=) Caucus season is here! Democratic Town Committees across the state hosted their very first caucuses of the cycle last Saturday. I was glad to join with Democrats in Easthampton, Cambridge, Randolph, Boston, and Winchester — and I’m meeting with more caucuses every day. I was also proud to attend and speak at the Plymouth County Democratic League’s candidate breakfast and take part in one of the first big forums of the race, sponsored by 14 Democratic town committees across Central Massachusetts. I talked about the biggest issues we can tackle together, from education, to the housing crisis, to my plan for a Green New Deal to ensure that we build a Commonwealth where everyone can thrive. I’m putting in the work, and I’m committed to meeting folks where they are across the Commonwealth. Thanks to our team of grassroots supporters, we have the chance to win real, substantive change for the people who need it the most in Massachusetts. [_**If you can, pitch in $25 to say you’re ready for a Governor who will deliver change now.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41607925/329565418/-1275523729?refcode=em_20220209_f_s_update&ms=em_20220209_f_s_update&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NzBiMDA0Zi1lYzg5LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xnlhZkMp9dUXwZsh2POHFYpuSvyPC1hDrPz0kxx_w9Y=) Thanks for all you do. Saludos, Sonia

name: Aadland For Colorado
subject: Celebrating Black History Month
body:
---
| | | | | | Volume 26 | February 9, 2022
---
|
---
| Celebrating Black History Month
---
| February is Black History Month, and Black history is American history. Throughout this month we celebrate the scientific, economic, cultural, and spiritual contributions of Black Americans to the growth of our nation.
It was President Gerald R. Ford who, in 1976, set aside the month of February to honor the achievements of Black Americans. At the time, he said: "Freedom and the recognition of individual rights are what our Revolution was all about. They were ideals that inspired our fight for Independence: ideals that we have been striving to live up to ever since. Yet it took many years before ideals became a reality for Black citizens.... In celebrating Black History Month, we can take satisfaction from this recent progress in the realization of the ideals envisioned by our Founding Fathers. But, even more than this, we can seize the opportunity to honor the too-often neglected accomplishments of black Americans in every area of endeavor throughout our history."
History is constantly made and taught anew, and so today we have the responsibility and privilege to celebrate the many unfolding ways in which Black Americans exemplify the American spirit. The profound dignity of their hard work over generations has challenged our consciences and enjoined us to be a more just society. Now, just as our Black communities have long known how to overcome adversity and fight for their rights, we all must rise to today's challenges in the same spirit and ensure that our right to flourish is never taken away.
Our nation was founded under God, indivisible. But there are those today that would divide us by categories of race, identity, or economics that are ultimately immaterial to our inherent value as citizens. I won't stand for this. I've learned throughout my life that there is so much more meaning to our experience than such narrow characterizations. We need common ground more than ever, and I urge us to look to the lessons of our history to find it.
The need to find unity and purpose reminds me of my time in Iraq and Afghanistan. I served side by side with men and women of all colors, working together to answer the call of duty and defend our country. That's the sort of unity we must manifest today to revitalize our country and restore its virtue.
In considering serving you, I have often been inspired by Dr. Martin Luther King Jr.'s dream that Americans would one day "be judged not by the color of their skin but by the content of their character." I believe that we choose to live in that day, and I stand firmly on the belief that we are to be judged on character alone. Our results will not lie as we steel our character to the task of building a better tomorrow.
I learned this principle of liberty in service with my brothers and sisters in arms. Character is forged and tested on the battlefield, and through my experience I stand ready to represent the very best of our state, no matter what race, creed, color or gender. That is my pledge to you.
I believe Black History Month is only a starting point. We should honor the accomplishments of Black Americans every day because they--first and foremost, and same as all of us--are Americans. What matters to our future is not a narrow conception of identity, but rather our dedication to the common cause of securing "the Blessings of Liberty to ourselves and our Posterity".
I wish you the best in celebrating this month and all it means for Americans.
In Service,

---
|
---
| | |
---
| Campaign Update
---
| |
---|---
|
This week we continued with petition signing and celebration of small business with our Brewery Tour of CD7.

Check our schedule below, and come out to see Erik, talk one-on-one about issues important to you.

This week Erik was on The Dan Caplis Show where they discussed the campaign strategy and the number one issue on the minds of Coloradans.

Next week, back on The Peter Boyles radio show Thursday Feb 17th at 7:00AM - 719 KNUS.

We can really feel the momentum building in this campaign. We hope to see you on the campaign trail as together we find solutions so some of our nation's--and Colorado's--biggest issues.

clean_body: | | | | | | Volume 26 | February 9, 2022 | | Celebrating Black History Month | February is Black History Month, and Black history is American history. Throughout this month we celebrate the scientific, economic, cultural, and spiritual contributions of Black Americans to the growth of our nation. It was President Gerald R. Ford who, in 1976, set aside the month of February to honor the achievements of Black Americans. At the time, he said: "Freedom and the recognition of individual rights are what our Revolution was all about. They were ideals that inspired our fight for Independence: ideals that we have been striving to live up to ever since. Yet it took many years before ideals became a reality for Black citizens.... In celebrating Black History Month, we can take satisfaction from this recent progress in the realization of the ideals envisioned by our Founding Fathers. But, even more than this, we can seize the opportunity to honor the too-often neglected accomplishments of black Americans in every area of endeavor throughout our history." History is constantly made and taught anew, and so today we have the responsibility and privilege to celebrate the many unfolding ways in which Black Americans exemplify the American spirit. The profound dignity of their hard work over generations has challenged our consciences and enjoined us to be a more just society. Now, just as our Black communities have long known how to overcome adversity and fight for their rights, we all must rise to today's challenges in the same spirit and ensure that our right to flourish is never taken away. Our nation was founded under God, indivisible. But there are those today that would divide us by categories of race, identity, or economics that are ultimately immaterial to our inherent value as citizens. I won't stand for this. I've learned throughout my life that there is so much more meaning to our experience than such narrow characterizations. We need common ground more than ever, and I urge us to look to the lessons of our history to find it. The need to find unity and purpose reminds me of my time in Iraq and Afghanistan. I served side by side with men and women of all colors, working together to answer the call of duty and defend our country. That's the sort of unity we must manifest today to revitalize our country and restore its virtue. In considering serving you, I have often been inspired by Dr. Martin Luther King Jr.'s dream that Americans would one day "be judged not by the color of their skin but by the content of their character." I believe that we choose to live in that day, and I stand firmly on the belief that we are to be judged on character alone. Our results will not lie as we steel our character to the task of building a better tomorrow. I learned this principle of liberty in service with my brothers and sisters in arms. Character is forged and tested on the battlefield, and through my experience I stand ready to represent the very best of our state, no matter what race, creed, color or gender. That is my pledge to you. I believe Black History Month is only a starting point. We should honor the accomplishments of Black Americans every day because they--first and foremost, and same as all of us--are Americans. What matters to our future is not a narrow conception of identity, but rather our dedication to the common cause of securing "the Blessings of Liberty to ourselves and our Posterity". I wish you the best in celebrating this month and all it means for Americans. body:
Those who pollute should pay into a fund that helps us finance a wide range of efforts to tackle climate change.
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41596885/329511588/396464211?refcode=em-logo&refcode2=b44f4f7b-c289-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&contactdata=sX5aRz4IB5UNI5VCKrGRFcz3lNIvnFmHdbpEGf/8GFCLcJEiIOwcKphR2NbKxTKI&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODIzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNDRmNGY3Yi1jMjg5LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DbZjZ8Xs9AujZ8ao5h6OOeLCN6ZK7wMU0pPtpzKz4Vs=)
Friends -
Late last year, I introduced a bill called the “Polluters Pay Climate Fund Act.”
The idea is simple:
Those who pollute should pay into a fund that helps us finance a wide range of efforts to tackle climate change. And those who pollute the most should pay the most.
The legislation would generate about $500 billion over ten years and the largest polluters — we’re talking companies like ExxonMobil, Shell, and Chevron — would pay about $5 billion a year. For most of the largest payers, it’d be less than 3% of their gross receipts.
A small price to pay to help clean up the mess they’ve made.
This legislation has the support of the League of Conservation Voters, the Sunrise Movement, Chesapeake Climate Action Network and more.
But it needs your support too. Because making the largest polluters pay will never happen unless we demand it. So I am asking:
**[Can you please add your name as a Citizen Co-Sponsor of my “Polluters Pay Climate Fund Act” today? We’re looking for 5,000 signatures before the end of the weekend.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41596887/329511589/-173885097?refcode=em220209-15&refcode2=b44f4f7b-c289-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&contactdata=sX5aRz4IB5UNI5VCKrGRFcz3lNIvnFmHdbpEGf/8GFCLcJEiIOwcKphR2NbKxTKI&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODIzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNDRmNGY3Yi1jMjg5LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DbZjZ8Xs9AujZ8ao5h6OOeLCN6ZK7wMU0pPtpzKz4Vs=&emci=6cf82475-c289-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=b44f4f7b-c289-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=2216363)**
**[CO-SPONSOR THE BILL](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41596889/329511592/-173885097?refcode=em220209-15&refcode2=b44f4f7b-c289-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&contactdata=sX5aRz4IB5UNI5VCKrGRFcz3lNIvnFmHdbpEGf/8GFCLcJEiIOwcKphR2NbKxTKI&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODIzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNDRmNGY3Yi1jMjg5LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DbZjZ8Xs9AujZ8ao5h6OOeLCN6ZK7wMU0pPtpzKz4Vs=&emci=6cf82475-c289-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=b44f4f7b-c289-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=2216363)**
For years, fossil fuel companies have made TRILLIONS in profits while wreaking havoc on our environment, harming public health, and threatening the very livability of our planet for future generations.
It’s time for them to pay their share of the clean-up bill.
Onward.
Chris

And those who pollute the most should pay the most. The legislation would generate about $500 billion over ten years and the largest polluters — we’re talking companies like ExxonMobil, Shell, and Chevron — would pay about $5 billion a year. For most of the largest payers, it’d be less than 3% of their gross receipts. A small price to pay to help clean up the mess they’ve made. This legislation has the support of the League of Conservation Voters, the Sunrise Movement, Chesapeake Climate Action Network and more. But it needs your support too. Because making the largest polluters pay will never happen unless we demand it. So I am asking: For years, fossil fuel companies have made TRILLIONS in profits while wreaking havoc on our environment, harming public health, and threatening the very livability of our planet for future generations. It’s time for them to pay their share of the clean-up bill. Onward. Chris PAID FOR BY VAN HOLLEN FOR SENATE If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, you can , but we'd be very sorry to see you go.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Hunter=20Estes?=
subject: Under the Dome - Your update from the Legislature
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/progressupdate-8132300?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
| Dear Friend,

My apologies for not getting you a legislative update these past few weeks. I have been out of the office for two weeks of Army National Guard training.
It feels good to be back, and I’m very glad to be spending more time walking through the Capitol than walking through the woods.

Without further delay, here’s a quick catch up on some of the good, the bad, and the interesting from this week:

**The Good:**
**-_HCR 39_ from Speaker Philip Gunn would create a new initiative process that would allow Mississippians to make their voices heard.** This is a major win for all those who wanted to see a revival of the initiative process in some capacity.
**-_HB 599_ from Rep. Dana Criswell and Rep. Brady Williamson extends important accountability and transparency measures to counties and municipalities. **This will guarantee that citizens have more clear access to how their local governments are run.
**-_HB 917_ from Rep. Jansen Owen ensures the freedom to operate for home-based businesses.** A record number of new businesses were created during the pandemic, many of these, home-based. These entrepreneurs should be applauded, and we support all efforts to guarantee their continued freedom to operate.
**-_SB 2797_ from Sen. John Polk would require state agencies to report potential deficits and necessitate that they work with the state auditor’s office to reduce expenses.** This is a positive way to tighten budgets and eliminate government waste of taxpayer money.

**The Bad:**
**-_SB 2731_ reduces the income reporting requirements for food stamp recipients and increases the potential for welfare waste and abuse.** With the massive amount of fraud that already exists within our welfare systems, there is no reason to loosen existing accountability measures. We need to ensure these programs are helping those they’re meant to, not those that want to cheat the system.

**The Interesting:**
**\- The Legislature is considering a vast range of pay raises for government employees across the state.** Those individuals may very well deserve a pay raise, but I just wish the average Mississippian would see their pay increase as consistently as our public servants’ salaries do.
**-_HB 1487_** **establishes the song “One Mississippi” by Steve Azar as our official state song.** Personally, I think I prefer the Kane Brown version.

There’s a lot moving at the Capitol right now, I’ll do my best to keep you updated as we continue to fight for liberty here!
---
| |
---

All the Best,

Hunter Estes
Senior Director, Policy & Communications

_Ps. Be sure to follow our Facebook and Twitter pages for detailed updates about the legislative session. Check out our [**Legislative Tracker,**](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=574d9f3a53&e=5703353baa) too._
---
| |
---
| _ _
You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website.

**Our mailing address is:**
Mississippi Center for Public Policy520 George StJackson, MS 39202-3013
[Add us to your address book](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/vcard?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/profile?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd&e=5703353baa&c=2c4a105a4c) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd&e=5703353baa&c=2c4a105a4c).

name: Val Demings (personal)
subject: I never thought of myself as a politician
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Val Demings for U
body:
the long and short of why I'm in this race
| | |
---
Friend – Every member of this grassroots team has their own motivation to flip Florida blue. Today, I want to tell you mine:
**When I was a social worker in Jacksonville, **I met a 10-year-old boy who was exhibiting dangerous behavior after being seriously neglected at home. He needed support quickly – but I was told it would be weeks before he could be evaluated. I didn't think he would make it until then, so I went around the red tape and got him the help he needed. I was reprimanded, but that's what it took to save his life.
**I remember being so angry that the system designed to help children like him had totally failed him.** That's when I heard that the Orlando Police Department was recruiting, and I took a call to protect and serve the most vulnerable members in my community, people like this child.
Fast-forward 27 years: I'm now Orlando's first woman Chief of Police, and I've reduced the violent crime rate by more than 40%, so children like that young boy I'd met as a social worker didn't have to live in fear of playing in the streets. In my last days as Chief, the mayor sat me down for a chat:
**"You have to run for Congress," the Mayor told me. **

Me? A politician? I never thought of myself that way. "You've got jokes today," I said, laughing.
He asked my husband Jerry and me to meet some leaders in D.C. It was Speaker Nancy Pelosi who finally convinced me to run when she said, **“1 in 6 children go to bed hungry every night. If you could do something about that, wouldn’t you?” **
Of course, I thought of the child I had met years ago. We were still in touch three decades later. I couldn't pass up an opportunity to help children like him, not when they've been neglected by the system. I had to do everything I could to give each child in my community a story of opportunity like mine, so I ran for office. And the rest is history.
Not a day goes by that I forget about that child – or all of the working families who are counting on leaders like me to help them get through dark times. To thrive and not just survive.
**For me, that's what this is all about – and it's why I believe the Senate is where I can do the most good. If I win this race, Democrats can expand our Senate majority. We'll be able to extend the enhanced Child Tax Credit that's cut child poverty by more than 40%. We'll protect children from gun violence. And we'll help families keep food on the table by making groceries and gas more affordable. **
**[That's the long and short of why I'm in this race, friend. If you're ready to help me build a better future, will you donate to my campaign today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41608640/329568725/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2272-fr-nd-v1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNWNlOGQxYy1mMDg5LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QLLx2pn7Xwh8IqzaRCOuf0XtlTxryadO-EY4cr5A-7s=)**

Thanks for reading my story,

Val Demings

clean_body: the long and short of why I'm in this race | | | Friend – Every member of this grassroots team has their own motivation to flip Florida blue. Today, I want to tell you mine: When I was a social worker in Jacksonville, I met a 10-year-old boy who was exhibiting dangerous behavior after being seriously neglected at home. He needed support quickly – but I was told it would be weeks before he could be evaluated. I didn't think he would make it until then, so I went around the red tape and got him the help he needed. I was reprimanded, but that's what it took to save his life. I remember being so angry that the system designed to help children like him had totally failed him. That's when I heard that the Orlando Police Department was recruiting, and I took a call to protect and serve the most vulnerable members in my community, people like this child. Fast-forward 27 years: I'm now Orlando's first woman Chief of Police, and I've reduced the violent crime rate by more than 40%, so children like that young boy I'd met as a social worker didn't have to live in fear of playing in the streets. In my last days as Chief, the mayor sat me down for a chat: "You have to run for Congress," the Mayor told me. Me? A politician? I never thought of myself that way. "You've got jokes today," I said, laughing. He asked my husband Jerry and me to meet some leaders in D.C. It was Speaker Nancy Pelosi who finally convinced me to run when she said, “1 in 6 children go to bed hungry every night. If you could do something about that, wouldn’t you?” Of course, I thought of the child I had met years ago. We were still in touch three decades later. I couldn't pass up an opportunity to help children like him, not when they've been neglected by the system. I had to do everything I could to give each child in my community a story of opportunity like mine, so I ran for office. And the rest is history. Not a day goes by that I forget about that child – or all of the working families who are counting on leaders like me to help them get through dark times. To thrive and not just survive. For me, that's what this is all about – and it's why I believe the Senate is where I can do the most good. If I win this race, Democrats can expand our Senate majority. We'll be able to extend the enhanced Child Tax Credit that's cut child poverty by more than 40%. We'll protect children from gun violence. And we'll help families keep food on the table by making groceries and gas more affordable. = Thanks for reading my story, Val Demings | | = | | = Val Demings here: I can’t thank you enough for fighting alongside me to flip Florida blue. Florida will determine whether Democrats keep our Senate majority – that’s why Republicans are pouring millions of dollars into this race to crush our movement and keep Florida red permanently. Our grassroots campaign is off to a great start, but in a race as close as this one, I need your help to surge ahead and defend the Senate. I’m relying on grassroots supporters like you, donating to emails like this, to help me defeat Marco Rubio and stop Mitch McConnell from flipping the Senate. Will you donate today to help me flip Florida blue? = If you’d like to purchase merchandise to show your support for this campaign, Thank you for your continued support. Together we’re going to protect voting rights, expand access to affordable health care and fully recover from this pandemic. = If you’re reading from your phone, to automatically sign up for my SMS team. body:
| | | [](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/9b46T44_yNM_)

This is the most important email I have ever sent you.

\-- I watched Republicans launch **more than 400** voter suppression bills nationwide to keep Democrats from ever winning another election.

**\-- Now, MSNBC just warned that if we lose our democracy in this election, "we are unlikely to get it back during our lifetimes."**

I cannot overstate the severity of this situation:

**[If we want to save our Majorities and STOP Republicans from barging back into power for the rest of our lives, I'm going to need every single Democrat to step up and do their part in this historic election. I'm calling on 3,000 Democrats to confirm their 2022 Memberships before midnight tonight. Can I count on you to step up? I cannot overstate how catastrophic the consequences would be if Democrats lost our Majority in this pivotal election >>](https://links.e.dccc.)** | [](https://links.e.dccc.)
2022 DEMOCRATIC MEMBERSHIP STATUS: **PENDING**
NAME: dpwillis67@gmail.com
[Suggested Support: $3](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/Eqxzt__)
---

Hear me loud and clear:

We CANNOT allow Republicans to sabotage this election.

We CANNOT allow the GOP to spread Trump's vicious lies.

And we CANNOT allow our hard-earned Majorities to be taken from us.

**But if we don 't fight to win this election with every fiber of our being, _we could hand Republicans the Majority once and for all._**

****[I'm calling for 3,000 Democratic Member gifts before midnight to fight back against the GOP's dangerous voter suppression schemes, PROTECT my Democratic House Majority, and show Republicans we will NEVER let them hold the reins in Congress again. ---
Friend,
On his first day in office, Donald Trump repealed the Clean Water Rule, which safeguarded America’s rivers, streams, lakes, wetlands, and other waters. Trump’s action lifted the protections afforded by the Clean Water Act for thousands of waterways nationwide. Not surprisingly, polluters have taken advantage of Trump’s “Dirty Water Rule” to pollute these waterways, and Americans are paying the price.
Thousands of streams and at least half of America’s wetlands remain unprotected to this day. **Millions of Americans depend on these waterways for drinking water, yet they are not protected by the Clean Water Act because Trump’s Dirty Water Rule remains intact.**
Kirsten stands with House Democrats like Southern Arizona’s Congresswoman Ann Kirkpatrick and Congressman Raúl M. Grijalva in fighting to repeal the Dirty Water Rule and restore protections for America’s waterways.
If you agree that protecting clean, reliable water should be a top priority for Congress, we hope you’ll chip in today to help elect Kirsten Engel, a certified water policy expert.
[**Whether it’s $5 or $500, every dollar will help send Kirsten to Congress to fight for our clean water future. **](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41609286/329572144/416963966?refcode=X_020922_WaterPolicy&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZjUwMzg5Yy1mMzg5LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Keeb0962FErSRmIMwohqSCWdsnrPR5uM8WcRqdYRMHI=)

We only need FIVE seats to turn the House RED. This gives us a once-in-a-lifetime chance to change the direction of our country, and Peter, we need you to join the team. So my ask of you today is: | The Biden Democrats have not stopped driving America into the ground. And if they continue to win, there is no end in sight for what their madness will cause. Fortunately, Peter, we have a solution... Grassroots Patriots like you. Do you want to stop runaway inflation? Do you want to end our national security failures? Do you want to stop China? Then Peter, patriots like us need to step up, especially with ringleader Nancy Pelosi running for reelection! We have to get the gavel back so we can get America back. With your help, we can AND will take back the majority.** For America, Drew Ferguson | | PAID FOR BY DREW FERGUSON FOR CONGRESS Thank your for your support! body:
It's not about the issues. It's about who is the Trumpiest and who can say it the loudest. |

Friend,

Today's GOP is in a race to the bottom, and nowhere is that clearer than in NC-14.

While state Republicans deal with the fallout of their gerrymandered congressional maps being ruled unconstitutional, my Republican opponents are campaigning on conspiracy theories and their loyalty to Donald Trump and the MAGA-right.

_It's not about the issues.

It's not about what they can accomplish for Western North Carolina.

It's about who is the Trumpiest and who can say it the loudest._

We can't do what's right for North Carolina families with politicians sowing hate and division. Folks are sick of it. That’s why my campaign is about building bridges in Western North Carolina. We're done being angry, and we're ready to get work:

But we cannot slow down - the current Governor is FAILING the people of Texas. We are ahead in the polls and we must keep our momentum strong. body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41610126/329574996/-420428835?refcode=20220209_SA_RW&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNjMxNWIwMS1mNTg5LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZibbTxW8ihLVQmxzyaoyvpp2hYHx0J34WYpyL9QVTlw=) Friend - I'm one of the most vulnerable incumbent Senate Democrats up for reelection this year, and I need your help: while I've spent my time in office providing pandemic relief to struggling families, fighting for voting rights and delivering on our progressive priorities, extremist Republicans are doing everything they can to attack me and smear my record. Here's why: experts at _POLITICO_ say that Democrats' chances of defending our razor-thin majority hinge on keeping Georgia blue. This race will decide Senate control – but while GOP megadonors and dark money groups have millions to spend to try and buy this seat, we're running a people-powered campaign that relies on grassroots support. **And unfortunately, with time running out before our crucial midnight fundraising deadline, we're falling incredibly short of our goal.** **So I'm personally reaching out to ask for your help today. I need to raise another $8,346 to fight back against GOP attacks and protect my seat – and I'm counting on you to help me get there:[ please, split $25 or more right now – as much as you can spare by midnight tonight – between my campaign and Seth Moulton's Serve America so we can win in Georgia and defend our Democratic Senate majority. ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41610127/329574997/-392698372?refcode=20220209_SA_RW&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNjMxNWIwMS1mNTg5LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZibbTxW8ihLVQmxzyaoyvpp2hYHx0J34WYpyL9QVTlw=)** [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41610128/329574998/-420428835?refcode=20220209_SA_RW&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNjMxNWIwMS1mNTg5LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZibbTxW8ihLVQmxzyaoyvpp2hYHx0J34WYpyL9QVTlw=)
As a kid who grew up in public housing, I know what it's like to be counted out before you even get started. But through hard work and the support of my family and community, I was able to graduate from college and went on to become the senior pastor at Dr. Martin Luther King Jr.'s church. Now, I'm proudly serving as the first Black senator in Georgia's history. But here's the deal: **with the Senate split 50-50, Republicans need to flip only one seat to retake control – and they're coming after me as a top target for defeat.** That's why we have to fight back _now_ – and it's why falling short of important goals like this isn't an option. Because if we fail to keep Georgia blue, Mitch McConnell will be back calling the shots and obstructing our Democratic agenda at every turn. **The battle for Senate control will be won or lost in Georgia, friend. So if you care about defending our Democratic Senate, I'm counting on you to rush your immediate grassroots support before it's too late:** [**Please, split a donation of $25 or more now between my campaign and Seth Moulton's Serve America PAC – before our crucial midnight deadline – to help us fight back against GOP attacks, keep Georgia blue and defend our Democratic Senate majority!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41610129/329574999/-392698372?refcode=20220209_SA_RW&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNjMxNWIwMS1mNTg5LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZibbTxW8ihLVQmxzyaoyvpp2hYHx0J34WYpyL9QVTlw=) I appreciate it – thank you so much. – Raphael Warnock [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41610130/329575000/-420428835?refcode=20220209_SA_RW&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNjMxNWIwMS1mNTg5LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZibbTxW8ihLVQmxzyaoyvpp2hYHx0J34WYpyL9QVTlw=)

name: Team Benson
subject: How we fight extremists
disclaimer_text:
Paid for by
Jocelyn Benson for Secretary of State
body:
Friend, last week Jocelyn reached out about conspiracy theorists who are attempting to gain power on county canvassing boards around Michigan. One new county canvasser said he would not have certified the 2020 election. Imagine, openly saying he would not follow the will of the voters!

Jocelyn said the best way to fight this extremist power grab is by monitoring the country canvassing board and speaking out against individuals who are nominated and would politicize the non-partisan election process if appointed.

The fight to protect democracy is a battle we must all participate in, and that’s why we’re reaching out today to ask if you followed Jocelyn’s advice. Do you know who is on your county canvassing board?

YES: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cby?refcdoe=020922Y

NO: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cbn?refcode=020922N

Thanks for participating in our democracy, friend.

Team Benson

One new county canvasser said he would not have certified the 2020 election. Imagine, openly saying he would not follow the will of the voters! Jocelyn said the best way to fight this extremist power grab is by monitoring the country canvassing board and speaking out against individuals who are nominated and would politicize the non-partisan election process if appointed. The fight to protect democracy is a battle we must all participate in, and that’s why we’re reaching out today to ask if you followed Jocelyn’s advice. Do you know who is on your county canvassing board? YES: NO: Thanks for participating in our democracy, friend. Paxton's Patriots Daily Update February 9, 2022

**Paxton's Patriots Daily Update February 9, 2022**

**Paxton's Patriots Suggested Social Media Post With Clip to Share: **

**Post:** Defending the Constitution and protecting our freedom isn't for the weak or faint of heart – that's why President Trump endorsed Ken Paxton. Watch his newest ad now to learn more about his successful battles in Court against Joe Biden.

**Link: **[https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=8S5y-KOtKAs](http://links.kenpaxtontx.com/u/click?_t=943205272de64e8b898beb2ebfd45b1b&_m=a1165f080b584f54ad2b12321c8c69ca&_e=ADhKZXyEZDCAo1_RAJEbnRiB01v1r8Tp3fEdGIP6m6fvRq81IXm-LwjzDFPijDe3ODiUyiYme7LYV8WOZoRvOUwFqMvWS_38wzy9EJB4S5C_McANPZNtEK_8QvdT1h9RICuI0owhfllGJi5Txl5l_dUrVJuYrF9NaoFfcX6KY02NAL6Zyb6gaaUq0hFoHqInbKdG1eEbF2M3bKEIKzxCbTqtu1wDHbt57jauca14rOg-xDR7sWIL7YsMWqW-Z26F9QqZVF_35-CbijKHcPwXnAvJNHQXs9l6aoh2S_05G68%3D)

**Theme of the Day: Brave**

As the Biden administration pushes their lawless agenda that has resulted in dire consequences for Texas, Ken Paxton is committed to holding the admin accountable, defending the Lone Star State from burdensome mandates, and championing the conservative values Texans hold dear. Here’s a recap of Ken Paxton’s efforts to defend Texas values and what’s driving the news you need to know: ~ Illegal immigrants are committing crimes across our country and aren't being deported as a result of the Biden administration's open-border policies. In Washington, D.C., the illegal immigrant who drew swastikas on the walls at Union Station won't be deported even though he's a convicted felon with a criminal history of deportations and arrests. Joe Biden's refusal to enforce our laws is dangerous. That's why Ken Paxton has taken Joe Biden to Court – and won. He won't stop until our border is secure.

~ A report out this week confirms what Texans already know, that Mexico is now the "dominant source" of the supply of deadly fentanyl and synthetic opioids streaming into our country. Joe Biden's policies are enriching drug cartels – and it is killing Americans. Ken Paxton is dedicated to combatting these drug traffickers and keeping drugs off our streets.

~ More and more Americans are becoming outraged at Joe Biden's plan to fund the distribution of "smoking kits and supplies" as part of a $30 million grant program aimed at reducing drug-related infections in the name of racial equity. Ken Paxton knows that this is dangerous and reckless. He'll continue to support policies that focus on reducing drug use, not encouraging it. We encourage you to [share these messages](http://links.kenpaxtontx.com/u/click?_t=943205272de64e8b898beb2ebfd45b1b&_m=a1165f080b584f54ad2b12321c8c69ca&_e=ADhKZXyEZDCAo1_RAJEbnb8-han8RZpDJgIhk_f7BPSDShZwrJiRDZPRrraWpbs2z1kY2bJJWDyYQfFd9P5BhNDgXdY7TJT-8QkPbqwJIITHTg7uCsFGuK3OsCepvqBuwmBVHNwfAuIKsf74Nh3VoEppfF3E4r_f7BNDdHVWwdTSuvHHnxc2WUuCee9RRsdNHtOeZllklRX83RIA3BvuOyVJe_HTm1Jvs0U5NjNeoFefYbKbIi4gaQw46tuIp-b2yc0elChS4GSObCqtYMAVSw%3D%3D) with your friends and followers on social media. Attorney General Paxton wakes up every day to fight for Texas and our core values, and sharing his efforts with your network will help ensure he can continue his fight on your behalf. Please encourage your friends and fellow patriots to [join our efforts](http://links.kenpaxtontx.com/u/click?_t=943205272de64e8b898beb2ebfd45b1b&_m=a1165f080b584f54ad2b12321c8c69ca&_e=ADhKZXyEZDCAo1_RAJEbnb8-han8RZpDJgIhk_f7BPSDShZwrJiRDZPRrraWpbs28qGALtmoYNTMr1nsihSChW-T7hSHnoeGLgbGtyb8kLKBGCqI9axUDD0nADaPUF3VHwswysLyUFZD_fTUnOhv3-KJR2V-TCZF0XJvvCLhFspyZR28Eo1uTAqgCqG2VqEIyGeMo0rIvvpLmf929WdTACcQYcUfNgyceXpYL1M7CUq49e_Md3RPpLi8415GJ8SNYNWFeu8avNDaCCLyw8_DtA%3D%3D) and Paxton’s Patriots to receive these daily updates [by clicking here.](http://links.kenpaxtontx.com/u/click?_t=943205272de64e8b898beb2ebfd45b1b&_m=a1165f080b584f54ad2b12321c8c69ca&_e=ADhKZXyEZDCAo1_RAJEbnb8-han8RZpDJgIhk_f7BPSDShZwrJiRDZPRrraWpbs25htkLsFGYJ9-96qReW4cgC9Rzpk4Weax3UR5WXOWwElOJ229lFNmqzgyJw67U50W4zPxKvARuFaka0cu9hxccKVt-7ViUBEzM31N7_omRnIWpaT9uXD1S3eqUeYpU4s2HZkCIYno-u-opM1XN7RINLBFI9LbjgqW-Y7b8LdORTSmzrRt3xv4pYgbdG09EKtN4jy0GJmN4bjNoLtVndwYTQ%3D%3D)

Donald J. Trump February 8th, 2022
The Biden Administration now says “conspiracy theories” about elections are the greatest threat to the homeland. Does the Department of Homeland Security include in its list of conspiracy theories the on tape irrefutable evidence of massive “Ballot Harvesting” in the Swing States? Do they include more votes than voters, and the fact that in Georgia thousands of duplicate votes were scanned and voter fraud was committed with 100-0 falsified vote counts for Joe Biden? Do they include in Wisconsin more than twice the election margin voted without ever showing Voter ID, which is illegal, or the widespread fraud uncovered in nursing homes? What about the many violations of the Constitution, and the millions poured into Swing States by the Facebook CEO to hijack our elections?

The Biden Administration will do anything to keep the eye away from the massive irregularities and voter fraud that took place in the 2020 Presidential Election, even so ridiculously as going after its own citizens as “terrorists” using DHS, which should instead be focusing on the Border, where millions of people, from places unknown, are pouring into our Country. They are so desperate to hide the truth, they’ll make it criminal to speak it!

body:
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41610603/329576947/-1862136002?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MGYyNDJjYy1mNzg5LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pv2vDu3XDIljupLYVU11dMLTl83r0QNid1DbewtLhH8=&emci=fb586953-e889-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=60f242cc-f789-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=15384964)
Peter,

Workers are the backbone of our economy but while productivity has continued to go up, wages have remained stagnant for far too long and middle class Rhode Islanders are struggling to pay their bills.

A strong labor movement is essential to rebuilding the middle class and ensuring hardworking Americans can keep up with the rising cost of living. It’s no coincidence that while union membership is at historic lows, inequality is at historic highs.

That’s why Seth supports the Protecting the Right to Organize Act (PRO Act) to expand labor protections and ensure workers have the freedom to decide whether they wish to form a union without the fear of retaliation.

Seth has a long track record of creating good paying jobs. The school construction initiative and clean energy programs he spearheaded have put over 30,000 people to work rebuilding our crumbling schools and making energy efficiency upgrades across the state.

Seth will continue to fight for working people in Congress and stand up to the right-wing politicians who care more about enriching their friends than they do providing workers a chance at the American Dream.

clean_body: Peter, Workers are the backbone of our economy but while productivity has continued to go up, wages have remained stagnant for far too long and middle class Rhode Islanders are struggling to pay their bills. A strong labor movement is essential to rebuilding the middle class and ensuring hardworking Americans can keep up with the rising cost of living. It’s no coincidence that while union membership is at historic lows, inequality is at historic highs. That’s why Seth supports the Protecting the Right to Organize Act (PRO Act) to expand labor protections and ensure workers have the freedom to decide whether they wish to form a union without the fear of retaliation. Seth has a long track record of creating good paying jobs. The school construction initiative and clean energy programs he spearheaded have put over 30,000 people to work rebuilding our crumbling schools and making energy efficiency upgrades across the state. Seth will continue to fight for working people in Congress and stand up to the right-wing politicians who care more about enriching their friends than they do providing workers a chance at the American Dream. | Thank you, Team Seth = | | ---|---|--- PAID FOR BY MAGAZINER FOR CONGRESS VICTORIA ALMEIDA, TREASURER Magaziner for Congress Victoria Almeida, Treasurer PO Box 303 Providence, RI 02901 United States

9,824 — That’s the number of miles Mark Kelly has traveled in Arizona since getting elected, visiting each of the state’s 15 counties.
#

**9,824**
That’s the number of miles Mark Kelly traveled during his first year in office, visiting each of the state’s 15 counties.
**21**
The number of bipartisan bills and amendments Mark Kelly sponsored during his first year, including 3 of the core bills in the bipartisan infrastructure bill.
**5**
That’s the number of Republican opponents we have in this race trying to beat Mark.
**$10 million**
That’s how much money one of our potential opponents already has behind them in just one Super PAC.
**966,869**
That’s the number of people who have contributed to support Mark Kelly.

That’s the day we’re asking you to make to join them with your first donation to our campaign. Because it all adds up when we’re all chipping in.

North Carolina is a purple state, and we know that our elections are usually very close. And when I say this race could come down to a handful of votes, it’s because I’ve seen it happen.
It happened to me, in fact. My race for Chief Justice in 2020 was decided by just 401 votes. Out of 5,391,501 votes. In a race where I earned more votes than almost every Democrat on the ticket.
The latest polling is showing we could be in for just as close of a race, so we cannot afford to take anything for granted here. That’s why I’m asking:
[**Will you make a $3 donation to our campaign to flip North Carolina’s open Senate seat today? There’s no doubt in my mind that every dollar will make a difference when the votes are counted.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-feb22?refcode=em220209-1-ma&refcode2=383.357359.uUIggg&t=27&akid=383%2E357359%2EuUIggg)
In a race that could come down to such a narrow margin, this is why we have to work even harder. What we each do can truly make a difference.
\- Cheri Beasley
