disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE
body:
Decertify AZ |
---
| | [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=5067aa2185&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| | Dear ,
The last few days have been a whirlwind, but I wanted to take a few minute here to give you a crucial update on what I am doing in the Arizona Legislature.

**After tremendous work, research, and collaboration with key figures like Senator Wendy Rogers, I have introduced legislation to the House to decertify three 2020 county elections: Maricopa, Pima, and Yuma.**

Everything involved in these elections in these counties scream fraud and that they are irredeemably compromised.

The following form the grounds for this groundbreaking and historic legislation:
* Article I, section II of the US Constitution provides the power to make ultimate decisions over electors to the State Legislature.
* The Supreme Court has supported this, stating that “whatever provisions may be made by statute, or by the state constitution, to choose electors by the people, there is no doubt of the right of the legislature to resume the power at any time.”
* There is a common law principle that anything arising out of fraud is void ab initio, and can be rescinded. This has been applied to remove a sitting elected official (Marks v. Stinson).
* The margin of error, exceeds the margin of victory, undermining the integrity of the election in these key counties – making it impossible to declare a winner.

**And this is blowing up, right now.**

_The President, Donald J. Trump, has immediately issued his support:_
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=d4e40c9c0a&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| Big news in Arizona, indeed!

**Thank you, President Trump, for your support in this key effort.**

While there is no doubt that this legislation is absolutely critical and necessary, this will require a significant amount of resources to get the word out and make sure that this legislation passes.

[_And I am humbly and sincerely asking your support, joining me, Senator Wendy Rogers, Senator Sonny Borrelli, and other America First Patriots, in pushing the first domino down in repealing the long chain of fraudulent outcomes of the 2020 election._

_Please donate today to help us Decertify the 2020 election!_](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=8c18170584&e=44b8c466b0)
---
|
---
| HCR 2033 will go down as historic – a bill which enables and empowers the people to take back control of elections from the shadow elite, those who have robbed, stolen, and cheated the election from the beginning.

**And this needs to pass! The country has backslid to worse than Obama-era times under the mis-administration of Joe Biden. And at the root of all of this? **

_That which is irredeemably compromised and endemically broken. The 2020 election._

**I ask you once again – _stand with me, Representatives Barton, Biasiucci, Burges, Carter, Chaplik, Diz, Fillmore, Martinez, Nguyen, Parker, and Senators Borrelli, Rogers, and Townsend._**

[_This started with the grassroots and will end with the grassroots. I need your support today to get this through!_](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=aa58d7889f&e=44b8c466b0)

_[Can you help out with a donation of $25, $50, $100, $250 or more?](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=0621218d47&e=44b8c466b0)_

[Thank you for your support!](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=a9856a3444&e=44b8c466b0)

clean_body: Decertify AZ | | | | | Dear , The last few days have been a whirlwind, but I wanted to take a few minute here to give you a crucial update on what I am doing in the Arizona Legislature. After tremendous work, research, and collaboration with key figures like Senator Wendy Rogers, I have introduced legislation to the House to decertify three 2020 county elections: Maricopa, Pima, and Yuma. Everything involved in these elections in these counties scream fraud and that they are irredeemably compromised. The following form the grounds for this groundbreaking and historic legislation: Article I, section II of the US Constitution provides the power to make ultimate decisions over electors to the State Legislature. The Supreme Court has supported this, stating that “whatever provisions may be made by statute, or by the state constitution, to choose electors by the people, there is no doubt of the right of the legislature to resume the power at any time.” There is a common law principle that anything arising out of fraud is void ab initio, and can be rescinded. This has been applied to remove a sitting elected official (Marks v. Stinson). The margin of error, exceeds the margin of victory, undermining the integrity of the election in these key counties – making it impossible to declare a winner. And this is blowing up, right now. The President, Donald J. Trump, has immediately issued his support: | | Big news in Arizona, indeed! Thank you, President Trump, for your support in this key effort. While there is no doubt that this legislation is absolutely critical and necessary, this will require a significant amount of resources to get the word out and make sure that this legislation passes. | | HCR 2033 will go down as historic – a bill which enables and empowers the people to take back control of elections from the shadow elite, those who have robbed, stolen, and cheated the election from the beginning. And this needs to pass! The country has backslid to worse than Obama-era times under the mis-administration of Joe Biden. And at the root of all of this? That which is irredeemably compromised and endemically broken. The 2020 election. I ask you once again – stand with me, Representatives Barton, Biasiucci, Burges, Carter, Chaplik, Diz, Fillmore, Martinez, Nguyen, Parker, and Senators Borrelli, Rogers, and Townsend. | | Mark Finchem Arizona House of Representatives – District 11 Republican for Arizona Secretary of State Conservative Election Integrity Patriot P.S. subject: We can get through this

body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41610841/329577720/1254848285?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODk0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNGQxYzYxZi1mOTg5LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_qp7suboV-m8eZbyrkYnfQU6lvy6U2hkxXfB8Fm2wYg=&emci=2b36b86c-f889-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=f4d1c61f-f989-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=23594672) | |
---
Peter – Across the country, families are struggling. The pandemic has worsened already existing problems faced by middle class, rural, and underserved families:**a lack of childcare.**

My family has felt this personally, when my husband and I had to work opposite shifts for years because we could not afford childcare. In GA-14 alone, more than two thirds of our District is considered a childcare desert, making access and affordability almost impossible for our families.

But this issue is bigger than just GA-14. We’re at a point where communities across the country are struggling to find childcare. And if we don’t address this, the impacts on children and families across the country**will be devastating. **

Over the last two years, 110,000 people have left the childcare industry. As schools shut their doors due to rising COVID-19 cases, childcare facilities are constantly understaffed and at capacity. Parents are forced to make the choice between taking care of their children or providing for their families.

My question is: where is Marjorie Taylor Greene while her District is begging for accessible childcare? **The alarm bells are ringing, and our representatives have failed to provide solutions.**

I'm running for Congress because this isn’t just about my family anymore – this is impacting my neighbors, your neighbors, and our whole country. I will fight each day in Congress to provide solutions. I will fully support and pass the Childcare is Infrastructure Act. I will work tirelessly to implement a national preschool program. And it's about time we worked across the aisle to extend the childcare tax credit. I know that we can overcome these obstacles if we work together.

**[Donate $10 today if you're ready to take a stand and support candidates like me.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41610842/329577721/-804235033?refcode=em0209b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODk0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNGQxYzYxZi1mOTg5LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_qp7suboV-m8eZbyrkYnfQU6lvy6U2hkxXfB8Fm2wYg=)** Candidates who will not abandon our communities, but ones who will fight each day for them.

We can get through this,
Holly McCormack.
|

I’m reaching out today because we need to send a strong message that we’re ready to defend this seat – no matter what.

Thanks to redistricting, VA-02 just got _a lot_ more competitive. **In fact, it’s the most competitive House race in the entire country.**
Some folks don’t believe that we can hold this seat – but those are the same folks who thought this team couldn’t flip VA-02 back in 2018.
The support of everyone on this grassroots team made the difference in that race, and we ended up winning by less than 6,000 votes. This time around it could be even closer.

body:

| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zsb8ru8vrj57kufd43ak7tgbvino416sggj3nus0_rp22sh2s8i66ob1c5gmao72c5h2bs)

| |
Dear fellow American, Anti-Americanism has long been evident in higher education. But recently, it has spread from college campuses to other areas of American life. Today it asserts itself in many forms—including critical race theory—in our government, in our K-12 schools, in our corporations, in the media, in sports, and even in our military. The recent election in Virginia brought the corruption of American K-12 education, in particular, to the forefront of our national conversation. The breakdown (especially among younger Americans) of informed patriotism—without which self-government is impossible—is not something we can allow to continue. While there is reason to remain hopeful, there is much work to be done to reverse the current trends in the months and years ahead. **Education is where this attack on America began—and it is the battlefield on which we must engage the Left in defense of liberty and limited constitutional government.** Hillsdale College has been deeply engaged in this battle for decades. We are now determined, with the help of supporters like you, who agree with Hillsdale’s mission, to redouble our efforts at this crucial time for our nation—no matter the cost. That’s why we are expanding our **Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions** in 2022. You can support this vital project through this link: _[**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/preserve-freedom-for-future-generations**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z2uru7m2288jmqp4drekrli2u91gblkjusdtvnog_rp22sh2s8i66ob1c5gmao72c5h2bs)_ **The Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions** will give informed patriots across the country the effective ability to defend liberty through education. And we need your help. The**** project has three key objectives:
1. **Expand** the circulation of _Imprimis_ , our digest of liberty, to reach millions more Americans.

2. **Increase** the number of citizens (especially younger Americans) enrolling in our free online courses, such as “Constitution 101: The Meaning and History of the Constitution,” “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope,” and our newest course, “American Citizenship and Its Decline” with Victor Davis Hanson.

3. **Launch****** additional Hillsdale-affiliated classical K-12 charter schools nationwide and **provide, free of charge,** our American classical K-12 curriculum (including the new ** _Hillsdale 1776 Curriculum_**) to thousands more American teachers and homeschoolers.

And your generous support is critical to our success. Here’s why... Hillsdale College**conducts its educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty** —as it does all of its work—while refusing to accept one penny of government funding, not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. So, to expand this effective program, we will need thousands of gifts between **$25** and **$100**. This is the range in which most supporters give. We will also need a significant number of **$500** to **$1,000** donations. But contributions of any size are appreciated. We urgently need your help. **You can safely and securely renew your support using this link:** [**_https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/preserve-freedom-for-future-generations_**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z5jvtbn91qi3f20su87ch1bp3ut5dh32s4lod268_rp22sh2s8i66ob1c5gmao72c5h2bs) As the forces of anti-Americanism redouble their own efforts to undermine informed patriotism in our schools and our culture, and to subvert constitutionalism in our government, we must engage them ever more aggressively—including on the central battlefield of education. That’s why I hope you’ll make your most generous gift in this critical year for America. Every dollar you can give will help expand our **Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions** in 2022. Thank you for your generosity. I hope you’ll stand with us. Together, we will work to preserve freedom for future generations of Americans. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

Friend, the anti-freedom COVID hysteria has gone too far.

In the Capital city of our country, they are literally shutting down restaurants that refuse to enforce their tyrannical, lawless mandates.

Just this week I went out to show my support for a local business threatened by the out of control health department!

Let’s just be clear:
1. Enacting a vaccine mandate infringes upon the personal liberties of consumers.

I've introduced legislation to stop these ridiculous mandates and restore individual rights in Washington, DC.

**Will you chip in now to join me in the fight to end these anti-freedom, anti-science mandates?**

body:
Another liberal politician showing hypocrisy regarding 'masking up.' | [](http://links.amandamakkiforcongress.com/u/click?_t=8965a0767ffa477684a41cb5767552cd&_m=8d2a8a4437674f9c8479e75c0c257491&_e=KZZg9pE8Sky09Bd48_o_SYf6hOyDK6RESdwq4j4P116TLRNkChPmiGG0XujnOGivTsY3MJhx_Mm4I7asMcqIfpaDdBArSoOKmCVyGylUPHA9m_KHjGpl8bq4VREgU2fSrUWDAqUZCW1IqI4xN4Ig5zsxnFI0kXlY6mAR-lMeC0yF04YroL3E_y9xtycuGSrbKk3ajuXtwpup70VcAepjT4A2Ug94k9I6bM_BJbWPmeGw-kMKz9FOgmGNt0j18cd8UF5CGEUlmu3uNf6vSN5tcW2GyydLY5DexJ_tC_tRf2FiNkY0WCaEwa2oYJPy0-0K7oa0Ce_xPXIT7cDfILd0P83Ao_5kl0imXgya03kb16C_nONU8TyPTadsk7RBfhK27PadMtud4vxzkni3_9IsC5puFqiypTp-H7V6p5K7HlwULNNFth1uB26nDzBj8l5X)

Peter -

I'm sure you saw this last weekend—another liberal politician showing hypocrisy regarding _'masking up.'_

[ ](http://links.amandamakkiforcongress.com/u/click?_t=8965a0767ffa477684a41cb5767552cd&_m=8d2a8a4437674f9c8479e75c0c257491&_e=KZZg9pE8Sky09Bd48_o_SYf6hOyDK6RESdwq4j4P116TLRNkChPmiGG0XujnOGivTsY3MJhx_Mm4I7asMcqIfpaDdBArSoOKmCVyGylUPHA9m_KHjGpl8bq4VREgU2fSrUWDAqUZCW1IqI4xN4Ig5zsxnFI0kXlY6mAR-lMeC0yF04YroL3E_y9xtycuGSrbKk3ajuXtwpup70VcAepjT_w8-9ZeKAuEh_8vglcHY3-r0pOjKROPNr7RSu1752qvSCqyg97iPnB3-OEztkk9Ekwu4F7BJb6ZlrNbOoymc7B1UwlwC_C5UcLdPrLxWCoU5-9SgLgqjWjkEAFVM8g4lc58Inw3GLdzezhQmIbCQWtWzJTgDAd-0vv2tkXyt7efa5GfhPiDV8YEDfHOBGArwNBhmWMViHFCSSYD7fCPcbrW-BPByEnbZe2Jt1BDr4gy)

Stacey Abrams was sitting in front of a room of masked children maskless. Her reasoning for not wearing a mask? **She didn't think the children could hear her if she spoke while wearing a mask.**

**Liberals like her are the reason kids have to listen to their teachers through masks and miss out on valuable emotional and educational development.**

The Left is doing reprehensible and irreversible damage to our nation's children. Conservatives know this, and red states like Florida have taken steps to protect our children from the negligence of the Left.

This November, Republicans have the opportunity to take back the House. We can right the wrongs that the Biden Administration has done over the last 14 months and block their efforts until we can elect a Republican President. [**But we need to make sure that the right Republicans get there.**](http://links.amandamakkiforcongress.com/u/click?_t=8965a0767ffa477684a41cb5767552cd&_m=8d2a8a4437674f9c8479e75c0c257491&_e=KZZg9pE8Sky09Bd48_o_SYf6hOyDK6RESdwq4j4P116TLRNkChPmiGG0XujnOGivTsY3MJhx_Mm4I7asMcqIfpaDdBArSoOKmCVyGylUPHA9m_KHjGpl8bq4VREgU2fSrUWDAqUZCW1IqI4xN4Ig5zsxnFI0kXlY6mAR-lMeC0yF04YroL3E_y9xtycuGSrbKk3ajuXtwpup70VcAepjT8Xro2o2rItA1M9ZbD6i2uG291wqzWfCgKL-ufy3dWU5DLt0fX-OYhrUpv6uJ-zvJStEkC9Wo8ioOU_NHWgcgmvnEBHs97oEXIDJ7iXSmoTiVD5NTwB62GUOtC7kTA3a1avUs54nDbzBA-fqrrJXqYfNZ1XUssIhZkkYSMxGt8fg-_fVb1_Oa70tMBRQxNCtrhTGoDFM5zgD0boPb4kxVq4iL9NqmM_TAmXnrM17C29B)

For the sake of our children, can you help me take down my RINO opponents and ensure that a true Conservative like me is elected to Florida's 13th Congressional District? [**Can you make a $5, $10 or $25 contribution to my campaign now?**](http://links.amandamakkiforcongress.com/u/click?_t=8965a0767ffa477684a41cb5767552cd&_m=8d2a8a4437674f9c8479e75c0c257491&_e=KZZg9pE8Sky09Bd48_o_SYf6hOyDK6RESdwq4j4P116TLRNkChPmiGG0XujnOGivTsY3MJhx_Mm4I7asMcqIfpaDdBArSoOKmCVyGylUPHA9m_KHjGpl8bq4VREgU2fSrUWDAqUZCW1IqI4xN4Ig5zsxnFI0kXlY6mAR-lMeC0yF04YroL3E_y9xtycuGSrbKk3ajuXtwpup70VcAepjTxlTyXoUvM3mHNY9VDy34lph6FAKdjeALM5X_SKJKt1ZAuiqDNUdaC8Nq5WaxEvfc2x6IwPu5aarUYPbFBw3TIpMTA19FOZQw1Djrkb9czwYPsk8ZFgD9-k1Z76yLd6TZ3GzIhlK9FKwXm-2jxyozDEP4FOOFbadLiA37B_IaOcHGM00Vfw1DCMokj21waZHt23FvlJj2X4AG0qYwX2FU2ZJWjf_7FHK96ktwS86j2VA)

| [**$5**](http://links.amandamakkiforcongress.com/u/click?_t=8965a0767ffa477684a41cb5767552cd&_m=8d2a8a4437674f9c8479e75c0c257491&_e=KZZg9pE8Sky09Bd48_o_SYf6hOyDK6RESdwq4j4P116TLRNkChPmiGG0XujnOGivTsY3MJhx_Mm4I7asMcqIfpaDdBArSoOKmCVyGylUPHA9m_KHjGpl8bq4VREgU2fSrUWDAqUZCW1IqI4xN4Ig5zsxnFI0kXlY6mAR-lMeC0yF04YroL3E_y9xtycuGSrbKk3ajuXtwpup70VcAepjT7ZeIg5UU-3GhYsSAFauado6GmSrZRgrAi23dCF8PDLPDoRLofv5LpLk-TFg0jIKkT3aP3dWPElFK2CN7CLOBTAL8crP3ii50sGs73kNuKH7JPYSR2JPOA3NPkLwYwYIvreceXSPxQS7LgaUa02rZ3R0VQJOMO75zhowNEzvvbqUhDxGd57CLFdju3jqj0nvZ1sRy_aNDv2nlIhu9NngyELPrA3orpMROOUy_GRUBFes) | [**$10**](http://links.amandamakkiforcongress.com/u/click?_t=8965a0767ffa477684a41cb5767552cd&_m=8d2a8a4437674f9c8479e75c0c257491&_e=KZZg9pE8Sky09Bd48_o_SYf6hOyDK6RESdwq4j4P116TLRNkChPmiGG0XujnOGivTsY3MJhx_Mm4I7asMcqIfpaDdBArSoOKmCVyGylUPHA9m_KHjGpl8bq4VREgU2fSrUWDAqUZCW1IqI4xN4Ig5zsxnFI0kXlY6mAR-lMeC0yF04YroL3E_y9xtycuGSrbKk3ajuXtwpup70VcAepjT33AWzjwyWdwvH5kJMxMf0-Y334U6rZkS1uauhKTSQAKEek2F5QTZDwzrfstNAUSb0TBE-4vBy9MCQQ3wtqSGU_Tr2KijrT3MWfu_bSeKhf0etJrDBAT7Eye3oz4PqSjlBhUKDYthLg3w8y6x7molgss_TfJ_p6ih6rMVbtJTIlrYAoosmkWB1USOrg91A80XcEqkqE21uyJqmhzaJd3OY97-TjjVW0UPqfuYxQhtuKv) | [**$25**](http://links.amandamakkiforcongress.com/u/click?_t=8965a0767ffa477684a41cb5767552cd&_m=8d2a8a4437674f9c8479e75c0c257491&_e=KZZg9pE8Sky09Bd48_o_SYf6hOyDK6RESdwq4j4P116TLRNkChPmiGG0XujnOGivTsY3MJhx_Mm4I7asMcqIfpaDdBArSoOKmCVyGylUPHA9m_KHjGpl8bq4VREgU2fSrUWDAqUZCW1IqI4xN4Ig5zsxnFI0kXlY6mAR-lMeC0yF04YroL3E_y9xtycuGSrbKk3ajuXtwpup70VcAepjT-lMjeUgAgTISZ3HOrxJ0XWH3h_Vsv7JsFjxFM4L2PVttAGelLWHi3zD8VhAb-BwyBcgbeVjm0M2TW7f7vnetLyNoDRGkp1D0YNm089tU5qnTCe7G1owq80XxrVQl_Fgnrrb5zo8LV9zUsZ0W9wvDtqTH2JRY_RDBVmevaN3ipaKVUoXKCRXgdTOj2Z1wtKXSqgB0wCWZO8VXFp3crbQ3z4shOxI8bYivS-DZMdhhWCl)

[**Can you help send a proud Floridian Conservative to Congress?**](http://links.amandamakkiforcongress.com/u/click?_t=8965a0767ffa477684a41cb5767552cd&_m=8d2a8a4437674f9c8479e75c0c257491&_e=KZZg9pE8Sky09Bd48_o_SYf6hOyDK6RESdwq4j4P116TLRNkChPmiGG0XujnOGivTsY3MJhx_Mm4I7asMcqIfpaDdBArSoOKmCVyGylUPHA9m_KHjGpl8bq4VREgU2fSrUWDAqUZCW1IqI4xN4Ig5zsxnFI0kXlY6mAR-lMeC0yF04YroL3E_y9xtycuGSrbKk3ajuXtwpup70VcAepjTwPMyMraHZLK50G1xS_lf7nIJRdrtsPGOtVxdKPHMfc71JK6TpQFzlUNzVJXiZwY7ITllD85DjUcgt_PFohjtkno1mrzRinctwrEwsJlFr_a2M0BhRjpIxwqeChs6uPphUJS8wbV3_O18fRxzlB1AWxDADfVP7V3JJXk2RlcMHDzlxcXUtsHxZ-Y5U4nK0U4X5uWAeHag5z_YY6FDuPzGiUlc_pAtxv03PQV7O9kl_Ml)

Sincerely,

**_Amanda Makki_**
Republican for Florida's 13th Congressional District

Another liberal politician showing hypocrisy regarding 'masking up.'
clean_body: Another liberal politician showing hypocrisy regarding 'masking up.' | Peter - I'm sure you saw this last weekend—another liberal politician showing hypocrisy regarding 'masking up.' Stacey Abrams was sitting in front of a room of masked children maskless. Her reasoning for not wearing a mask? She didn't think the children could hear her if she spoke while wearing a mask. Liberals like her are the reason kids have to listen to their teachers through masks and miss out on valuable emotional and educational development. The Left is doing reprehensible and irreversible damage to our nation's children. Conservatives know this, and red states like Florida have taken steps to protect our children from the negligence of the Left. This November, Republicans have the opportunity to take back the House. We can right the wrongs that the Biden Administration has done over the last 14 months and block their efforts until we can elect a Republican President. For the sake of our children, can you help me take down my RINO opponents and ensure that a true Conservative like me is elected to Florida's 13th Congressional District? | | | ---|---|--- No child should be forced to cover their face for 8 hours a day, and Republicans need to make sure that mask mandates are blocked coast-to-coast. We need strong conservatives in the House to make that happen, not RINOs with questionable allegiances. Sincerely, Amanda Makki Republican for Florida's 13th Congressional District | Amanda Makki is an America First candidate for Congress in Florida's 13th District. A legal immigrant, attorney, and conservative national commentator, Amanda is a strong conservative with a proven record of fighting for the values and principles that made America the greatest country in the world! ---|--- | Paid for by Amanda Makki For Congress Don't want to receive any more of our emails? subject: Indiana educators need our help!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Democratic Party, www
body:
HB1134 has passed the house

|
---
Peter — Not that this should come as a shock, but instead of focusing on passing meaningful legislation that would benefit our education system, **Indiana Republicans are focused on continuing to push their culture wars into our schools.** HB 1134 is currently awaiting a vote in the Senate. This bill is a blatant overreach of the government that would censor public school curriculums across the state. The Indiana GOP's partisanship is now one step closer toward taking the state's teacher shortage into overdrive. Educators from every corner of Indiana are taking a stand against the GOP’s move to put politics in our schools and divide communities across the state, but they need our help. **We’re working nonstop to hold the GOP accountable to passing meaningful education policy to create a better future for Hoosiers.[Can you chip in to help Indiana Democrats support educators across the state?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41611202/329579282/405560545?refcode=idp-em-220209-education&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyN2RmYmU3Mi1mYjg5LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_Bd1s4k1tIoNAMQU4CkVizcSY3_1n-ahLtuG2-efBjo=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [Chip in $10 now ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41611203/329579283/405560545?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=idp-em-220209-education&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyN2RmYmU3Mi1mYjg5LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_Bd1s4k1tIoNAMQU4CkVizcSY3_1n-ahLtuG2-efBjo=)

clean_body: HB1134 has passed the house | Peter — Not that this should come as a shock, but instead of focusing on passing meaningful legislation that would benefit our education system, Indiana Republicans are focused on continuing to push their culture wars into our schools. HB 1134 is currently awaiting a vote in the Senate. This bill is a blatant overreach of the government that would censor public school curriculums across the state. The Indiana GOP's partisanship is now one step closer toward taking the state's teacher shortage into overdrive. Educators from every corner of Indiana are taking a stand against the GOP’s move to put politics in our schools and divide communities across the state, but they need our help. | | | Fellow Conservative, we have one question for you.
**Are you proud to be an American? **

---
| [](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3gqir-1xfp9-4qqlpo1/ "Graphic")
---

We can’t help but be proud to be Americans! Our country is the best in the world, and we aren’t ashamed of it. Liberals love to attack our beautiful nation and even go as far to say that it’s inherently evil. Frankly, we disagree. We love America, and what it stands for across the world.

Our Founding Fathers created this nation so we could be free – the freedom of speech, the freedom of religion, the right to bear arms. We’ve been through hardships, but Americans have bravely chosen to defend these freedoms at home and abroad.

If you’re proud to be an American, then you NEED this 2022 Limited Edition USA Flag Shirt! **[These shirts are LIMITED. We only ordered enough for the first 100 Patriots to claim theirs, so do not wait another minute to claim your shirt... subject: WATCH: Hypocrisy unmasked
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mike Gallagher for Wisconsin
body:

name: Alessandra Biaggi
subject: Humbly asking if you can add your name and personally endorse my campaign for Congress? This is important, and your support means a lot.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Alessandra Biaggi for Congress This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail
body:
#
Friends —
Earlier this week, I shared the news that I’m running for Congress in New York’s 3rd district. Since then, hundreds of people have made contributions to our campaign to show their support.
And truthfully, I want to say thank you, because lots of supporters like you chipping in $5 or $10 at a time is what will power this campaign.
But if we are going to win in a crowded primary, we will need as many people as possible to say that they are standing with us. That’s why I’m asking:
[**Can you add your name here to say that you personally endorse my campaign for Congress? It’s important to know that we can count on you in this race.**](https://act.alessandrabiaggi.com/signup/em220209-personalendorse/?source=em220209-1-15&akid=462%2E59515%2E7vdLaK)
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.alessandrabiaggi.com/signup/em220209-personalendorse/?source=em220209-1-15&akid=462%2E59515%2E7vdLaK)**
For years, Albany was plagued by gridlock caused by conservatives in our own party, corruption, and cronyism at the highest levels.
Through hard work, we were finally able to turn the page on that era — and I want to take the lessons we learned to Congress to support working families in New York and beyond.
[**If you’re with me, I’m asking for you to show your support by personally endorsing my campaign. You can add your name using this link. **[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.alessandrabiaggi.com/signup/em220209-personalendorse/?source=em220209-1-15&akid=462%2E59515%2E7vdLaK)** I can’t thank you enough for your support, and I’ll be in touch soon. All my best,
Alessandra
Paid For By Alessandra Biaggi for Congress This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [**unsubscribe here**](https://act.alessandrabiaggi.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1&akid=462%2E59515%2E7vdLaK).

clean_body: This time, with your help, the underdog will win. | = Peter, I’m used to being counted out. I ran for Congress for the first time in 2020, during the height of the global pandemic, as a small-business owner and dedicated community activist. We were the clear underdog against MAGA Devin Nunes. But we came inches from defeating him — and sent shockwaves through the California GOP! I cherish each one of the 144,251 votes I received. Every vote represents one door knocked, one call made, and one step closer toward saving our democracy. = | = I know this campaign will be different this time around. Entrenched MAGA incumbent Devin Nunes quit on our communities to work for Trump. Nunes and Trump left our district, and our democracy, in shambles. I’m running to clean up their mess — and build a people‐powered movement to do it. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = With gratitude, — Phil | | Paid for by Arballo For Congress P.O. Box 3406, Fresno, CA 93650 www.philarballo.com Phil Arballo is a Latino, a Central Valley native, a father, and a husband. And he's running for Congress in California. Phil is a champion for real working families and will fight to protect health care access, keep guns out of the wrong hands, and stand up to traitorous Republicans who are working to ruin our Democracy. One more thing: MAGA Republicans are desperate to win this race. Make no mistake: redistricting has made this district the most competitive it's been in decades, but we need every good Democrat to step up and do their part to beat them. | | Folks, For years, Virginia Democrats have worked overtime to bring our Commonwealth into the 21st century, to make it a place where people of all races, ethnicities, sexual orientations, genders, and religions feel safe and welcome. **Yesterday the Virginia GOP killed an amendment that would have removed a ban on Gay Marriage from the Virginia Constitution.** **These are the people who voted against marriage equality in Virginia:** Christopher Head
Les Adams
Jay Leftwich
John McGuire
Phillip Scott
Margaret Ransone The bigotry doesn’t stop there. Not only do we have homophobic members in the House of Delegates that don’t believe that members of the LGBTQ community deserve full rights under the law — we have a governor who agrees with them. **THAT is why we’re asking for your support. | **"Democrats cannot afford to blow it in Wisconsin’s Senate race"**

_— The Washington Post_
---

First, _The Cook Political Report_ labeled our race a "toss-up." Then, _Roll Call_ and _CNN_ called Ron Johnson the most vulnerable GOP incumbent up for re-election. Not long after that, _The Washington Post_ reported, **“Sarah Godlewski could be the best chance to rid the Senate of Ron Johnson.”**

Now, we have a real opportunity to defeat Ron Johnson and return this seat to the people of Wisconsin, but it won't be easy. He’s a two-term incumbent with Donald Trump’s full endorsement and the full backing of national Republicans. Not to mention, he has Mitch McConnell’s entire dark money network behind him to dump millions into our race.

Sarah is the only Democrat leading Ron Johnson in the latest head-to-head poll, and she’s the only one who has taken on powerful Republicans in two statewide elections and won. With your help, she can do it again to flip this seat.

**[Will you make a contribution to our campaign and help us defeat Ron Johnson? We can't blow our best chance to get rid of Ron Johnson and flip Wisconsin’s U.S. Senate seat from red to blue. Friend, sorry to reach out again, but wanted to follow up on the urgent email we sent earlier this week.

Mitch McConnell only needs to flip ONE seat to take back Senate control, and he's laser-focused on this one. With CNN calling New Hampshire one of the most likely to flip, it's critical we reelect Maggie Hassan if we're going to defend our razor-thin Democratic Senate majority.

Unlike her GOP opponents, Senator Hassan doesn't have dark-money donors with bottomless pockets. We rely on the grassroots support of committed supporters like you to come through at this crucial fundraising moment.

**But unfortunately, we're still $8,188 short of our fundraising goal, and we need to close the gap by midnight tonight. **

**[_Please, will you rush a donation right now — even $5 or $10 can make all the difference — to protect Sen. Hassan's vulnerable seat and defend the Senate from McConnell and the GOP?_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41612186/329583748/-947982778?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk658-fr-nondonors&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYTRjMjMyZi0wMDhhLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=A3zQdruedc15OPdG6Kwuih5X5wA-nfGRDyEK-E-i7Fs=)**

1\. Political experts are calling Sen. Maggie Hassan's seat in New Hampshire one of the most vulnerable in the country.

2\. Senator Hassan doesn’t have as many resources as other top Democrats, BUT the GOP is spending more against her than any other Senate Democrat in the country - more than $7 million and counting.

3\. If we lose here in New Hampshire, we have no chance of holding our Democratic majority in the Senate.
**There is simply too much on the line, and securing Sen. Hassan's vulnerable seat is critical to maintaining our razor-thin Senate majority. **
That’s why we’ve set a goal to raise another $15,000 by midnight, but right now, we’re not on track. We cannot afford to fall behind now:

clean_body: sorry to reach out again, but this is urgent | | | Friend, sorry to reach out again, but wanted to follow up on the urgent email we sent earlier this week. Mitch McConnell only needs to flip ONE seat to take back Senate control, and he's laser-focused on this one. With CNN calling New Hampshire one of the most likely to flip, it's critical we reelect Maggie Hassan if we're going to defend our razor-thin Democratic Senate majority. Unlike her GOP opponents, Senator Hassan doesn't have dark-money donors with bottomless pockets. We rely on the grassroots support of committed supporters like you to come through at this crucial fundraising moment. But unfortunately, we're still $8,188 short of our fundraising goal, and we need to close the gap by midnight tonight. = Thanks for stepping up when we need you most. Team Hassan \---------- Forwarded message ---------- From: maggiehassan.com Date: Thu, Feb 3, 2022 Subject: There's too much at stake | | = Friend: Here are three things you urgently need to know to help protect our razor-thin Democratic Senate majority: 1\. Political experts are calling Sen. Maggie Hassan's seat in New Hampshire one of the most vulnerable in the country. 2\. Senator Hassan doesn’t have as many resources as other top Democrats, BUT the GOP is spending more against her than any other Senate Democrat in the country - more than $7 million and counting. 3\. If we lose here in New Hampshire, we have no chance of holding our Democratic majority in the Senate. There is simply too much on the line, and securing Sen. Hassan's vulnerable seat is critical to maintaining our razor-thin Senate majority. That’s why we’ve set a goal to raise another $15,000 by midnight, but right now, we’re not on track. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41612384/329584502/-1531988014?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220209sos_tw_60da_xx_img&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NTA1ZmE4MC0wMThhLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MQ3PUiy35rQXFD_FF2xU4FxzO1Fv4vBzkoeJsD-RGkY=) Wes has worked in public service during his entire professional career — he just hasn’t been a politician. He has the experience of working with elected officials all throughout the state, and he knows the way that we move forward is through partnership. He and Aruna understand it’s going to take the private sector, nonprofits, our government (both the legislative and the executive branches), community organizations, and the people to move our state forward. **To be the next chief executive of this state, you need to have a history of being able to have a bold vision, accomplishing big things, and being able to move cross-sectorally. ---
| | I am shocked and appalled. [**FIRST:**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41612348/329584301/1694517773?refcode=20220209_em_fr_b1_pelosi_30_v1&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDIvMS84ODQ2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YjIzZmRkNC0wMDhhLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=v4s2RFVYP9poMyh5yY2U6i6eSc4oCS1H-wt52NLj6fs=) I watched Trump’s supporters breach and trash our Capitol on January 6th. [**THEN:**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41612349/329584302/1694517773?refcode=20220209_em_fr_b1_pelosi_30_v1&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDIvMS84ODQ2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YjIzZmRkNC0wMDhhLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=v4s2RFVYP9poMyh5yY2U6i6eSc4oCS1H-wt52NLj6fs=) TEN Republicans involved in the January 6th rallies were just elected to office. [**NOW:** **FIVE more are now running for Congress – and Republicans only need to win SIX seats to retake our Majority.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41612350/329584303/1694517773?refcode=20220209_em_fr_b1_pelosi_30_v1&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDIvMS84ODQ2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YjIzZmRkNC0wMDhhLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=v4s2RFVYP9poMyh5yY2U6i6eSc4oCS1H-wt52NLj6fs=) [_**I am through with Republicans thinking they can trample our democracy with their dangerous lies and misinformation. I will not allow them to regain power in Congress if it takes everything I have left to stop them. But here’s what I need from you: Before my Midnight Deadline in this historic election year hits, I need 887 Democrats to confirm their 2022 Memberships to meet my budget goal, PROTECT our Democratic Majority, and ensure these dangerous Republicans never set foot in the halls of Congress again. A gift of any amount before midnight to confirm your Democratic Membership would mean so much to me. >>**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41612351/329584304/1694517773?refcode=20220209_em_fr_b1_pelosi_30_v1&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDIvMS84ODQ2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YjIzZmRkNC0wMDhhLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=v4s2RFVYP9poMyh5yY2U6i6eSc4oCS1H-wt52NLj6fs=) | [**2022 DEMOCRATIC MEMBER**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41612352/329584305/1694517773?refcode=20220209_em_fr_b1_pelosi_30_v1&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDIvMS84ODQ2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YjIzZmRkNC0wMDhhLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=v4s2RFVYP9poMyh5yY2U6i6eSc4oCS1H-wt52NLj6fs=)

name: Kevin Kiley
subject: Vote to End Emergency
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kevin Kiley for Congress 9458 Treelake Road, Granite Bay, CA 95746, United States
body:
|
---
Hi Peter, I've just published a new blog post: [Our Own Super Bowl](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=Bjc8XUdeJ9yV6eR3mI9Z6HRd5urWv8u8i-Pa-jQzioph9ZSajjEOfdpKmAEdd-AywJF3p6i9HMlCvu-x19MMWw&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=feb_9_final&n=1) It’s hard to get one’s mind around the absurd reality: California is about to host the _Super Bowl_ during a _State of Emergency_. Tomorrow, we’re making one last attempt to stop this descent into Bizarro World. We will finally take a vote on ending the emergency. The Assembly has never allowed a vote in the 21 months since I introduced my Resolution. But tomorrow I’m using a special parliamentary procedure to put everyone on the record for or against ACR 46. Other blue states long ago ended their emergencies. Even New Jersey and Pennsylvania are done with school mask mandates. Yet Newsom is still clinging to absolute power as he masks millions of kids. In our two-year battle against his one-man rule, this is our own Super Bowl. You can watch live on my Facebook page at 8 AM. Standing with me will be the new Assembly Republican Leader: James Gallagher. Yesterday we chose James to lead our caucus. He’s been my co-plaintiff in our court battles against Newsom, my “partner in liberty” through thick and thin. As my time at the State Capitol ends this year, he’s the perfect person to carry on the fight. I’m ready to take our fight to the U.S. Capitol – and national Democrats are sounding the alarm. With voting 3 months away, they’re hoping to strike a serious blow to our movement by taking me out. [Help me defeat Pelosi's campaign machine](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=09K6E4GvoPozZ73mzf50y5etLj1_9wCfyRoQ3wvVmv-GOhHPWzgYbh54Gph7Pyuk3g2mp41Qa8XyLKk0CnWqFcPhfo-70bh2d9FGRmWv-G172QGsW76cwQP_qMTr_tK1&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=feb_9_final&n=2) [Share this Post on Social Media](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6lpHI-UVcODcFSdMgu5zpAx-x6UnjtCPZZvt9ZAkpmvs7k42FeUNWivdBlKBZP-lXa_p72co_Xiqg3mu2nVtK-W7DFKi2fcCwpZujyPeoK27vb7igCFHanJjs5LTNwTYnOjFdhz_KQt6nBrnzKBFDNyitJcQowp7FGk3iTQI1EOS&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=feb_9_final&n=3) Kevin Kiley
California Legislator
Paid for by Kevin Kiley for Congress 9458 Treelake Road, Granite Bay, CA 95746, United States

name: Breaking News (via Nan Whaley HQ)
subject: Ohio Republicans are still trying to gerrymander our state
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Nan Whaley
body:
Once again – again! – Ohio Republicans’ maps have been ruled as unconstitutional.

Team,
Breaking news – **Once again, the Ohio Supreme Court has rejected state Republicans’ proposed district maps for the state legislature.**
Not only is this the third time the Ohio Supreme Court has sided with Ohio voters, but the judges who ruled against these gerrymandered maps come from both sides of the aisle – this time ruling that the proposed maps **did not “comply with the [state] Constitution].”**
Even more striking: One of the justices in favor of keeping the GOP maps was Republican governor Mike DeWine’s son, Pat. He refused to recuse himself even though his dad is one of the defendants.
**[We can’t let Republicans gerrymander their way into the majority, team. Please, pitch in $5 right now to help send Nan to the governor’s office to fight for representation for all – not just the few at the top.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41612621/329585610/1372011145?refcode=nw_em_220209_1_t2_b&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODM5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNDhjNDJjMi0wMzhhLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=frgcd5uE1nGTRalVxeE8CBczYWRMlkZ1ZWFyfzD9W-0=)**
The state legislature isn’t the only place where Ohio Republicans are attempting to gerrymander their way into power. They’ve also tried to rig the state Congressional map and take back the U.S. House of Representatives by diluting the power of Ohio voters like you.
We absolutely cannot let them stifle our voices – and that’s exactly what these gerrymandered maps would do. Every single Ohio voter deserves the chance to pick their leaders and not the other way around. For that to be reality, we need fair maps that ensure all of our votes count equally, regardless of our zip code, skin color, or how much money we earn.
**[Nan is fighting for Ohioans’ voices to be heard – but her Republican opponents are doing the exact opposite. If you’re ready to end extreme GOP gerrymandering, rush a $5 donation now to support Nan Whaley for Ohio>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41612622/329585618/1372011145?refcode=nw_em_220209_1_t2_b&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODM5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNDhjNDJjMi0wMzhhLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=frgcd5uE1nGTRalVxeE8CBczYWRMlkZ1ZWFyfzD9W-0=)**
Thank you,
Team Nan

They’ve also tried to rig the state Congressional map and take back the U.S. House of Representatives by diluting the power of Ohio voters like you. We absolutely cannot let them stifle our voices – and that’s exactly what these gerrymandered maps would do. Every single Ohio voter deserves the chance to pick their leaders and not the other way around. For that to be reality, we need fair maps that ensure all of our votes count equally, regardless of our zip code, skin color, or how much money we earn. = Thank you, Team Nan **= Paid for by Friends of Nan Whaley PO Box 2815, Dayton, OH 45401 This campaign is powered by supporters like you, but if you'd like to unsubscribe, .

body:

Folks—we’re falling REALLY behind on our February fundraising,
which isn’t great considering we’re up against millionaires backed by
billionaires.

Tim’s proud to run a campaign fueled by grassroots donors—our average
donation this month is just $29—but as the race picks up, so do our
fundraising goals.

Increasing our fundraising goal is the only way to compete with the
truckloads of dark money being dumped into Ohio. Seriously, I’ve done the

subject: And they’re lecturing us about voter fraud?!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BRACY FOR CONGRESS
body:
Peter,

This week, news broke that a whole lot of seniors in South Florida have had their party affiliation switched to Republican without their knowledge. And all signs point to the GOP.

It looks like the Florida GOP has been going door to door in public housing, tricking people into switching their party affiliation to try to get a leg up in the 2022 election.

And then they turn around and try to lecture us about voter fraud and election security.

They’re taking advantage of our seniors for their own political gain, Peter, and we need to fight back. Click here to chip in $25 and join our fight for transparency, honesty, and justice. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bracy-email?refcode=0208party]

We knew that the GOP wasn’t past pulling dirty tricks, but this is something else. Our seniors deserve leaders who will support them, not use them.

Randolph has always stood by our seniors. He’s always played fair. And he’s delivered real results for our community. Click here to support a candidate who plays fair and gets things done. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bracy-email?refcode=0208party]

Thank you for your support.

— Team Bracy

**But with just 6 hours until our first deadline of the month, it’s looking like we might fall short of our $120,000 goal and what we need to defeat Chuck Grassley and turn Iowa blue.**
**This couldn’t be more important.** [**Please, will you give $5 or whatever you can afford now – before our critical deadline at midnight tonight – to help me hit our goal, defeat Chuck Grassley, and protect our Democratic Senate majority?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41612766/329586803/-42398318?refcode=em20220209pm-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZDJkMjg2MC0wNDhhLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3NgiTlB6QKYkJXFokg0q_RjD6YW54JobrHz1vYDfu0g=)

**If we’re going to win, though, we need to hit our goal before our critical deadline at midnight tonight – and right now, we’re still coming up short.**
[**I’m not taking money from corporate PACs so I’m relying on you. name: =?utf-8?Q?Neil=20Kumar=20for=20Congress?=
subject: Are you tired of being called a "racist"?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY NEIL FOR ARKANSAS
body:
Leftist smears don't work on us anymore | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/neilforarkansas/jan6-5066153?e=eda539b26b)
---
| | [ ](https://NeilforArkansas.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b07b27c744909d0ecfce3d46&id=cdeac4853b&e=eda539b26b)
---
| | Fellow Patriot:

They say you can know a man best by his enemies.

And boy, do we have enemies.

Just like President Trump, all of the right ghouls are trying to silence me, from Big Tech to the totally corrupt Republican Establishment.

I've been thrown offstage at GOP events, banned from social media, and banned from 2 payment processors--I was even banned by my old barbershop.

Last fall, the Republican Party of Arkansas called me a "racist, sexist, bigot," and disavowed my campaign. What was my crime?

I want to end the Invasion on our Southern Border by building the Wall and imposing a Total Immigration Moratorium. America is full.

I'm also a proud Southerner.

Now, the evil ADL, along with the Guardian---Communist smear operations---put me at the very top of their list of the most "extreme" candidates in America.

According to these cretins, I'm a "racist White Supremacist." Of course, the absurdity of calling a mixed-race, Indian-American individual like myself a "White Supremacist" is totally lost on them.

What these Communists don't understand is that their slanders and smears don't work on us anymore.

We know their games, and we're not playing along anymore.

All of these attacks are great badges of honor, proof positive that I'm a threat, that I can't be controlled, that I'm not a part of their club.

It's no coincidence that this latest ADL and Guardian attack came just after my campaign posted our strongest fundraising numbers yet.

They know that we're coming for them. They know that their days are numbered.

**[_Show them that their attacks are __toothless. Show them what we think about their lies and slanders of Patriots_ _._

_Do you know why my Deep State RINO opponent doesn't face these attacks? Because he's only a threat to one thing: the people of Arkansas_](https://NeilforArkansas.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b07b27c744909d0ecfce3d46&id=83d274204d&e=eda539b26b). **

[**_Help me tell the Establishment that the people are DONE with their games_ _ \-- Chip into my election campaign right away and show them the power of the America First movement_**](https://NeilforArkansas.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b07b27c744909d0ecfce3d46&id=cf0ec03b6f&e=eda539b26b) _._

_We need PATRIOTS who will**FIGHT** for the **AMERICAN** people, who aren't going to tuck tail and run when they get called mean names._

[_**Your contributions to my campaign will help me purchase TV and radio ads, yard signs, and other campaign materials so I can fight the worthless GOP, retire a weak RINO, and replace him with a fierce America First Warrior**_.](https://NeilforArkansas.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b07b27c744909d0ecfce3d46&id=bcbe7bfbc6&e=eda539b26b)

Thank you in advance for your generous support. For America,
Neil Robinson Kumar
_Republican for U.S. Congress, AR-03_

**P.S. The Republican Party of Arkansas is pulling out all the stops to kill my authentic America First campaign. ** [_**I know you're ready to replace these worthless RINOs with America First conservatives like me, and that's why I'm counting on your contribution of $5, $10, $25, $50, $100, $250, $500 or more today**_](https://NeilforArkansas.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b07b27c744909d0ecfce3d46&id=a8d7affff6&e=eda539b26b)** _._**
---

name: Team Erica Smith
subject: 4️⃣ important reasons to donate
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY Erica Smith for US Senate 2022
body:
[1]Erica Smith

We’re officially in Election Year, and we think it’s time to explain why
this race is even bigger than NC-02:

1️⃣ Our Democratic majority is hanging by a thread — and our once safely
blue district has now been racially gerrymandered into a swing district.
It’s critical that we protect this House seat because if we lose it we may
lose our Democratic majority.

2️⃣ Erica is the ONLY pro-choice candidate in this race and she’s exactly
who we need in office. We can’t keep electing just any Democrats, we have
to elect the right Democrats who will fight for the issues that affect
working families across the state.

3️⃣ Erica is running against a Trumpist, insurrectionist, far-right
Republican. If we lose this seat to our extremist, far-right opponent,
Sandy Smith, it won’t just be NC-02 that suffers. Sandy Smith attended the
January 6th insurrection, and she is backed by Trump’s strongest allies,
Madison Cawthorn and Roger Stone. We can’t afford to lose even one seat to
a representative with Sandy Smith’s viewpoints.

4️⃣ The last time a Black woman was on the U.S. House leadership committee
was Shirley Chisholm 45 years ago. This is just plain unacceptable. We
*need* more Black and brown representation in the House and it’s high-time
we have representatives that have actually lived the experience of the
folks they’re representing.

[ https://act.ericaforus.com/go/39303?t=1001&akid=864%2E3698%2ExH9qa7 ]Can you rush a donation of $5 to our campaign right now
to help send Erica to the U.S. House, protect this seat, and achieve bold
progressive change?

[ https://act.ericaforus.com/go/39476?refcode=em20220209-864&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=864%2E3698%2ExH9qa7 ]Donate $5

Let’s do this,

Team Erica Smith

Contribute to Erica's campaign:https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-emails?refcode=em20220209-864-footer&t=1021&refcode2=864_3698_xH9qa7&akid=864%2E3698%2ExH9qa7

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Erica for Us, P.O. Box 1236, Gaston, NC 27832.

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.ericaforus.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=864%2E3698%2ExH9qa7

PAID FOR BY Erica Smith for US Senate 2022

name: Mark Takano
subject: This could be our worst-case scenario
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mark Takano For Congress P
body:
You could make all the difference.

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41613103/329591665/-2042826227?refcode=header-img&amount=25&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZDdhZTgzMC0wNjhhLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xuE0KT8Pt9INKRYF84Uue73V7qCOrutxPsS9F_GMDZQ=)
---
Peter,

Despite 2022 being a MAJOR election year...
Despite ultra right-wing MAGA conspiracies spreading like wildfire...
Despite an ongoing pandemic...

**I’ve unfortunately seen many Democrats become complacent!**

Peter, I’m shocked by this because we simply can’t afford to slack off right now. Let me show you what’s at stake:

**2022 WORST-CASE SCENARIO:** Republicans take back the House and Senate majorities, oust elected progressives like me, install Trump as Speaker of the House, and block every single Biden priority causing a major loss for Democrats in 2024.

**2022 BEST-CASE SCENARIO:** We keep and strengthen our House and Senate majorities, beat back MAGA extremism, and execute on our progressive priorities to create a United States that works for ALL Americans.

Peter, YOU are all that’s standing between these two scenarios.

name: Jeremy Hunt
subject: What kind of leader do YOU want?
body:
Peter, Every Sunday, I watched my father preach powerful sermons to our church congregation. The calling to help others stuck with me, and I knew I wanted to dedicate my life to making our community - and our country - a better place. I answered my call to service by joining the U.S. Army. Through faith and hard work, I rose to the rank of captain and deployed to Eastern Europe as an active-duty Army intelligence officer. I may have left the military, but my calling to serve is far from over. Today, I am honored to run for Congress and bring a new generation of conservative leadership to Washington. When I turn on the news, I see radical Democrats threaten to destroy America from the inside-out. Deadly ideas like socialism threaten the American people and put our great nation in jeopardy. I am ready to bring the same fighting spirit from my days in the Army to Washington as we defend American values, but just like in the military, I can’t finish this fight without an A-Team behind me. With you by my side, I know we can keep America strong for the next generation - but we have to act quickly before the radical Left destroys the American Dream for good. **[Please pitch in TODAY so we name: MarisaWoodForCongress.com
subject: McCarthy is seriously losing it.

McCarthy is paving the way for a Trump comeback and pretending Jan. 6 was a peaceful demonstration. | _We are alerting Democrats about Marisa Wood -- a public school teacher and Democrat running a historic campaign to unseat GOP Leader Kevin McCarthy. We refuse to standby and let McCarthy run roughshod over our Democracy, but if we’re going to stop him from getting the gavel, we need widespread grassroots support!

[**We set a critical end-of-week fundraising goal -- 1,250 donations from across California and the country -- to put McCarthy on notice that we are ready for this fight. President Trump has called for an America First conservative to STEP-UP and defeat RINO sell-out Congressman Chris Smith of New Jersey and** [I am answering that call](https://crispiforcongress.mikecrispi.com/r/dc8b29fad21fd833c8285321b?ct=YTo1OntzOjY6InNvdXJjZSI7YToyOntpOjA7czoxNDoiY2FtcGFpZ24uZXZlbnQiO2k6MTtpOjYwO31zOjU6ImVtYWlsIjtpOjEzO3M6NDoic3RhdCI7czoyMjoiNjIwNDE1MmY4N2Y0NDAyMTQ2MzE3OCI7czo0OiJsZWFkIjtzOjY6IjExMzE5MyI7czo3OiJjaGFubmVsIjthOjE6e3M6NToiZW1haWwiO2k6MTM7fX0%3D&)!**

Liberal Republican Smith is the epitome of a CAREER POLITICIAN who has spent a WHOPPING 41 years in Congress betraying conservatives. Smith has been hanging around Washington so long, that he was first elected to Congress when Jimmy Carter was President.

And, in just the last few years, he has voted:
* against the Second Amendment, earning a D rating from the NRA,
* for open borders policies like amnesty and DACA,
* for VACCINE MANDATE databases,
* for drafting our daughters into the military,
* for the January 6 Witch Hunt Commission, and
* for Biden's Green New Deal slush fund / fake infrastructure bill

In 2019, Smith voted AGAINST President Trump more than every other Republican congressman except one.

Smith is such a RINO, that he opposed President Trump more than turncoats Liz Cheney and Adam Kinzinger!

[**But I can defeat him with your support. $35, $50, $100, $150, $200,... whatever you can afford will be a HUGE help in this race**](https://crispiforcongress.mikecrispi.com/r/dc8b29fad21fd833c8285321b?ct=YTo1OntzOjY6InNvdXJjZSI7YToyOntpOjA7czoxNDoiY2FtcGFpZ24uZXZlbnQiO2k6MTtpOjYwO31zOjU6ImVtYWlsIjtpOjEzO3M6NDoic3RhdCI7czoyMjoiNjIwNDE1MmY4N2Y0NDAyMTQ2MzE3OCI7czo0OiJsZWFkIjtzOjY6IjExMzE5MyI7czo3OiJjaGFubmVsIjthOjE6e3M6NToiZW1haWwiO2k6MTM7fX0%3D&)**!**

The future of the America First movement is on the line in congressional districts like mine. That's why legendary Republican strategist Roger Stone is assisting my campaign.

I'll be an America First congressman who every true patriot in America can count on. I'll fight
* for the right to life
* for election integrity
* against vaccine mandates
* for the Second Amendment
* for border security
* and to hold lockdown bureaucrats like Dr. Fauci accountable once and for all!

But [I need your help to defeat RINO Chris Smith](https://crispiforcongress.mikecrispi.com/r/dc8b29fad21fd833c8285321b?ct=YTo1OntzOjY6InNvdXJjZSI7YToyOntpOjA7czoxNDoiY2FtcGFpZ24uZXZlbnQiO2k6MTtpOjYwO31zOjU6ImVtYWlsIjtpOjEzO3M6NDoic3RhdCI7czoyMjoiNjIwNDE1MmY4N2Y0NDAyMTQ2MzE3OCI7czo0OiJsZWFkIjtzOjY6IjExMzE5MyI7czo3OiJjaGFubmVsIjthOjE6e3M6NToiZW1haWwiO2k6MTM7fX0%3D&)!

President Trump has singled out a handful of atrociously liberal RINOs like Chris Smith who have been in Congress far too long and who need to GO!

Put simply, Smith has lost touch with his district which gave President Trump a massive 23% majority in the 2020 election.

I'll be honored if you would immediately chip in your best possible contribution to my campaign right now... [whether its $35, $50, $100, $150, $200, or more... up to the maximum allowed donation of $2,900](https://crispiforcongress.mikecrispi.com/r/dc8b29fad21fd833c8285321b?ct=YTo1OntzOjY6InNvdXJjZSI7YToyOntpOjA7czoxNDoiY2FtcGFpZ24uZXZlbnQiO2k6MTtpOjYwO31zOjU6ImVtYWlsIjtpOjEzO3M6NDoic3RhdCI7czoyMjoiNjIwNDE1MmY4N2Y0NDAyMTQ2MzE3OCI7czo0OiJsZWFkIjtzOjY6IjExMzE5MyI7czo3OiJjaGFubmVsIjthOjE6e3M6NToiZW1haWwiO2k6MTM7fX0%3D&).

In Congress, I'll fight day and night for America First principles and conservative values. And unlike Smith, I won't forget who I am, who you are, or why you helped send me to Congress.

Thank you for your patriotism, your encouragement, and your support!

Mike Crispi

PS: RINO party "leaders" don't truly appreciate -- or even worse, they reject -- the Republican base's desire for courageous, bold, conservative leadership in Congress. That's why they're starting to circle the wagons around Smith and fill his coffers with donations from so-called "moderates" and even "liberal Republicans." You can help me keep pace with Smith and defeat him on Election Day. An immediate contribution of [$35, $50, $100, $150, $200, or more](https://crispiforcongress.mikecrispi.com/r/dc8b29fad21fd833c8285321b?ct=YTo1OntzOjY6InNvdXJjZSI7YToyOntpOjA7czoxNDoiY2FtcGFpZ24uZXZlbnQiO2k6MTtpOjYwO31zOjU6ImVtYWlsIjtpOjEzO3M6NDoic3RhdCI7czoyMjoiNjIwNDE1MmY4N2Y0NDAyMTQ2MzE3OCI7czo0OiJsZWFkIjtzOjY6IjExMzE5MyI7czo3OiJjaGFubmVsIjthOjE6e3M6NToiZW1haWwiO2k6MTM7fX0%3D&) will be a HUGE help.

Thank you in advance!

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41613288/329595569/-1614289773?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMGM5NzllMC0wNzhhLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kLecCY7dd_ShsRfK_kI2jgF0qi8-1swIjoqFVMwfr0Y=&emci=ef6418bd-0b89-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=10c979e0-078a-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=11385749)

Dear Peter,

Lately, I haven't been talking about Mike Garcia much – you all know by now exactly how awful he's been for this district – but last week, he did something that I could not believe (but should have).

You might have seen last week the GOP declared that the January 6th deadly attack on our nation's Capital was "legitimate political discourse" and voted to censure Rep. Liz Cheney and Rep. Adam Kinzinger for speaking the truth about the attempted insurrection.

This is what our own Mike Garcia had to say about it:

_“We need to move on from that whole discussion [Jan. 6th] and, frankly, move forward and get the House back in 2022.”_

**Mike Garcia and the RNC may want to conveniently move on, but I have a few questions for him:**

Mike, does this look like "legitimate political discourse" to you?
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41613289/329595570/-1278704484?refcode=em22_220209_garciaarticle&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMGM5NzllMC0wNzhhLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kLecCY7dd_ShsRfK_kI2jgF0qi8-1swIjoqFVMwfr0Y=)
---

And what do you think the people of CA-27 would call this?
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41613290/329595571/-1278704484?refcode=em22_220209_garciaarticle&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMGM5NzllMC0wNzhhLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kLecCY7dd_ShsRfK_kI2jgF0qi8-1swIjoqFVMwfr0Y=)
---

Is this how you think the American people should express their grievances?
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41613291/329595572/-1278704484?refcode=em22_220209_garciaarticle&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMGM5NzllMC0wNzhhLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kLecCY7dd_ShsRfK_kI2jgF0qi8-1swIjoqFVMwfr0Y=)
---

While Mike Garcia and his insurrectionist-apologist allies would rather sweep the horrors of Jan. 6th under the rug, we're not going to let them. We're not going to allow Republicans to ignore the fact that five lives were taken that day, that the destruction of the riots caused over $1.5 million in damages to the halls of democracy, and that Capitol police are still suffering PTSD from the violence they witnessed that day.

We're not going to allow them to spread Trump's vitriolic lies at the expense of our democracy.

**Peter, the Republican party calling the Jan. 6th attempted coup "legitimate political discourse" is flat out dangerous. Not only does it incentivize further violence, it jeopardizes the highest ideal of our democracy – a peaceful transition of power.

[Make an urgent donation of $5 to flip CA-27 and stop Republicans from taking control of Congress and sweeping this under the rug. >>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41613292/329595573/-1278704484?refcode=em22_220209_garciaarticle&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMGM5NzllMC0wNzhhLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kLecCY7dd_ShsRfK_kI2jgF0qi8-1swIjoqFVMwfr0Y=)**

Mike isn't the moderate he claims to be. We must get Mike Garcia out. We already knew he was unfit to represent this district, now it's clear he is too extreme.

[**Chip in to get Mike Garcia out once and for all, and help protect our democracy. >>>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41613294/329595575/-1278704484?refcode=em22_220209_garciaarticle&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMGM5NzllMC0wNzhhLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kLecCY7dd_ShsRfK_kI2jgF0qi8-1swIjoqFVMwfr0Y=)

Christy

clean_body: | Dear Peter, Lately, I haven't been talking about Mike Garcia much – you all know by now exactly how awful he's been for this district – but last week, he did something that I could not believe (but should have). You might have seen last week the GOP declared that the January 6th deadly attack on our nation's Capital was "legitimate political discourse" and voted to censure Rep. Liz Cheney and Rep. Adam Kinzinger for speaking the truth about the attempted insurrection. This is what our own Mike Garcia had to say about it: “We need to move on from that whole discussion [Jan. 6th] and, frankly, move forward and get the House back in 2022.” Mike Garcia and the RNC may want to conveniently move on, but I have a few questions for him: Mike, does this look like "legitimate political discourse" to you? | = And what do you think the people of CA-27 would call this? = Is this how you think the American people should express their grievances? = While Mike Garcia and his insurrectionist-apologist allies would rather sweep the horrors of Jan. 6th under the rug, we're not going to let them. We're not going to allow Republicans to ignore the fact that five lives were taken that day, that the destruction of the riots caused over $1.5 million in damages to the halls of democracy, and that Capitol police are still suffering PTSD from the violence they witnessed that day. We're not going to allow them to spread Trump's vitriolic lies at the expense of our democracy. Peter, the Republican party calling the Jan. 6th attempted coup "legitimate political discourse" is flat out dangerous. Not only does it incentivize further violence, it jeopardizes the highest ideal of our democracy – a peaceful transition of power. = = Mike isn't the moderate he claims to be. We must get Mike Garcia out. We already knew he was unfit to represent this district, now it's clear he is too extreme. = Thank you for all you do, Christy = = *

clean_body: Here’s the proof that I am the true pro-family candidate. | | | | | | == | | | Dear Peter, I am honored to have been endorsed by these three top pro-family groups in Texas and am committed to always fighting for YOU and for YOUR family in Washington. First, the Texas Home School Coalition. I believe School Choice is the civil rights issue of our time and parents must not only be supported for taking responsibility for the education of their children. | == | Second, Texas Values Action. I'm honored to receive this endorsement from one of the best pro-family, pro-life, and pro-religious liberty advocated in the nation. I look forward to working alongside of Texas Values as a member of Congress. | == | Finally, Texas Right to Life. I will never waver on my position on human life. This threat is real, and the Dems would love nothing more than to infect our state with crime, Critical Race Theory, abortion, and everything else on their socialist wish list.

disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ODESSA FOR CONGRESS** ](https://u1584542
body:
It’s official, and it’s not good. | | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xQsZ_uHW9ME9h2VPudEgVBlT0rAEcoX_uBPlqDgEOfEQIhz_Vu9SFmd68KrwuQ3aKi7nPZoMC1hdvv-aBtd_WQhF_HHr7R5OkEDrc_ZkrefBJ7I8JcGKFlbOWFIiNwadH1oQt_6LR9AA4Zbg-qpTkSuTVDbxQWfrNmdr7CcMEZJS8KZ68B_uW-8VfXAdy_VdhwFO0FoY5wAcqTpA-5YmcFlyKXjB77ka4XtV6fhohZNHGWTYb0HaWVWGcYbidsvketSKKy2oj20r0_WR_7p3QqCv43UQ0fUzgvQhsc-YYm5Wut4HhXasZMZMUzc2GXeRN5Kz1KegnUwYt3-90QWRo16dx2Lpxag2iLfwvt4KKwsQ/3jf/h2TDSwhLSeqNL_f2A3Frsg/h0/Q_4yppR5GAReDRfHqovbVwIg0V2lA4CFGMI0BmhWlok) Peter, This week, the Supreme Court allowed a shameful new map to go into effect in Alabama that was being challenged as an illegal racial gerrymander under the Voting Rights Act. It carves just one of seven districts to have a Black majority, out of a state that is _more than a quarter Black._ And just days ago, the new congressional maps here in Tennessee were approved, meaning Nashville is officially being gerrymandered out of being a reliable Democratic seat in the House of Representatives. clean_body: It’s official, and it’s not good. | | | Peter, This week, the Supreme Court allowed a shameful new map to go into effect in Alabama that was being challenged as an illegal racial gerrymander under the Voting Rights Act. It carves just one of seven districts to have a Black majority, out of a state that is more than a quarter Black. And just days ago, the new congressional maps here in Tennessee were approved, meaning Nashville is officially being gerrymandered out of being a reliable Democratic seat in the House of Representatives. It’s crystal clear: State-sanctioned Jim Crow is on the march across the South, and we have to stand up for our rights. Odessa is running on an agenda that will unite the working class no matter what you look like or where you come from. If we come together and claim our power, we can make sure this country works for all of us. To do that, we need to keep up our fundraising so we can mount the strongest campaign possible. Thank you, Team Odessa Kelly | To give by check: Odessa for Congress 2817 West End Ave, Ste 126-401 Nashville, TN 37203

name: Deron Erney
subject: Doug Mastriano for Governor - Petition Signatures needed to get Doug on the ballot
body:
Hi Monroe County supporters of Doug Mastriano for Governor:
Please reply back to this email at your earliest confidence if you have time/interest in collecting signatures from registered Republicans on behalf of Doug Mastriano for Governor. Petition drive for signatures is from Feb. 15th -March 8th 2022.
I was just notified that there will be a zoom webinar training session tomorrow/Thursday Feb 10th at 8pm scheduled to last approx 1 hour (conducted by Team Mastriano Campaign Manager).
Additionally, I am awaiting a reply back to confirm details for the upcoming Monroe County GOP petition signing event next week at Stroudsmoor. Some of you have expressed interest in attending this event. Let me know if anyone is able to volunteer to attend to acquire signatures for Doug.
Thanks for time and consideration.
Deron Erney
Volunteer Monroe County Coordinator/Doug Mastriano for Governor

Sent from my iPad

Look, we’ll acknowledge something most campaigns wouldn’t admit: there are a _lot_ of candidates you could be supporting with your hard-earned dollars.

But, we’ll argue that Josh Riley in New York’s 22nd Congressional District should be at the top of your list. We already know what’s on the line nationally – Democrats have a razor-thin majority in the House of Representatives and we’re tied 50-50 in the Senate.

**So we’re not kidding around when we say that all of our progress is on the line this year.**

Peter, if we’re going to protect our Democratic majority, we can’t just hold seats – we need to flip seats in crucial red to blue races like this one, too.

Listen Team, Frank LaRose is the Joe Rogan of election integrity and I am sick of it. While Joe Rogan defends himself on spreading dangerous misinformation about COVID, LaRose is doing the same about our nation’s elections. They both hide behind the same tired excuses of “just asking questions” and that “there are bad people on both sides.” This is just disgusting; even nonpartisan groups are calling it out as dangerous. So, here is the plan:
* Keep calling him out
* Organize our hearts out in Cuyahoga, Lucas, Athens, Franklin and (my hometown) Allen counties
* **Win!**

Here’s how you can help:
* Take a second to hit the forward button, shoot this out to all the chain emails you’ve been getting, and get your network involved.
* Join our team of grassroots activists by replying to this email with your interest.
* You knew this one was coming... [DONATE! clean_body: We can’t let the curtain close on January just yet! Wow! Chelsea's last email sparked some controversy. Turns out people have strong feelings on pizza toppings! We are still raising money for the pizza fund and decided to let you weigh in. Pick the link to cast your vote. = = = Don’t care, just take my money already. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = Thanks for keeping us fed, Shawn P.S. Please help us get an extra Hawaiian! \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Chelsea Clark <info@chelseaforohio.com> Date: Tue, Feb 8, 2022 at 10:24 AM Subject: Whataboutism To: <shawn@chelseaforohio.com> | = Listen Team, Frank LaRose is the Joe Rogan of election integrity and I am sick of it. While Joe Rogan defends himself on spreading dangerous misinformation about COVID, LaRose is doing the same about our nation’s elections. They both hide behind the same tired excuses of “just asking questions” and that “there are bad people on both sides.” This is just disgusting; even nonpartisan groups are calling it out as dangerous. So, here is the plan: Keep calling him out Organize our hearts out in Cuyahoga, Lucas, Athens, Franklin and (my hometown) Allen counties Win! Here’s how you can help: Take a second to hit the forward button, shoot this out to all the chain emails you’ve been getting, and get your network involved. Join our team of grassroots activists by replying to this email with your interest. You knew this one was coming... = = Thank you for being there for me, Chelsea | | | Democrat Chelsea Clark is a small business owner, a city councilwoman, a sixth-generation farmer, and a single mom. She's running to be Ohio's Secretary of State because the constitutional right to vote is under attack. Chelsea will fight to make sure that we all have access to vote, that all votes are counted, and that our elections are safe and secure. = Paid for by Chelsea Clark For Ohio 30 Garfield Place, Suite 900, Cincinnati, OH 45202 www.chelseaforohio.com to receive fewer emails.
