name: Larry Elder
subject: Critical race theory is insulting
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELDER FOR AMERICA
body:
It teaches white children that they are evil oppressors, and it teaches black children that they are eternal victims. | [](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=f7fb8231cbcc489eb2dea51f8f2bfc6a&_e=VWbx5QNMsZ6BFZ2DuUcNDjuPe6YsqF6ZuJqq8erlQ2txf0y9Nylp7ESHzTR1VnSy8KsFdKpNDmFyCTmPJsjkZ88zbGLhlZgeubWcev8QFyycNrrQeirSZNrR06Xp_7uB3BBcvmWgdXL63Q7bKtdCHlyuwCRB2XLF2LlTwo_Sl37VbW3-APyVyBKWh4vzSzMarLrcaGka-vIljerCaMV3Hi8FM1cHnzdMfyFrZvD7vVK31WFG8jgR21m8rEnhwarkgKMv1jCYDxseB5Gz9Z5AkGHCKjAR2xtFkEbOc2e7dYeOv32Dgt_tZejcGtVglKhd0S8T3NWeFblyaqEa9o9FIJqci1NWwYRjj6mbzj294nSKd-BOD3wNJExVy2tHi-5SdREPWbjeaHYRvz9LR1l4rmyX25UcSOntzt8C1HtpJf7SQf3UCmUR7W4AtNw-YF_t)
---
Peter,

I launched Elder for America PAC last month because I wanted to take the movement and momentum we built during our race for Governor in California and use it for the betterment of all of America.

Taking back Republican majorities in the House and Senate are two of our top priorities, but we’re also getting involved with important issues that are affecting Americans at the local level.

One of those is critical race theory.

Let me put it bluntly: **critical race theory is insulting.** It teaches white children that they are evil oppressors, and it teaches black children that they are eternal victims.

**Critical race theory is divisive and is designed to pit people of different races against each other,** _while doing NOTHING to solve the real problems that actually plague our minority communities._

[**I need your help to stand up to critical race theory and other destructive leftist ideas. Will you support Elder for America PAC and help me save our country with a donation of $25, $50 or more today?**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=f7fb8231cbcc489eb2dea51f8f2bfc6a&_e=VWbx5QNMsZ6BFZ2DuUcNDjuPe6YsqF6ZuJqq8erlQ2txf0y9Nylp7ESHzTR1VnSy8KsFdKpNDmFyCTmPJsjkZ88zbGLhlZgeubWcev8QFyycNrrQeirSZNrR06Xp_7uB3BBcvmWgdXL63Q7bKtdCHlyuwCRB2XLF2LlTwo_Sl37VbW3-APyVyBKWh4vzSzMarLrcaGka-vIljerCaMV3Hi8FM1cHnzdMfyFrZvD7vVJMJ6Hdb_Br99CtLgtmu_p8RMTtBnk6h1uDBCT9fWW894Gtd3oje-oHYn5zMx5NHnqYQ1znfmXGkty-UqBxSjm7lrjBwqb9sBWa9apYSgWtc9ppNFCTjfLFPHeOLcr7ZvovQkmY-O2oilF-PqBAXtpTFDQFgQm29WZbF4O4jn2moZdwvJtHnICMN7lcDNkuf0LmnLHwtW4wsRUcqHfiTvfn)

| [**Join Larry Elder and
End Critical Race Theory **](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=f7fb8231cbcc489eb2dea51f8f2bfc6a&_e=VWbx5QNMsZ6BFZ2DuUcNDjuPe6YsqF6ZuJqq8erlQ2txf0y9Nylp7ESHzTR1VnSy8KsFdKpNDmFyCTmPJsjkZ88zbGLhlZgeubWcev8QFyycNrrQeirSZNrR06Xp_7uB3BBcvmWgdXL63Q7bKtdCHlyuwCRB2XLF2LlTwo_Sl37VbW3-APyVyBKWh4vzSzMarLrcaGka-vIljerCaMV3Hi8FM1cHnzdMfyFrZvD7vVIpia6dre2Pe2ESo-PQB4_03gPWsKypFqKyULXl3CmxKgLQrXNQnNu-NWbOjtkHvGfFHGnImWbX9XwY9T5EP3uodqWBpjd4GG0ELT0i_R5WYTspQpi5pcmlWcD3YdE5pImTsyMFfu37vsWxr0_Vh8-jTAr8xl_9tLd9Ipgdcq0rnbTsMEcUUZmetVJNREMZgtSgX53rF7vRkJzEc9HcUIdw)
---

The Leftists who pedal these ideas of systemic racism and critical race theory really just want to **manipulate minority communities in order to win their vote.**

The Left knows that their power in Washington depends on convincing minorities that they are victims and that only government programs can save them. If minorities no longer feel like victims, then the Left no longer has power over them – or their vote.

_**Not only is this racist itself, but it is oppressive and poisonous.**_

Critical race theory has no place in our schools’ curriculums, and fighting against this divisive doctrine at the local level [**is one of our priorities at Elder for America PAC. Will you help me put an end to it with a contribution today?**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=f7fb8231cbcc489eb2dea51f8f2bfc6a&_e=VWbx5QNMsZ6BFZ2DuUcNDjuPe6YsqF6ZuJqq8erlQ2txf0y9Nylp7ESHzTR1VnSy8KsFdKpNDmFyCTmPJsjkZ88zbGLhlZgeubWcev8QFyycNrrQeirSZNrR06Xp_7uB3BBcvmWgdXL63Q7bKtdCHlyuwCRB2XLF2LlTwo_Sl37VbW3-APyVyBKWh4vzSzMarLrcaGka-vIljerCaMV3Hi8FM1cHnzdMfyFrZvD7vVIo2eAqPaXMXBJb49K8Lxa6-BY1CWTf890k9dqZJsXHmkVLNmcHrTvLqnLt-GQmTHwPFFV2v07PP_YgWBLHh6Ypo_zOVKXbJDgvKj_ajbOVzXrEY8khCJmh5qEzoZCnXdK4vyQ6KM3ouG2lYqDHBK8U4MP_RsfL3n5cgZASeNsIJIkiQ8BxYO2epGCkZyl_Eo2deGCa9MnVlZtrt1xJmmgc)

Thanks,

Larry Elder

[**Join Larry Elder and
End Critical Race Theory **](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=f7fb8231cbcc489eb2dea51f8f2bfc6a&_e=VWbx5QNMsZ6BFZ2DuUcNDjuPe6YsqF6ZuJqq8erlQ2txf0y9Nylp7ESHzTR1VnSy8KsFdKpNDmFyCTmPJsjkZ88zbGLhlZgeubWcev8QFyycNrrQeirSZNrR06Xp_7uB3BBcvmWgdXL63Q7bKtdCHlyuwCRB2XLF2LlTwo_Sl37VbW3-APyVyBKWh4vzSzMarLrcaGka-vIljerCaMV3Hi8FM1cHnzdMfyFrZvD7vVIZjCYYi-SknLcCpBfhO3vrGXkSGz7nDhk9hdU8jy64EDYlYHtDUTZn-pME0ocXo9eMgQqbepYmIxjNfO11nqDfBhkg1YP51nn5F22ukWtodRHW2bQJDf_jpdKhP3mh2MiKNEjLSnmzvoi72SnxeRzs1hr5smnRkG6d2N6W1PrSQGhc0casjAAnri8H1SlT_BfSXRgWJVpeYJvgThYt2snR)

name: =?utf-8?Q?David=20Curry?=
subject: Queen of Hypocrisy
body:
Reigning terror on Georgia |
---
| | [ ](https://davidcurryforcongress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=852ebb75cc52ccc1113c21207&id=febbeea36d&e=598f6aa24c)
---
| |
---
| Friend,

Stacey Abrams is the Queen of left wing hypocrisy. She spent years falsely claiming she won the 2018 Georgia Gubernatorial election, yet does not allow you to ask questions about the 2020 election. Just when you thought her hypocrisy knew no bounds, she posed with school children for a photo op and FORCED masks upon them, while flaunting her own mandate.

Stacey Abrams and the left know that masking children is ineffective, but they are so drunk on power that they force our children to be masked in schools while they go about living their liberal elite lives, maskless.

This woman can NOT take power in Georgia. I will fight back everyday to ensure Republicans win in Georgia in 2022 and we UNMASK OUR CHILDREN. [](https://davidcurryforcongress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=852ebb75cc52ccc1113c21207&id=a228c3d4cb&e=598f6aa24c) [If you are sick of the Liberal Elites rules for thee but not for me, Join My Team Today!](https://davidcurryforcongress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=852ebb75cc52ccc1113c21207&id=5d76c30a51&e=598f6aa24c) Remember this photo when you vote folks.
[](https://davidcurryforcongress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=852ebb75cc52ccc1113c21207&id=cce6b09c1b&e=598f6aa24c)
[](https://davidcurryforcongress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=852ebb75cc52ccc1113c21207&id=712d241ad9&e=598f6aa24c)
[](https://davidcurryforcongress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=852ebb75cc52ccc1113c21207&id=0d83790d75&e=598f6aa24c)
[](https://davidcurryforcongress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=852ebb75cc52ccc1113c21207&id=a46e046b2e&e=598f6aa24c) Thank you,
David Curry

name: =?utf-8?Q?Janice=20McGeachin=20for=20Idaho=20Governor?=
subject: Michelle Malkin Endorses Janice McGeachin for Idaho Governor! Plus our Latest Video!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Janice for Idaho, Machele Hamilton Treasurer [unsubscribe](https://janicemcgeachin
body:
Freedom fighter Michelle Malkin has endorsed Lt. Governor Janice McGeachin to be the next Governor of Idaho. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/janicemcgeachin/02-09-21?e=823fa8e224)
---
| | [ ](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=2c35f3ad9c&e=823fa8e224)
---
| | Dear Friends,
---
| We have some exciting news! Freedom fighter Michelle Malkin has endorsed Lt. Governor Janice McGeachin to be the next Governor of Idaho. In her [endorsement](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=7a39906d69&e=823fa8e224), Malkin wrote, **"She's got guts. McGeachin has taken unapologetic action against Little and state GOP elites repeatedly for their routine capitulation on education policy, medical freedom, and law and order. She convened a task force against critical race theory while others sat on their hands. She joined citizens burning masks last spring while Little went AWOL and issued executive orders against mask and vaccine mandates while he traveled out-of-state. She is now taking on homeless camps manned by leftist professional agitators who plague the capitol grounds while the governor diddles around. Janice McGeachin is the kind of defiant GOP leader we need and I wholeheartedly endorse (along with Donald Trump). Empty-suit surrenderists won't keep Idaho and America free, safe and great. Bold, uncontrolled and unafraid fighters on the frontlines will."** You can read more of what Malkin had to say in her article [**here**](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=cd005d68e1&e=823fa8e224) and on Twitter [**here**](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=30151cb8a9&e=823fa8e224). (Be sure to read her whole thread.) The Lt. Governor is honored to receive this endorsement and the support from such an important voice in the conservative movement. Along with the endorsement from President Trump, this endorsement from Michelle Malkin makes it clear who the true **America First** conservative candidate is in this race.
---
|
---
| Also exciting this week, we have released a new campaign video introducing people to Janice McGeachin and her campaign for Idaho Governor. Click [**here**](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=b1292d48e7&e=823fa8e224) to watch it.
---
| [ ](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=2611b0479a&e=823fa8e224)
---
| Our campaign continues to heat up! Will you help our efforts to defend our shared conservative values with a contribution today? Donating [**$100**](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=23c8505532&e=823fa8e224), [**$50**](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=76766f99bc&e=823fa8e224), or even [**$25**](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=b7e9644a3a&e=823fa8e224) will greatly help us in the battle to Make Idaho Free Again!
---
| [DONATE Today!](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=e5794f6f75&e=823fa8e224 "DONATE Today!")
---
| Sincerely,

Janice McGeachin for Idaho Governor
---
| **P.S.** Please [**DONATE**](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=d0cc688be1&e=823fa8e224) if you are able, [**VISIT OUR CAMPAIGN STORE**](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=1071ac3662&e=823fa8e224) to see our unique merchandise, [**LIKE**](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=f8d929a51b&e=823fa8e224) and [**FOLLOW**](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=82129b6ec5&e=823fa8e224) us on social media, and [**VISIT OUR WEBSITE**](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=7c564cae11&e=823fa8e224) to learn about some of the other ways you can get involved with the Janice McGeachin for Idaho Governor Campaign.

subject: Sisolak is fundraising millions, too…
body:
It didn’t take long for our mission here in Nevada to set records...
---

My opponent, Elissa Slotkin, joined progressive activist Stacey Abrams in broadcasting just how out of touch they are with the struggles of our children and our families.While they continue to demand our compliance with ineffective mask mandates, they do as they wish, when they wish.

Hey Fellow Conservative,

I just left a team meeting and I’m going to get right to the point... We’re losing our chances of taking back the House majority this election. [**PLEASE DON’T LET ME FAIL.**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=ef5e3e4150b540338beb2d6c9ba3bc6c&_e=6gaPbtMpihwQzcifqTmkyd6hcww6VX1XqTn8ODfcnN8Fe68isTq3e_jdnFcmc1LHMde6DbLvfrg285XOdRD7n3ubLVfp1EI_l_z3EYhiiX2jYtccSduXFR9QF2y06vOl4J_bWxaiPTzlHfTrhKJt8lWPn3HoUgdN-rshd0gScWQwEkS_ER-3FDfhCC3dvkDqUXHeMRb7STXUy3XWy5Jto8WlbUnPoW7u0RArlPzFlrO3qlsYvYMzkpVmGrCH4CJfKM7A3GZmfDf_sHOJx8IxhzhPoIeaqo9DLcVA2XY_KtUIYcGtDZsoCyv-u9UphjU3vx4fZOZrBpH0xm766K4GtvC1Br9RxaK0XKosjqOSfw_eFfHHZZqkCb4muwkJyssz)

name: me, @DemsOfState (2)
subject: re: Shirley Weber’s message for Black History Month >>>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Democratic Association of Secretaries of State, Treasurer Denise Merrill
body:
Team, Shirley Weber had a message for us all this Black History Month – did you miss it?
Our voting rights are under fire from the far-right, and 2022 will be a crucial battleground for the future of elections. Historically disenfranchised groups will be the hardest hit if any of the far-right’s candidates take office! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-feb22?amount=20&refcode=email_020922_3]
Equal rights means equal voting rights too, team. Join DASS and support our Secretaries in the fight to defend our elections! Chip in $20 ASAP to fight back! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-feb22?amount=20&refcode=email_020922_3]
CHIP IN $20 >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-feb22?amount=20&refcode=email_020922_3]
Begin forward:
Team,
Dr. Shirley Weber is a lifelong academic and equal rights advocate. She served in California’s State Assembly for almost a decade before becoming California’s first Black Secretary of State last year.
She is acutely aware of the issues faced by disenfranchised communities this Black History Month – and she has a message to share: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-feb22?amount=20&refcode=email_020922_3]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-feb22?amount=20&refcode=email_020922_3 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-feb22?amount=20&refcode=email_020922_3]
DASS is working with our member Secretaries to support and expand equal voting rights for all eligible Americans. But the far-right’s plans for 2022 revolve around suppressing those very rights.
We need every single supporter to stand with DASS now and resist the far-right’s discriminatory voter suppression. We’re running out of time to stop them!! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-feb22?amount=20&refcode=email_020922_3]
The midterms are just around the corner – we have to be ready to defeat the far-right’s extremist candidates and voter suppression bills! Chip in $20 NOW to make a difference and fight for your rights with DASS >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-feb22?amount=20&refcode=email_020922_3]

your donation will process immediately:

name: Raphael Warnock
subject: I had to reach out
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
body:
A new poll just came out.
| | |
---
Team, I had to reach out:

**FIRST:** My potential opponent, Herschel Walker (R) just announced that he's raised nearly **$10 MILLION to defeat me** and retake the Senate for Mitch McConnell.
**THEN:** A new poll just came out that **shows me one point down****** – in the race experts say could decide Senate control.
**NOW:****** Our entire Democratic agenda – from voting rights to climate justice and more – is on the line in this race. But if we fail to fight back now, we could risk handing this seat and our critical Senate majority right back to Mitch McConnell.
**That's why we set a goal to raise $50,000 by midnight tonight to fight back against GOP spending, pull ahead, and win this race. But time is running out, and we're still falling short.**
**[Please, team, I'm counting on you: Will you rush $5 or more right now to split between my campaign and Jacky Rosen so we can win in Georgia and defend our Senate majority?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41614023/329610224/-1910320442?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1632-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NzFhOTA3NC0wZDhhLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2E6l8KJ8pnia_U2gMZALDsLiodoY-hg8--kR8ir23pw=)**

# [State Halts Use of Flawed U.S.-Funded Korean COVID Test; Half Return False Negative](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57848&L=26742&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvc3RhdGUtaGFsdHMtdXNlLW9mLWZsYXdlZC11LXMtZnVuZGVkLWtvcmVhbi1jb3ZpZC10ZXN0LWhhbGYtcmV0dXJuLWZhbHNlLW5lZ2F0aXZlLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWNvcnJ1cHRpb24rY2hyb25pY2xlcyZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz)
A COVID-19 test developed by a Korean company with a $10.3 million infusion from the U.S. government is so flawed at least one state stopped using it after just a few weeks and a third-world country flagged it as defective months ago. In late September, the rapid antigen tests received Emergency Use Authorization (EUA) from the Food and Drug Administration (FDA) to test individuals suspected by healthcare providers of being infected and by the end of December the authorization was expanded to include asymptomatic individuals. The test is made by south Korean manufacturer GenBody and is being promoted by a “minority-owned, female-led” public relations agency based in southern California.
[Read More](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57848&L=26742&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvc3RhdGUtaGFsdHMtdXNlLW9mLWZsYXdlZC11LXMtZnVuZGVkLWtvcmVhbi1jb3ZpZC10ZXN0LWhhbGYtcmV0dXJuLWZhbHNlLW5lZ2F0aXZlLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWNvcnJ1cHRpb24rY2hyb25pY2xlcyZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz)

In late September, the rapid antigen tests received Emergency Use Authorization (EUA) from the Food and Drug Administration (FDA) to test individuals suspected by healthcare providers of being infected and by the end of December the authorization was expanded to include asymptomatic individuals. The test is made by south Korean manufacturer GenBody and is being promoted by a “minority-owned, female-led” public relations agency based in southern California. | | | The Epoch Times The more than 14,000 hours of surveillance video footage from Jan. 6, 2021, held by U.S. Capitol Police can’t be hidden under a cloak of “sovereign immunity” and should be released to the public because it represents “an extraordinary moment in our history,” Judicial Watch argued in a recent legal filing in U.S. District Court. = Fox News Center for Medical Progress founder David Daleiden, along with watchdog group Judicial Watch, brought national attention to the university’s GUDMAP research, which identified the Pitt biospecimen core as the source of its tissue. Pitt itself has acknowledged that UPMC provides tissue for its biospecimen core and houses several of the tissue bank’s locations. = CNS News The government watchdog group Judicial Watch has filed a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) lawsuit against the Central Intelligence Agency (CIA) for communications between then-CIA Director Gina Haspel and Chairman of the Joint Chiefs of Staff General Mark Milley in 2020-21, which reportedly involved the targeting of President Donald Trump. Judicial Watch President Tom Fitton in a statement said, “It ought to be disturbing to all Americans that the head of the CIA and the Chairman of the Joint Chiefs were reportedly conspiring against the President of the United States. | CLIPS | | | | | | Keep our investigators on the job uncovering the truth: | = | | | | ---|---|--- = = = Judicial Watch, Inc. 425 3rd St Sw Ste 800, Washington, DC 20024 202.646.5172 (C)2017-2022, All Rights Reserved = |

clean_body: My team just crunched the numbers... | Friend – it’s going to come down to the wire. With Pelosi spending $30 million on her new voter mobilization effort to try and take me down in the final weeks of our election, my team crunched the numbers to see how we could fight back. What if I told you that withjust $5 we could get a new conservative voter out to the polls to help us WIN 1 of the 5 seats needed to FLIP the House? Well, that’s all it takes. Thank you, Wesley Hunt Former U.S. Army Captain Republican for Congress \- - - - Forwarded Message - - - - From: Wesley Hunt Date: Monday, February 7, 2022 Subject: Pelosi is targeting my new district To: dpwillis67@gmail.com Friend, This is alarming... Early voting is set to begin in Texas in just 1 WEEK, but Nancy Pelosi and her DCCC are spending $30 MILLION on a voter mobilization effort to take down conservative frontrunners like myself running in the 5 must-win races that Republicans need to END her majority. With just weeks to go in this election, I’m counting on YOUR help to fight back and ensure we have enough registered voters of our own. Pelosi’s new registration effort is just the latest in her laundry list of attempts to try and undermine our momentum and stop us from winning this critical seat. She even tried SUING the state of Texas to have our brand-new 38th district ERASED from the maps. This may be a desperate, last-ditch attempt by Pelosi and her allies, but it proves just how much is on the line. We can’t take a single thing for granted in these final weeks of the election. clean_body: It’s surprisingly easy, team, and it only takes a few dollars. Team, It's been an honor to welcome Kathleen Murphy on to Team Sullivan With her on board, we know we’ve got the winning ticket for Illinois. Kathleen is a high character, high competency leader, who has lived her values throughout her life and career. But there is one more partner we need for our ticket to be complete: You. We can’t Save Illinois without Illinoisians like you. Your donation—of any size—shows Illinois’ corrupt politicians that the people are personally invested in bringing new leadership to our state. Your donation will have them shaking in their boots! Show you are backing the winning ticket. Commit to sending two next-generation leaders all the way to Springfield. Thank you, Team Sullivan | | | | Paid for by Sullivan for Illinois | | 111 E Douglas St, Petersburg, IL 62675 | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | | |

It also gives Republican candidates this year like Chuck Morse a lot to tackle, but in order to do so, he wants to hear directly from you on which issues are most important to you. This will take just two minutes, and will provide important feedback for Chuck’s Senate campaign!

This will take just two minutes, and will provide important feedback for Chuck’s Senate campaign! | | | | | | | | | | When Chuck Schumer and Maggie Hassan won’t listen to our interests, it’s important we speak out to leaders who will... | | _**BREAKING: DCCC Names IL-11 as One of its Top Priority Races for 2022**_
Friend,

The Democratic Congressional Campaign Committee (DCCC) just added our race to its list of top priorities for the 2022 midterms.

Nancy Pelosi sees the momentum our campaign has, and she's NERVOUS.

Democrats are depending on liberal mega-donors like George Soros and Michael Bloomberg spending MILLIONS to defeat us.

We don't have billionaire mega-donors, we have grassroots conservatives like YOU, Friend.

_**[Will you chip in any amount to help us make sure we have the resources to fight back?>>](https://JerryEvansIL.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b630adf46d0f4acc3511961b&id=1fc91f7819&e=b78e7c4d40)**_

body:
I'm running out of time
| |

I'm sorry to crowd your inbox, friend, but I wouldn't bump my last message if it weren't critical to defeating Marco Rubio.
My finance team tells me that even after a small surge in grassroots donations to my campaign over the last few hours, I'm still short of my midnight fundraising goal – and at this pace, I may need to make budget cuts if I fall short.
While national Republicans are funneling _upward of $10 million _into this race _ _ to flip Florida red permanently, I simply cannot afford to cut back on resources. **I'm running out of time to fix this, so I'm humbly asking you to act quickly:**
[**Please, rush $5, $25 or whatever you can spare to close my fundraising gap. The timing – and the sheer consequences _–_ of falling short right now couldn't be more serious. I don't say that lightly. Polling has me down _ 2 points _behind Marco Rubio, just as he and the GOP hauled in more than $28 million to dismantle our Senate majority.

**If I don't have the resources to narrow this polling gap, we could hand Senate control straight back to Mitch McConnell.**
With a grassroots team this strong, I know that if we dig deep, we _will_ flip Florida blue. Point-blank, friend: That means hitting my fundraising goal. **It's truly the only path we have to fighting back against GOP megadonors.**

name: Doug White (personal)
subject: something I need to talk to you about
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DOUG WHITE FOR CONGRESS
body:
Friends,

First, I want to thank you for your support over the last few months. Unlike my opponents who are backed by special interests and wealthy corporate donors, I rely on people like you to run this campaign. I am extremely grateful that you have decided to engage in this fight.

Together, we are laying the foundation for a better future for all our families by rejecting ultra-rich politicians like Dan Newhouse, who have repeatedly failed to represent our interests in Congress.

There’s no better example of this than when Newhouse voted against the historic infrastructure bill – which would create jobs, lower child poverty rates, make critical investments in infrastructure like broadband and take the first steps towards a clean energy future.

I talked about these priorities in a recent Zoom. I received strong feedback. Many in the district share my disappointment at Newhouse’s failure to confront or even acknowledge the urgent challenges we face in WA-04.

The reality is that our economy is struggling. Families are in distress. The threat climate change poses to our community and the livelihood of farmers across the region is dire.

Rural communities like ours can no longer be ignored.

As we scale up our campaign in the next few weeks, I’d like to keep in closer contact so that I know where you stand on these issues. Will you share what your top priorities are now so that I can ensure they are addressed?

TAKE THE SURVEY [ https://secure.ngpvan.com/T4zJbpQc6EixLCabu852EA2]
Please take this opportunity to weigh in with your priorities so that I can bring the leadership WA-04 needs and deserves now. I can’t do this without you.

I’ll be in touch,

Doug

PAID FOR BY DOUG WHITE FOR CONGRESS

Doug White for Congress
PO Box 9674
Yakima, WA 98909
United States

Doug White is running to represent Washington’s 4th Congressional District in Congress. To support his campaign, make a one-time donation [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dwfooter?refcode=footer&amount=25] or sign on as a monthly recurring donor [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dwfooter?refcode=footer&amount=25&recurring=true] .

Email is the best way for our grassroots movement to stay in touch, but if you need to, you can unsubscribe here: unsubscribe: https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/f56db7ec-e289-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a/8c493aa8-178a-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzUwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YzQ5M2FhOC0xNzhhLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qR81NLcc6Dh4l_2jNIz3YX13E9YaMaAVWKewYGt3YU4=&id=109942110 .

Do you want to help build the power we need to send Doug to Congress? The question is simple: Will you support a proven, America First leader for Ohio?
| [**NO**](http://links.janetimkenforohio.com/u/click?_t=000ad8e780e94cdcabbe48134b2314da&_m=f2fadee5231248299556df3b8fd2799a&_e=eJQZY0mO5_G6xEgbMYzuaqdRPsmahIWcVe3E8AAIp5lfDHt-WT3GK-7ieHDivdTROXDJK8kWtMkCBSObxj0qUHTFqBEy18K2sDUahRIvmhv0Ob-t8N7N519s37TvCQzZiLFjnqfurtdbQa4FDcsCxjBlkZ6n5WQISX1_iaU1JlMaEwrFMTwxJVRlWhX0oaQya5c9GRGTA2vG_x6GozJLRapqWvwaa3_RZ82uiFtu23P_odz5OA9H8u6rCujwLrbUW05JrVukVB9FeL44HyB5vBOY8rhkKabBuKw-fucZMwh6YtsSaJvOLvn3ZtRzZvvkTP7nS-Hr4QiajC17DJxm2bLqp1fhTutQclo2E4CVKE83ej3xKtyX6q8ckUaXGUko6BUSxpWqiLsBOq6AYlhJScl3xvfJhUZTCtkEityPmrIelLC-sVjQUrdd9W8yifKn56EIiMa2DczWr5bRONNzCtkIhvPsE2INgWnAyizXesx6CqEkhdXG53p57XZQAHaMpVz3WQjsjtZtPyIlt8aYyu_cR6RZmfVmEqqzquIIbb8%3D)

Peter,

The Democrats spent four years trying to stop President Trump from getting anything accomplished for the American people. Now, President Biden and Democrats in Congress are of the mindset that forcing through legislation on party-line votes is the way to go.

That just doesn’t fly. In Congress, our mandate from the American people is simple: Don’t do anything dumb. Democrats haven’t gotten the memo.

**Democrats have the narrowest congressional majority in the last 50 years, yet they’re acting as if they have a supermajority**.

Clearly Pelosi, Schumer, and Biden don’t remember what happened in 2010 after they went rogue and passed Obamacare without a single Republican vote. Need a reminder? **Republicans picked up 63 seats in the House and flipped the majority.**

Democrats are at it once again. They’ve added more than $2 trillion to our national debt in just twelve months and they’re eyeing an additional $3 trillion in spending in the coming months - with zero plans to negotiate with Republicans.

[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=50736e5e30214171939d904dc8f1f1b2&_e=a-Fo92P6SPc7JuDiRf5foDK29n8sRpqyshkp2Mwq8di2Kl_JwGxZse2AbKkrVufduiz7uzOzxNkJVsyXVFItbkm0nm_CF9u3jO6hkqys1fDx3llASm7BC6HuQwyJVy3fglr_dIN-HaIKCHjfp2syWFNTa9WiNa3JVlMjJUvk409ittZmoaNPNKjdWAq5h6wNZNlXeE5oPx4qSD5oZeDufI6sa4CBVLjGLQ4UZCwJOLqg8EXB8tdir-GfG0aiMKRL6w1vohUhWRxoHGOh4yWdskFNlD65np0FiokUwxb1CAeZXMarnnXyowtAnN_OHI2Iox9BNOuzr2JHLF4uJlGjC1c2WFySmKKUmUVHu96pjKPKA6xmiNpNiXdRqC_0Tw2pgslBuvw0U0u_TdcUdTtKHR0kCqLpFVl9S8Wq_xjjd8B-hP3fYPO9mucHAkIQ85Ve6maTqNMAiXP7TYR1syAljDS4j-EFRqB0jmIIPdOeAmwKW7XWjABh-cxQbBkGLotp6YdJ5tsiBt-qLzw1OWrfbw%3D%3D)
That’s a mistake.

I’m writing today because we must start now to win a Conservative majority in Congress. **[We only need a few more Conservatives in the House to put the Democrats in the minority and prevent the Biden administration from doing more damage to our nation](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=50736e5e30214171939d904dc8f1f1b2&_e=a-Fo92P6SPc7JuDiRf5foDK29n8sRpqyshkp2Mwq8di2Kl_JwGxZse2AbKkrVufduiz7uzOzxNkJVsyXVFItbkm0nm_CF9u3jO6hkqys1fDx3llASm7BC6HuQwyJVy3fglr_dIN-HaIKCHjfp2syWFNTa9WiNa3JVlMjJUvk409ittZmoaNPNKjdWAq5h6wNZNlXeE5oPx4qSD5oZeDufI6sa4CBVLjGLQ4UZCwJOLqg8EXB8tdir-GfG0aiMKRL6w1vohUhWRxoHGOh4yWdskFNlD65np0FiokUwxb1CAeZXMarnnXyowtAnN_OHI2ISejUOYQkpn1apbcQrgU5abt7OPfP5ptwsoE5BdpBjWzkK9G5bZw051a2iUFv3r-EhdaPJ0incqg0aA2Lql3r-0KE8CUEvQZmnJdMZFKq8Tdx0yEkqVqVsA4keoLmFo5y1LsZkhB2514D8-L9cVSqwaAYNaRWo5hKIYZxKPrVu5ysE3stprV1OKJPNiDRtX6Dzm7FZ7XDJeUKj3oUPnvJPA%3D%3D)**.

While the election may not be this month – **we must begin the groundwork for a successful campaign cycle. TODAY**.

A couple of months ago we sent around a petition calling for **[100,000 conservatives to join our “2022 comeback team”](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=50736e5e30214171939d904dc8f1f1b2&_e=a-Fo92P6SPc7JuDiRf5foDK29n8sRpqyshkp2Mwq8di2Kl_JwGxZse2AbKkrVufduiz7uzOzxNkJVsyXVFItbkm0nm_CF9u3jO6hkqys1fDx3llASm7BC6HuQwyJVy3fglr_dIN-HaIKCHjfp2syWFNTa9WiNa3JVlMjJUvk409ittZmoaNPNKjdWAq5h6wNZNlXeE5oPx4qSD5oZeDufI6sa4CBVLjGLQ4UZCwJOLqg8EXB8tdir-GfG0aiMKRL6w1vohUhWRxoHGOh4yWdskFNlD65np0FiokUwxb1CAeZXMarnnXyowtAnN_OHI2ISYFTLcvEyo8Wv7CDsAHBLr2MNcvmROvCSrFfGc487kQN3tFQasMRO4Eg56gryqZ0jYxryEvudP_ubyTclVrey8w5RRbXtXGknP4s46topp4QXzI5MuPWs2KmJ-23n8Dfy0vVmE7qKZzG0qnY4bXf4CgUD-oLFFAY3sX3r-cZEyEGfR5OB1HxCcNgM6lHSWpYjKM7Bu_LaA7gHKqbttPvBw%3D%3D)** in an effort to ensure we have the right people in place to take back Congress this November. In the end, we came up short by 13,000 signatures.

We’re still looking for the additional 13,000 signatures and **we’ve set a goal of finding them by the time President Biden gives his State of the Union address on Tuesday, March 1st**.

He just returned from visiting the southern border to see first hand the chaos and devastation that the Democrats’ open-border policies have caused. Now, he needs us to stand with him and fight to restore law and order at our southern border. It’s supposed to be the federal government’s job to enforce our laws and secure our nation's borders. Yet because the Biden administration has totally neglected to do its job to secure our border, states like Texas and even Kansas have had to step in to help and to deal with the consequences. It’s a total disaster! This is why we need more leaders like Derek Schmidt who will enforce our nation’s laws and protect our national security. After the Trump administration made so much headway in just a few years to improve our border security, the Biden administration seems determined to throw away all of the progress that we made. That’s why it’s so important that Kansas elects Derek Schmidt to be our next Governor. Derek is endorsed by President Trump and by many law enforcement leaders because he understands the importance of law and order and will do whatever he can to promote our safety and security. Thanks for all of your support, friend. – Team Schmidt | | PAID FOR BY DEREK SCHMIDT FOR KANSAS, INC., KELLY ARNOLD, TREASURER. | | | ---|---|---

name: Peter Welch
subject: re: Affordable Health Care
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WELCH FOR VERMONT
body:
Add your name to send a message: it’s time to lower the cost of prescription drugs
# [](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/144?t=2&akid=100%2E61531%2EqxWvWh)
Hello,
I once got a letter from a Vermonter who said, "I have a choice between paying for something I cannot afford, or risking a loss that I could never endure." Lifesaving drugs or health care aren’t helpful if Americans can’t afford them. Enough is enough. Every American has a right to affordable health care.
For the past 15 years, I’ve fought as Vermont’s Congressman to deliver relief for communities who aren’t afforded this right — and with your support I’ll continue to be on the front lines in the fight to cut the skyrocketing cost of prescription drugs and health care for all Americans.
For far too long pharmaceutical and insurance companies have had an iron grip on pricing life-saving and life-extending care options. Big Pharma has exercised far too much influence over the very treatments that can save lives. Instead of acting, we’ve seen lawmakers sit on the sidelines and decline to provide the urgent solutions communities need.
[**That’s why we’re asking: what would lowered health care costs mean to you and your family? Click here and let us know.**](https://act.welchforvermont.com/signup/em-health-care-story-share?source=em_20220208_p_p_healthcare&t=3&akid=100%2E61531%2EqxWvWh)
There are many common sense steps Congress can take to ease the burden of the cost of care. We can empower Medicare to negotiate lower drug prices, work to limit annual price increases, and ensure everyone has access to the care they need no matter where they live.
I’m proud to be in this fight with all of you. I’ll never stop fighting for patients, families, and communities to make sure this system works for people it’s supposed to serve.
[**So please, click here and let us know what lowering the cost of health care would mean for you and your family.**](https://act.welchforvermont.com/signup/em-health-care-story-share?source=em_20220208_p_p_healthcare&t=4&akid=100%2E61531%2EqxWvWh)
It’s time we bring relief to millions of people. Thanks for sharing your story and joining me in this fight.
Peter

---
| [DONATE ](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pwfv-em-22feb?refcode=em_20220208_p_p_healthcare&refcode2=100_61531_qxWvWh&akid=100%2E61531%2EqxWvWh)
---

Friend,

When I was in the White House, America had a President who put our Nation FIRST every single day. For the first time in a long time, power was taken from Washington and given BACK to the American People.

Unfortunately, Joe Biden and the rest of the Washington SWAMP are working overtime to undo everything my administration accomplished. _Mark my words, America will be put FIRST again, but only with the help of my most loyal supporters._

You've always been a trusted ally, Friend, which is why I want to offer you something very exclusive.

clean_body: He asked about you Friend, Did you see my father's last email? He offered YOU the chance to get your name on the OFFICIAL 2022 TRUMP DONOR WALL. This is a once-in-a-lifetime opportunity, Friend. I really shouldn't be doing this, but I'm going to hold your spot until 11:59 PM TONIGHT. After that, I cannot guarantee you'll have another chance. Thank you, Donald Trump Jr. \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Donald J. Trump Date: February 7, 2022 To: Friend, When I was in the White House, America had a President who put our Nation FIRST every single day. For the first time in a long time, power was taken from Washington and given BACK to the American People. Unfortunately, Joe Biden and the rest of the Washington SWAMP are working overtime to undo everything my administration accomplished. Mark my words, America will be put FIRST again, but only with the help of my most loyal supporters. You've always been a trusted ally, Friend, which is why I want to offer you something very exclusive. This is the year we TAKE AMERICA BACK from the Left, soI 've decided to dedicate a wall at my office for a select group of donors who choose to step up at this critical time. I want to give you PRIORITY ACCESS to get your name permanently engraved on theOfficial 2022 Trump Donor Wall. Space is extremely limited. This could be your only chance. I want you to be a part of history with me, Friend. I promise I will never stop fighting to put AMERICA First. I need you to stand with me so that we canSAVE AMERICA. Can I count on you? Thank you, and God Bless you, Donald J. Trump 45th President of the United States Paid for by Save America JFC, a joint fundraising committee of Save America and Make America Great Again PAC. name: Team Jayapal
subject: “If Biden Cancels Student Loans, This Will Happen Next”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
Student loan debt is an economic, social, and racial justice issue.
#
Peter, when we saw this headline in Forbes, we already had our answers ready.
[](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/9938?refcode=em20220209-1019&%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=1019%2E420207%2EvCTw4B)
Here’s what will happen:
1. Immediate financial relief for more than 42 million Americans
2. At least $108 billion infused into our economy
3. 1.2 million new jobs created annually

Student loan debt is an economic, social, and racial justice issue. Canceling it would mean a measure of relief and justice for so many, plus a boon to the economy.
[**Can you chip in $3 to fuel Pramila’s advocacy for student loan debt relief? If Pres. Biden takes action, we’ll see relief for millions, jobs, and economic stimulus.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/9938?refcode=em20220209-1019&%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=1019%2E420207%2EvCTw4B)
**[Chip in $3](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/9938?refcode=em20220209-1019&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=1019%2E420207%2EvCTw4B)**
Pramila is advocating for President Biden to take action to alleviate the student loan debt that so many people are struggling with, and that disproportionately impacts Black and brown folks.
We know canceling student loan debt will help the economy. We know it will provide hope to young people across this country and it is the right thing to do. And it's something that is universally popular, not just with Democrats, but with independents and Republicans.
[**Fuel Pramila’s fight to cancel student loan debt today with a donation of $3 or anything at all. With one swipe of the pen, Pres. Biden can deliver relief and jobs to millions of people.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/9938?refcode=em20220209-1019&%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=1019%2E420207%2EvCTw4B)
We can, and must, get this done.
In solidarity,
Team Jayapal

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20220209-1019-footer&t=23&refcode2=1019_420207_vCTw4B&akid=1019%2E420207%2EvCTw4B)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.

* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=25&akid=1019%2E420207%2EvCTw4B)

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Feenstra for Congress
body:
| | |
| [](http://link.email.dynect.net/link.php?DynEngagement=true&H=OOqfIEhTnDRB7pDKfOt4m%2FgpcU1iklFfFC4lCEtK3R%2F56icbAP86Nl%2FIEEVM8kvRXDtA6e52qhzl5yI1qPwriPGl1FH1YbaKSp%2F%2FWU6bJTM8stvXeVXa1Q%3D%3D&G=0&R=https%3A%2F%2FXXBSG4ZTGNA.hatchbuck.com%2FTrackLinkClick%3FID2%3D1gaxd7zIjr9QXM-u2B--0dqBklXRzvPR668bUZo6xcYxdUYcjZbdKAZI8grA3VBE0&I=20220209221630.0000006f5364%40smtp-ad3-42-phx&X=MHwxMjcwODUwOjI0NzQ3NTYyMzc7MXwxMjcwODUxOjE5NTI0NDE2Mjs%3D&V=3&S=xiKq8ASigbkaBEprB9844q5T1J0IM0NWokwCfRkFm5s)
---
| Dear Friend,
---
| America’s Olympic athletes are the envy of the world once again. We should be proud and supportive of them and all they’ve accomplished. But they should never have been put in this position, competing in a nation whose tyranny, cruelty, and aggression have been on full display during this year’s Winter Olympics. The Biden Administration may not have sent any diplomats, but by sending our athletes to compete in this year’s Olympics, the President has given the Chinese regime what it wants–legitimacy in the eyes of the world. Americans across the country must believe the same thing as ratings for these Winter Games have plummeted. I want to know what you think. clean_body: | | | | | Dear Friend, | America’s Olympic athletes are the envy of the world once again. We should be proud and supportive of them and all they’ve accomplished. But they should never have been put in this position, competing in a nation whose tyranny, cruelty, and aggression have been on full display during this year’s Winter Olympics. The Biden Administration may not have sent any diplomats, but by sending our athletes to compete in this year’s Olympics, the President has given the Chinese regime what it wants–legitimacy in the eyes of the world. Americans across the country must believe the same thing as ratings for these Winter Games have plummeted. I want to know what you think. Randy | | | | Paid for by Feenstra for Congress Not interested in email updates from Feenstra For Congress? To ensure delivery to your inbox please add to your address book.641 2nd St., Hull, IA 51239

name: Fetterman for U.S. Senate
subject: The Trump team behind David McCormick’s campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
Three Trump staffers are now supporting David McCormick’s campaign.
#
Derek, we have some interesting news...
ANOTHER Trump staffer has thrown their support behind one of our GOP opponents. Let’s do a quick roundup, shall we?
**Trump Staffers Supporting David McCormick**
Hope Hicks, Donald Trump’s Senior Adviser
Stephen Miller, author of Donald Trump’s racist Muslim ban
And now Mike Pompeo, Donald Trump’s Secretary of State
Three too many if you ask us. 🤨
But that’s who we’re up against, Derek. And if we’re going to flip this Senate seat and maintain our Democratic Senate majority, we need all hands on deck so we don’t have a Trump-lite Republican representing the great Commonwealth of Pennsylvania.
**[Please, rush a donation of $5 or more today to support our fight against Trumpism and to protect our Democratic majority by sending John Fetterman to the U.S. Senate. Any and all donations help when we’re up against self-funding millionaires like McCormick and Dr. Oz.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/43787?refcode=ema20220209-4525&t=1&akid=4525%2E434096%2EbPDtPB)**
[****](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/43787?refcode=ema20220209-4525&t=2&akid=4525%2E434096%2EbPDtPB)
_Our opponent David McCormick and Donald Trump._
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/43787?refcode=em20220209-4525&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=4525%2E434096%2EbPDtPB)**
Thank you for your support, Derek. We couldn’t do it without you.
More soon,
Fetterman for U.S. Senate
**[Contribute Now](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/43787?refcode=em20220209-4525&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=4525%2E434096%2EbPDtPB)**

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20220209-4525-footer&t=23&refcode2=4525_434096_bPDtPB&akid=4525%2E434096%2EbPDtPB)**
---

Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.

In the end, we came up short by 13,000 signatures.

**[We’re still looking for the additional 13,000 signatures and we’ve set a goal of finding them by the time President Biden gives his State of the Union address on Tuesday, March 1st.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=97174088dea94135b8f8f6c782868416&_e=MUNuzc-XsAkpN6gvjoA9sU4JZPdanHb8g4VejsdXzAy_TuMP1O1sFRI65AXC2zPelnuxEpDmpZnRNHYG9ObSXoRHc35ta-txSbAzxK79GUe1tlSsrQmPo2Yw-gV09d83pOsNx4ZVzWdT1tzgNRdY4t14VIEe1a4YyMVbS_shWjJN-YFltf4l9meESlgnfm0fH1YoNxXc8g0rb4LeIij1P3fJUB8EtuSVu6N0F9XTL3yvd7vQSGX8X-b56g-Ik80Pmtkb5-CTtX_jMl_409I03a0rD7tZ6MfsmZhuCw_NkRwpKWJfuSIfQf0azvmpMZ92C1eXio_KYZf7ZDVk6VQOyGFU9pjdh0h3vSY34yoM0iqug1t_miL2rCsWjZut51A-Un6JPeCtUrSgZIdigAGx6Z431mtWAYZ3TjoE1Oz72JLeN_7hxgtVio8jZ68CEyvIgd7KY9VxwE1Uuc5IvxjeKvkWiX2SlaUJmv53BmDFMhO4E_9284z3RwxVlcY722LkucnoXpYkMnzco50DkRdzLg%3D%3D)**

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=97174088dea94135b8f8f6c782868416&_e=MUNuzc-XsAkpN6gvjoA9sU4JZPdanHb8g4VejsdXzAy_TuMP1O1sFRI65AXC2zPelnuxEpDmpZnRNHYG9ObSXoRHc35ta-txSbAzxK79GUe1tlSsrQmPo2Yw-gV09d83pOsNx4ZVzWdT1tzgNRdY4t14VIEe1a4YyMVbS_shWjJN-YFltf4l9meESlgnfm0fH1YoNxXc8g0rb4LeIij1P3fJUB8EtuSVu6N0F9XTL3yvd7vQSGX8X-b56g-Ik80Pmtkb5-CTtX_jMl_409I03a0rD7tZ6MfsmZhuCw_NkRwpKWJfuSIfQf0azvmpMZ9228g6i3XT9bnLoNfRlLOy45EajBa-2fV7iUzUbd86ef7WIyE9s0zA__sb05bjxdGdMifbo334nrwRaEiI5lkPYEhTmNVVzllVv2M0mn3D152z_JlSjMsD5Su4LMn1fedWlj3yMVm2OuWtyciMtPmcaHj7qbs9OAYVEQoXoZveM1lw9FefdCt4dPb0nzJnXCztdIgJvR2UkeZvx3o-w-1Kyw%3D%3D)
Fellow American,

The Democrats spent four years trying to stop President Trump from getting anything accomplished for the American people. Now, President Biden and Democrats in Congress are of the mindset that forcing through legislation on party-line votes is the way to go.

That just doesn’t fly. In Congress, our mandate from the American people is simple: Don’t do anything dumb. Democrats haven’t gotten the memo.

**Democrats have the narrowest congressional majority in the last 50 years, yet they’re acting as if they have a supermajority**.

Clearly Pelosi, Schumer, and Biden don’t remember what happened in 2010 after they went rogue and passed Obamacare without a single Republican vote. Need a reminder? **Republicans picked up 63 seats in the House and flipped the majority.**

Democrats are at it once again. They’ve added more than $2 trillion to our national debt in just twelve months and they’re eyeing an additional $3 trillion in spending in the coming months - with zero plans to negotiate with Republicans.

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=97174088dea94135b8f8f6c782868416&_e=MUNuzc-XsAkpN6gvjoA9sU4JZPdanHb8g4VejsdXzAy_TuMP1O1sFRI65AXC2zPelnuxEpDmpZnRNHYG9ObSXoRHc35ta-txSbAzxK79GUe1tlSsrQmPo2Yw-gV09d83pOsNx4ZVzWdT1tzgNRdY4t14VIEe1a4YyMVbS_shWjJN-YFltf4l9meESlgnfm0fH1YoNxXc8g0rb4LeIij1P3fJUB8EtuSVu6N0F9XTL3yvd7vQSGX8X-b56g-Ik80Pmtkb5-CTtX_jMl_409I03a0rD7tZ6MfsmZhuCw_NkRwpKWJfuSIfQf0azvmpMZ92euFjIatBsS-dpmvkDZyZ2IY8jREp3CixUfN0rRFzFxxyjmTNl_GRjqvOp-uiZYcsaJqAspqCa4Lqgt4At8usPEXTeE_147vTvr873ltpMpKROvYSmiXB1zZ0EDJGQC6pihXBcCP9nIeXncw4Ddz9E5dYbqsHHOIukOo8w-nDgoyUDDBDwrDzp4cWzEF3zPObdJaBe6C2848pILOKPTA7Ug%3D%3D)
That’s a mistake.

I’m writing today because we must start now to win a Conservative majority in Congress. **[We only need a few more Conservatives in the House to put the Democrats in the minority and prevent the Biden administration from doing more damage to our nation](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=97174088dea94135b8f8f6c782868416&_e=MUNuzc-XsAkpN6gvjoA9sU4JZPdanHb8g4VejsdXzAy_TuMP1O1sFRI65AXC2zPelnuxEpDmpZnRNHYG9ObSXoRHc35ta-txSbAzxK79GUe1tlSsrQmPo2Yw-gV09d83pOsNx4ZVzWdT1tzgNRdY4t14VIEe1a4YyMVbS_shWjJN-YFltf4l9meESlgnfm0fH1YoNxXc8g0rb4LeIij1P3fJUB8EtuSVu6N0F9XTL3yvd7vQSGX8X-b56g-Ik80Pmtkb5-CTtX_jMl_409I03a0rD7tZ6MfsmZhuCw_NkRwpKWJfuSIfQf0azvmpMZ92qNxp4mmcQDGNeLztGClqDycTLeXrAOpLcxzIb705vUDsF5_cPP1N7zgaHOwMPLRcoHJ0_KnwvAsBwoVC3-HRuWyJNlYSPyfNhUrVaq9ZoiQDZlpxALffKUZhN-I9UbakzOgEXkfiO_IS39a75XahicAjM4rBP7yLFOh9SP1TJ10Kit9bqTI-m01Ezy8-O8QRscO0SARi0d8eZn-96xbtgA%3D%3D)**.

While the election may not be this month – **we must begin the groundwork for a successful campaign cycle. TODAY**.

A couple of months ago we sent around a petition calling for **[100,000 conservatives to join our “2022 comeback team”](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=97174088dea94135b8f8f6c782868416&_e=MUNuzc-XsAkpN6gvjoA9sU4JZPdanHb8g4VejsdXzAy_TuMP1O1sFRI65AXC2zPelnuxEpDmpZnRNHYG9ObSXoRHc35ta-txSbAzxK79GUe1tlSsrQmPo2Yw-gV09d83pOsNx4ZVzWdT1tzgNRdY4t14VIEe1a4YyMVbS_shWjJN-YFltf4l9meESlgnfm0fH1YoNxXc8g0rb4LeIij1P3fJUB8EtuSVu6N0F9XTL3yvd7vQSGX8X-b56g-Ik80Pmtkb5-CTtX_jMl_409I03a0rD7tZ6MfsmZhuCw_NkRwpKWJfuSIfQf0azvmpMZ92x_6zckUuCMMBLCSwwo253nOkF6SgxxJuKbHXj8NzChSiRNQfBSCBHFn_dpIVMSMwL1J4fvbvap7ZM4mwmTaNoaSax2fMrqIMMASZRooM-Nco0Vi0BAG7IsNb863gpA4PmdbGlkee_TWW3zZ3Pe0SO9qHr_g2hHJ04TqDBKdzV3YB4I0CVmHBHIbm6ndoNZ43u0NgJxIZGVYQBb0wTyDD9Q%3D%3D)** in an effort to ensure we have the right people in place to take back Congress this November. In the end, we came up short by 13,000 signatures.

We’re still looking for the additional 13,000 signatures and **we’ve set a goal of finding them by the time President Biden gives his State of the Union address on Tuesday, March 1st**.

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=97174088dea94135b8f8f6c782868416&_e=MUNuzc-XsAkpN6gvjoA9sU4JZPdanHb8g4VejsdXzAy_TuMP1O1sFRI65AXC2zPelnuxEpDmpZnRNHYG9ObSXoRHc35ta-txSbAzxK79GUe1tlSsrQmPo2Yw-gV09d83pOsNx4ZVzWdT1tzgNRdY4t14VIEe1a4YyMVbS_shWjJN-YFltf4l9meESlgnfm0fH1YoNxXc8g0rb4LeIij1P3fJUB8EtuSVu6N0F9XTL3yvd7vQSGX8X-b56g-Ik80Pmtkb5-CTtX_jMl_409I03a0rD7tZ6MfsmZhuCw_NkRwpKWJfuSIfQf0azvmpMZ92sk2OFbSGPPyOuTe8Smp4xhqaZ_9NmMPQbquzHngkWnRxXtEh_KqL0TuxzODoZO7Br7bt-WWHQuOr-DvDMdvQGPmSbqDPbN435PdZhsT8bU_rjdCAVvnGQWMVvJnIbrMNmwA0Xgel9TnLR1M-4HtxZ6czx57019olnT_SAGnJIrJZU8J8h3uL0sa7sGka4RLfTDysappgrvaYpGIAFkQIAw%3D%3D)

Retiring Nancy Pelosi as Speaker and uniting all Conservatives to stop radical legislation from Joe Biden and the far left begins today. **[We’re counting on you to join our cause.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=97174088dea94135b8f8f6c782868416&_e=MUNuzc-XsAkpN6gvjoA9sU4JZPdanHb8g4VejsdXzAy_TuMP1O1sFRI65AXC2zPelnuxEpDmpZnRNHYG9ObSXoRHc35ta-txSbAzxK79GUe1tlSsrQmPo2Yw-gV09d83pOsNx4ZVzWdT1tzgNRdY4t14VIEe1a4YyMVbS_shWjJN-YFltf4l9meESlgnfm0fH1YoNxXc8g0rb4LeIij1P3fJUB8EtuSVu6N0F9XTL3yvd7vQSGX8X-b56g-Ik80Pmtkb5-CTtX_jMl_409I03a0rD7tZ6MfsmZhuCw_NkRwpKWJfuSIfQf0azvmpMZ92-ub7kfcCHT_9qaC6hX2beLipdosh-aDZ4_00roiBcNIp78QvDPb67q-boMFNarRwFhz0--kswdSzqB-354cSCiHvoILlj0ZK-iV7F1lTqBv3WB0Udk4M4Fb2cABxv9lj0005naPsWEYpQGMooNZ73xC7wTUnHnoLK4uCm8_UUNn1n8xschrBL4bY55Ci1LSUY21yaM63c1N3i5JVuEd3ug%3D%3D)**

Without control of the House or the Senate, Republicans are inherently at a disadvantage. Right now, we can’t block Democrats’ pet projects from making their way into COVID relief legislation or stop Biden from halting construction on the Keystone Pipeline.

The American people made it clear in the November 2020 election – they elected Conservatives in nearly every close House race in the country. **[Now we must expand the map and take back the majority](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=97174088dea94135b8f8f6c782868416&_e=MUNuzc-XsAkpN6gvjoA9sU4JZPdanHb8g4VejsdXzAy_TuMP1O1sFRI65AXC2zPelnuxEpDmpZnRNHYG9ObSXoRHc35ta-txSbAzxK79GUe1tlSsrQmPo2Yw-gV09d83pOsNx4ZVzWdT1tzgNRdY4t14VIEe1a4YyMVbS_shWjJN-YFltf4l9meESlgnfm0fH1YoNxXc8g0rb4LeIij1P3fJUB8EtuSVu6N0F9XTL3yvd7vQSGX8X-b56g-Ik80Pmtkb5-CTtX_jMl_409I03a0rD7tZ6MfsmZhuCw_NkRwpKWJfuSIfQf0azvmpMZ92SFsmf865pf8ReY8Z3gOQVcvjSaIiluUz2TSGXRERa6Y4nfCi1FIfnXtQaH4JSmxKdtu-Ts0T0eYoRLQo9OI9GIoR6kbuBY8jcu1MXnYeImSO8QAFEGTD2ALWWy2PYq7HLhcQ4mMfTBDrVJlDuB8xtzYx26bMsOF3lKx4kboODMpAMYtNAPIseQG4hVjvUbGjtiHiRQ-MgJiCq4Kk_UpqmA%3D%3D)**.

We hope you will be among the first to sign up and signal your commitment to return a Conservative majority in the House.

Thank you for your support.

For freedom,

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=97174088dea94135b8f8f6c782868416&_e=MUNuzc-XsAkpN6gvjoA9sU4JZPdanHb8g4VejsdXzAy_TuMP1O1sFRI65AXC2zPelnuxEpDmpZnRNHYG9ObSXoRHc35ta-txSbAzxK79GUe1tlSsrQmPo2Yw-gV09d83pOsNx4ZVzWdT1tzgNRdY4t14VIEe1a4YyMVbS_shWjJN-YFltf4l9meESlgnfm0fH1YoNxXc8g0rb4LeIij1P3fJUB8EtuSVu6N0F9XTL3yvd7vQSGX8X-b56g-Ik80Pmtkb5-CTtX_jMl_409I03a0rD7tZ6MfsmZhuCw_NkRwpKWJfuSIfQf0azvmpMZ92-itPG_Q6rxj2MIsq_G8HGMHGg2Qxc3QEdZtExn7GWHAzzAwmucmpMyc2m78Do5JrM4H-KlTEqnME0ZfdndZKrs6jnF9Di7QweTZo-dPZeaqRWSjPIFdQ-vNFbWTcmfvWYspcOT-ikLrqZb4_u6xpBNDz318KQQ6ZJu_J0hhy0T_nkhq1M9EXDW4ak1SGSWp8ScBSz3-Ocu4FkSL8xDC9AQ%3D%3D)

body:
I'm often told that because I'm black, I shouldn't be a Republican. I'm working daily to change the belief that Black Americans MUST be Democrats |
No longer want to receive emails from Rod? You may [unsubscribe here](http://links.bestamericanow.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_s=d2a28736e4744b14ab806585199bdd52&_t=oI-6rw8PvnEy96LpE-GKwBFmTzv1vlHTBcJnfYGxQcjwT9XYGguUlOkkfdStRy8nyyawZDKK7SxvSAy2Q4sV2kYnEgBc8kemiT8XZfy9IeHoQsbCMOWiha0tSYeKpk0JP5LpddS6w_mZMhjllOUXfXT1OHPwMvWoc1YHGc2bKnA%3D).

[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=d2a28736e4744b14ab806585199bdd52&_e=vay1l4YubRY3mAOkhvROTCKzfVjiXJFxE4btbk-DgwkJc8sz4k64v7DTJCGIreFgYN3Agln4F38SyxywN_lecZY8FwaEBwz9zvA6cIiU5_1vZu0p261dHsZUiL0r3e70JxbB60Ip0-TmRa-VE_XFZjyvsVjRFfntfuaaO4Yil8hv35SBtvaKJC3wtUEVT1mEANxv9-gOZuz6UMumIE7RXRfXZgKQGXni0056HDq2x7hAxVSprGPOzi_uw7qJVXLLmYE3UykEq3ieWuQ4rIstnV_7TPFc0Z3Kwu0qamPtTCH4ng3hYQ67Cnxpt83MES0G4j7Yp_lcvrfgKJaDfJGysoFeeGfiHzqgdv3mOpz2ioEntjHwX-OTIcH7iKWyqr7OB5EWA0acgrem6hIf94QnfPJy7UnC4VZeIOjj3e6LVS2HMxBysM363ZJ4JsGrVW8Lno8hyLcBxIl9Q7tiD7Nr5BiYpA0Tq3qCDfi9wMbJokHYYKx6bpMgGwCOrp1ERIKx)

Peter,

My name is Rod Dorilás and I’m a candidate for Congress in Florida’s 21st Congressional District.

My opponent isn’t too terribly famous or even a household name. But she’s a Democrat who I’m not convinced still believes that the American Dream is alive.

**[All I'm asking of you today is that you please take a 10-30 seconds to watch my introduction video that I recorded several months ago and believe is worth the watch](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=d2a28736e4744b14ab806585199bdd52&_e=vay1l4YubRY3mAOkhvROTCKzfVjiXJFxE4btbk-DgwkJc8sz4k64v7DTJCGIreFgYN3Agln4F38SyxywN_lecZY8FwaEBwz9zvA6cIiU5_1vZu0p261dHsZUiL0r3e70JxbB60Ip0-TmRa-VE_XFZjyvsVjRFfntfuaaO4Yil8hv35SBtvaKJC3wtUEVT1mEANxv9-gOZuz6UMumIE7RXRfXZgKQGXni0056HDq2x7hAxVSprGPOzi_uw7qJVXLLmYE3UykEq3ieWuQ4rIstnV_7TPFc0Z3Kwu0qamPtTCEfe24JoshL6e7wcSPvo10PWAumeVFu3a6OJM8kfE9vca12KnZCjYnXQcWqL9cf9JidwU46jxsHHShWQZ2X_usWAUxAWHegnrliMkvLf4wAQ1UhXK8PSv24CJ8i1gGNYxunpo80vlANZZ6vBRB8f2TfqO2RnfuG2UYRtbSP-u9cQWzYliy8HG6ZopnWWY06XPJI6zT0PBRC1ghXhxCSeBor)**.

As a first generation American, I thank god every day the American Dream is alive and well.

[**WATCH MY LAUNCH VIDEO >> **](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=d2a28736e4744b14ab806585199bdd52&_e=vay1l4YubRY3mAOkhvROTCKzfVjiXJFxE4btbk-DgwkJc8sz4k64v7DTJCGIreFgYN3Agln4F38SyxywN_lecZY8FwaEBwz9zvA6cIiU5_1vZu0p261dHsZUiL0r3e70JxbB60Ip0-TmRa-VE_XFZjyvsVjRFfntfuaaO4Yil8hv35SBtvaKJC3wtUEVT1mEANxv9-gOZuz6UMumIE7RXRfXZgKQGXni0056HDq2x7hAxVSprGPOzi_uw7qJVXLLmYE3UykEq3ieWuQ4rIstnV_7TPFc0Z3Kwu0qamPtTCHux0DMa56-OvOw973qU9C-Yzrs5xBJFGO0BoXy9QDs2Z8onVN1V0wTc2k1wCahchb3uoKmQeUs52Cv9RgwGXljuAMrTK4IcNFDjk6QGbAcJMqhF_aqR1bKT_o0oGRz0DBYx1xDnFPLBePwF2Jxu7x9rlsqpSaMWB45qskES9ShxRB5LQK9kAVvHxKtz-ERk1mewIKZi9LMO05hsdh5XRJq)
A few key facts about myself that you may find informative:
* I’m a first generation American, the son of two Haitian immigrants. **My parents immigrated to the United States to pick crops** in order to provide for our family.
* At 17, I enlisted in the Navy and served six years planning and executing the deployment of Tomahawk Land Attack Missiles.
* I attended Syracuse University Law School on the G.I. Bill.
* Following graduation, **I worked for the Department of Commerce under President Trump** (the honor of a lifetime!).

[**WATCH MY LAUNCH VIDEO TODAY >> **](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=d2a28736e4744b14ab806585199bdd52&_e=vay1l4YubRY3mAOkhvROTCKzfVjiXJFxE4btbk-DgwkJc8sz4k64v7DTJCGIreFgYN3Agln4F38SyxywN_lecZY8FwaEBwz9zvA6cIiU5_1vZu0p261dHsZUiL0r3e70JxbB60Ip0-TmRa-VE_XFZjyvsVjRFfntfuaaO4Yil8hv35SBtvaKJC3wtUEVT1mEANxv9-gOZuz6UMumIE7RXRfXZgKQGXni0056HDq2x7hAxVSprGPOzi_uw7qJVXLLmYE3UykEq3ieWuQ4rIstnV_7TPFc0Z3Kwu0qamPtTCH6YgIUmOj3YZviMBEo7uVZUiEzoiH7V1QFJ_16_awYaMYd5edv1xMlqPSyzif22_iizhTLaDRrUjnc281pAj0mhF7k29ZV2G5aVTL18xFOWIobvZu2DKGKdpC7Wv4WzHGgVOfF3RfONzKiTRckB5hMH5mDEnXfQJN9axBnNxvULKq_2P6R_yaHBEVdDOb1boHUXxQrh0-Coc3rffnHKJmP)
**With 435 members, the U.S. House is bigger than any one person**. However, my own personal story has taught me that just about anything in America is possible if you work hard enough. I believe that maxim still rings true today, and that’s why I’m asking you to send a few dollars to my campaign if you can.

For Country,

Rod Dorilás

| _**ABOUT ROD**_

Rod Dorilás is the first-generation son of two immigrants from Haiti. His father immigrated to Florida to pick crops, and eventually his parents went on to own a small business. From a young age, his parents instilled in him the importance of hard work, integrity, and service.

At age 17, Rod enlisted in the United States Navy, serving for six years as a Petty Officer Second Class and Assistant Engagement Control Officer onboard the USS The Sullivans, stationed in Jacksonville. There, he was responsible for planning and executing the deployment of Tomahawk Land Attack Missiles on the Ballistic Missile Defense destroyer.

Upon completion of his military service, Rod attended law school at Syracuse University with the help of the G.I. Bill. After graduating, he served in President Trump's Administration in the U.S. Department of Commerce. While serving our great nation, Rod fought tirelessly to ensure that American families and businesses weren't taken advantage of by China.

Rod is a true public servant and is dedicated to serving his country and community. He wants to ensure that every American, through hard work and perseverance, can achieve the American Dream. Rod is running for Congress in South Florida to continue Trump's America First Agenda and defend our country from the Radical Left.

name: Lisa Scheller
subject: This is the Dem’s solution to the opioid epidemic?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scheller for Congress, Inc
body:
These words do not feel real as I write them to you. The Biden Administration is giving out free crack pipes in the name of “racial equity.” Take a... Peter, These words do not feel real as I write them to you. The Biden Administration is giving out free crack pipes in the name of “racial equity.” Take a look for yourself: **There’s only one thing to be said here: We are in a national crisis and the Democrats are treating this as a laughing matter... ** At a time when overdoses are the number ONE cause of death in America, the Radical Left is combating it by giving out free crack pipes. I’m in recovery from heroin addiction for more than 39 years, and I was anonymous for most of those 39 years because of the stigma associated with being in recovery. It’s time we END the stigma and provide proper help to those who are struggling–and providing crack pipes is the LEAST impactful way to do so. Take a look at some of the stats: ❌ Opioids are killing nearly 200 Americans every single day. ❌ The town where I grew up has a rate of addiction twice the national average. ❌ More than 4,000 Pennsylvanians died of overdoses last year - that’s more than died in car crashes. It’s reasons like this I’m confident we need to fire Nancy Pelosi and Susan Wild once and for all. **[Will you help me do just that by chipping in only $7 today to help FLIP PA-07 and get our nation’s priorities back on track?](http://links.schellerforcongress.com/u/click?_t=2618b931a0124f90ba4a51cf9fda2c48&_m=b4611bd1b0c84157b67f50f83e42ca0c&_e=vNM7KeWzT20gNKrHOm38o9hJrn-W9ulMm7M-qJVftqMZ5k2zjEJK6rg76nJd8lJYFXv49IP9gdLK_Pclr5GZA3hBCMqoXkiRQNANlP3hSBbqLJtePqqGqeVVlc4tl9ZgY25RJevaykVkoLD7z2nQPxHJ9A3hyRd4B3N0gnzQkSyb1ArFyPOtqVwn93zSVLiDdzwLUYi9cuy-HhUBrdLhkt3ney872Q7cF2MshZuq8Nq5tp7LN09x6OK_kKH6eU-eDV5ieCQHbGzE-uhngrmtt9-_RWvf2TpNHmavy-9Sd2Kw655t6iPtb2tkBqvEJv_6fcURPnedTf2qmI8EExahQy8T-b_-YP5afcaEJjZ_RrJ6u8f4SX0pjQ_OQ78z-z0VyI5liEIMjxKlnQ-ejvnk-MmgE0OFxGTLyqB_cuE1SynlWVMGfncshdNUlK59ysuwrfaond0BoR23FM7TcTXisl7_bZOJHIQHAp0Gtv8IAbC-ohLKNxbiCFgkASVyXLhDVLN8vOXeCV9KoDD30M6Oyg%3D%3D)** [**HELP DEFEND OUR NATION**](http://links.schellerforcongress.com/u/click?_t=2618b931a0124f90ba4a51cf9fda2c48&_m=b4611bd1b0c84157b67f50f83e42ca0c&_e=vNM7KeWzT20gNKrHOm38o9hJrn-W9ulMm7M-qJVftqMZ5k2zjEJK6rg76nJd8lJYFXv49IP9gdLK_Pclr5GZA3hBCMqoXkiRQNANlP3hSBbqLJtePqqGqeVVlc4tl9ZgY25RJevaykVkoLD7z2nQPxHJ9A3hyRd4B3N0gnzQkSyb1ArFyPOtqVwn93zSVLiDdzwLUYi9cuy-HhUBrdLhkt3ney872Q7cF2MshZuq8Nq5tp7LN09x6OK_kKH6eU-eDV5ieCQHbGzE-uhngrmtt9-_RWvf2TpNHmavy-9Sd2Kw655t6iPtb2tkBqvEJv_6J8N7FoMiLT9YOM408hEmEPxnmdST3JQ7zvdbmCFORwiXaMWJvG021hZ2qcvIxhUk8N_y5pd7EeKEMMdS2VSdAGRyjxnjrCSqN3m22S3nE_arYIAWkHwKRfBgx6HclqBAqQYYqS0aeIuXu6xpplx8NI-OIjLoL-mKnLZoJNrvta51pqJ3CCZ7MsuYY2auyiwMkwcn84SvPk3l0GO2yCngvg%3D%3D) [**FIRE NANCY PELOSI AND SUSAN WILD**](http://links.schellerforcongress.com/u/click?_t=2618b931a0124f90ba4a51cf9fda2c48&_m=b4611bd1b0c84157b67f50f83e42ca0c&_e=vNM7KeWzT20gNKrHOm38o9hJrn-W9ulMm7M-qJVftqMZ5k2zjEJK6rg76nJd8lJYFXv49IP9gdLK_Pclr5GZA3hBCMqoXkiRQNANlP3hSBbqLJtePqqGqeVVlc4tl9ZgY25RJevaykVkoLD7z2nQPxHJ9A3hyRd4B3N0gnzQkSyb1ArFyPOtqVwn93zSVLiDdzwLUYi9cuy-HhUBrdLhkt3ney872Q7cF2MshZuq8Nq5tp7LN09x6OK_kKH6eU-eDV5ieCQHbGzE-uhngrmtt9-_RWvf2TpNHmavy-9Sd2Kw655t6iPtb2tkBqvEJv_6jgmUzmjELjKyDeTZGRWqOtKM4Pj5la40qaPcO9sP8siOdugG5Ykdec0kDJdmSh2FQYe6P3sZ2T2MqK0zxA6fj_-VFnRQxzvzRvAluIK2v_UZDuWBG7eupReYeYB2KlNdDQtVYqKYYYswHhMEO7Q_PPt6eWWD4dKPUR_3AAxIR4a-8w3qMftsyeB_MkBdjYXv4Mr2RZKe4ApKlvw8imZDDg%3D%3D) As I watch the opioid epidemic unfold in our country, I can’t stay on the sidelines any further. I put a face on what recovery looks like, I’m helping to end the stigma around drug addiction, and help those who need it most. It’s why I started Hope & Coffee, a coffee shop and meeting place that seeks to bring persons recovering from alcohol and drug dependency back to the job market. Addiction can happen to anyone. We should be striving to promote jobs, bring programs to help addicts, and end the stigma around drug addiction, NOT handing out free crack pipes from the federal government in communities of color. Peter, thank you for your continued support. It’s time we fire Pelosi and Wild once and for all. Lisa Scheller, Candidate for Congress Paid for by Scheller for Congress, Inc. clean_body: These words do not feel real as I write them to you. The Biden Administration is giving out free crack pipes in the name of “racial equity.” Take a... Peter, These words do not feel real as I write them to you. The Biden Administration is giving out free crack pipes in the name of “racial equity.” Take a look for yourself: There’s only one thing to be said here: We are in a national crisis and the Democrats are treating this as a laughing matter... At a time when overdoses are the number ONE cause of death in America, the Radical Left is combating it by giving out free crack pipes. I’m in recovery from heroin addiction for more than 39 years, and I was anonymous for most of those 39 years because of the stigma associated with being in recovery. It’s time we END the stigma and provide proper help to those who are struggling–and providing crack pipes is the LEAST impactful way to do so. Take a look at some of the stats: ❌ Opioids are killing nearly 200 Americans every single day. ❌ The town where I grew up has a rate of addiction twice the national average. ❌ More than 4,000 Pennsylvanians died of overdoses last year - that’s more than died in car crashes. It’s reasons like this I’m confident we need to fire Nancy Pelosi and Susan Wild once and for all. As I watch the opioid epidemic unfold in our country, I can’t stay on the sidelines any further. I put a face on what recovery looks like, I’m helping to end the stigma around drug addiction, and help those who need it most. It’s why I started Hope & Coffee, a coffee shop and meeting place that seeks to bring persons recovering from alcohol and drug dependency back to the job market. Addiction can happen to anyone. We should be striving to promote jobs, bring programs to help addicts, and end the stigma around drug addiction, NOT handing out free crack pipes from the federal government in communities of color. Peter, thank you for your continued support. It’s time we fire Pelosi and Wild once and for all. Lisa Scheller, Candidate for Congress Paid for by Scheller for Congress, Inc.

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: Fox News is taking notice
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter, Fox News is
taking notice:

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/93491?refcode=em20220209-21903&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=21903%2E1203867%2EwPdTio ]Fox News headline reads AOC and Justice Democrats target a handful of
moderate Democrats in 2022 midterms

That’s right (though, we’d usually call those “moderates” corporate
Democrats). We’re challenging longtime incumbents who cater to the
interests of their corporate donors, because it’s time for progressive
fighters to upend the status quo in the Democratic Party.

Right now, corporate PAC money flows into the hands of out-of-touch
incumbents and the DNC from Big Oil, Wall Street, Big Pharma, health
insurance executives, credit card companies, big banks, and the list goes
on. The result? Policies that we desperately need, like Medicare for All
and a Green New Deal, get pushed aside for what corporate lobbyists want.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/93491?refcode=em20220209-21903&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=21903%2E1203867%2EwPdTio ]These primaries are about changing those politics by expanding the
Squad and sending more Justice Democrats to D.C. Can you chip in
$3 to help us oust corporate Democrats and elect Justice
Democrats?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/93491?refcode=em20220209-21903&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=21903%2E1203867%2EwPdTio ]Contribute $3

body:
Can you take our quick, 1 question survey and tell us which issues are on your mind?
#

About once a month, we like to check in with a few of Alex’s top supporters to get your read on the most important issues facing our country.
Today is the day, and you’ve been selected to share your thoughts.
[**Can you take our quick, 1 question survey and tell us which issues are on your mind?**](https://act.alex-padilla.com/signup/February-Issue-Survey-2022-em/?source=em220209-1-30&refcode2=634.159979.u-msxs&akid=634%2E159979%2Eu-msxs)
**[TAKE THE SURVEY](https://act.alex-padilla.com/signup/February-Issue-Survey-2022-em/?source=em220209-1-30&refcode2=634.159979.u-msxs&akid=634%2E159979%2Eu-msxs)**
Even if you’ve taken our survey before, we’re hoping you’ll do it once again today, because we’re not only looking at the results of each individual survey, but also the change over time.
Your input today will help Alex as he works in the Senate, and it will help us build a stronger campaign — one that’s focused on the priorities of our movement and that has what it takes to reach folks in every corner of the state and get them involved.
**So please, use this link to take our 1 question survey and let Alex know where you stand:**
[**https://act.alex-padilla.com/go/February-Survey**](https://act.alex-padilla.com/signup/February-Issue-Survey-2022-em/?source=em220209-1-30&refcode2=634.159979.u-msxs&akid=634%2E159979%2Eu-msxs)
Thank you in advance for making your voice heard!
\- Team Padilla
**[TAKE THE SURVEY](https://act.alex-padilla.com/signup/February-Issue-Survey-2022-em/?source=em220209-1-30&refcode2=634.159979.u-msxs&akid=634%2E159979%2Eu-msxs)**

name: OcasioCortez.com
subject: A moral hazard
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
Forgiveness is the right thing to do.
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20220209-2780-header&t=1&akid=2780%2E2526796%2E7EJ4rW)
We cannot understate the economic danger and risk for our country if President Biden does not make the emergency pause on federal student loan payments permanent.
Forcing millions of borrowers to restart student debt payments would not only threaten our country’s economic recovery, but would be unethical in light of the economic hardships faced by this generation.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20220209?refcode=em20220209-2780-P_FND_ANO_HDL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&refcode2=2780_2526796_7EJ4rW&akid=2780%2E2526796%2E7EJ4rW)
Forgiveness is the right thing to do. **And that’s why Alexandria spoke to _Yahoo!_ Finance about keeping up the pressure on President Biden to go further on his campaign promise and permanently forgive at least $50,000 in federal student loan debt for the millions of Americans crushed under this economic burden.**
[If you agree that it’s time for President Biden to keep his promise to cancel student loan debt — please help our movement keep up the pressure on his administration by making a contribution of any amount today in support of permanent student debt cancellation.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20220209?refcode=em20220209-2780-P_FND_ANO_HDL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&refcode2=2780_2526796_7EJ4rW&akid=2780%2E2526796%2E7EJ4rW)
**[Donate now »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20220209?refcode=em20220209-2780-P_FND_ANO_HDL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&refcode2=2780_2526796_7EJ4rW&akid=2780%2E2526796%2E7EJ4rW)**
**Your contribution will send a powerful message that the country is united in demanding student loan debt cancellation NOW.**
President Biden made student loan forgiveness a major talking point while campaigning for President in 2020, yet he continues to put off keeping his promise.
At such a delicate point in our country’s post-COVID economic recovery, to restart payments that are essentially the size of a mortgage payment, sometimes even larger, on a generation that has already been so devastated by rising costs of education, rent, and homes and stagnated wages, could throw off balance what is already a very fragile recovery.
**Federal student loan payments are set to re-start on May 1 — so we have no time to lose.**
[If you’re able to, please make a contribution right now to help our movement keep up the pressure on President Biden to do not only what’s in the best interest of our nation’s economic recovery, but also what is morally right: cancel student loan debt permanently.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20220209?refcode=em20220209-2780-P_FND_ANO_HDL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=23&refcode2=2780_2526796_7EJ4rW&akid=2780%2E2526796%2E7EJ4rW)
Thank you,
Team AOC

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20220209?refcode=em20220209-2780-P_FND_ANO_HDL&t=24&refcode2=2780_2526796_7EJ4rW&akid=2780%2E2526796%2E7EJ4rW)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20220209-2780-P_FND_ANO_HDL&t=25&akid=2780%2E2526796%2E7EJ4rW)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=26&akid=2780%2E2526796%2E7EJ4rW) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=27&akid=2780%2E2526796%2E7EJ4rW) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=28&akid=2780%2E2526796%2E7EJ4rW)
---|---|---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.

name: CharlesBooker.org
subject: Good and bad news (we’ll start with the good)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
[1]Charles Booker

Peter, we have
good news and bad news.

We’ll start with the good — there’s been a lot of it lately. We just had
our biggest fundraising month since we launched our campaign, thousands of
y’all have given your personal endorsements, and we announced a state-wide
road trip to meet voters where they’re at. It’s clear that Kentucky is
hungry for the meaningful, progressive change our campaign is fighting
for.

But here’s the bad news: Rand Paul raised nearly $4 million in the final
quarter of 2021. His friends in Wall Street, Big Pharma, and the fossil
fuel industry are ramping up their donations to make sure Rand stays in
office.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-20220209?refcode=em20220209-1553&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&refcode2=1553_346206_eqdhUL&akid=1553%2E346206%2EeqdhUL ][IMG]

We’re gaining momentum — but it’s clear we urgently need to amp up our
fundraising so we can compete with Rand’s dark money and prepare for every
attack the GOP has planned this election. [ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-20220209?refcode=em20220209-1553&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&refcode2=1553_346206_eqdhUL&akid=1553%2E346206%2EeqdhUL ]Can you please make
a $5 donation right now to power our grassroots funded
campaign?

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-20220209?refcode=em20220209-1553&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&refcode2=1553_346206_eqdhUL&akid=1553%2E346206%2EeqdhUL ]Contribute $5

Charles always says that if you have faith just the size of a mustard
seed, you can move a mountain.

This grassroots movement has already moved mountains in the past months
since we launched our historic movement to replace Rand Paul. Together,
we’re proving what’s possible when we fight hard, fight together, and
fight for our common values.

The harsh truth is that Democrat fundraising totals across the country
have been dwarfed by far-right candidates like Rand Paul who are peddling
dangerous conspiracies. It’s urgent we catch up and make sure that we
continue hitting our monthly goals so we can do the organizing work that’s
necessary to win this race.

Rand Paul can spend as much as he wants in attack ads, but we know that’s
no match for the very real, personal conversations our volunteers are
having with voters in Kentucky. At the end of the day — our bold,
progressive agenda is the message that motivates voters.

We might not have as much money as Rand’s team has in the bank, but we
just need enough to power our voter outreach programs and make sure our
volunteers have the resources they need to keep organizing.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-20220209?refcode=em20220209-1553&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1023&refcode2=1553_346206_eqdhUL&akid=1553%2E346206%2EeqdhUL ]Can you chip in even just $5 to help us take our
campaign to the next level? We’re relying on donations from emails like
this one to make sure we have the resources to power our voter outreach
and organizing efforts in every corner of Kentucky.

Keep fighting,

Team Booker

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20220209-1553-footer&t=1024&refcode2=1553_346206_eqdhUL&akid=1553%2E346206%2EeqdhUL

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1553%2E346206%2EeqdhUL

Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Paid for by Booker for Kentucky

It’s clear that Kentucky is hungry for the meaningful, progressive change our campaign is fighting for. But here’s the bad news: Rand Paul raised nearly $4 million in the final quarter of 2021. [ ][IMG] We’re gaining momentum — but it’s clear we urgently need to amp up our fundraising so we can compete with Rand’s dark money and prepare for every attack the GOP has planned this election. [ ]Can you please make a $5 donation right now to power our grassroots funded campaign? [ ]Contribute $5 Charles always says that if you have faith just the size of a mustard seed, you can move a mountain. This grassroots movement has already moved mountains in the past months since we launched our historic movement to replace Rand Paul. Together, we’re proving what’s possible when we fight hard, fight together, and fight for our common values. The harsh truth is that Democrat fundraising totals across the country have been dwarfed by far-right candidates like Rand Paul who are peddling dangerous conspiracies. It’s urgent we catch up and make sure that we continue hitting our monthly goals so we can do the organizing work that’s necessary to win this race. Rand Paul can spend as much as he wants in attack ads, but we know that’s no match for the very real, personal conversations our volunteers are having with voters in Kentucky. At the end of the day — our bold, progressive agenda is the message that motivates voters. We might not have as much money as Rand’s team has in the bank, but we just need enough to power our voter outreach programs and make sure our volunteers have the resources they need to keep organizing. [ ]Can you chip in even just $5 to help us take our campaign to the next level? We’re relying on donations from emails like this one to make sure we have the resources to power our voter outreach and organizing efforts in every corner of Kentucky. Keep fighting, Team Booker Contribute to Charles Booker:
