clean_body: We need American Energy to remain AMERICAN | | | | | | | | | Dear Patriot, Pennsylvania is home to a world-class energy industry that creates prosperity and opportunities for students, families, and the economy. This energy means national security, a stronger workforce, and lower energy costs. Unfortunately, we have a president who does not believe in the power of American energy and is, in fact, trying to outsource our energy so we have to rely on our foreign adversaries. All while trying to score social justice points with the Radical Left in the name of Climate Change. We need American Energy to remain AMERICAN, rather than relying on Middle Eastern countries and Russia to power our nation. God Bless, Congressman Fred Keller (Taking the values of PA's 12th District to Congress) Paid for by Fred Keller for Congress Our mailing address is: PO Box 61893 Harrisburg, PA 17106 Don't want to receive our emails anymore?

name: Morgan Harper HQ
subject: Enough is enough
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Morgan Harper for Ohio
body:
If we’re going to achieve bold, progressive change we need bold progressive AND diverse representation.
# [](https://act.morganharper.org/go/1512?refcode=em20220209-638-footer-ak&t=2&akid=638%2E90090%2E2Dlid5)
Happy Black History Month.
This February at Morgan Harper HQ, we’re thinking about the leaders who came before us and what WE can do to carry on their legacy and their fight.
**There are currently no Black women in the Senate.** Yep, in 2022, not only are there are no Black women in the U.S. Senate, but Ohio has never sent a woman, or a Black person, to represent the state in the Senate —**this is simply unacceptable**.
Black women have so often led the charge to create critical change in our country, and yet they are still absent from some of our country’s highest offices.
**We must do everything we can to correct these systemic injustices, and we can start by electing Morgan Harper.**
[**_This Black History Month, can we count on you to chip in $5 to ensure we have the resources we need to finally elect the FIRST Black woman from Ohio to the U.S. Senate?_**](https://act.morganharper.org/go/25274?t=3&akid=638%2E90090%2E2Dlid5)**
**
**[Contribute $5](https://act.morganharper.org/go/25280?refcode=em20220209-638&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=638%2E90090%2E2Dlid5)**
Tim Ryan has been in office for almost two decades and under his watch we’ve seen absolutely no investment in Ohio’s Black communities. It’s time that we have a representative who will work for the people, _all people,_ not just for corporations and the ultra-wealthy.
It’s long past time for a Black woman to represent Ohio in the Senate. **_[Can you help us make it happen by donating $5, or whatever you can afford, to send Morgan to the Senate and build a future we can be proud of?](https://act.morganharper.org/go/25274?t=23&akid=638%2E90090%2E2Dlid5)_ **
Thank you for your time and support,
Morgan Harper HQ
**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mh-email?refcode=em20220209-638-footer&t=24&refcode2=638_90090_2Dlid5&akid=638%2E90090%2E2Dlid5)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/mh4oh/) | [](https://twitter.com/mh4oh) | [](https://www.instagram.com/mh4oh)
Email us: contact@morganharper.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch, so thank you for reading to the end. Grassroots donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Morgan Harper for Ohio, P.O. Box 15008, Columbus, OH 43215.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.morganharper.org/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.morganharper.org/sign/personal_info/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.morganharper.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=25&akid=638%2E90090%2E2Dlid5)

Paid for by Morgan Harper for Ohio

Friend,

Bill de Blasio was the **worst mayor** in America.

He insulted cops, turned New York City into a crime, rat, and violence-infested mess, mandated mass lockdowns and school closures, and focused more on woke causes than making the city of 8 million people function.

**_Now, he’s considering a run for Congress!_** **_[And if he runs, he will try to oust Nicole Malliotakis – a founder of the Freedom Force and defender of capitalism who we NEED in Congress!](http://links.nicolemalliotakis.com/u/click?_t=759a85d1cba743719e64e2569e23c9b8&_m=0c2096359b614be08cf8ec8ee836feca&_e=GTgPx6sP_LrQ_POc2UcxMu_EOnN87Fam0O_yXuwFDfmEVV9NwkTpiAABxJPTvbW-RmOPxW-N2aNStKE8-9fDxH5A4mkOctRV1u7VJGh4KhNv04OyxeYIiJ5QFLmEFU-bGBcNFdfHEMrHwM-NbaJLnavdC1_b6SBtvbUdzACWcd_0GLB-RsUtyGh1qLADEUkS4idvB2vnK8Fbq15PjeBtFRJImkb2MgKIoBlX2gTi-unQbcan8CNpUeqDz_2s2RGTlkSxlTojlTvJ5yMPCCWzLJCRnnYJxFIc-hUIBwRoMdQrj2BGtpJkiN0EuKWVk-os5sFKrp8lKx3SxaSPZC6YizTcIVbMNN9VgBFORRGx7Jf0LmYQPYW86qtIkwL4pwcikJAMUERgw4FSfYqIrIdBqLf_dRizoE8LOibstou0AbDUZ0bavBbLLZwpcJsZuiv_zZvOjfdsVmcpyJmaSRWxmqhXQV9gWAszbBGJPDP3AtA%3D)_** | [**Stop Bill de Blasio Now**](http://links.nicolemalliotakis.com/u/click?_t=759a85d1cba743719e64e2569e23c9b8&_m=0c2096359b614be08cf8ec8ee836feca&_e=GTgPx6sP_LrQ_POc2UcxMu_EOnN87Fam0O_yXuwFDfmEVV9NwkTpiAABxJPTvbW-RmOPxW-N2aNStKE8-9fDxH5A4mkOctRV1u7VJGh4KhNv04OyxeYIiJ5QFLmEFU-bGBcNFdfHEMrHwM-NbaJLnavdC1_b6SBtvbUdzACWcd_0GLB-RsUtyGh1qLADEUkS4idvB2vnK8Fbq15PjeBtFRJImkb2MgKIoBlX2gTi-unQbcan8CNpUeqDz_2s2RGTlkSxlTojlTvJ5yMPCCWzLJhC6zRu2nnNIX0ZjlsAIjbZagybMid6U-rRGnUmOX5kc2ugIK76p8fIVvQnEF8Y44nRKEB-KoCu1MpxXzJ5_S8A-4MbOunVAv5x3PIzBqovHUeDCnbesdn8D3lvOU2E-gBqYaWfWkqgJMvsWR0oB4p_qt6dj3M3RjM40ILqqHNuBxts6AlgrQw8XeB-5DU4rNgRqRAAsjWS-kovil1XiOk%3D)

We cannot let limousine liberal Bill de Blasio continue his reckless spree of bad ideas and destructive policies.

Unlike de Blasio, Nicole Malliotakis is actually fighting FOR the people of her district. Every single day she’s working to pass legislation that strengthens her community and provides opportunities for people to thrive. And she’ll keep doing that if she’s reelected in November.

But she needs your help. Nicole is the only Republican member of the New York City congressional delegation. If we lose her, we lose all hope of getting NYC back on track.

**[That is why I am urging every person who sees this to rush any contribution you can to Nicole Malliotakis’ campaign right away!](http://links.nicolemalliotakis.com/u/click?_t=759a85d1cba743719e64e2569e23c9b8&_m=0c2096359b614be08cf8ec8ee836feca&_e=GTgPx6sP_LrQ_POc2UcxMu_EOnN87Fam0O_yXuwFDfmEVV9NwkTpiAABxJPTvbW-RmOPxW-N2aNStKE8-9fDxH5A4mkOctRV1u7VJGh4KhNv04OyxeYIiJ5QFLmEFU-bGBcNFdfHEMrHwM-NbaJLnavdC1_b6SBtvbUdzACWcd_0GLB-RsUtyGh1qLADEUkS4idvB2vnK8Fbq15PjeBtFRJImkb2MgKIoBlX2gTi-unQbcan8CNpUeqDz_2s2RGTlkSxlTojlTvJ5yMPCCWzLHABGkbAJXB8XFtJw_FDEhkMlIKijfEvO2_VFSzgoKHslfWBP9xBtnzJYVWNZVMV2yt9KmXq8SRUADml2zDJLPCogYg6PayRClj7Vtt7DIOENjdVR1A4W5x1YjSZI3vlkcOZn0Z7BslgcIRySXr482XFrgtt6u4dHIUquFRGZXzbga0yWlG0qUWnyJDXsOAUp-fAU1xY-_nkCKsLL_YzwWE%3D)** [**Support Rep.
